name: Abhorrent Apparition
desc: You imbue a terrifying visage onto a gourd and toss it ahead of you to a spot of your choosing within range. cada criatura within 15 pies of that spot recibe 6d8 daño psíquico and becomes asustado of you for 1 minuto; a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría halves el daño and negates the fright. A criatura asustado in this way repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
material: a gourd with a face carved on it

name: Abrupt Hug
desc: You or the criatura taking the Attack action can immediately make an unarmed strike. In addition to dealing damage with the unarmed strike, the objetivo can grapple the criatura it hit with the unarmed strike.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you or a creature within 30 feet of you takes an Attack action

name: Absolute Command
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You can control a construct you have built with a challenge rating of 6 or less. You can manipulate objects with your construct as precisely as its construction allows, and you perceive its surroundings through its sensory inputs as if you inhabited its body. The construct uses the caster's competencia bonus (modified by the construct's Fuerza and Destreza scores). You can use the manipulators of the construct to perform any number of skill-based tasks, using the construct's Fuerza and Destreza modifiers when using skills based on those particular abilities. Your body remains immobile, as if paralizado, for the duration of the spell. The construct must remain within 100 pies of you. If it moves beyond this distance, the spell immediately ends and the caster's mind returns to his or her body.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using higher-level espacios de conjuro, you may control a construct with a challenge rating 2 higher for each slot level you use above 4th. The construct's range also increases by 10 pies for each slot level.

name: Accelerando
desc:
You play a complex and quick up-tempo piece that gradually gets faster and more complex, instilling the objetivos with its Velocidad. You cannot cast another spell through your spellcasting focus while concentrating on this spell.

Until the spell ends, objetivos gain cumulative benefits the longer you maintain Concentración on this spell (including the turn you cast it).

* **1 ronda:** Double Velocidad.
* **2 rondas:** +2 bonus to AC.
* **3 rondas:** ventaja on Destreza saving throws.
* **4 rondas:** An additional action each turn. This action can be used only to take the Attack (one weapon attack only), Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object action.

When the spell ends, a objetivo can't move or take actions until after its next turn as the impact of their frenetic Velocidad catches up to it.
higher_level: You may maintain Concentración on this spell for an additional 2 rondas for each slot level above 4th.

name: Accelerate
desc: Choose up to three willing criaturas within range, which can include you. For the duration of the spell, each objetivo’s walking Velocidad is doubled. Each objetivo can also use a acción adicional on each of its turns to take the Dash action, and it has ventaja on Destreza saving throws.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can affect one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a toy top

name: Acid Arrow
desc: A shimmering green arrow streaks toward a objetivo within range and bursts in a spray of ácido. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 4d4 daño de ácido immediately and 2d4 daño de ácido at the end of its next turn. On a miss, the arrow splashes the objetivo with ácido for half as much of the initial damage and no damage at the end of its next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño (both initial and later) increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: Powdered rhubarb leaf and an adder's stomach.

name: Acid Arrow
desc:
A jet of ácido streaks towards the objetivo like a hissing, green arrow. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro.

On a hit the objetivo recibe 4d4 daño de ácido and 2d4 ongoing daño de ácido for 1 ronda. On a miss the objetivo recibe la mitad del daño.
higher_level: Increase this spell's initial and ongoing damage by 1d4 per slot level above 2nd.

name: Acid Gate
desc:
You create a portal of swirling, acidic green vapor in an unoccupied space you can see. This portal connects with a objetivo destination within 100 millas that you are personally familiar with and have seen with your own eyes, such as your wizard’s tower or an inn you have stayed at. You and up to three criaturas of your choice can enter the portal and pass through it, arriving at the objetivo destination (or within 10 pies of it, if it is currently occupied). If the objetivo destination doesn’t exist or is inaccessible, the spell automatically fails and the gate doesn’t form.

Any criatura that tries to move through the gate, other than those selected by you when the spell was cast, recibe 10d6 daño de ácido and is teleported 1d100 × 10 pies in a random, horizontal direction. If the criatura makes a successful tirada de salvación de Inteligencia, it can’t be teleported by this portal, but it still recibe daño de ácido when it enters the ácido-filled portal and every time it ends its turn in contact with it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, you can allow one additional criatura to use the gate for each slot level above 7th.
material: a vial of ácido and a polished silver mirror worth 125 gp

name: Acid Rain
desc: You unleash a storm of swirling ácido in a cylinder 20 pies wide and 30 pies high, centered on a point you can see. The area is heavily obscured by the driving acidfall. A criatura that starts its turn in the area or that enters the area for the first time on its turn recibe 6d6 daño de ácido, or half as much damage if it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura recibe half as much damage from the ácido (as if it had made a successful tirada de salvación) at the start of its first turn after leaving the affected area.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 5th.
material: a drop of ácido

name: Acid Splash
desc: You hurl a bubble of ácido. Choose una criatura within range, or choose two criaturas within range that are within 5 pies of each other. A objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 1d6 daño de ácido.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Acid Splash
desc: A stinking bubble of ácido is conjured out of thin air to fly at the objetivos, dealing 1d6 daño de ácido.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Adjust Position
desc: You adjust the location of an aliado to a better tactical position. You move one willing criatura within range 5 pies. This movement does not provoke opportunity attacks. The criatura moves bodily through the intervening space (as opposed to teleporting), so there can be no physical obstacle (such as a wall or a door) in the path.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can objetivo an additional willing criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Afflict Line
desc:
You invoke the darkest curses upon your victim and his or her descendants. This spell does not require that you have a clear path to your objetivo, only that your objetivo is within range. The objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be cursed until the magic is dispelled. While cursed, the victim has desventaja on ability checks and saving throws made with the ability score that you used when you cast the spell. In addition, the objetivo’s firstborn offspring is also targeted by the curse. That individual is allowed a tirada de salvación of its own if it is currently alive, or it makes one upon its birth if it is not yet born when the spell is cast. If the objetivo’s firstborn has already died, the curse passes to the objetivo’s next oldest offspring.

**Ritual Focus.** If you expend your ritual focus, the curse becomes hereditary, passing from firstborn to firstborn for the entire length of the family’s lineage until one of them successfully saves against the curse and throws off your dark magic.
material: a statuette carved in the likeness of the victim worth 1,250 gp

name: Agonizing Mark
desc: You choose a criatura you can see within range to mark as your prey, and a ray of black energy issues forth from you. Until the spell ends, each time you deal damage to the objetivo it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, it falls derribado as its body is filled with torturous agony.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Aid
desc: Your spell bolsters your aliados with toughness and resolve. Choose up to three criaturas within range. Each objetivo's punto de golpe maximum and current puntos de golpe increase by 5 for the duration.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, a objetivo's puntos de golpe increase by an additional 5 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: A tiny strip of white cloth.

name: Aid
desc: You draw upon divine power, imbuing the objetivos with fortitude. Until the spell ends, each objetivo increases its punto de golpe maximum and current puntos de golpe by 5.
higher_level: The granted puntos de golpe increase by an additional 5 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Air Wave
desc: Your deft weapon swing sends a wave of cutting air to assault a criatura within range. Make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma against the objetivo. If you are wielding one weapon in each hand, your attack causa an additional 1d6 damage. Regardless of the weapon you are wielding, your attack causa daño cortante.
higher_level: The spell's range increases by 30 pies for each slot level above 1st.

name: Alarm
desc:
You set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Choose a door, a window, or an area within range that is no larger than a 20-pie cube. Until the spell ends, an alarm alerts you whenever a Tiny or larger criatura touches or enters the warded area. 

When you cast the spell, you can designate criaturas that won't set off the alarm. You also choose whether the alarm is mental or audible. A mental alarm alerts you with a ping in your mind if you are within 1 milla of the warded area. This ping awakens you if you are sleeping. An audible alarm produces the sound of a hand bell for 10 seconds within 60 pies.
material: A tiny bell and a piece of fine silver wire.

name: Alarm
desc:
You set an alarm against unwanted intrusion that alerts you whenever a criatura of size Tiny or larger touches or enters the warded area. When you cast the spell, choose any number of criaturas. These criaturas don't set off the alarm.

Choose whether the alarm is silent or audible. The silent alarm is heard in your mind if you are within 1 milla of the warded area and it awakens you if you are sleeping. An audible alarm produces a loud noise of your choosing for 10 seconds within 60 pies.
higher_level:
You may create an additional alarm for each slot level above 1st. The spell's range increases to 600 pies, but you must be familiar with the locations you ward, and all alarms must be set within the same physical structure. Setting off one alarm does not activate the other alarms.

You may choose one of the following effects in place of creating an additional alarm. The effects apply to all alarms created during the spell's casting.

Increased Duration. The spell's duration increases to 24 horas.

Improved Audible Alarm. The audible alarm produces any sound you choose and can be heard up to 300 pies away.

Improved Mental Alarm. The mental alarm alerts you regardless of your location, even if you and the alarm are on different planes of existence.

name: Alchemical Form
material: a vial of ácido, veneno, or alchemist's fuego

name: Ale-dritch Blast
desc: A stream of ice-frío ale blasts from your outstretched hands toward a criatura or object within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, it recibe 1d8 daño de frío and it debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be envenenado until the end of its next turn. A targeted criatura has desventaja on the tirada de salvación if it has drunk any alcohol within the last hora.
higher_level: el daño increases when you alcance higher levels: 2d8 at 5th level, 3d8 at 11th level, and 4d8 at 17th level.

name: Ally Aegis
desc: When you see an aliado within range in imminent danger, you can use your reacción to protect that criatura with a shield of mágico fuerza. Until the start of your next turn, your aliado has a +5 bonus to AC and is immune to daño de fuerza. In addition, if your aliado debe realizar a tirada de salvación against an enemigo’s spell that causa damage, the aliado recibe half as much damage on a failed tirada de salvación and no damage en una salvación exitosa. aliado aegis offers no protection, however, against daño psíquico from any source.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional aliado for each slot level above 6th.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when your ally is hit by an attack or is targeted by a spell that deals damage other than psychic damage

name: Alone
desc: You cause a criatura within range to believe its aliados have been banished to a different realm. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, or it treats its aliados as if they were invisible and silenced. The affected criatura cannot objetivo, perceive, or otherwise interact with its aliados for the duration of the spell. If one of its aliados hits it with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, the affected criatura can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends.

name: Alter Arrow’s Fortune
desc: You clap your hands, setting off a chain of tiny events that culminate in throwing off an enemigo’s aim. When an enemigo makes a ataque a distancia with a weapon or a spell that hits one of your aliados, this spell causes the enemigo to reroll the tirada de ataque unless the enemigo makes a successful tirada de salvación de Carisma. The attack is resolved using the lower of the two rolls (effectively giving the enemigo desventaja on the attack).
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy makes a ranged attack that hits
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Alter Self
desc:
You assume a different form. When you cast the spell, choose one of the following options, the effects of which last for the duration of the spell. While the spell lasts, you can end one option as an action to gain the benefits of a different one.

**Aquatic Adaptation.** You adapt your body to an aquatic environment, sprouting gills and growing webbing between your fingers. You can breathe underwater and gain a nadando Velocidad equal to your walking Velocidad.

**Change Appearance.** You transform your appearance. You decide what you look like, including your height, weight, facial features, sound of your voice, hair length, coloration, and distinguishing characteristics, if any. You can make yourself appear as a member of another race, though none of your statistics change. You also can't appear as a criatura of a different size than you, and your basic shape stays the same; if you're bipedal, you can't use this spell to become quadrupedal, for instance. At any time for the duration of the spell, you can use your action to change your appearance in this way again.

**Natural Weapons.** You grow claws, fangs, spines, horns, or a different natural weapon of your choice. Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 contundente, perforante, or daño cortante, as appropriate to the natural weapon you chose, and you are proficient with your unarmed strikes. Finally, the natural weapon is magic and you have a +1 bonus to the attack and damage rolls you make using it.

name: Alter Self
desc:
You use magic to mold yourself into a new form. Choose one of the options below. Until the spell ends, you can use an action to choose a different option.

* **Amphibian:** Your body recibe on aquatic adaptations. You can breathe underwater normally and gain a nadando Velocidad equal to your base Velocidad.
* **Altered State:** You decide what you look like.  
    
None of your gameplay statistics change but you can alter anything about your body's appearance, including but not limited to: your heritage, 1 pie of height, weight, clothing, tattoos, piercings, facial features, sound of your voice, hair style and length, skin and eye coloration, sex, and any other distinguishing features. You cannot become a criatura of a different size category, and your limb structure remains the same; for example if you're bipedal, you can't use this spell to become a quadruped. Until the spell ends, you can use an action to change your appearance.
* **Red in Tooth and Claw:** You grow mágico natural weapons of your choice with a +1 bonus to attack and damage. Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 contundente, perforante, or daño cortante of a type determined by the natural weapon you chose; for example a tentacle causa contundente, a horn causa perforante, and claws deal cortante.
higher_level:
When using a espacio de conjuro of 5th-level, add the following to the list of forms you can adopt.

* **Greater Natural Weapons:** el daño dealt by your natural weapon increases to 2d6, and you gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls with your natural weapons.
* **Mask of the Grave:** You adopt the appearance of a skeleton or zombie (your choice). Your type changes to undead, and mindless undead criaturas ignore your presence, treating you as one of their own. You don't need to breathe and you become immune to veneno.
* **Wings:** A pair of wings sprouts from your back. The wings can appear bird-like, leathery like a bat or dragon's wings, or like the wings of an insect. You gain a fly Velocidad equal to your base Velocidad.

name: Altered Strike
desc:
You briefly transform your weapon or fist into another material and strike with it, making a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma against a objetivo within your alcance.

You use your spellcasting ability for your attack and damage rolls, and your ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma counts as if it were made with a different material for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques no mágicos and damage: either bone, bronze, frío iron, steel, stone, or wood.
higher_level:
When you alcance 5th level, you can choose silver or mithral as the material. When you alcance 11th level, if you have the Extra Attack feature you make two melee weapon attacks as part of the casting of this spell instead of one. In addition, you can choose adamantine as the material.

When you alcance 17th level, your attacks with this spell deal an extra 1d6 damage.

name: Althea’s Travel Tent
desc: You touch an ordinary, properly pitched canvas tent to create a space where you and a companion can sleep in comfort. From the outside, the tent appears normal, but inside it has a small foyer and a larger bedchamber. The foyer contains a writing desk with a chair; the bedchamber holds a soft bed large enough to sleep two, a small nightstand with a candle, and a small clothes rack. The floor of both rooms is a clean, dry, hard-packed version of the local ground. When the spell ends, the tent and the ground return to normal, and any criaturas inside the tent are expelled to the nearest unoccupied spaces.
higher_level: When the spell is cast using a 3rd-level slot, the foyer becomes a dining area with seats for six and enough floor space for six people to sleep, if they bring their own bedding. The sleeping room is unchanged. With a 4th-level slot, the temperature inside the tent is comfortable regardless of the outside temperature, and the dining area includes a small kitchen. With a 5th-level slot, an unseen servant is conjured to prepare and serve food (from your supplies). With a 6th-level slot, a third room is added that has three two-person beds. With a slot of 7th level or higher, the dining area and second sleeping area can each accommodate eight persons.
material: a canvas tent

name: Ambush
desc: The forest floor swirls and shifts around you to welcome you into its embrace. While in a forest, you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks to Hide. While hidden in a forest, you have ventaja on your next Initiative check. The spell ends if you attack or cast a spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can affect one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st. The spell ends if you or any objetivo of this spell attacks or casts a spell.

name: Ambush Chute
desc:
You touch a wooden, plaster, or stone surface and create a passage with two trapdoors. The first trapdoor appears where you touch the surface, and the other appears at a point you can see up to 30 pies away. The two trapdoors can be wooden with a metal ring handle, or they can match the surrounding surfaces, each with a small notch for opening the door. The two trapdoors are connected by an extradimensional passage that is up to 5 pies wide, up to 5 pies tall, and up to 30 pies long. The trapdoors don't need to be on the same surface, allowing the passage to connect two separated locations, such as the two sides of a chasm or river. The passage is always straight and level for criaturas inside it, and the criaturas exit the tunnel in such a way that allows them to maintain the same orientation as when they entered the passage. No more than five criaturas can transit the passage at the same time.
  When the spell ends and the trapdoors disappear, any criaturas or objects still in the passage created by the spell are safely ejected to an unoccupied space nearest the end of the passage closest to them.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the length of the passage and the distance you can place the second trapdoor increases by 10 pies for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Amplify Gravity
desc: This spell intensifies gravity in a 50-pie-radius area within range. Inside the area, damage from falling is quadrupled (2d6 per 5 pies fallen) and maximum damage from falling is 40d6. Any criatura on the ground in the area when the spell is cast debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be knocked derribado; the same applies to a criatura that enters the area or ends its turn in the area. A derribado criatura in the area debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza to stand up. A criatura on the ground in the area moves at half Velocidad and has desventaja on Destreza checks and ataque a distancia rolls.
material: a piece of lead

name: Amplify Ley Field
desc: You create a faintly shimmering field of charged energy around yourself. Within that area, the intensity of ley lines you're able to draw on increases from weak to strong, or from strong to titanic. If no ley lines are near enough for you to draw on, you can treat the area of the spell itself as an unlocked, weak ley line.

name: Analyze Device
desc: You discover all mechanical properties, mechanisms, and functions of a single construct or clockwork device, including how to activate or deactivate those functions, if appropriate.
material: a set of clockworker’s tools

name: Ancestor’s Strength
desc: Choose a willing criatura you can see and touch. Its muscles bulge and become invigorated. For the duration, the objetivo is considered one size category larger for determining its carrying capacity, the maximum weight it can lift, push, or pull, and its ability to break objects. It also has ventaja on Fuerza checks.

name: Anchoring Rope
desc: You create a spectral lanyard. One end is tied around your waist, and the other end is magically anchored in the air at a point you select within range. You can choose to make the rope from 5 to 30 pies long, and it can support up to 800 pounds. The point where the end of the rope is anchored in midair can’t be moved after the spell is cast. If this spell is cast as a reacción while you are falling, you stop at a point of your choosing in midair and take no falling damage. You can dismiss the rope as a acción adicional.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can create one additional rope for every two slot levels above 1st. Each rope must be attached to a different criatura.
casting_time: 1 action, or 1 reaction that you take while falling

name: Ancient Shade
desc:
You grant the semblance of life and Inteligencia to a pile of bones (or even bone dust) of your choice within range, allowing the ancient spirit to answer the questions you pose. These remains can be the remnants of undead, including animated but unintelligent undead, such as skeletons and zombies. (Intelligent undead are not affected.) Though it can have died centuries ago, the older the spirit called, the less it remembers of its mortal life.

Until the spell ends, you can ask the ancient spirit up to five questions if it died within the past year, four questions if it died within ten years, three within one hundred years, two within one thousand years, and but a single question for spirits more than one thousand years dead. The ancient shade knows only what it knew in life, including languages. Answers are usually brief, cryptic, or repetitive, and the corpse is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if you are hostile to it or it recognizes you as an enemigo. This spell doesn’t return the criatura’s soul to its body, only its animating spirit. Thus, the corpse can’t learn new information, doesn’t comprehend anything that has happened since it died, and can’t speculate about future events.
material: burning candles of planar origin worth 500 gp

name: Angel Paradox
desc: The objetivo is bombarded with a fraction of energy stolen from some slumbering, deific source, immediately taking 40 daño radiante. This spell ignores resistances but does not ignore immunities. A criatura killed by this spell does not decay and cannot become undead for the spell's duration. Days spent under the influence of this spell don't count against the time limit of spells such as _raise dead_. This effect ends early if the corpse recibe daño necrótico.
higher_level: el daño and duration increase to 45 daño radiante and 1 year when using an 8th-level espacio de conjuro, or 50 damage and until dispelled when using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro.

name: Angelic Guardian
desc:
You conjure a minor Celestial manifestation to protect a criatura you can see within range. A faintly glowing image resembling a human head and shoulders hovers within 5 pies of the objetivo for the duration. The manifestation moves to interpose itself between the objetivo and any incoming attacks, granting the objetivo a +2 bonus to AC.

Also, the first time the objetivo gets a failure on a tirada de salvación de Destreza while the spell is active, it can use its reacción to reroll the save. The spell then ends.

name: Animal Friendship
desc: This spell lets you convince a beast that you mean it no harm. Choose a beast that you can see within range. It must see and hear you. If the beast's Inteligencia is 4 or higher, the spell fails. Otherwise, the beast debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be hechizado by you for the spell's duration. If you or one of your companions harms the objetivo, the spells ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can affect one additional beast for each slot level above 1st.
material: A morsel of food.

name: Animal Friendship
desc: You allow your inner beauty to shine through in song and dance whether to call a bird from its tree or a badger from its sett. Until the spell ends or one of your companions harms it (whichever is sooner), the objetivo is hechizado by you.
higher_level: Choose one additional objetivo for each slot level above 1st.

name: Animal Messenger
desc:
By means of this spell, you use an animal to deliver a message. Choose a Tiny beast you can see within range, such as a squirrel, a blue jay, or a bat. You specify a location, which you must have visited, and a recipient who matches a general description, such as "a man or woman dressed in the uniform of the town guard" or "a red-haired dwarf wearing a pointed hat." You also speak a message of up to twenty-five words. The objetivo beast travels for the duration of the spell toward the specified location, covering about 50 millas per 24 horas for a volando messenger, or 25 millas for other animals. 

When the messenger arrives, it delivers your message to the criatura that you described, replicating the sound of your voice. The messenger speaks only to a criatura matching the description you gave. If the messenger doesn't alcance its destination before the spell ends, the message is lost, and the beast makes its way back to where you cast this spell.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3nd level or higher, the duration of the spell increases by 48 horas for each slot level above 2nd.
material: A morsel of food.

name: Animal Messenger
desc:
You call a Tiny beast to you, whisper a message to it, and then give it directions to the message's recipient. It is now your messenger.

Specify a location you have previously visited and a recipient who matches a general description, such as "a person wearing a pointed red hat in Barter Town" or "a half-orc in a wheelchair at the Striped Lion Inn." Speak a message of up to 25 words. For the duration of the spell, the messenger travels towards the location at a rate of 50 millas per day for a messenger with a volando Velocidad, or else 25 millas without.

When the messenger arrives, it delivers your message to the first criatura matching your description, replicating the sound of your voice exactly. If the messenger can't find the recipient or alcance its destination before the spell ends, the message is lost, and the beast makes its way back to where you cast this spell.
higher_level: The duration of the spell increases by 48 horas for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Animal Shapes
desc:
Your magic turns others into beasts. Choose any number of willing criaturas that you can see within range. You transform each objetivo into the form of a Large or smaller beast with a challenge rating of 4 or lower. On subsequent turns, you can use your action to transform affected criaturas into new forms. 

The transformation lasts for the duration for each objetivo, or until the objetivo drops to 0 puntos de golpe or dies. You can choose a different form for each objetivo. A objetivo's game statistics are replaced by the statistics of the chosen beast, though the objetivo retains its alignment and Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. The objetivo assumes the puntos de golpe of its new form, and when it reverts to its normal form, it returns to the number of puntos de golpe it had before it transformed. If it reverts as a result of dropping to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to its normal form. As long as the excess damage doesn't reduce the criatura's normal form to 0 puntos de golpe, it isn't knocked inconsciente. The criatura is limited in the actions it can perform by the Naturaleza of its new form, and it can't speak or cast spells. 

The objetivo's gear melds into the new form. The objetivo can't activate, wield, or otherwise benefit from any of its equipment.

name: Animal Shapes
desc:
You transform the bodies of criaturas into beasts without altering their minds. Each objetivo transforms into a Large or smaller beast with a Challenge Rating of 4 or lower. Each objetivo may have the same or a different form than other objetivos.

On subsequent turns, you can use your action to transform objetivos into new forms, gaining new puntos de golpe when they do so.

Until the spell ends or it is dropped to 0 puntos de golpe, the objetivo's game statistics (including its puntos de golpe) are replaced by the statistics of the chosen beast excepting its Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. The objetivo is limited to actions that it is physically capable of doing, and it can't speak or cast spells. The objetivo's gear melds into the new form. Equipment that merges with a objetivo's form has no effect until it leaves the form.

When the objetivo reverts to its normal form, it returns to the number of puntos de golpe it had before it transformed. If the spell's effect on the objetivo end early from dropping to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to its normal form and knocks it inconsciente if el daño reduces it to 0 puntos de golpe.

name: Animate Construct
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork This spell animates a carefully prepared construct of Tiny size. The object acts immediately, on your turn, and can attack your opponents to the best of its ability. You can direct it not to attack, to attack particular enemigos, or to perform other actions. You choose the object to animate, and you can change that choice each time you cast the spell. The cost of the body to be animated is 10 gp x its puntos de golpe. The body can be reused any number of times, provided it isn't severely damaged or destroyed. If no prepared construct body is available, you can animate a mass of loose metal or stone instead. Before casting, the loose objects must be arranged in a suitable shape (taking up to a minuto), and the construct's puntos de golpe are halved. An animated construct has a Constitución of 10, Inteligencia and Sabiduría 3, and Carisma 1. Other characteristics are determined by the construct's size as follows. Size HP AC Attack STR DEX espacio de conjuro Tiny 15 12 +3, 1d4+4 4 16 1st Small 25 13 +4, 1d8+2 6 14 2nd Medium 40 14 +5, 2d6+1 10 12 3rd Large 50 15 +6, 2d10+2 14 10 4th Huge 80 16 +8, 2d12+4 18 8 5th Gargantuan 100 17 +10, 4d8+6 20 6 6th
higher_level: Casting this spell using higher level espacios de conjuro allows you to increase the size of the construct animated, as shown on the table.

name: Animate Dead
desc:
This spell creates an undead servant. Choose a pile of bones or a corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid within range. Your spell imbues the objetivo with a foul mimicry of life, raising it as an undead criatura. The objetivo becomes a skeleton if you chose bones or a zombie if you chose a corpse (the DM has the criatura's game statistics). 

On each of your turns, you can use a acción adicional to mentally command any criatura you made with this spell if the criatura is within 60 pies of you (if you control multiple criaturas, you can command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the criatura will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the criatura only defends itself against hostile criaturas. Once given an order, the criatura continues to follow it until its task is complete. 

The criatura is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it. To maintain control of the criatura for another 24 horas, you must cast this spell on the criatura again before the current 24-hora period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to four criaturas you have animated with this spell, rather than animating a new one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you animate or reassert control over two additional undead criaturas for each slot level above 3rd. Each of the criaturas must come from a different corpse or pile of bones.
material: A drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust.

name: Animate Dead
desc:
You animate a mortal's remains to become your undead servant.

If the spell is cast upon bones you create a skeleton, and if cast upon a corpse you choose to create a skeleton or a zombie. The Narrator has the undead's statistics.

While it is within 60 pies you can use a acción adicional to mentally command the undead. When you command multiple undead using this spell, you must give them all the same command. You may decide the action the undead recibe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. If not given a command, the undead only defends itself. The undead continues to follow a command until its task is complete.

The undead is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any commands. You must cast this spell on the undead before the spell ends to maintain control of it for another 24 horas.

Casting the spell in this way reasserts control over up to 4 of your previously-animated undead instead of animating a new one.
higher_level: You create or reassert control over 2 additional undead for each slot level above 3rd. When commanding more than 3 undead they make group attack rolls (see page 454 in Chapter 8: Combat).

name: Animate Ghoul
desc: You raise one Medium or Small humanoid corpse as a ghoul under your control. Any class levels or abilities the criatura had in life are gone, replaced by the standard ghoul stat block.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 3rd-level espacio de conjuro, it can be used on the corpse of a Large humanoid to create a Large ghoul. When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, this spell creates a ghast, but the material component changes to an onyx gemstone worth at least 200 gp.
material: piece of rotting flesh and an onyx gemstone worth 100 gp

name: Animate Greater Undead
desc:
**Animate greater undead** creates an undead servant from a pile of bones or from the corpse of a Large or Huge humanoid within range. The spell imbues the objetivo with a foul mimicry of life, raising it as an undead skeleton or zombie. A skeleton uses the stat block of a minotaur skeleton, or a zombie uses the stat block of an ogre zombie, unless a more appropriate stat block is available.

The criatura is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying your commands. To maintain control of the criatura for another 24 horas, you must cast this spell on it again while you have it controlled. Casting the spell for this purpose reasserts your control over up to four criaturas you have previously animated rather than animating a new one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, you can reanimate one additional criatura for each slot level above 6th.
material: a pint of blood, a pound of flesh, and an ounce of bone dust, all of which the spell consumes

name: Animate Objects
desc:
Objects come to life at your command. Choose up to ten no mágico objects within range that are not being worn or carried. Medium objetivos count as two objects, Large objetivos count as four objects, Huge objetivos count as eight objects. You can't animate any object larger than Huge. Each objetivo animates and becomes a criatura under your control until the spell ends or until reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. 
As a acción adicional, you can mentally command any criatura you made with this spell if the criatura is within 500 pies of you (if you control multiple criaturas, you can command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the criatura will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the criatura only defends itself against hostile criaturas. Once given an order, the criatura continues to follow it until its task is complete.
### Animated Object Statistics 
| Size | HP | AC | Attack | Str | Dex |
|--------|----|----|----------------------------|-----|-----|
| Tiny | 20 | 18 | +8 para impactar, 1d4 + 4 damage | 4 | 18 |
| Small | 25 | 16 | +6 para impactar, 1d8 + 2 damage | 6 | 14 |
| Medium | 40 | 13 | +5 para impactar, 2d6 + 1 damage | 10 | 12 |
| Large | 50 | 10 | +6 para impactar, 2d10 + 2 damage | 14 | 10 |
| Huge | 80 | 10 | +8 para impactar, 2d12 + 4 damage | 18 | 6 | 

An animated object is a construct with AC, puntos de golpe, attacks, Fuerza, and Destreza determined by its size. Its Constitución is 10 and its Inteligencia and Sabiduría are 3, and its Carisma is 1. Its Velocidad is 30 pies; if the object lacks legs or other appendages it can use for locomotion, it instead has a volando Velocidad of 30 pies and can hover. If the object is securely attached to a surface or a larger object, such as a chain bolted to a wall, its Velocidad is 0. It has vista ciega with a radius of 30 pies and is blind beyond that distance. When the animated object drops to 0 puntos de golpe, it reverts to its original object form, and any remaining damage carries over to its original object form. If you command an object to attack, it can make a single ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against a criatura within 5 pies of it. It makes a slam attack with an attack bonus and daño contundente determined by its size. The DM might rule that a specific object inflicts cortante or daño perforante based on its form.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, you can animate two additional objects for each slot level above 5th.

name: Animate Objects
desc:
Objects come to life at your command just like you dreamt of when you were an apprentice! Choose up to 6 unattended no mágico Small or Tiny objects. You may also choose larger objects; treat Medium objects as 2 objects, Large objects as 3 objects, and Huge objects as 6 objects. You can't animate objects larger than Huge.

Until the spell ends or a objetivo is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, you animate the objetivos and turn them into constructs under your control.

Each construct has Constitución 10, Inteligencia 3, Sabiduría 3, and Carisma 1, as well as a volando Velocidad of 30 pies and the ability to hover (if securely fastened to something larger, it has a Velocidad of 0), and vista ciega to a range of 30 pies (blind beyond that distance). Otherwise a construct's statistics are determined by its size.

If you animate 4 or more Small or Tiny objects, instead of controlling each construct individually they function as a construct swarm. Add together all swarm's total puntos de golpe. Attacks against a construct swarm deal la mitad del daño. The construct swarm reverts to individual constructs when it is reduced to 15 puntos de golpe or less.

You can use a acción adicional to mentally command any construct made with this spell while it is within 500 pies. When you command multiple constructs using this spell, you may simultaneously give them all the same command. You decide the action the construct recibe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. Without commands the construct only defends itself. The construct continues to follow a command until its task is complete.

When you command a construct to attack, it makes a single slam ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against a criatura within 5 pies of it. On a hit the construct causa contundente, perforante, or daño cortante appropriate to its shape.

When the construct drops to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to its normal object form.
higher_level: You can animate 2 additional Small or Tiny objects for each slot level above 5th.

name: Animated Scroll
desc: The paper or parchment must be folded into the shape of an animal before casting the spell. It then becomes an animated paper animal of the kind the folded paper most closely resembles. The criatura uses the stat block of any beast that has a challenge rating of 0. It is made of paper, not flesh and bone, but it can do anything the real criatura can do: a paper owl can fly and attack with its talons, a paper frog can swim without disintegrating in water, and so forth. It follows your commands to the best of its ability, including carrying messages to a recipient whose location you know.
higher_level: The duration increases by 24 horas at 5th level (48 horas), 11th level (72 horas), and 17th level (96 horas).
material: intricately folded paper or parchment

name: Anomalous Object
desc: Deep Magic: temporal By touching an object, you retrieve another version of the object from elsewhere in time. If the object is attended, you debe tener éxito en a melee ataque de conjuro roll against the criatura holding or controlling the object. Any effect that affects the original object also affects the duplicate (charges spent, damage taken, etc.) and any effect that affects the duplicate also affects the original object. If either object is destroyed, both are destroyed. This spell does not affect sentient items or unique artifacts.

name: Anticipate Arcana
desc: Your foresight gives you an instant to ready your defenses against a mágico attack. When you cast **anticipate Arcanos**, you have ventaja on saving throws against spells and other mágico effects until the start of your next turn.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy you can see casts a spell

name: Anticipate Attack
desc: In a flash of foreknowledge, you spot an oncoming attack with enough time to avoid it. Upon casting this spell, you can move up to half your Velocidad without provoking opportunity attacks. The oncoming attack still occurs but misses automatically if you are no longer within the attack’s range, are in a space that's impossible for the attack para impactar, or can’t be targeted by that attack in your new position. If none of those circumstances apply but the situation has changed—you have moved into a position where you have cover, for example—then the attack is made after taking the new situation into account.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are attacked but before the attack roll is made
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Anticipate Weakness
desc: With a quick glance into the future, you pinpoint where a gap is about to open in your foe’s defense, and then you strike. After casting **anticipate weakness**, you have ventaja on attack rolls until the end of your turn.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Antilife Shell
desc: A shimmering barrier extends out from you in a 10-pie radius and moves with you, remaining centered on you and hedging out criaturas other than undead and constructs. The barrier lasts for the duration. The barrier prevents an affected criatura from passing or reaching through. An affected criatura can cast spells or make attacks with ranged or alcance weapons through the barrier. If you move so that an affected criatura is forced to pass through the barrier, the spell ends.

name: Antilife Shell
desc:
A barrier that glimmers with an oily rainbow hue pops into existence around you. The barrier moves with you and prevents criaturas other than undead and constructs from passing or reaching through its surface.

The barrier does not prevent spells or attacks with ranged or alcance weapons from passing through the barrier.

The spell ends if you move so that a Tiny or larger living criatura is forced to pass through the barrier.

name: Antimagic Field
desc:
A 10-pie-radius invisible sphere of antimagic surrounds you. This area is divorced from the mágico energy that suffuses the multiverse. Within the sphere, spells can't be cast, summoned criaturas disappear, and even magic items become mundane. Until the spell ends, the sphere moves with you, centered on you. Spells and other mágico effects, except those created by an artifact or a deity, are suppressed in the sphere and can't protrude into it. A slot expended to cast a suppressed spell is consumed. While an effect is suppressed, it doesn't function, but the time it spends suppressed counts against its duration.

**Targeted Effects.** Spells and other mágico effects, such as magic missile and charm person, that objetivo a criatura or an object in the sphere have no effect on that objetivo.

**Areas of Magic.** The area of another spell or mágico effect, such as fireball, can't extend into the sphere. If the sphere overlaps an area of magic, the part of the area that is covered by the sphere is suppressed. For example, the flames created by a wall of fuego are suppressed within the sphere, creating a gap in the wall if the overlap is large enough.

**Spells.** Any active spell or other mágico effect on a criatura or an object in the sphere is suppressed while the criatura or object is in it.

**Magic Items.** The properties and powers of magic items are suppressed in the sphere. For example, a +1 longsword in the sphere functions as a no mágico longsword. A magic weapon's properties and powers are suppressed if it is used against a objetivo in the sphere or wielded by an attacker in the sphere. If a magic weapon or a piece of magic munición fully leaves the sphere (for example, if you fuego a magic arrow or throw a magic spear at a objetivo outside the sphere), the magic of the item ceases to be suppressed as soon as it exits.

**mágico Travel.** Teleportation and planar travel fail to work in the sphere, whether the sphere is the destination or the departure point for such mágico travel. A portal to another location, world, or plane of existence, as well as an opening to an extradimensional space such as that created by the rope trick spell, temporarily closes while in the sphere.

**criaturas and Objects.** A criatura or object summoned or created by magic temporarily winks out of existence in the sphere. Such a criatura instantly reappears once the space the criatura occupied is no longer within the sphere.

**Dispel Magic.** Spells and mágico effects such as dispel magic have no effect on the sphere. Likewise, the spheres created by different antimagic field spells don't nullify each other.
material: A pinch of powdered iron or iron filings.

name: Antimagic Field
desc:
An invisible sphere of antimagic forms around you, moving with you and suppressing all mágico effects within it. At the Narrator's discretion, sufficiently powerful artifacts and deities may be able to ignore the sphere's effects.

* **Area Suppression:** When a mágico effect protrudes into the sphere, that part of the effect's area is suppressed. For example, the ice created by a wall of ice is suppressed within the sphere, creating a gap in the wall if the overlap is large enough.
* **criaturas and Objects:** While within the sphere, any criaturas or objects created or conjured by magic temporarily wink out of existence, reappearing immediately once the space they occupied is no longer within the sphere.
* **Dispel Magic:** The sphere is immune to dispel magic and similar mágico effects, including other antimagic field spells.
* **Magic Items:** While within the sphere, magic items function as if they were mundane objects. Magic weapons and munición cease to be suppressed when they fully leave the sphere.
* **mágico Travel:** Whether the sphere includes a destination or departure point, any planar travel or teleportation within it automatically fails. Until the spell ends or the sphere moves, mágico portals and extradimensional spaces (such as that created by a bag of holding) within the sphere are closed.
* **Spells:** Any spell cast within the sphere or at a objetivo within the sphere is suppressed and the espacio de conjuro is consumed. Active spells and mágico effects are also suppressed within the sphere. If a spell or mágico effect has a duration, time spent suppressed counts against it.

name: Antipathy/Sympathy
desc:
This spell attracts or repels criaturas of your choice. You objetivo something within range, either a Huge or smaller object or criatura or an area that is no larger than a 200-pie cube. Then specify a kind of intelligent criatura, such as red dragons, goblins, or vampires. You invest the objetivo with an aura that either attracts or repels the specified criaturas for the duration. Choose antipathy or sympathy as the aura's effect.

**Antipathy.** The enchantment causes criaturas of the kind you designated to feel an intense urge to leave the area and avoid the objetivo. When such a criatura can see the objetivo or comes within 60 pies of it, the criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become asustado. The criatura remains asustado while it can see the objetivo or is within 60 pies of it. While asustado by the objetivo, the criatura must use its movement to move to the nearest safe spot from which it can't see the objetivo. If the criatura moves more than 60 pies from the objetivo and can't see it, the criatura is no longer asustado, but the criatura becomes asustado again if it regains sight of the objetivo or moves within 60 pies of it.

 **Sympathy.** The enchantment causes the specified criaturas to feel an intense urge to approach the objetivo while within 60 pies of it or able to see it. When such a criatura can see the objetivo or comes within 60 pies of it, the criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or use its movement on each of its turns to enter the area or move within alcance of the objetivo. When the criatura has done so, it can't willingly move away from the objetivo. If the objetivo damages or otherwise harms an affected criatura, the affected criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to end the effect, as described below.

**Ending the Effect.** If an affected criatura ends its turn while not within 60 pies of the objetivo or able to see it, the criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura is no longer affected by the objetivo and recognizes the feeling of repugnance or attraction as mágico. In addition, a criatura affected by the spell is allowed another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría every 24 horas while the spell persists. A criatura that successfully saves against this effect is immune to it for 1 minuto, after which time it can be affected again.
material: Either a lump of alum soaked in vinegar for the antipathy effect or a drop of honey for the sympathy effect.

name: Antipathy/Sympathy
desc:
You mystically impart great love or hatred for a place, thing, or criatura. Designate a kind of intelligent criatura, such as dragons, goblins, or vampires.

The objetivo now causes either antipathy or sympathy for the specified criaturas for the duration of the spell. When a designated criatura successfully saves against the effects of this spell, it immediately entiende it was under a mágico effect and is immune to this spell's effects for 1 minuto.

* **Antipathy:** When a designated criatura can see the objetivo or comes within 60 pies of it, the criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or becomes asustado. While asustado the criatura must use its movement to move away from the objetivo to the nearest safe spot from which it can no longer see the objetivo. If the criatura moves more than 60 pies from the objetivo and can no longer see it, the criatura is no longer asustado, but the criatura becomes asustado again if it regains sight of the objetivo or moves within 60 pies of it.
* **Sympathy:** When a designated criatura can see the objetivo or comes within 60 pies of it, the criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, the criatura uses its movement on each of its turns to enter the area or move within alcance of the objetivo, and is unwilling to move away from the objetivo.  
If the objetivo damages or otherwise harms an affected criatura, the affected criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to end the effect. An affected criatura can also make a tirada de salvación once every 24 horas while within the area of the spell, and whenever it ends its turn more than 60 pies from the objetivo and is unable to see the objetivo.

name: Arcane Eye
desc: You create an invisible, mágico eye within range that hovers in the air for the duration. You mentally receive visual information from the eye, which has normal vision and visión en la oscuridad out to 30 pies. The eye can look in every direction. As an action, you can move the eye up to 30 pies in any direction. There is no limit to how far away from you the eye can move, but it can't enter another plane of existence. A solid barrier blocks the eye's movement, but the eye can pass through an opening as small as 1 inch in diameter.
material: A bit of bat fur.

name: Arcane Eye
desc:
Until the spell ends, you create an invisible, floating mágico eye that hovers in the air and sends you visual information. The eye has normal vision, visión en la oscuridad to a range of 30 pies, and it can look in every direction.

You can use an action to move the eye up to 30 pies in any direction as long as it remains on the same plane of existence. The eye can pass through openings as small as 1 inch across but otherwise its movement is blocked by solid barriers.

name: Arcane Hand
desc:
You create a Large hand of shimmering, translucent fuerza in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The hand lasts for the spell's duration, and it moves at your command, mimicking the movements of your own hand. The hand is an object that has AC 20 and puntos de golpe equal to your punto de golpe maximum. If it drops to 0 puntos de golpe, the spell ends. It has a Fuerza of 26 (+8) and a Destreza of 10 (+0). The hand doesn't fill its space. When you cast the spell and as a acción adicional on your subsequent turns, you can move the hand up to 60 pies and then cause one of the following effects with it.

**Clenched Fist.** The hand strikes una criatura or object within 5 pies of it. Make a melee ataque de conjuro for the hand using your game statistics. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 4d8 daño de fuerza.

**Forceful Hand.** The hand attempts to push a criatura within 5 pies of it in a direction you choose. Make a check with the hand's Fuerza contested by the Fuerza (Atletismo) check of the objetivo. If the objetivo is Medium or smaller, you have ventaja on the check. If you succeed, the hand pushes the objetivo up to 5 pies plus a number of pies equal to five times your spellcasting ability modifier. The hand moves with the objetivo to remain within 5 pies of it.

**Grasping Hand.** The hand attempts to grapple a Huge or smaller criatura within 5 pies of it. You use the hand's Fuerza score to resolve the grapple. If the objetivo is Medium or smaller, you have ventaja on the check. While the hand is grappling the objetivo, you can use a acción adicional to have the hand crush it. When you do so, the objetivo recibe daño contundente equal to 2d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier

 **Interposing Hand.** The hand interposes itself between you and a criatura you choose until you give the hand a different command. The hand moves to stay between you and the objetivo, providing you with half cover against the objetivo. The objetivo can't move through the hand's space if its Fuerza score is less than or equal to the hand's Fuerza score. If its Fuerza score is higher than the hand's Fuerza score, the objetivo can move toward you through the hand's space, but that space is difficult terrain for the objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, el daño from the clenched fist option increases by 2d8 and el daño from the grasping hand increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 5th.
material: An eggshell and a snakeskin glove.

name: Arcane Hand
desc:
You create a Large hand of shimmering, translucent fuerza that mimics the appearance and movements of your own hand.

The hand doesn't fill its space and has AC 20, Fuerza 26 (+8), Destreza 10 (+0), maneuver CD 18, and puntos de golpe equal to your punto de golpe maximum. The spell ends early if it is dropped to 0 puntos de golpe.

When you cast the spell and as a acción adicional on subsequent turns, you can move the hand up to 60 pies and then choose one of the following.

* **_Shove:_** The hand makes a tirada de salvación de Fuerza against the maneuver CD of a criatura within 5 pies of it, with ventaja if the criatura is Medium or smaller. en un éxito, the hand pushes the criatura in a direction of your choosing for up to 5 pies plus a number of pies equal to 5 times your spellcasting ability modifier, and remains within 5 pies of it.
* **_Smash:_** Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura or object within 5 pies of the hand. On a hit, the hand causa 4d8 daño de fuerza.
* **_Snatch:_** The hand makes a tirada de salvación de Fuerza against the maneuver CD of a criatura within 5 pies of it, with ventaja if the criatura is Medium or smaller. en un éxito, the criatura is agarrado by the hand. You can use a acción adicional to crush a criatura agarrado by the hand, dealing daño contundente equal to 2d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
* **_Stop:_** Until the hand is given another command it moves to stay between you and a criatura of your choice, providing you with three-quarters cover against the chosen criatura. A criatura with a Fuerza score of 26 or less cannot move through the hand's space, and stronger criaturas treat the hand as difficult terrain.
higher_level: el daño from Smash increases by 2d8 and el daño from Snatch increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Arcane Lock
desc: You touch a closed door, window, gate, chest, or other entryway, and it becomes locked for the duration. You and the criaturas you designate when you cast this spell can open the object normally. You can also set a password that, when spoken within 5 pies of the object, suppresses this spell for 1 minuto. Otherwise, it is impassable until it is broken or the spell is dispelled or suppressed. Casting knock on the object suppresses arcane lock for 10 minutos. While affected by this spell, the object is more difficult to break or fuerza open; the CD to break it or pick any locks on it increases by 10.
material: Gold dust worth at least 25gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Arcane Lock
desc: The objetivo is sealed to todas las criaturas except those you designate (who can open the object normally). Alternatively, you may choose a password that suppresses this spell for 1 minuto when it is spoken within 5 pies of the objetivo. The spell can also be suppressed for 10 minutos by casting _knock_ on the objetivo. Otherwise, the objetivo cannot be opened normally and it is more difficult to break or fuerza open, increasing the CD to break it or pick any locks on it by 10 (minimum CD 20).
higher_level: Increase the CD to fuerza open the object or pick any locks on the object by an additional 2 for each slot level above 2nd. Only a knock spell cast at a slot level equal to or greater than your arcane lock suppresses it.

name: Arcane Muscles
desc: Your muscles swell with arcane power. They're too clumsy to effectively wield weapons but certainly strong enough for a powerful punch. Until the spell ends, you can choose to use your spellcasting ability score for Atletismo checks, and for the attack and damage rolls of unarmed strikes. In addition, your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 daño contundente and count as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques no mágicos and damage.

name: Arcane Riposte
desc: You respond to an incoming attack with a magically-infused attack of your own. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against the criatura that attacked you. If you hit, the criatura recibe 3d6 ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, veneno, or daño de trueno.
higher_level: The spell causa an extra 1d6 damage for each slot level above 1st. When using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro, you may choose to deal psíquico, radiante, or daño necrótico. When using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, you may choose to deal daño de fuerza.

name: Arcane Sight
desc: The recipient of this spell gains the benefits of both [true seeing](https://api.open5e.com/spells/true-seeing) and [detect magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/detect-magic) until the spell ends, and also knows the name and effect of every spell he or she witnesses during the spell’s duration.
material: a piece of clear quartz

name: Arcane Sword
desc: You create a sword-shaped plane of fuerza that hovers within range. It lasts for the duration. When the sword appears, you make a melee ataque de conjuro against a objetivo of your choice within 5 pies of the sword. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 3d10 daño de fuerza. Until the spell ends, you can use a acción adicional on each of your turns to move the sword up to 20 pies to a spot you can see and repeat this attack against the same objetivo or a different one.
material: A miniature platinum sword with a grip and pommel of copper and zinc, worth 250 gp.

name: Arcane Sword
desc:
You summon an insubstantial yet deadly sword to do your bidding.

Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a objetivo of your choice within 5 pies of the sword, dealing 3d10 daño de fuerza on a hit.

Until the spell ends, you can use a acción adicional on subsequent turns to move the sword up to 20 pies to a space you can see and make an identical melee ataque de conjuro against a objetivo.

name: Arcanist's Magic Aura
desc:
You place an illusion on a criatura or an object you touch so that divination spells reveal false information about it. The objetivo can be a willing criatura or an object that isn't being carried or worn by another criatura. When you cast the spell, choose one or both of the following effects. The effect lasts for the duration. If you cast this spell on the same criatura or object every day for 30 days, placing the same effect on it each time, the illusion lasts until it is dispelled.

**False Aura.** You change the way the objetivo appears to spells and mágico effects, such as detect magic, that detect mágico auras. You can make a no mágico object appear mágico, a mágico object appear no mágico, or change the object's mágico aura so that it appears to belong to a specific school of magic that you choose. When you use this effect on an object, you can make the false magic apparent to any criatura that handles the item.

**Mask.** You change the way the objetivo appears to spells and mágico effects that detect criatura types, such as a paladin's Divine Sense or the trigger of a symbol spell. You choose a criatura type and other spells and mágico effects treat the objetivo as if it were a criatura of that type or of that alignment.
material: A small square of silk.

name: Arcanist's Magic Aura
desc:
You craft an illusion to deceive others about the objetivo's true mágico properties.

Choose one or both of the following effects. When cast upon the same objetivo with the same effect for 30 successive days, it lasts until it is dispelled.

* **False Aura:** A mágico objetivo appears no mágico, a no mágico objetivo appears mágico, or you change a objetivo's mágico aura so that it appears to belong to a school of magic of your choosing. Additionally, you can choose to make the false magic apparent to any criatura that handles the item.
* **Masking Effect:** Choose a criatura type. Spells and mágico effects that detect criatura types (such as a herald's Divine Sense or the trigger of a symbol spell) treat the objetivo as if it were a criatura of that type. Additionally, you can choose to mask the objetivo's alignment trait (if it has one).
higher_level: When cast using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro or higher the effects last until dispelled with a acción adicional.

name: Armored Formation
desc:
You bolster the defenses of those nearby. Choose up to twelve willing criaturas in range. When an affected criatura is within 5 pies of at least one other affected criatura, they create a formation. The formation must be a contiguous grouping of affected criaturas, and each affected criatura must be within 5 pies of at least one other affected criatura within the formation. If the formation ever has less than two affected criaturas, it ends, and an affected criatura that moves further than 5 pies from other criaturas in formation is no longer in that formation. Affected criaturas don't have to all be in the same formation, and they can create or end as many formations of various sizes as they want for the duration of the spell. cada criatura in a formation gains a bonus depending on how many affected criaturas are in that formation.
  ***Two or More criaturas.*** cada criatura gains a +2 bonus to AC.
  ***Four or More criaturas.*** cada criatura gains a +2 bonus to AC, and when it hits with any weapon, it causa an extra 1d6 damage of the weapon's type.
  ***Six or More criaturas.*** cada criatura gains a +3 bonus to AC, and when it hits with any weapon, it causa an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type.

name: Armored Heart
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork The targeted criatura gains resistance to contundente, cortante, and daño perforante. This resistance can be overcome with adamantine or mágico weapons.

name: Armored Shell
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork This spell creates a suit of mágico studded leather armor (AC 12). It does not grant you competencia in its use. Casters without the appropriate armor competencia suffer desventaja on any ability check, tirada de salvación, or tirada de ataque that involves Fuerza or Destreza and cannot cast spells.
higher_level: Casting armored shell using a higher-level espacio de conjuro creates stronger armor: a chain shirt (AC 13) at level 2, scale mail (AC 14) at level 3, chain mail (AC 16) at level 4, and plate armor (AC 18) at level 5.

name: As You Were
desc:
When cast on a dead or undead body, **as you were** returns that criatura to the appearance it had in life while it was healthy and uninjured. The objetivo must have a physical body; the spell fails if the objetivo is normally noncorporeal.

If as you were is cast on a corpse, its effect is identical to that of [gentle repose](https://api.open5e.com/spells/gentle-repose), except that the corpse’s appearance is restored to that of a healthy, uninjured (albeit dead) person.

If the objetivo is an undead criatura, it also is restored to the appearance it had in life, even if it died from disease or from severe wounds, or centuries ago. The objetivo looks, smells, and sounds (if it can speak) as it did in life. Friends and family can tell something is wrong only with a successful Sabiduría (Perspicacia) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro, and only if they have reason to be suspicious. (Knowing that the person should be dead is sufficient reason.) Spells and abilities that detect undead are also fooled, but the criatura remains susceptible to Turn Undead as normal.

This spell doesn’t confer the ability to speak on undead that normally can’t speak. The criatura eats, drinks, and breathes as a living criatura does; it can mimic sleep, but it has no more need for it than it had before.

The effect lasts for a number of horas equal to your caster level. You can use an action to end the spell early. Any amount of radiante or daño necrótico dealt to the criatura, or any effect that reduces its Constitución, also ends the spell.

If this spell is cast on an undead criatura that isn’t your aliado or under your control, it makes a tirada de salvación de Carisma to resist the effect.
material: a piece of flesh from a criatura of the objetivo’s race

name: Ashen Memories
desc: You touch the ashes, embers, or soot left behind by a fuego and receive a vision of one significant event that occurred in the area while the fuego was burning. For example, if you were to touch the frío embers of a campfire, you might witness a snippet of a conversation that occurred around the fuego. Similarly, touching the ashes of a burned letter might grant you a vision of the person who destroyed the letter or the contents of the letter. You have no control over what information the spell reveals, but your vision usually is tied to the most meaningful event related to the fuego. The GM determines the details of what is revealed.

name: Aspect of the Dragon
desc:
This spell draws out the ancient Naturaleza within your blood, allowing you to assume the form of any dragon-type criatura of challenge 10 or less.

You assume the puntos de golpe and Hit Dice of the new form. When you revert to your normal form, you return to the number of puntos de golpe you had before you transformed. If you revert as a result of dropping to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to your normal form. As long as the excess damage doesn’t reduce your normal form to 0 puntos de golpe, you aren’t knocked inconsciente.

You retain the benefits of any features from your class, race, or other source and can use them, provided that your new form is physically capable of doing so. You can speak only if the dragon can normally speak.

When you transform, you choose whether your equipment falls to the ground, merges into the new form, or is worn by it. Worn equipment functions normally, but equipment doesn’t change shape or size to match the new form. Any equipment that the new form can’t wear must either fall to the ground or merge into the new form. The GM has final say on whether the new form can wear or use a particular piece of equipment. Equipment that merges has no effect in that state.
material: a dragon scale

name: Aspect of the Moon
desc: You throw your head back and howl like a beast, embracing your most basic impulses. Until the spell ends your hair grows, your features become more feral, and sharp claws grow on your fingers. You gain a +1 bonus to AC, your Velocidad increases by 10 pies, you have ventaja on Percepción checks, and your unarmed strikes deal 1d8 daño cortante. You may use your Fuerza or Destreza for attack and damage rolls with unarmed strikes, and treat your unarmed strikes as weapons with the sutil property. You gain an additional action on your turn, which may only be used to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo with your unarmed strike. If you are hit by a silvered weapon, you have desventaja on your tirada de salvación de Constitución to maintain Concentración.

name: Aspect of the Serpent
desc:
A criatura you touch recibe on snakelike aspects for the duration of the spell. Its tongue becomes long and forked, its canine teeth become fangs with venom sacs, and its pupils become sharply vertical. The objetivo gains visión en la oscuridad with a range of 60 pies and vista ciega with a range of 30 pies. As a acción adicional when you cast the spell, the objetivo can make a ataque a distancia con arma with a normal range of 60 pies that causa 2d6 daño de veneno on a hit.

As an action, the objetivo can make a bite attack using either Fuerza or Destreza (ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma: range 5 ft., una criatura; Hit: 2d6 daño perforante), and the criatura debe realizar a successful CD 14 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be paralizado for 1 minuto. A criatura paralizado in this way repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito).
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, both the ataque a distancia and bite attack damage increase by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a dried snakeskin

name: Astral Projection
desc: You and up to eight willing criaturas within range project your astral bodies into the Astral Plane (the spell fails and the casting is wasted if you are already on that plane). The material body you leave behind is inconsciente and in a state of suspended animation; it doesn't need food or air and doesn't age. Your astral body resembles your mortal form in almost every way, replicating your game statistics and possessions. The principal difference is the addition of a silvery cord that extends from between your shoulder blades and trails behind you, fading to invisibility after 1 pie. This cord is your tether to your material body. As long as the tether remains intact, you can find your way home. If the cord is cut-something that can happen only when an effect specifically states that it does-your soul and body are separated, killing you instantly. Your astral form can freely travel through the Astral Plane and can pass through portals there leading to any other plane. If you enter a new plane or return to the plane you were on when casting this spell, your body and possessions are transported along the silver cord, allowing you to re-enter your body as you enter the new plane. Your astral form is a separate incarnation. Any damage or other effects that apply to it have no effect on your physical body, nor do they persist when you return to it. The spell ends for you and your companions when you use your action to dismiss it. When the spell ends, the affected criatura returns to its physical body, and it awakens. The spell might also end early for you or one of your companions. A successful dispel magic spell used against an astral or physical body ends the spell for that criatura. If a criatura's original body or its astral form drops to 0 puntos de golpe, the spell ends for that criatura. If the spell ends and the silver cord is intact, the cord pulls the criatura's astral form back to its body, ending its state of suspended animation. If you are returned to your body prematurely, your companions remain in their astral forms and must find their own way back to their bodies, usually by dropping to 0 puntos de golpe.
material: For cada criatura you affect with this spell, you must provide one jacinth worth at least 1,000gp and one ornately carved bar of silver worth at least 100gp, all of which the spell consumes.

name: Astral Projection
desc:
Until the spell ends, the objetivos leave their material bodies (inconsciente and in a state of suspended animation, not aging or requiring food or air) and project astral forms that resemble their mortal forms in nearly all ways, keeping their game statistics and possessions.

While in this astral form you trail a tether, a silvery-white cord that sprouts from between your shoulder blades and fades into immateriality a pie behind you. As long as the tether remains intact you can find your way back to your material body. When it is cut—which requires an effect specifically stating that it cuts your tether —your soul and body are separated and you immediately die. Damage against and other effects on your astral form have no effect on your material body either during this spell or after its duration ends. Your astral form travels freely through the Astral Plane and can pass through interplanar portals on the Astral Plane leading to any other plane. When you enter a new plane or return to the plane you were on when casting this spell, your material body and possessions are transported along the tether, allowing you to return fully intact with all your gear as you enter the new plane.
