You can conjure the swarm to appear in an enemigo's space. If you prefer, you can summon two full-Fuerza, standard swarms of insects (including beetles, centipedes, spiders, or wasps) instead.

name: Conjure Minor Elementals
desc:
You summon elementals that appear in unoccupied spaces that you can see within range. You choose one the following options for what appears: 
- One elemental of challenge rating 2 or lower 
- Two elementals of challenge rating 1 or lower 
- Four elementals of challenge rating 1/2 or lower 
- Eight elementals of challenge rating 1/4 or lower. An elemental summoned by this spell disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends. The summoned criaturas are friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the summoned criaturas as a group, which has its own turns. They obey any verbal commands that you issue to them (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile criaturas, but otherwise take no actions. The DM has the criaturas' statistics.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using certain higher-level espacios de conjuro, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more criaturas appear: twice as many with a 6th-level slot and three times as many with an 8th-level slot.

name: Conjure Minor Elementals
desc:
You summon up to 3 criaturas from the Elemental Planes. These criaturas use the statistics of a minor elemental (detailed below) with certain traits determined by your choice of its type: air, earth, fuego, or water. If you summon only 2 criaturas with this spell, increase its effective slot level by 1 when determining the minor elemental's statistics, and if you summon a single criatura with this spell its effective slot level is increased by 2 instead.

The summoned criaturas are friendly to you and your companions and take their turns immediately after yours. They obey your verbal commands. When you command multiple minor elementals using this spell, you must give them all the same command.

Without such commands, a minor elemental only defends itself.

The summoned criatura disappears when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. If your Concentración is broken before the spell ends, you lose control of any summoned criaturas, which become hostile and might attack you and your companions. An uncontrolled criatura disappears at the end of the spell's maximum duration.
higher_level: Use the higher espacio de conjuro level wherever the spell's level appears in the stat block.

name: Conjure Minor Voidborn
desc:
You summon fiends or aberrations that appear in unoccupied spaces you can see within range. You choose one of the following options:
* una criatura of challenge rating 2 or lower
* Two criaturas of challenge rating 1 or lower
* Four criaturas of challenge rating 1/2 or lower
* Eight criaturas of challenge rating 1/4 or lower
Summoned criaturas disappear when they drop to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.

The summoned criaturas do not directly attack you or your companions. Roll initiative for the summoned criaturas as a group; they take their own turns on their initiative result. They attack your enemigos and try to stay within 90 pies of you, but they control their own actions. The summoned criaturas despise being bound, so they might harm or impede you and your companions with secondary effects (but not direct attacks) if the opportunity arises. At the beginning of the criaturas’ turn, you can use your reacción to verbally command them. They obey your commands on that turn, and you take 1d6 daño psíquico at the end of the turn.

If your Concentración is broken, the spell ends but the criaturas don’t disappear. Instead, you can no longer command them, and they become hostile to you and your companions. They will attack you and your aliados if they believe they have a chance to win the fight or to inflict meaningful harm, but they won’t fight if they fear it would mean their own death. You can’t dismiss the criaturas, but they disappear 1 hora after being summoned.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 7th‑or 9th-level espacio de conjuro, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more criaturas appear­—twice as many with a 7th-level espacio de conjuro and three times as many with a 9th-level espacio de conjuro.

name: Conjure Scarab Swarm
desc:
You summon swarms of scarab beetles to attack your foes. Two swarms of insects (beetles) appear in unoccupied spaces that you can see within range.

Each swarm disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends. The swarms are friendly to you and your aliados. Make one initiative roll for both swarms, which have their own turns. They obey verbal commands that you issue to them (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile criaturas but otherwise take no actions.
material: a beetle carapace

name: Conjure Shadow Titan
desc:
You summon a shadow titan, which appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The shadow titan’s statistics are identical to a [stone Gigante’s](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/stone-Gigante), with two differences: its camouflage ability works in dim ligera instead of rocky terrain, and the “rocks” it hurls are composed of shadow-stuff and cause daño de frío.

The shadow titan is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the shadow titan; it acts on its own turn. It obeys verbal or telepathic commands that you issue to it (giving a command recibe no action on your part). If you don’t issue any commands to the shadow titan, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions.

The shadow titan disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.

name: Conjure Spectral Allies
desc:
You sprinkle some graveyard dirt before you and call forth vengeful spirits. The spirits erupt from the ground at a point you choose within range and sweep outward. cada criatura in a 30-pie-radius sphere centered on that point debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 6d10 daño necrótico and becomes asustado for 1 minuto. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much damage and isn't asustado.
  At the end of each of its turns, a criatura asustado by this spell can make another tirada de salvación. en un éxito, this spell ends on the criatura.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Conjure Spectral Dead
desc: You summon a [shroud](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shroud) to do your bidding. The criatura appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The criatura is friendly to you and your aliados for the duration. Roll initiative for the criatura, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to the criatura, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions. The criatura disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 3rd-level espacio de conjuro, you can choose to summon two [shrouds](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shroud) or one [specter](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/specter). When you cast this spell with a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can choose to summon four [shrouds](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shroud) or one [will-o’-wisp](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/will-o-wisp).
material: a handful of bone dust, a crystal prism, and a silver coin

name: Conjure Undead
desc: You summon a [shadow](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shadow) to do your bidding. The criatura appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The criatura is friendly to you and your aliados for the duration. Roll initiative for the shadow, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to the criatura, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions. The shadow disappears when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro, you can choose to summon a [wight](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/wight) or a [shadow](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shadow). When you cast this spell with a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can choose to summon a [ghost](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghost), a [shadow](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shadow), or a [wight](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/wight).
material: a humanoid skull

name: Conjure Voidborn
desc:
You summon a fiend or aberration of challenge rating 6 or lower, which appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The criatura disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.

Roll initiative for the criatura, which recibe its own turns. It attacks the nearest criatura on its turn. At the start of the fiend’s turn, you can use your reacción to command the criatura by speaking in Void Speech. It obeys your verbal command, and you take 2d6 daño psíquico at the end of the criatura’s turn.

If your Concentración is broken, the spell ends but the criatura doesn’t disappear. Instead, you can no longer issue commands to the fiend, and it becomes hostile to you and your companions. It will attack you and your aliados if it believes it has a chance to win the fight or to inflict meaningful harm, but it won’t fight if it fears doing so would mean its own death. You can’t dismiss the criatura, but it disappears 1 hora after you summoned it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the challenge rating increases by 1 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Conjure Woodland Beings
desc:
You summon fey criaturas that appear in unoccupied spaces that you can see within range. Choose one of the following options for what appears: 
- One fey criatura of challenge rating 2 or lower 
- Two fey criaturas of challenge rating 1 or lower 
- Four fey criaturas of challenge rating 1/2 or lower 
- Eight fey criaturas of challenge rating 1/4 or lower A summoned criatura disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends. The summoned criaturas are friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the summoned criaturas as a group, which have their own turns. They obey any verbal commands that you issue to them (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile criaturas, but otherwise take no actions. The DM has the criaturas' statistics.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using certain higher-level espacios de conjuro, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more criaturas appear: twice as many with a 6th-level slot and three times as many with an 8th-level slot.
material: One holly berry per criatura summoned.

name: Conjure Woodland Beings
desc:
You summon up to 3 criaturas from The Dreaming. These criaturas use the statistics of a woodland being (detailed below) with certain traits determined by your choice of its type: blink dog, satyr, or sprite. If you summon only 2 criaturas with this spell, increase its effective slot level by 1 when determining the minor woodland being's statistics, and if you summon a single criatura with this spell its effective slot level is increased by 2 instead.

The summoned criaturas are friendly to you and your companions and take their turns immediately after yours. They obey your verbal commands. When you command multiple woodland beings using this spell, you must give them all the same command.

Without such commands, a summoned criatura only defends itself.

The summoned criatura disappears when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. If your Concentración is broken before the spell ends, you lose control of any summoned criaturas, which become hostile and might attack you and your companions. An uncontrolled criatura disappears at the end of the spell's maximum duration.
higher_level: Use the higher espacio de conjuro level wherever the spell's level appears in the stat block.

name: Consult the Storm
desc:
You ask a question of an entity connected to storms, such as an elemental, a deity, or a primal spirit, and the entity replies with destructive fury.

As part of the casting of the spell, you must speak a question consisting of fifteen words or fewer. Choose a point within range. A short, truthful answer to your question booms from that point. It can be heard clearly by any criatura within 600 pies. cada criatura within 15 pies of the point recibe 7d6 daño de trueno, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Contact Other Plane
desc: You mentally contact a demigod, the spirit of a long-dead sage, or some other mysterious entity from another plane. Contacting this extraplanar Inteligencia can strain or even break your mind. When you cast this spell, make a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en un fallo, you take 6d6 daño psíquico and are insane until you finish a descanso largo. While insane, you can't take actions, can't understand what other criaturas say, can't read, and speak only in gibberish. A greater restoration spell cast on you ends this effect. en una salvación exitosa, you can ask the entity up to five questions. You must ask your questions before the spell ends. The DM answers each question with one word, such as "yes," "no," "maybe," "never," "irrelevant," or "unclear" (if the entity doesn't know the answer to the question). If a one-word answer would be misleading, the DM might instead offer a short phrase as an answer.

name: Contact Other Plane
desc:
You consult an otherworldly entity, risking your very mind in the process. Make a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en un fallo, you take 6d6 daño psíquico and suffer four levels of strife until you finish a descanso largo. A _greater restoration_ spell ends this effect.

en una salvación exitosa, you can ask the entity up to 5 questions before the spell ends. When possible the entity responds with one-word answers: yes, no, maybe, never, irrelevant, or unclear. At the Narrator's discretion, it may instead provide a brief but truthful answer when necessary.

name: Contagion
desc:
Your touch inflicts disease. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura within your alcance. On a hit, you afflict the criatura with a disease of your choice from any of the ones described below. At the end of each of the objetivo's turns, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. After failing three of these saving throws, the disease's effects last for the duration, and the criatura stops making these saves. After succeeding on three of these saving throws, the criatura recovers from the disease, and the spell ends. Since this spell induces a natural disease in its objetivo, any effect that removes a disease or otherwise ameliorates a disease's effects apply to it.

**Blinding Sickness.** Pain grips the criatura's mind, and its eyes turn milky white. The criatura has desventaja on Sabiduría checks and Sabiduría saving throws and is cegado.

**Filth Fever.** A raging fever sweeps through the criatura's body. The criatura has desventaja on Fuerza checks, Fuerza saving throws, and attack rolls that use Fuerza.

**Flesh Rot.** The criatura's flesh decays. The criatura has desventaja on Carisma checks and vulnerability to all damage.

**Mindfire.** The criatura's mind becomes feverish. The criatura has desventaja on Inteligencia checks and Inteligencia saving throws, and the criatura behaves as if under the effects of the confusion spell during combat.

**Seizure.** The criatura is overcome with shaking. The criatura has desventaja on Destreza checks, Destreza saving throws, and attack rolls that use Destreza.

**Slimy Doom.** The criatura begins to bleed uncontrollably. The criatura has desventaja on Constitución checks and Constitución saving throws. In addition, whenever the criatura recibe damage, it is aturdido until the end of its next turn.

name: Contagion
desc:
Your touch inflicts a hideous disease. Make a melee ataque de conjuro. On a hit, you afflict the objetivo with a disease chosen from the list below.

The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns. After three failed saves, the disease lasts for the duration and the criatura stops making saves, or after three successful saves, the criatura recovers and the spell ends. A greater restoration spell or similar effect also ends the disease.

* **Blinding Sickness:** The objetivo's eyes turn milky white. It is cegado and has desventaja on Sabiduría checks and saving throws.
* **Filth Fever:** The objetivo is wracked by fever. It has desventaja when using Fuerza for an ability check, tirada de ataque, or tirada de salvación.
* **Flesh Rot:** The objetivo's flesh rots. It has desventaja on Carisma ability checks and becomes vulnerable to all damage.
* **Mindfire:** The objetivo hallucinates. During combat it is confused, and it has desventaja when using Inteligencia for an ability check or tirada de salvación.
* **Rattling Cough:** The objetivo becomes discombobulated as it hacks with body-wracking coughs. It is rattled and has desventaja when using Destreza for an ability check, tirada de ataque, or tirada de salvación.
* **Slimy Doom:** The objetivo bleeds uncontrollably. It has desventaja when using Constitución for an ability check or tirada de salvación. Whenever it recibe damage, the objetivo is aturdido until the end of its next turn.

name: Contingency
desc: Choose a spell of 5th level or lower that you can cast, that has a casting time of 1 action, and that can objetivo you. You cast that spell-called the contingent spell-as part of casting contingency, expending espacios de conjuro for both, but the contingent spell doesn't come into effect. Instead, it recibe effect when a certain circumstance occurs. You describe that circumstance when you cast the two spells. For example, a contingency cast with water breathing might stipulate that water breathing comes into effect when you are engulfed in water or a similar liquid. The contingent spell recibe effect immediately after the circumstance is met for the first time, whether or not you want it to. and then contingency ends. The contingent spell recibe effect only on you, even if it can normally objetivo others. You can use only one contingency spell at a time. If you cast this spell again, the effect of another contingency spell on you ends. Also, contingency ends on you if its material component is ever not on your person.
material: A statuette of yourself carved from ivory and decorated with gems worth at least 1,500 gp.

name: Contingency
desc:
As part of this spell, cast a spell of 5th-level or lower that has a casting time of 1 action, expending espacios de conjuro for both. The second spell must objetivo you, and doesn't objetivo others even if it normally would.

Describe the circumstances under which the second spell should be cast. It is automatically triggered the first time these circumstances are met. This spell ends when the second spell is triggered, when you cast _contingency_ again, or if the material component for it is not on your person. For example, when you cast _contingency_ with _blur_ as a second spell you might make the trigger be when you see a criatura objetivo you with a weapon attack, or you might make it be when you make a weapon attack against a criatura, or you could choose for it to be when you see an aliado make a weapon attack against a criatura.

name: Continual Flame
desc: A flame, equivalent in brightness to a torch, springs forth from an object that you touch. The effect looks like a regular flame, but it creates no heat and doesn't use oxygen. A continual flame can be covered or hidden but not smothered or quenched.
material: Ruby dust worth 50 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Continual Flame
desc: A mágico torch-like flame springs forth from the objetivo. The flame creates no heat, doesn't consume oxygen, and can't be extinguished, but it can be covered.

name: Control Water
desc:
Until the spell ends, you control any freestanding water inside an area you choose that is a cube up to 100 pies on a side. You can choose from any of the following effects when you cast this spell. As an action on your turn, you can repeat the same effect or choose a different one.

**Flood.** You cause the water level of all standing water in the area to rise by as much as 20 pies. If the area includes a shore, the flooding water spills over onto dry land. instead create a 20-pie tall wave that travels from one side of the area to the other and then crashes down. Any Huge or smaller vehicles in the wave's path are carried with it to the other side. Any Huge or smaller vehicles struck by the wave have a 25 percent chance of capsizing. The water level remains elevated until the spell ends or you choose a different effect. If this effect produced a wave, the wave repeats on the start of your next turn while the flood effect lasts

 **Part Water.** You cause water in the area to move apart and create a trench. The trench extends across the spell's area, and the separated water forms a wall to either side. The trench remains until the spell ends or you choose a different effect. The water then slowly fills in the trench over the course of the next ronda until the normal water level is restored.

**Redirect Flow.** You cause flowing water in the area to move in a direction you choose, even if the water has to flow over obstacles, up walls, or in other unlikely directions. The water in the area moves as you direct it, but once it moves beyond the spell's area, it resumes its flow based on the terrain conditions. The water continues to move in the direction you chose until the spell ends or you choose a different effect.

**Whirlpool.** This effect requires a body of water at least 50 pies square and 25 pies deep. You cause a whirlpool to form in the center of the area. The whirlpool forms a vortex that is 5 pies wide at the base, up to 50 pies wide at the top, and 25 pies tall. Any criatura or object in the water and within 25 pies of the vortex is pulled 10 pies toward it. A criatura can swim away from the vortex by making a Fuerza (Atletismo) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. When a criatura enters the vortex for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 2d8 daño contundente and is caught in the vortex until the spell ends. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe la mitad del daño, and isn't caught in the vortex. A criatura caught in the vortex can use its action to try to swim away from the vortex as described above, but has desventaja on the Fuerza (Atletismo) check to do so. The first time each turn that an object enters the vortex, the object recibe 2d8 daño contundente; this damage occurs each ronda it remains in the vortex.
material: A drop of water and a pinch of dust.

name: Control Water
desc:
Water inside the area is yours to command. On the ronda you cast it, and as an action on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you can choose one of the following effects. When you choose a different effect, the current one ends.

* **Flood:** The standing water level rises by up to 20 pies. The flood water spills onto land if the area includes a shore, but when the area is in a large body of water you instead create a 20-foottall wave. The wave travels across the area and crashes down, carrying Huge or smaller vehicles to the other side, each of which has a 25% chance of capsizing. The wave repeats on the start of your next turn while this effect continues.
* **Part Water:** You create a 20-pie wide trench spanning the area with walls of water to either side. When this effect ends, the trench slowly refills over the course of the next ronda.
Redirect Flow: Flowing water in the area moves in a direction you choose, including up. Once the water moves beyond the spell's area, it resumes its regular flow based on the terrain.
* **Whirlpool:** If the affected body of water is at least 50 pies square and 25 pies deep, a whirlpool forms within the area in a 50-pie wide cone that is 25 pies long. criaturas and objects that are in the area and within 25 pies of the whirlpool make an Atletismo check against your CD de salvación del conjuro or are pulled 10 pies toward it. Once within the whirlpool, checks made to swim out of it have desventaja. When a criatura first enters the whirlpool on a turn or starts its turn there, it makes a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or recibe 2d8 daño contundente and is pulled into the center of the whirlpool. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe la mitad del daño and isn't pulled.

name: Control Weather
desc: You take control of the weather within 5 millas of you for the duration. You must be outdoors to cast this spell. Moving to a place where you don't have a clear path to the sky ends the spell early. When you cast the spell, you change the current weather conditions, which are determined by the DM based on the climate and season. You can change precipitation, temperature, and wind. It recibe 1d4 x 10 minutos for the new conditions to take effect. Once they do so, you can change the conditions again. When the spell ends, the weather gradually returns to normal. When you change the weather conditions, find a current condition on the following tables and change its stage by one, up or down. When changing the wind, you can change its direction.
material: Burning incense and bits of earth and wood mixed in water.

name: Control Weather
desc:
You must be outdoors to cast this spell, and it ends early if you don't have a clear path to the sky.

Until the spell ends, you change the weather conditions in the area from what is normal for the current climate and season. Choose to increase or decrease each weather condition (precipitation, temperature, and wind) up or down by one stage on the following tables. Whenever you change the wind, you can also change its direction. The new conditions take effect after 1d4 × 10 minutos, at which point you can change the conditions again. The weather gradually returns to normal when the spell ends.

name: Converse With Dragon
desc:
You gain limited telepatía, allowing you to communicate with any criatura within 120 pies of you that has the dragon type, regardless of the criatura’s languages. A dragon can choose to make a tirada de salvación de Carisma to prevent telepathic contact with itself.

This spell doesn’t change a dragon’s disposition toward you or your aliados, it only opens a channel of communication. In some cases, unwanted telepathic contact can worsen the dragon’s attitude toward you.

name: Convey Inner Peace
desc: You imbue yourself and up to five willing criaturas within range with the ability to enter a meditative trance like an elf. Once before the spell ends, an affected criatura can complete a descanso largo in 4 horas, meditating as an elf does while in trance. After resting in this way, cada criatura gains the same benefit it would normally gain from 8 horas of rest.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorceror, Warlock, Wizard

name: Corpse Explosion
desc: A corpse explodes in a poisonous cloud. cada criatura in a 10-pie radius of the corpse debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. A criatura recibe 3d6 daño de trueno and is envenenado for 1 minuto en una salvación fallida, or it recibe half as much damage and is not envenenado on a successful one. A envenenado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect for itself en un éxito.
higher_level: You objetivo an additional corpse for every 2 slot levels above 1st.

name: Cosmic Alignment
desc: Deep Magic: illumination You arrange the forces of the cosmos to your benefit. Choose a cosmic event from the Comprehension of the Starry Sky ability that affects spellcasting (conjunction, eclipse, or nova; listed after the spell). You cast spells as if under the effect of the cosmic event until the next sunrise or 24 horas have passed. When the ability requires you to expend your Perspicacia, you expend your ritual focus instead. This spell must be cast outdoors, and the casting of this spell is obvious to everyone within 100 millas of its casting when an appropriate symbol, such as a flaming comet, appears in the sky above your location while you are casting the spell. Conjunction: Planetary conjunctions destabilize minds and emotions. You can give una criatura you can see desventaja on a tirada de salvación against one enchantment or illusion spell cast by you. Eclipse: Eclipses plunge the world into darkness and strengthen connections to the shadow plane. When you cast a spell of 5th level or lower that causes daño necrótico, you can reroll a number of damage dice up to your Inteligencia modifier (minimum of one). You must use the new rolls. Nova: The nova is a powerful aid to divination spells. You can treat one divination spell you cast as though you had used a espacio de conjuro one level higher than the slot actually used.

name: Costly Victory
desc:
You select up to ten enemigos you can see that are within range. Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, that criatura is cursed to burst into flame if it reduces one of your aliados to 0 puntos de golpe before this spell’s duration expires. The affected criatura recibe 6d8 daño de fuego and 6d8 daño radiante when it bursts into flame.

If the affected criatura is wearing flammable material (or is made of flammable material, such as a plant criatura), it catches on fuego and continues burning; the criatura recibe daño de fuego equal to your spellcasting ability modifier at the end of each of its turns until the criatura or one of its aliados within 5 pies of it uses an action to extinguish the fuego.

name: Counterspell
desc: You attempt to interrupt a criatura in the process of casting a spell. If the criatura is casting a spell of 3rd level or lower, its spell fails and has no effect. If it is casting a spell of 4th level or higher, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The CD equals 10 + the spell's level. en un éxito, the criatura's spell fails and has no effect.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the interrupted spell has no effect if its level is less than or equal to the level of the espacio de conjuro you used.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature within 60 feet of you casting a spell

name: Counterspell
desc:
You attempt to interrupt a criatura in the process of casting a spell. If the criatura is casting a spell of 2nd-level or lower, its spell fails and has no effect.

If it is casting a spell of 3rd-level or higher, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (CD 10 + the spell's level). en un éxito, the criatura's spell fails and has no effect, but the criatura can use its reacción to reshape the fraying magic and cast another spell with the same casting time as the original spell.

This new spell must be cast at a espacio de conjuro level equal to or less than half the original espacio de conjuro.
higher_level: The interrupted spell has no effect if its level is less than the level of the espacio de conjuro used to cast this spell, or if both spells use the same level espacio de conjuro an opposed spellcasting ability check is made.

name: Create Food and Water
desc: You create 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of water on the ground or in containers within range, enough to sustain up to fifteen humanoids or five steeds for 24 horas. The food is bland but nourishing, and spoils if uneaten after 24 horas. The water is clean and doesn't go bad.

name: Create Food and Water
desc: Your magic turns one serving of food or water into 3 Supply. The food is nourishing but bland, and the water is clean. After 24 horas uneaten food spoils and water affected or created by this spell goes bad.
higher_level: You create an additional 2 Supply for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Create Ring Servant
desc:
You touch two metal rings and infuse them with life, creating a short-lived but sentient construct known as a [ring servant](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ring-servant). The ring servant appears adjacent to you. It reverts form, changing back into the rings used to cast the spell, when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.

The ring servant is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. Roll initiative for the ring servant, which acts on its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to the ring servant, it defends itself and you from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions.
material: two metal rings

name: Create Thunderstaff
desc:
After you cast **create thunderstaff** on a normal quarterstaff, the staff must then be mounted in a noisy location, such as a busy marketplace, and left there for 60 days. During that time, the staff gradually absorbs ambient sound.

After 60 days, the staff is fully charged and can’t absorb any more sound. At that point, it becomes a **thunderstaff**, a +1 quarterstaff that has 10 charges. When you hit on a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo with the staff and expend 1 charge, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d8 daño de trueno. You can cast a [thunderwave](https://api.open5e.com/spells/thunderwave) spell from the staff as a acción adicional by expending 2 charges. The staff cannot be recharged.

If the final charge is not expended within 60 days, the staff becomes no mágico again.
material: a quarterstaff

name: Create Undead
desc: You can cast this spell only at night. Choose up to three corpses of Medium or Small humanoids within range. Each corpse becomes a ghoul under your control. (The DM has game statistics for these criaturas.) As a acción adicional on each of your turns, you can mentally command any criatura you animated with this spell if the criatura is within 120 pies of you (if you control multiple criaturas, you can command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the criatura will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the criatura only defends itself against hostile criaturas. Once given an order, the criatura continues to follow it until its task is complete. The criatura is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any command you have given it. To maintain control of the criatura for another 24 horas, you must cast this spell on the criatura before the current 24-hora period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to three criaturas you have animated with this spell, rather than animating new ones.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, you can animate or reassert control over four ghouls. When you cast this spell using an 8th-level espacio de conjuro, you can animate or reassert control over five ghouls or two ghasts or wights. When you cast this spell using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, you can animate or reassert control over six ghouls, three ghasts or wights, or two mummies.
material: One clay pot filled with grave dirt, one clay pot filled with brackish water, and one 150 gp black onyx stone for each corpse.

name: Create Undead
desc:
This spell cannot be cast in sunlight. You reanimate the objetivos as undead and transform them into ghouls under your control.

While it is within 120 pies you can use a acción adicional to mentally command the undead. When you command multiple undead using this spell, you must give them all the same command. You may decide the action the undead recibe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. If not given a command, the undead only defends itself. The undead continues to follow a command until its task is complete.

The undead is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any commands. You must cast this spell on the undead before the spell ends to maintain control of it for another 24 horas. Casting the spell in this way reasserts control over up to 3 undead you have animated with this spell, rather than animating a new one.
higher_level: You create or reassert control over one additional ghoul for each slot level above 6th. Alternatively, when using an 8th-level espacio de conjuro you create or reassert control over 2 ghasts or wights, or when using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro you create or reassert control over 3 ghasts or wights, or 2 mummies. When commanding more than 3 undead they make group attack rolls (see page 454 in Chapter 8: Combat).

name: Create or Destroy Water
desc:
You either create or destroy water.

**Create Water.** You create up to 10 gallons of clean water within range in an open container. Alternatively, the water falls as rain in a 30-pie cube within range

 **Destroy Water.** You destroy up to 10 gallons of water in an open container within range. Alternatively, you destroy fog in a 30-pie cube within range.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you create or destroy 10 additional gallons of water, or the size of the cube increases by 5 pies, for each slot level above 1st.
material: A drop of water if creating water, or a few grains of sand if destroying it.

name: Create or Destroy Water
desc:
Choose one of the following.

* **Create Water:** You fill the objetivo with up to 10 gallons of nonpotable water or 1 Supply of clean water. Alternatively, the water falls as rain that extinguishes exposed flames in the area.
* **Destroy Water:** You destroy up to 10 gallons of water in the objetivo. Alternatively, you destroy fog in the area.
higher_level: For each slot level above 1st, you either create or destroy 10 additional gallons of water, or the size of the cube increases by 5 pies.

name: Creation
desc:
You pull wisps of shadow material from the Shadowfell to create a nonliving object of vegetable matter within 'range': soft goods, rope, wood, or something similar. You can also use this spell to create mineral objects such as stone, crystal, or metal. The object created must be no larger than a 5-pie cube, and the object must be of a form and material that you have seen before. The duration depends on the object's material. If the object is composed of multiple materials, use the shortest duration

 **Vegetable matter** 1 day **Stone or crystal** 12 horas **Precious metals** 1 hora **Gems** 10 minutos **Adamantine or mithral** 1 minuto Using any material created by this spell as another spell's material component causes that spell to fail.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the cube increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 5th.
material: A tiny piece of matter of the same type of the item you plan to create.

name: Creation
desc:
You weave raw magic into a mundane physical object no larger than a 5-pie cube. The object must be of a form and material you have seen before. Using the object as a material component for another spell causes that spell to fail.

The spell's duration is determined by the object's material. An object composed of multiple materials uses the shortest duration.
higher_level: The size of the cube increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 5th.

name: Creeping Ice
desc:
You create a sheet of ice that covers a 5-pie square within range and lasts for the spell’s duration. The iced area is difficult terrain.

A criatura in the area where you cast the spell debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be apresado by ice that rapidly encases it. A criatura apresado by the ice recibe 2d6 daño de frío at the start of its turn. A apresado criatura can use an action to make a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro, freeing itself en un éxito, but it has desventaja on this check. The criatura can also be freed (and the spell ended) by dealing at least 20 damage to the ice. The apresado criatura recibe half el daño from any attacks against the ice.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th to 6th level, the area increases to a 10-pie square, the ice causa 4d6 daño de frío, and 40 damage is needed to melt each 5-pie square. When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the area increases to a 20-pie square, the ice causa 6d6 daño de frío, and 60 damage is needed to melt each 5-pie square.

name: Crown of Thorns
desc: You create a psíquico binding on the mind of a criatura within range. Until this spell ends, the criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma each time it casts a spell. en una salvación fallida, it recibe 2d6 daño psíquico, and it fails to cast the spell. It doesn't expend a espacio de conjuro if it fails to cast the spell.

name: Cruor of Visions
desc: You prick your finger with a bone needle as you cast this spell, taking 1 daño necrótico. This drop of blood must be caught in a container such as a platter or a bowl, where it grows into a pool 1 pie in diameter. This pool acts as a crystal ball for the purpose of scrying. If you place a drop (or dried flakes) of another criatura's blood in the cruor of visions, the criatura has desventaja on any tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to resist scrying. Additionally, you can treat the pool of blood as a crystal ball of telepatía (see the crystal ball description in the Fifth Edition rules). I When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the pool of blood acts as either a crystal ball of mind reading or a crystal ball of true seeing (your choice when the spell is cast).

name: Crushing Curse
desc: You speak a word of Void Speech. Choose a criatura you can see within range. If the objetivo can hear you, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 1d6 daño psíquico and be ensordecido for 1 minuto, except that it can still hear Void Speech. A criatura ensordecido in this way can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect en un éxito.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Crushing Haymaker
desc: Your fist reverberates with destructive energy, and woe betide whatever it strikes. As part of casting the spell, make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura or object within 5 pies. If you hit, the objetivo of your attack recibe 7d6 daño de trueno, and debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución or be knocked derribado and aturdido until the end of its next turn. This spell's damage is doubled against objects and structures.
higher_level: The spell causa an extra 1d6 of daño de trueno for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Crushing Trample
desc:
Upon casting this spell, you are filled with a desire to overrun your foes. You immediately move up to twice your Velocidad in a straight line, trampling every foe in your path that is of your size category or smaller. If you try to move through the space of an enemigo whose size is larger than yours, your movement (and the spell) ends. Each enemigo whose space you move through debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be knocked derribado and take 4d6 daño contundente. If you have hooves, add your Fuerza modifier (minimum of +1) to el daño.

You move through the spaces of foes whether or not they succeed on their Fuerza saving throws. You do not provoke opportunity attacks while moving under the effect of **crushing trample**.

name: Cure Beast
desc: A beast of your choice that you can see within range regains a number of puntos de golpe equal to 1d6 + your spellcasting modifier.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Cure Wounds
desc: A criatura you touch regains a number of puntos de golpe equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Cure Wounds
desc: The objetivo regains puntos de golpe equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
higher_level: The puntos de golpe regained increase by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Curse Ring
desc: You lay a curse upon a ring you touch that isn’t being worn or carried. When you cast this spell, select one of the possible effects of [bestow curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/bestow-curse). The next criatura that willingly wears the ring suffers the chosen effect with no tirada de salvación. The curse transfers from the ring to the wearer once the ring is put on; the ring becomes a mundane ring that can be taken off, but the curse remains on the criatura that wore the ring until the curse is removed or dispelled. An [identify](https://api.open5e.com/spells/identify) spell cast on the cursed ring reveals the fact that it is cursed.
material: 250 gp worth of diamond dust, which the spell consumes

name: Curse of Boreas
desc: You designate a criatura within range that you can see. If the objetivo fails a tirada de salvación de Carisma, it and its equipment are frozen solid, becoming an inert statue of ice. The criatura is effectively paralizado, but mental activity does not cease, and signs of life are detectable; the criatura still breathes and its heart continues to beat, though both acts are almost imperceptible. If the ice statue is broken or damaged while frozen, the criatura will have matching damage or injury when returned to its original state. [Dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) can’t end this spell, but it can allow the objetivo to speak (but not move or cast spells) for a number of rondas equal to the espacio de conjuro used. [Greater restoration](https://api.open5e.com/spells/greater-restoration) or more potent magic is needed to free a criatura from the ice.

name: Curse of Dust
desc: You cast a curse on a criatura within range that you’re familiar with, causing it to be unsatiated by food no matter how much it eats. This effect isn’t merely an issue of Percepción; the objetivo physically can’t draw sustenance from food. Within minutos after the spell is cast, the objetivo feels constant hunger no matter how much food it consumes. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución 24 horas after the spell is cast and every 24 horas thereafter. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo gains one level of agotamiento. The effect ends when the duration expires or when the objetivo makes two consecutive successful saves.
material: a piece of spoiled food

name: Curse of Formlessness
desc: A criatura you touch debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be cursed with a shifting, amorphous form. Spells that change the objetivo criatura's shape (such as polymorph) do not end the curse, but they do hold the criatura in a stable form, temporarily mitigating it until the end of that particular spell's duration; shapechange and stoneskin have similar effects. While under the effect of the curse of formlessness, the objetivo criatura is resistant to cortante and daño perforante and ignores the additional damage done by critical hits, but it can neither hold nor use any item, nor can it cast spells or activate magic items. Its movement is halved, and winged flight becomes impossible. Any armor, clothing, helmet, or ring becomes useless. Large items that are carried or worn, such as armor, backpacks, or clothing, become hindrances, so the objetivo has desventaja on Destreza checks and saving throws while such items are in place. A criatura under the effect of a curse of formlessness can try to hold itself together through fuerza of will. The afflicted criatura uses its action to repeat the tirada de salvación; if it succeeds, the afflicted criatura negates the penalties from the spell until the start of its next turn.

name: Curse of Incompetence
desc:
By making mocking gestures toward una criatura within
range that can see you, you leave the criatura incapable of
performing at its best. If the objetivo fails on an Inteligencia
tirada de salvación, roll a d4 and refer to the following table to
determine what the objetivo does on its turn. An affected
objetivo repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its
turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito or applying
the result of another roll on the table en un fallo.

| D4 | RESULT |
|---|---|
| 1 | objetivo spends its turn shouting mocking words at caster and recibe a -5 penalty to its initiative roll. |
| 2 | objetivo stands transfixed and blinking, recibe no action. |
| 3 | objetivo flees or fights (50 percent chance of each). |
| 4 | objetivo charges directly at caster, enraged. |

name: Curse of Yig
desc:
This spell transforms a Small, Medium, or Large criatura that you can see within range into a [servant of Yig](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/servant-of-yig). An unwilling criatura can attempt a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, negating the effect with a success. A willing criatura is automatically affected and remains so for as long as you maintain Concentración on the spell.

The transformation lasts for the duration or until the objetivo drops to 0 puntos de golpe or dies. The objetivo’s statistics, including mental ability scores, are replaced by the statistics of a servant of Yig. The transformed criatura’s alignment becomes neutral evil, and it is both friendly to you and reverent toward the Father of Serpents. Its equipment is unchanged. If the transformed criatura was unwilling, it makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the end of each of its turns. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends, the criatura’s alignment and personality return to normal, and it regains its former attitude toward you and toward Yig.

When it reverts to its normal form, the criatura has the number of puntos de golpe it had before it transformed. If it reverts as a result of dropping to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to its normal form.
material: a drop of snake venom
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Curse of the Grave
desc:
You tap your connection to death to curse a humanoid, making the grim pull of the grave stronger on that criatura’s soul.

Choose one humanoid you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or become cursed. A [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse) spell or similar magic ends this curse. While cursed in this way, the objetivo suffers the following effects:

* The objetivo fails death saving throws on any roll but a 20.
* If the objetivo dies while cursed, it rises 1 ronda later as a vampire spawn under your control and is no longer cursed.
* The objetivo, as a vampire spawn, seeks you out in an attempt to serve its new master. You can have only one vampire spawn under your control at a time through this spell. If you create another, the existing one turns to dust. If you or your companions do anything harmful to the objetivo, it can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, it is no longer under your control.
material: a pinch of dirt from a freshly dug grave

name: Cursed Gift
desc: **Cursed gift** imbues an object with a harmful mágico effect that you or another criatura in physical contact with you is currently suffering from. If you give this object to a criatura that freely accepts it during the duration of the spell, the recipient debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, the harmful effect is transferred to the recipient for the duration of the spell (or until the effect ends). Returning the object to you, destroying it, or giving it to someone else has no effect. Remove curse and comparable magic can relieve the individual who received the item, but the harmful effect still returns to the previous victim when this spell ends if the effect’s duration has not expired.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the duration increases by 24 horas for each slot level above 4th.
material: an object worth at least 75 gp

name: Cynophobia
desc: Choose a criatura that you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or develop an overriding fear of canids, such as dogs, wolves, foxes, and worgs. For the duration, the first time the objetivo sees a canid, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become asustado of that canid until the end of its next turn. Each time the objetivo sees a different canid, it debe realizar the tirada de salvación. In addition, the objetivo has desventaja on ability checks and attack rolls while a canid is within 10 pies of it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 24 horas. When you use a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 1 month. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 8th or 9th level, the spell lasts until it is dispelled.
material: a dog’s tooth

name: Daggerhawk
desc: When **daggerhawk** is cast on a no mágico dagger, a ghostly hawk appears around the weapon. The hawk and dagger fly into the air and make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against una criatura you select within 60 pies, using your ataque de conjuro modifier and dealing daño perforante equal to 1d4 + your Inteligencia modifier on a hit. On your subsequent turns, you can use an action to cause the daggerhawk to attack the same objetivo. The daggerhawk has AC 14 and, although it’s invulnerable to all damage, a successful attack against it that causa contundente, fuerza, or daño cortante sends the daggerhawk tumbling, so it can’t attack again until after your next turn.
material: a dagger

name: Damaging Intel
desc: You study a criatura you can see within range, learning its weaknesses. The criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. If it fails, you learn its damage vulnerabilities, damage resistances, and damage immunities, and the next attack one of your aliados in range makes against the objetivo before the end of your next turn has ventaja.

name: Dancing Lights
desc: You create up to four torch-sized lights within range, making them appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs that hover in the air for the duration. You can also combine the four lights into one glowing vaguely humanoid form of Medium size. Whichever form you choose, each ligera sheds dim ligera in a 10-pie radius. As a acción adicional on your turn, you can move the lights up to 60 pies to a new spot within range. A ligera must be within 20 pies of another ligera created by this spell, and a ligera winks out if it exceeds the spell's range.
material: A bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm.

name: Dancing Lights
desc:
You create up to four hovering lights which appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs that can be combined into a glowing Medium-sized humanoid form. Each sheds dim ligera in a 10-pie radius.

You can use a acción adicional to move the lights up to 60 pies so long as each remains within 20 pies of another ligera created by this spell. A dancing ligera winks out when it exceeds the spell's range.

name: Dark Dementing
desc: A dark shadow creeps across the objetivo’s mind and leaves a small bit of shadow essence behind, triggering a profound fear of the dark. A criatura you designate within range debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. If it fails, the objetivo becomes asustado of you for the duration. A asustado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación each time it recibe damage, ending the effect en un éxito. While asustado in this way, the criatura will not willingly enter or attack into a space that isn’t brightly lit. If it’s in dim ligera or darkness, the criatura must either move toward bright ligera or create its own (by lighting a lantern, casting a [ligera](https://api.open5e.com/spells/ligera) spell, or the like).
material: a moonstone

name: Dark Heraldry
desc:
Dark entities herald your entry into combat, instilling an existential dread in your enemigos. Designate a number of criaturas up to your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of one) that you can see within range and that have an alignment different from yours. Each of those criaturas recibe 5d8 daño psíquico and becomes asustado of you; a criatura that makes a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría recibe half as much damage and is not asustado.

A criatura asustado in this way repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. The criatura makes this tirada de salvación with desventaja if you can see it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Dark Maw
desc:
Thick, penumbral ichor drips from your shadow-stained mouth, filling your mouth with Gigante shadow fangs. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d8 daño necrótico as your shadowy fangs sink into it. If you have a bite attack (such as from a racial trait or a spell like [alter self](https://api.open5e.com/spells/after-self)), you can add your spellcasting ability modifier to the tirada de daño but not to your temporary puntos de golpe.

If you hit a humanoid objetivo, you gain 1d4 temporary puntos de golpe until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Dark Path
desc: You conjure a shadowy road between two points within range to create a bridge or path. This effect can bridge a chasm or create a smooth path through difficult terrain. The dark path is 10 pies wide and up to 50 pies long. It can support up to 500 pounds of weight at one time. A criatura that adds more weight than the path can support sinks through the path as if it didn’t exist.
material: a lodestone

name: Darkbolt
desc: You utter a quick invocation to create a black nimbus around your hand, then hurl three rays of darkness at one or more objetivos in range. The rays can be divided between objetivos however you like. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro for each objetivo (not each ray); each ray that hits causa 1d10 daño de frío. A objetivo that was hit by one or more rays debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be unable to use reactions until the start of its next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you create one additional ray for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Darklight
desc: You create an enchanted flame that surrounds your hand and produces no heat, but sheds bright ligera in a 20-pie radius around you and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. Only you and up to 6 criaturas of your choice can see this ligera.

name: Darkness
desc: mágico darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 15-pie-radius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. A criatura with visión en la oscuridad can't see through this darkness, and no mágico ligera can't illuminate it. If the point you choose is on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the darkness emanates from the object and moves with it. Completely covering the source of the darkness with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the darkness. If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of ligera created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell that created the ligera is dispelled.
material: Bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal.

name: Darkness
desc:
mágico darkness heavily obscures visión en la oscuridad and blocks no mágico ligera in the area. The darkness spreads around corners. If any of the area overlaps with mágico ligera created by a spell of 2nd-level or lower, the spell that created the ligera is dispelled.

When cast on an object that is in your possession or unattended, the darkness emanates from it and moves with it. Completely covering the object with something that is not transparent blocks the darkness.

name: Darkvision
desc: You touch a willing criatura to grant it the ability to see in the dark. For the duration, that criatura has visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies.
material: Either a pinch of dried carrot or an agate.

name: Darkvision
desc: The objetivo gains visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies.
higher_level: The range of the objetivo's visión en la oscuridad increases to 120 pies. In addition, for each slot level above 3rd you may choose an additional objetivo.

name: Daylight
desc: A 60-pie-radius sphere of ligera spreads out from a point you choose within range. The sphere is bright ligera and sheds dim ligera for an additional 60 pies. If you chose a point on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the ligera shines from the object and moves with it. Completely covering the affected object with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the ligera. If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of darkness created by a spell of 3rd level or lower, the spell that created the darkness is dispelled.

name: Daylight
desc:
mágico ligera fills the area. The area is brightly lit and sheds dim ligera for an additional 60 pies. If any of the area overlaps with mágico darkness created by a spell of 3rd-level or lower, the spell that created the darkness is dispelled.

When cast on an object that is in your possession or unattended, the ligera shines from it and moves with it. Completely covering the object with something that is not transparent blocks the ligera.

name: Dead Walking
desc: As part of the casting of this spell, you place a copper piece under your tongue. This spell makes up to six willing criaturas you can see within range invisible to undead for the duration. Anything a objetivo is wearing or carrying is invisible as long as it is on the objetivo's person. The spell ends for all objetivos if un objetivo attacks or casts a spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 3rd-level espacio de conjuro, it lasts for 1 hora without requiring your Concentración. When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a copper piece

name: Deadly Salvo
desc: When you cast this spell, the munición flies from your hand with a loud bang, targeting up to five criaturas or objects you can see within range. You can launch the bullets at un objetivo or several. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro for each bullet. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 3d6 daño perforante. This damage can experience a burst, as described in the gunpowder weapon property (see the Adventuring Gear chapter), but this spell counts as a single effect for the purposes of determining how many times el daño can burst, regardless of the number of objetivos affected.

name: Deadly Sting
desc: You grow a 10-pie-long tail as supple as a whip, tipped with a horrible stinger. During the spell’s duration, you can use the stinger to make a melee ataque de conjuro with a alcance of 10 pies. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d4 daño perforante plus 4d10 daño de veneno, and a criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or become vulnerable to daño de veneno for the duration of the spell.
material: a thorn

name: Deadweight
desc:
The objetivo object's weight is greatly increased. Any criatura holding the object debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or drop it. A criatura which doesn't drop the object has desventaja on attack rolls until the start of your next turn as it figures out the object's new balance.

criaturas that attempt to push, drag, or lift the object debe tener éxito en a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to do so.

name: Death God’s Touch
desc: This spell allows you to shred the life fuerza of a criatura you touch. You become invisible and make a melee ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 10d10 daño necrótico. If this damage reduces the objetivo to 0 puntos de golpe, the objetivo dies. Whether the attack hits or misses, you remain invisible until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, el daño increases by 2d10 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Death Ward
desc: You touch a criatura and grant it a measure of protection from death. The first time the objetivo would drop to 0 puntos de golpe as a result of taking damage, the objetivo instead drops to 1 punto de golpe, and the spell ends. If the spell is still in effect when the objetivo is subjected to an effect that would kill it instantaneously without dealing damage, that effect is instead negated against the objetivo, and the spell ends.

name: Death Ward
desc: The first time damage would reduce the objetivo to 0 puntos de golpe, it instead drops to 1 punto de golpe. If the objetivo is subjected to an effect that would kill it instantaneously without dealing damage, that effect is negated. The spell ends immediately after either of these conditions occur.

name: Decay
desc: Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura you touch. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d10 daño necrótico. If the objetivo is a Tiny or Small no mágico object that isn’t being worn or carried by a criatura, it automatically recibe maximum damage from the spell.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d10 when you alcance 5th level (2d10), 11th level (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).
material: a handful of ash

name: Decelerate
desc: You slow the flow of time around a criatura within range that you can see. The criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, or its walking Velocidad is halved (ronda up to the nearest 5-pie increment). The criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect en un éxito. Until the spell ends, en una salvación fallida the objetivo’s Velocidad is halved again at the start of each of your turns. For example, if a criatura with a Velocidad of 30 pies fails its initial tirada de salvación, its Velocidad drops to 15 pies. At the start of your next turn, the criatura’s Velocidad drops to 10 pies en una salvación fallida, then to 5 pies on the following ronda on another failed save. **Decelerate** can’t reduce a criatura’s Velocidad to less than 5 pies.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can affect an additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a toy top
dnd_class: Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Deep Breath
desc: The recipient of this spell can breathe and function normally in thin atmosphere, suffering no ill effect at altitudes of up to 20,000 pies. If more than una criatura is touched during the casting, the duration is divided evenly among todas las criaturas touched.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the duration increases by 2 horas for each slot level above 1st.

name: Defile Healing
desc: You attempt to reverse the energy of a healing spell so that it causa damage instead of healing. If the healing spell is being cast with a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or lower, the slot is expended but the spell restores no puntos de golpe. In addition, cada criatura that was targeted by the healing spell recibe daño necrótico equal to the healing it would have received, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level, it can reverse a healing spell being cast using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or lower. If you use a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, it can reverse a healing spell being cast using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or lower.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature cast a healing spell

name: Delay Passing
desc: You draw forth the ebbing life fuerza of a criatura and question it. Upon casting this spell, you must touch a criatura that dropped to 0 puntos de golpe since your last turn. If it fails a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, you temporarily prevent its spirit from passing into the next realm. You are able to hear the spirit, though the spirit doesn't appear to any criatura without the ability to see invisible criaturas. The spirit communicates directly with your psyche and cannot see or hear anything but what you tell it. You can ask the spirit a number of questions equal to your competencia bonus. Questions must be asked directly; a delay of more than 10 seconds between the spirit answering one question and you asking another allows the spirit to escape into the afterlife. The corpse's knowledge is limited to what it knew during life, including the languages it spoke. The spirit cannot lie to you, but it can refuse to answer a question that would harm its living family or friends, or truthfully answer that it doesn't know. Once the spirit answers your allotment of questions, it passes on.

name: Delay Potion
desc:
Upon casting this spell, you delay the next potion you consume from taking effect for up to 1 hora. You must consume the potion within 1 ronda of casting **delay potion**; otherwise the spell has no effect. At any point during **delay potion’s** duration, you can use a acción adicional to cause the potion to go into effect. When the potion is activated, it works as if you had just drunk it. While the potion is delayed, it has no effect at all and you can consume and benefit from other potions normally.

You can delay only one potion at a time. If you try to delay the effect of a second potion, the spell fails, the first potion has no effect, and the second potion has its normal effect when you drink it.

name: Delayed Blast Fireball
desc: A beam of yellow ligera flashes from your pointing finger, then condenses to linger at a chosen point within range as a glowing bead for the duration. When the spell ends, either because your Concentración is broken or because you decide to end it, the bead blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame that spreads around corners. cada criatura in a 20-pie-radius sphere centered on that point debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura recibe daño de fuego equal to the total accumulated damage en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The spell's base damage is 12d6. If at the end of your turn the bead has not yet detonated, el daño increases by 1d6. If the glowing bead is touched before the interval has expired, the criatura touching it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the spell ends immediately, causing the bead to erupt in flame. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura can throw the bead up to 40 pies. When it strikes a criatura or a solid object, the spell ends, and the bead explodes. The fuego damages objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the base damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 7th.
material: A tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur.

name: Delayed Blast Fireball
desc:
A glowing bead of yellow ligera flies from your finger and lingers at a point at the center of the area until you end the spell—either because your Concentración is broken or because you choose to end it—and the bead detonates. cada criatura in the area recibe 12d6 daño de fuego. If at the end of your turn the bead has not yet detonated, el daño increases by 1d6.

If touched before the spell ends, the criatura touching the bead makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or the bead detonates. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura can use an action to throw the bead up to 40 pies, moving the area with it. If the bead strikes a criatura or solid object, the bead detonates.

The fuego spreads around corners, and it damages and ignites any flammable unattended objects in the area.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Delayed Healing
desc: Touch a living criatura (not a construct or undead) as you cast the spell. The next time that criatura recibe damage, it immediately regains puntos de golpe equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of 1).
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the healing increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a bloodstone worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Demiplane
desc: You create a shadowy door on a flat solid surface that you can see within range. The door is large enough to allow Medium criaturas to pass through unhindered. When opened, the door leads to a demiplane that appears to be an empty room 30 pies in each dimension, made of wood or stone. When the spell ends, the door disappears, and any criaturas or objects inside the demiplane remain trapped there, as the door also disappears from the other side. Each time you cast this spell, you can create a new demiplane, or have the shadowy door connect to a demiplane you created with a previous casting of this spell. Additionally, if you know the Naturaleza and contents of a demiplane created by a casting of this spell by another criatura, you can have the shadowy door connect to its demiplane instead.

name: Demiplane
desc:
You create a shadowy door on the objetivo. The door is large enough for Medium criaturas to pass through. The door leads to a demiplane that appears as an empty, 30-pie-cube chamber made of wood or stone. When the spell ends, the door disappears from both sides, trapping any criaturas or objects inside the demiplane.

Each time you cast this spell, you can either create a new demiplane, conjure the door to a demiplane you have previously created, or make a door leading to a demiplane whose Naturaleza or contents you are familiar with.

name: Demon Within
desc:
One humanoid of your choice within range becomes a gateway for a demon to enter the plane of existence you are on. You choose the demon’s type from among those of challenge rating of 4 or lower. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the gateway fails to open, and the spell has no effect. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo recibe 4d6 daño de fuerza from the demon’s attempt to claw its way through the gate. For the spell’s duration, you can use a acción adicional to further agitate the demon, dealing an additional 2d6 daño de fuerza to the objetivo each time.

If the objetivo drops to 0 puntos de golpe while affected by this spell, the demon tears through the body and appears in the same space as its now incapacitado or dead victim. You do not control this demon; it is free to either attack or leave the area as it chooses. The demon disappears after 24 horas or when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe.
material: a vial of blood from a humanoid killed within the previous 24 horas

name: Desiccating Breath
desc: You spew forth a cloud of black dust that draws all moisture from a 30-pie cone. Each animal in the cone recibe 4d10 daño necrótico, or half as much damage if it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. el daño is 6d10 for plants and plant criaturas, also halved on a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución.
material: a clump of dried clay

name: Desolation
desc:
You plant an obsidian acorn in solid ground and spend an hora chanting a litany of curses to the natural world, after which the land within 1 milla of the acorn becomes infertile, regardless of its previous state. Nothing will grow there, and all plant life in the area dies over the course of a day. Plant criaturas are not affected. Spells that summon plants, such as [entangle](https://api.open5e.com/spells/entangle), require an ability check using the caster’s spellcasting ability against your CD de salvación del conjuro. On a successful check, the spell functions normally; if the check fails, the spell is countered by **desolation**.

After one year, the land slowly reverts to its normal fertility, unable to stave off the march of Naturaleza.

A living criatura that finishes a descanso corto within the area of a **desolation** spell halves the result of any Hit Dice it expends. Desolation counters the effects of a [bloom](https://api.open5e.com/spells/bloom) spell.

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the duration becomes permanent.
material: an obsidian acorn worth 500 gp, which is consumed in the casting

name: Destructive Resonance
desc: You shout a scathing string of Void Speech that assaults the minds of those before you. cada criatura in a 15-pie cone that can hear you recibe 4d6 daño psíquico, or half that damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. A criatura damaged by this spell can’t take reactions until the start of its next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Detect Dragons
desc: You can detect the presence of dragons and other Dracónico criaturas within your line of sight and 120 pies, regardless of disguises, illusions, and alteration magic such as polymorph. The information you uncover depends on the number of consecutive rondas you spend an action studying a subject or area. On the first ronda of examination, you detect whether any Dracónico criaturas are present, but not their number, location, identity, or type. On the second ronda, you learn the number of such criaturas as well as the general condition of the most powerful one. On the third and subsequent rondas, you make a CD 15 Inteligencia (Arcanos) check; if it succeeds, you learn the age, type, and location of one Dracónico criatura. Note that the spell provides no information on the turn in which it is cast, unless you have the means to take a second action that turn.

name: Detect Evil and Good
desc: For the duration, you know if there is an aberration, Celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, or undead within 30 pies of you, as well as where the criatura is located. Similarly, you know if there is a place or object within 30 pies of you that has been magically consecrated or desecrated. The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 pie of stone, 1 inch of Común metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 pies of wood or dirt.

name: Detect Evil and Good
desc:
You attempt to sense the presence of otherworldly forces. You automatically know if there is a place or object within range that has been magically consecrated or desecrated.
