In addition, on the ronda you cast it and as an action on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you may make a Sabiduría (Religión) check against the passive Engaño score of any aberration, Celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, or undead criatura within range. en un éxito, you sense the criatura's presence, as well as where the criatura is located.

The spell penetrates most barriers but is blocked by 3 pies of wood or dirt, 1 pie of stone, 1 inch of Común metal, or a thin sheet of lead.

name: Detect Magic
desc: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 pies of you. If you sense magic in this way, you can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible criatura or object in the area that bears magic, and you learn its school of magic, if any. The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 pie of stone, 1 inch of Común metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 pies of wood or dirt.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Ritual Caster, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Detect Magic
desc:
Until the spell ends, you automatically sense the presence of magic within range, and you can use an action to study the aura of a magic effect to learn its schools of magic (if any).

The spell penetrates most barriers but is blocked by 3 pies of wood or dirt, 1 pie of stone, 1 inch of Común metal, or a thin sheet of lead.
higher_level: When using a 2nd-level espacio de conjuro or higher, the spell no longer requires your Concentración. When using a 3rd-level espacio de conjuro or higher, the duration increases to 1 hora. When using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro or higher, the duration increases to 8 horas.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Herald, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Detect Poison and Disease
desc: For the duration, you can sense the presence and location of poisons, poisonous criaturas, and diseases within 30 pies of you. You also identify the kind of veneno, poisonous criatura, or disease in each case. The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 pie of stone, 1 inch of Común metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 pies of wood or dirt.
material: A yew leaf.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Ritual Caster

name: Detect Poison and Disease
desc:
On the ronda you cast it, and as an action on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you can attempt to sense the presence of poisons, poisonous criaturas, and disease by making a Percepción check. en un éxito you identify the type of each veneno or disease within range. Typically noticing and identifying a veneno or disease is a CD 10 check, but the Narrator may use CD 15 for uncommon afflictions, CD 20 for rare afflictions, or CD 25 for afflictions that are truly unique. On a failed check, this casting of the spell cannot sense that specific veneno or disease.

The spell penetrates most barriers but is blocked by 3 pies of wood or dirt, 1 pie of stone, 1 inch of Común metal, or a thin sheet of lead.

name: Detect Thoughts
desc: For the duration, you can read the thoughts of certain criaturas. When you cast the spell and as your action on each turn until the spell ends, you can focus your mind on any una criatura that you can see within 30 pies of you. If the criatura you choose has an Inteligencia of 3 or lower or doesn't speak any language, the criatura is unaffected. You initially learn the surface thoughts of the criatura-what is most on its mind in that moment. As an action, you can either shift your attention to another criatura's thoughts or attempt to probe deeper into the same criatura's mind. If you probe deeper, the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. If it fails, you gain Perspicacia into its reasoning (if any), its emotional state, and something that looms large in its mind (such as something it worries over, loves, or hates). If it succeeds, the spell ends. Either way, the objetivo knows that you are probing into its mind, and unless you shift your attention to another criatura's thoughts, the criatura can use its action on its turn to make an Inteligencia check contested by your Inteligencia check; if it succeeds, the spell ends. Questions verbally directed at the objetivo criatura naturally shape the course of its thoughts, so this spell is particularly effective as part of an interrogation. You can also use this spell to detect the presence of thinking criaturas you can't see. When you cast the spell or as your action during the duration, you can search for thoughts within 30 pies of you. The spell can penetrate barriers, but 2 pies of rock, 2 inches of any metal other than lead, or a thin sheet of lead blocks you. You can't detect a criatura with an Inteligencia of 3 or lower or one that doesn't speak any language. Once you detect the presence of a criatura in this way, you can read its thoughts for the rest of the duration as described above, even if you can't see it, but it must still be within range.
material: A copper coin.

name: Detect Thoughts
desc:
On the ronda you cast it, and as an action on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you can probe a criatura's mind to read its thoughts by focusing on una criatura you can see within range. The criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. criaturas with an Inteligencia score of 3 or less or that don't speak any languages are unaffected. en una salvación fallida, you learn the criatura's surface thoughts —what is most on its mind in that moment. en una salvación exitosa, you fail to read the criatura's thoughts and can't attempt to probe its mind for the duration. Conversation naturally shapes the course of a criatura's thoughts and what it is thinking about may change based on questions verbally directed at it.

Once you have read a criatura's surface thoughts, you can use an action to probe deeper into its mind. The criatura makes a second tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación exitosa, you fail to read the criatura's deeper thoughts and the spell ends. en un fallo, you gain Perspicacia into the criatura's motivations, emotional state, and something that looms large in its mind.

The criatura then becomes aware you are probing its mind and can use an action to make an Inteligencia check contested by your Inteligencia check, ending the spell if it succeeds.

Additionally, you can use an action to scan for thinking criaturas within range that you can't see.

Once you detect the presence of a thinking criatura, so long as it remains within range you can attempt to read its thoughts as described above (even if you can't see it).

The spell penetrates most barriers but is blocked by 2 pies of stone, 2 inches of Común metal, or a thin sheet of lead.
higher_level:
When using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro, increase the spell's range to 1 milla. When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, increase the range to 10 millas.

When using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, increase the range to 1, 000 millas.

name: Deva’s Wings
desc: You touch a willing criatura. The objetivo grows feathery wings of pure white that grant it a volando Velocidad of 60 pies and the ability to hover. When the objetivo recibe the Attack action, it can use a acción adicional to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma with the wings, with a alcance of 10 pies. If the wing attack hits, the objetivo recibe daño contundente equal to 1d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier and debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or fall derribado. When the spell ends, the wings disappear, and the objetivo falls if it was aloft.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional objetivo for each slot level above 4th.
material: a wing feather from any bird

name: Devouring Darkness
desc:
Terrifying and nightmarish monsters exist within the unknown void of the in-between. Choose up to six points you can see within range. Voidlike, mágico darkness spreads from each point to fill a 10-footradius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. A criatura with visión en la oscuridad can't see through this darkness, and no ligera, mágico or no mágico, can illuminate it.
  cada criatura inside a sphere when this spell is cast debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 6d10 daño perforante and 5d6 daño psíquico and is apresado until it breaks free as unseen entities bite and tear at it from the Void. Once a successful save, the criatura recibe half as much damage and isn't apresado. A apresado criatura can use its action to make a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If it succeeds, it is no longer apresado.
  When a criatura enters a sphere for the first time on a turn or starts its turn in a sphere, that criatura debe realizar an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. The criatura recibe 5d6 daño psíquico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
  Once created, the spheres can't be moved. A criatura in overlapping spheres doesn't suffer additional effects for being in more than one sphere at a time.

name: Dimension Door
desc: You teleport yourself from your current location to any other spot within range. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction, such as "200 pies straight downward" or "upward to the northwest at a 45-degree angle, 300 pies." You can bring along objects as long as their weight doesn't exceed what you can carry. You can also bring one willing criatura of your size or smaller who is carrying gear up to its carrying capacity. The criatura must be within 5 pies of you when you cast this spell. If you would arrive in a place already occupied by an object or a criatura, you and any criatura traveling with you each take 4d6 daño de fuerza, and the spell fails to teleport you.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Paladin, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Dimension Door
desc:
You teleport to any place you can see, visualize, or describe by stating distance and direction such as 200 pies straight downward or 400 pies upward at a 30-degree angle to the southeast.

You can bring along objects if their weight doesn't exceed what you can carry. You can also bring one willing criatura of your size or smaller, provided it isn't carrying gear beyond its carrying capacity and is within 5 pies.

If you would arrive in an occupied space the spell fails, and you and any criatura with you each take 4d6 daño de fuerza.

name: Dimensional Shove
desc: This spell pushes a criatura you touch through a dimensional portal, causing it to disappear and then reappear a short distance away. If the objetivo fails a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, it disappears from its current location and reappears 30 pies away from you in a direction of your choice. This travel can take it through walls, criaturas, or other solid surfaces, but the objetivo can't reappear inside a solid object or not on solid ground; instead, it reappears in the nearest safe, unoccupied space along the path of travel.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the objetivo is shoved an additional 30 pies for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Disguise Self
desc: You make yourself - including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person - look different until the spell ends or until you use your action to dismiss it. You can seem 1 pie shorter or taller and can appear thin, fat, or in between. You can't change your body type, so you must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you. The changes wrought by this spell fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this spell to add a hat to your outfit, objects pass through the hat, and anyone who touches it would feel nothing or would feel your head and hair. If you use this spell to appear thinner than you are, the hand of someone who reaches out to touch you would bump into you while it was seemingly still in midair. To discern that you are disguised, a criatura can use its action to inspect your apperance and debe tener éxito en an Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

name: Disguise Self
desc:
Until the spell ends or you use an action to dismiss it, you and your gear are cloaked by an illusory disguise that makes you appear like another criatura of your general size and body type, including but not limited to: your heritage, 1 pie of height, weight, clothing, tattoos, piercings, facial features, hair style and length, skin and eye coloration, sex, and any other distinguishing features. You cannot disguise yourself as a criatura of a different size category, and your limb structure remains the same; for example if you're bipedal, you can't use this spell to appear as a quadruped.

The disguise does not hold up to physical inspection. A criatura that tries to grab an illusory hat, for example, finds its hand passes straight through the figment. To see through your disguise without such an inspection, a criatura must use its action to make an Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.
higher_level: When using a 3rd-level espacio de conjuro or higher, this spell functions identically to the seeming spell, except the spell's duration is 10 minutos.

name: Disintegrate
desc: A thin green ray springs from your pointing finger to a objetivo that you can see within range. The objetivo can be a criatura, an object, or a creation of mágico fuerza, such as the wall created by wall of fuerza. A criatura targeted by this spell debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo recibe 10d6 + 40 daño de fuerza. If this damage reduces the objetivo to 0 puntos de golpe, it is disintegrated. A disintegrated criatura and everything it is wearing and carrying, except magic items, are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. The criatura can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell. This spell automatically disintegrates a Large or smaller no mágico object or a creation of mágico fuerza. If the objetivo is a Huge or larger object or creation of fuerza, this spell disintegrates a 10-pie-cube portion of it. A magic item is unaffected by this spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, el daño increases by 3d6 for each slot level above 6th.
material: A lodestone and a pinch of dust.

name: Disintegrate
desc:
A pale ray emanates from your pointed finger to the objetivo as you attempt to undo it.

The objetivo recibe 10d6 + 40 daño de fuerza. A criatura reduced to 0 puntos de golpe is obliterated, leaving behind nothing but fine dust, along with anything it was wearing or carrying (except magic items). Only true resurrection or a wish spell can restore it to life.

This spell automatically disintegrates no mágico objects and creations of mágico fuerza that are Large-sized or smaller. Larger objects and creations of mágico fuerza have a 10-pie-cube portion disintegrated instead. Magic items are unaffected.
higher_level: el daño increases by 3d6 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Dispel Evil and Good
desc:
Shimmering energy surrounds and protects you from fey, undead, and criaturas originating from beyond the Material Plane. For the duration, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead have desventaja on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions.

**Break Enchantment.** As your action, you touch a criatura you can alcance that is hechizado, asustado, or possessed by a Celestial, an elemental, a fey, a fiend, or an undead. The criatura you touch is no longer hechizado, asustado, or possessed by such criaturas.

**Dismissal.** As your action, make a melee ataque de conjuro against a Celestial, an elemental, a fey, a fiend, or an undead you can alcance. On a hit, you attempt to drive the criatura back to its home plane. The criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Carisma or be sent back to its home plane (if it isn't there already). If they aren't on their home plane, undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and fey are sent to the Feywild.
material: Holy water or powdered silver and iron.

name: Dispel Evil and Good
desc:
A nimbus of power surrounds you, making you more able to resist and destroy beings from beyond the realms material.

Until the spell ends, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead have desventaja on attack rolls against you.

You can end the spell early by using an action to do either of the following.

* **Mental Resistance:** Choose up to 3 friendly criaturas within 60 pies. Each of those criaturas that is hechizado, asustado, or possessed by a Celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, or undead may make an immediate tirada de salvación with ventaja against the condition or possession, ending it en un éxito.
* **Retribution:** Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a Celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, or undead within alcance. On a hit, the criatura recibe 7d8 radiante or daño necrótico (your choice) and is aturdido until the beginning of your next turn.
higher_level: Mental Resistance objetivos one additional criatura for each slot level above 5th, and Retribution's damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Dispel Magic
desc: Choose una criatura, object, or mágico effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the objetivo ends. For each spell of 4th level or higher on the objetivo, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The CD equals 10 + the spell's level. On a successful check, the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you automatically end the effects of a spell on the objetivo if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the espacio de conjuro you used.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Dispel Magic
desc: You scour the magic from your objetivo. Any spell cast on the objetivo ends if it was cast with a espacio de conjuro of 3rd-level or lower. For spells using a espacio de conjuro of 4th-level or higher, make an ability check with a CD equal to 10 + the spell's level for each one, ending the effect en un éxito.
higher_level: You automatically end the effects of a spell on the objetivo if the level of the espacio de conjuro used to cast it is equal to or less than the level of the espacio de conjuro used to cast dispel magic.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Herald, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Disquieting Gaze
desc: Your eyes burn with scintillating motes of unholy crimson ligera. Until the spell ends, you have ventaja on Carisma (Intimidación) checks made against criaturas that can see you, and you have ventaja on ataque de conjuro rolls that deal daño necrótico to criaturas that can see your eyes.

name: Disruptive Aura
desc: A warping, prismatic aura surrounds and outlines cada criatura inside a 10-pie cube within range. The aura sheds dim ligera out to 10 pies, and the the locations of hidden or invisible criaturas are outlined. If a criatura in the area tries to cast a spell or use a magic item, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación exitosa, the spell or item functions normally. en una salvación fallida, the effect of the spell or the item is suppressed for the duration of the aura. Time spent suppressed counts against the duration of the spell’s or item’s effect.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 9th‐level espacio de conjuro, the cube is 20 pies on a side.

name: Distracting Divination
desc: Foresight tells you when and how to be just distracting enough to foil an enemigo spellcaster. When an adjacent enemigo tries to cast a spell, make a melee ataque de conjuro against that enemigo. On a hit, the enemigo’s spell fails and has no effect; the enemigo’s action is used up but the espacio de conjuro isn’t expended.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy tries to cast a spell

name: Distraction Cascade
desc: With a flash of foresight, you throw a foe off balance. Choose una criatura you can see that your aliado has just declared as the objetivo of an attack. Unless that criatura makes a successful tirada de salvación de Carisma, attacks against it are made with ventaja until the end of this turn.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an ally declares an attack against an enemy you can see
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Divination
desc: Your magic and an offering put you in contact with a god or a god's servants. You ask a single question concerning a specific goal, event, or activity to occur within 7 days. The DM offers a truthful reply. The reply might be a short phrase, a cryptic rhyme, or an omen. The spell doesn't take into account any possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of additional spells or the loss or gain of a companion. If you cast the spell two or more times before finishing your next descanso largo, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get a random reading. The DM makes this roll in secret.
material: Incense and a sacrificial offering appropriate to your Religión, together worth at least 25gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Divination
desc:
Your offering and magic put you in contact with the higher power you serve or its representatives.

You ask a single question about something that will (or could) happen in the next 7 days. The Narrator offers a truthful reply, which may be cryptic or even nonverbal as appropriate to the being in question.

The reply does not account for possible circumstances that could change the outcome, such as making additional precautions.

When you cast this spell again before finishing a descanso largo, the chance of getting a random reading from the above options increases. The Narrator makes the following roll in secret: second casting—25%, third casting—50%, fourth casting—75%, fifth casting—100%.

name: Divine Favor
desc: Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Until the spell ends, your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 daño radiante on a hit.

name: Divine Favor
desc: You imbue divine power into your strikes. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d4 daño radiante with your weapon attacks.

name: Divine Retribution
desc: With a last word before you fall inconsciente, this spell inflicts daño radiante to your attacker equal to 1d8 + the amount of damage you took from the triggering attack. If the attacker is a fiend or undead, it recibe an extra 1d8 daño radiante. The criatura then debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or become aturdido for 1 minuto. At the end of each of its turns, the criatura can make another tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación exitosa, it is no longer aturdido.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when a weapon attack reduces you to 0 hit points

name: Divine Word
desc:
You utter a divine word, imbued with the power that shaped the world at the dawn of creation. Choose any number of criaturas you can see within range. cada criatura that can hear you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, a criatura suffers an effect based on its current puntos de golpe: 
- 50hp or less: ensordecido for 1 minuto 
- 40 hp or less: ensordecido and cegado for 10 minutos 
- 30 hp or less: cegado, ensordecido and dazed for 1 hora 
- 20 hp or less: killed instantly. Regardless of its current puntos de golpe, a Celestial, an elemental, a fey, or a fiend that fails its save is forced back to its plane of origin (if it isn't there already) and can't return to your current plane for 24 horas by any means short of a wish spell.

name: Divine Word
desc:
You utter a Primordial imprecation that brings woe upon your enemigos. A objetivo suffers an effect based on its current puntos de golpe.

* Fewer than 50 puntos de golpe: ensordecido for 1 minuto.
* Fewer than 40 puntos de golpe: cegado and ensordecido for 10 minutos.
* Fewer than 30 puntos de golpe: aturdido, cegado, and ensordecido for 1 hora.
* Fewer than 20 puntos de golpe: instantly killed outright.

Additionally, when a Celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend is affected by this spell it is immediately forced back to its home plane and for 24 horas it is unable to return to your current plane by any means less powerful than a wish spell. Such a criatura does not suffer this effect if it is already on its plane of origin.

name: Dominate Beast
desc: You attempt to beguile a beast that you can see within range. It debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be hechizado by you for the duration. If you or criaturas that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has ventaja on the tirada de salvación. While the beast is hechizado, you have a telepathic link with it as long as the two of you are on the same plane of existence. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the criatura while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack that criatura," "Run over there," or "Fetch that object." If the criatura completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itself to the best of its ability. You can use your action to take total and precise control of the objetivo. Until the end of your next turn, the criatura recibe only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time, you can also cause the criatura to use a reacción, but this requires you to use your own reacción as well. Each time the objetivo recibe damage, it makes a new tirada de salvación de Sabiduría against the spell. If the tirada de salvación succeeds, the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell with a 5th-­level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 10 minutos. When you use a 6th-­level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 1 hora. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 8 horas.
archetype: Cleric: Nature, Warlock: Archfey, Great Old One

name: Dominate Beast
desc:
You assert control over the objetivo beast's mind and it is hechizado for the duration. If it is engaged in combat with you or criaturas friendly to you, it has ventaja on its tirada de salvación.

Until the hechizado condition ends, you establish a telepathic link with it while you are on the same plane. You may issue commands through this link and the objetivo does its best to obey. No action is required to issue commands, which can be a simple and general course of action such as "Attack that objetivo, " "Go over there, " or "Bring me that object." Without commands the objetivo only defends itself. The objetivo continues to follow a command until its task is complete.

You can use your action to assume direct control of the objetivo. Until the end of your next turn, you decide all of the objetivo's actions and it does nothing you do not allow it to. While a objetivo is directly controlled in this way, you can also cause it to use a reacción, but this requires you to use your own reacción as well.

Each time the objetivo recibe damage, it makes a new tirada de salvación against the spell, ending the spell en un éxito.
higher_level: The spell's duration is extended: 5th-level—Concentración (10 minutos), 6th-level—Concentración (1 hora), 7th-level—Concentración (8 horas).

name: Dominate Monster
desc: You attempt to beguile a criatura that you can see within range. It debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be hechizado by you for the duration. If you or criaturas that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has ventaja on the tirada de salvación. While the criatura is hechizado, you have a telepathic link with it as long as the two of you are on the same plane of existence. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the criatura while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack that criatura," "Run over there," or "Fetch that object." If the criatura completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itself to the best of its ability. You can use your action to take total and precise control of the objetivo. Until the end of your next turn, the criatura recibe only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time, you can also cause the criatura to use a reacción, but this requires you to use your own reacción as well. Each time the objetivo recibe damage, it makes a new tirada de salvación de Sabiduría against the spell. If the tirada de salvación succeeds, the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell with a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 8 horas.

name: Dominate Monster
desc:
You assert control over the objetivo criatura's mind and it is hechizado for the duration. If it is engaged in combat with you or criaturas friendly to you, it has ventaja on its tirada de salvación.

Until the hechizado condition ends, you establish a telepathic link with it while you are on the same plane. You may issue commands through this link and the objetivo does its best to obey. No action is required to issue commands, which can be a simple and general course of action such as "Attack that objetivo, " "Go over there, " or "Bring me that object." Without commands the objetivo only defends itself. The objetivo continues to follow a command until its task is complete.

You can use your action to assume direct control of the objetivo. Until the end of your next turn, you decide all of the objetivo's actions and it does nothing you do not allow it to. While a objetivo is directly controlled in this way, you can also cause it to use a reacción, but this requires you to use your own reacción as well.

Each time the objetivo recibe damage, it makes a new tirada de salvación against the spell, ending the spell en un éxito.
higher_level: The duration is Concentración (8 horas)

name: Dominate Person
desc: You attempt to beguile a humanoid that you can see within range. It debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be hechizado by you for the duration. If you or criaturas that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has ventaja on the tirada de salvación. While the objetivo is hechizado, you have a telepathic link with it as long as the two of you are on the same plane of existence. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the criatura while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack that criatura," "Run over there," or "Fetch that object." If the criatura completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itself to the best of its ability. You can use your action to take total and precise control of the objetivo. Until the end of your next turn, the criatura recibe only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time you can also cause the criatura to use a reacción, but this requires you to use your own reacción as well. Each time the objetivo recibe damage, it makes a new tirada de salvación de Sabiduría against the spell. If the tirada de salvación succeeds, the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 10 minutos. When you use a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 1 hora. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 8 horas.
archetype: Cleric: Trickery, Warlock: Archfey, Great Old One

name: Dominate Person
desc:
You assert control over the objetivo humanoid's mind and it is hechizado for the duration. If it is engaged in combat with you or criaturas friendly to you, it has ventaja on its tirada de salvación.

Until the hechizado condition ends, you establish a telepathic link with it while you are on the same plane. You may issue commands through this link and the objetivo does its best to obey. No action is required to issue commands, which can be a simple and general course of action such as "Attack that objetivo, " "Go over there, " or "Bring me that object." Without commands the objetivo only defends itself. The objetivo continues to follow a command until its task is complete.

You can use your action to assume direct control of the objetivo. Until the end of your next turn, you decide all of the objetivo's actions and it does nothing you do not allow it to. While a objetivo is directly controlled in this way, you can also cause it to use a reacción, but this requires you to use your own reacción as well.

Each time the objetivo recibe damage, it makes a new tirada de salvación against the spell, ending the spell en un éxito.
higher_level: The spell's duration is extended: 6th-level—Concentración (10 minutos), 7th-level —Concentración (1 hora), 8th-level —Concentración (8 horas).

name: Doom of Ancient Decrepitude
desc: You generate an entropic field that rapidly ages every criatura in the area of effect. The field covers a sphere with a 20-pie radius centered on you. Every criatura inside the sphere when it's created, including you, debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or gain 2 levels of agotamiento from sudden, traumatic aging. A criatura that ends its turn in the field must repeat the tirada de salvación, gaining 1 level of agotamiento per subsequent failure. You have ventaja on these saving throws. An affected criatura sheds 1 level of agotamiento at the end of its turn, if it started the turn outside the spell's area of effect (or the spell has ended). Only 1 level of agotamiento can be removed this way; all remaining levels are removed when the criatura completes a short or descanso largo. A criatura that died from gaining 6 levels of agotamiento, however, remains dead.

name: Doom of Blue Crystal
desc:
You are surrounded by a field of glowing, blue energy lasting 3 rondas. criaturas within 5 pies of you, including yourself, debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución when the spell is cast and again at the start of each of your turns while the spell is in effect. A criatura whose tirada de salvación fails is apresado; a apresado criatura whose tirada de salvación fails is paralizado; and a paralizado criatura whose tirada de salvación fails is petrificado and transforms into a statue of blue crystal. As with all Concentración spells, you can end the field at any time (no action required). If you are turned to crystal, the spell ends after all affected criaturas make their saving throws. apresado and paralizado criaturas recover immediately when the spell ends, but petrification is permanent.

criaturas turned to crystal can see, hear, and smell normally, but they don’t need to eat or breathe. If shatter is cast on a crystal criatura, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución against the caster’s CD de salvación del conjuro or be killed.

criaturas transformed into blue crystal can be restored with dispel magic, greater restoration, or comparable magic.
material: a blue crystal

name: Doom of Consuming Fire
desc: You are wreathed in frío, purple fuego that damages criaturas near you. You take 1d6 daño de frío each ronda for the duration of the spell. criaturas within 5 pies of you when you cast the spell and at the start of each of your turns while the spell is in effect take 1d8 daño de frío.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 3rd-level espacio de conjuro, the purple fuego extends 10 pies from you, you take 1d8 daño de frío, and other criaturas take 1d10 daño de frío. When you cast this spell using a 4th‐level slot, the fuego extends 15 pies from you, you take1d10 daño de frío, and other criaturas take 1d12 daño de frío. When you cast this spell using a slot of 5th level or higher, the fuego extends to 20 pies, you take 1d12 daño de frío, and other criaturas take 1d20 daño de frío.
material: a dead coal or a fistful of ashes

name: Doom of Dancing Blades
desc:
When you cast **doom of dancing blades**, you create 1d4 illusory copies of your weapon that float in the air 5 pies from you. These images move with you, spinning, shifting, and mimicking your attacks. When you are hit by a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo but the tirada de ataque exceeded your Clase de Armadura by 3 or less, one illusory weapon parries the attack; you take no damage and the illusory weapon is destroyed. When you are hit by a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo that an illusory weapon can’t parry (the tirada de ataque exceeds your AC by 4 or more), you take only half as much damage from the attack, and an illusory weapon is destroyed. Spells and effects that affect an area or don’t require an tirada de ataque affect you normally and don’t destroy any illusory weapons.

If you make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo that scores a critical hit while **doom of dancing blades** is in effect on you, all your illusory weapons also strike the objetivo and deal 1d8 contundente, perforante, or daño cortante (your choice) each.

The spell ends when its duration expires or when all your illusory weapons are destroyed or expended.

An attacker must be able to see the illusory weapons to be affected. The spell has no effect if you are invisible or in total darkness or if the attacker is cegado.

name: Doom of Disenchantment
desc:
When you cast **doom of disenchantment**, your armor and shield glow with ligera. When a criatura hits you with an attack, the spell counters any magic that provides the attack with a bonus para impactar or to damage. For example, a +1 weapon would still be considered mágico, but it gets neither +1 para impactar nor +1 to damage on any attack against you.

The spell also suppresses other mágico properties of the attack. A [sword of wounding](https://api.open5e.com/magicitems/sword-of-wounding), for example, can’t cause ongoing wounds on you, and you recover puntos de golpe lost to the weapon's damage normally. If the attack was a spell, it’s affected as if you had cast [counterspell](https://api.open5e.com/spells/counterspell), using Carisma as your spellcasting ability. Spells with a duration of Instantáneo, however, are unaffected.

name: Doom of Serpent Coils
desc:
You drink a dose of venom or other veneno and spread the effect to other living things around you. If the veneno normally allows a tirada de salvación, your save automatically fails. You suffer the effect of the veneno normally before spreading the veneno to all other living criaturas within 10 pies of you. Instead of making the usual tirada de salvación against the veneno, cada criatura around you makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución against the spell. en una salvación exitosa, a objetivo suffers no damage or other effect from the veneno and is immune to further castings of **doom of serpent coils** for 24 horas. en una salvación fallida, a objetivo doesn't suffer the veneno’s usual effect; instead, it recibe 4d6 daño de veneno and is envenenado. While envenenado in this way, a criatura repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns. On a subsequent failed save, it recibe 4d6 daño de veneno and is still envenenado. On a subsequent successful save, it is no longer envenenado and is immune to further castings of **doom of serpent coils** for 24 horas.

Multiple castings of this spell have no additional effect on criaturas that are already envenenado by it. The effect can be ended by [protection from veneno](https://api.open5e.com/spells/protection-from-veneno) or comparable magic.
material: a vial of veneno

name: Doom of Voracity
desc: You create a ripple of dark energy that destroys everything it touches. You create a 10-pie-radius, 10-pie-deep cylindrical extra-dimensional hole on a horizontal surface of sufficient size. Since it extends into another dimension, the pit has no weight and does not otherwise displace the original underlying material. You can create the pit in the deck of a ship as easily as in a dungeon floor or the ground of a forest. Any criatura standing in the original conjured space, or on an expanded space as it grows, debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza to avoid falling in. The sloped pit edges crumble continuously, and any criatura adjacent to the pit when it expands debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza to avoid falling in. criaturas subjected to a successful pushing effect (such as by a spell like incapacitado for 2 rondas. When the spell ends, criaturas within the pit debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. Those who succeed rise up with the bottom of the pit until they are standing on the original surface. Those who fail also rise up but are aturdido for 2 rondas.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, increase the depth of the pit by 10 pies for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Doom of the Cracked Shield
desc: Doom of the cracked shield is cast on a melee weapon. The next time that weapon is used, it destroys the objetivo’s no mágico shield or damages no mágico armor, in addition to the normal effect of the attack. If the foe is using a no mágico shield, it breaks into pieces. If the foe doesn’t use a shield, its no mágico armor recibe a -2 penalty to AC. If the objetivo doesn’t use armor or a shield, the spell is expended with no effect.

name: Doom of the Earthen Maw
desc:
The ground within 30 pies of a point you designate turns into filthy and slippery muck. This spell affects sand, earth, mud, and ice, but not stone, wood, or other material. For the duration, the ground in the affected area is difficult terrain. A criatura in the area when you cast the spell debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be apresado by the mud until the spell ends. A apresado criatura can free itself by using an action to make a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza. A criatura that frees itself or that enters the area after the spell was cast is affected by the difficult terrain but doesn’t become apresado.

Each ronda, a apresado criatura sinks deeper into the muck. A Medium or smaller criatura that is apresado for 3 rondas becomes submerged at the end of its third turn. A Large criatura becomes submerged after 4 rondas. Submerged criaturas begin suffocating if they aren’t holding their breath. A criatura that is still submerged when the spell ends is sealed beneath the newly solidified ground. The criatura can escape only if someone else digs it out or it has a burrowing Velocidad.

name: Doom of the Slippery Rogue
desc: A **doom of the slippery rogue** spell covers a 20-pie-by-20-pie section of wall or floor within range with a thin coating of grease. If a vertical surface is affected, each climber on that surface debe realizar a successful CD 20 Fuerza (Atletismo) check or immediately fall from the surface unless it is held in place by ropes or other escalando gear. A criatura standing on an affected floor falls derribado unless it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. criaturas that try to climb or move through the affected area can move no faster than half Velocidad (this is cumulative with the usual reduction for escalando), and any movement must be followed by a tirada de salvación de Fuerza (for escalando) or a tirada de salvación de Destreza (for walking). en una salvación fallida, the moving criatura falls or falls derribado.
material: bacon fat

name: Door of the Far Traveler
desc:
You conjure a door to the destination of your choice that lasts for the duration or until dispelled. You sketch the outline of the door with chalk on any hard surface (a wall, a cliffside, the deck of a ship, etc.) and scribe sigils of power around its outline. The doorway must be at least 1 pie wide by 2 pies tall and can be no larger than 5 pies wide by 10 pies tall. Once the door is drawn, place the knob appropriately; it attaches magically to the surface and your drawing becomes a real door to the spell's destination. The doorway remains functional for the spell's duration. During that time, anyone can open or close the door and pass through it in either direction.
  The destination can be on any plane of existence. It must be familiar to you, and your level of familiarity with it determines the accuracy of the spell (determined by the GM). If it's a place you've visited, you can expect 100 percent accuracy. If it's been described to you by someone who was there, you might arrive in the wrong room or even the wrong structure, depending on how detailed their description was. If you've only heard about the destination third-hand, you may end up in a similar structure that's in a very different locale.
  *Door of the far traveler* doesn't create a doorway at the destination. It connects to an existing, working door. It can't, for example, take you to an open field or a forest with no structures (unless someone built a doorframe with a door in that spot for this specific purpose!). While the spell is in effect, the pre-existing doorway connects only to the area you occupied while casting the spell. If you connected to an existing doorway between a home's parlor and library, for example, and your door leads into the library, then people can still walk through that doorway from the parlor into the library normally. Anyone trying to go the other direction, however, arrives wherever you came from instead of in the parlor.
  Before casting the spell, you must spend one hora etching mágico symbols onto the doorknob that will serve as the spell's material component to attune it to your desired destination. Once prepared, the knob remains attuned to that destination until it's used or you spend another hora attuning it to a different location.
  *The door of the far traveler* is dispelled if you remove the knob from the door. You can do this as a acción adicional from either side of the door, provided it's shut. If the spell's duration expires naturally, the knob falls to the ground on whichever side of the door you're on. Once the spell ends, the knob loses its attunement to any location and another hora must be spent attuning it before it can be used again.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a 9thlevel slot, the duration increases to 12 horas.

name: Douse Light
desc: With a simple gesture, you can put out a single small source of ligera within range. This spell extinguishes a torch, a candle, a lantern, or a [ligera](https://api.open5e.com/spells/ligera) or [dancing lights](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dancing-lights) truco.

name: Draconic Smite
desc: The next time you hit a criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma during the spell’s duration, your weapon recibe on the form of a silver dragon’s head. Your attack causa an extra 1d6 daño de frío, and up to four other criaturas of your choosing within 30 pies of the attack’s objetivo must each make a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1d6 daño de frío.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the extra daño de frío and the daño de frío dealt to the secondary criaturas increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Dragon Breath
desc:
You summon Dracónico power to gain a breath weapon. When you cast dragon breath, you can immediately exhale a cone or line of elemental energy, depending on the type of dragon you select. While the spell remains active, roll a d6 at the start of your turn. On a roll of 5 or 6, you can take a acción adicional that turn to use the breath weapon again.

When you cast the spell, choose one of the dragon types listed below. Your choice determines the affected area and el daño of the breath attack for the spell’s duration.

| Dragon Type | Area | Damage |
|---|---|---|
| Black | 30-pie line, 5 pies wide | 6d6 daño de ácido |
| Blue | 30-pie line, 5 pies wide | 6d6 daño de rayo |
| Green | 15-pie cone | 6d6 daño de veneno |
| Red | 15-pie cone | 6d6 daño de fuego |
| White | 15-pie cone | 6d6 daño de frío |
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, el daño increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 5th.
material: a piece of a dragon’s tooth

name: Dragon Roar
desc: Your voice is amplified to assault the mind of una criatura. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. If it fails, the objetivo recibe 1d4 daño psíquico and is asustado until the start of your next turn. A objetivo can be affected by your dragon roar only once per 24 horas.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases by 1d4 when you alcance 5th level (2d4), 11th level (3d4), and 17th level (4d4).

name: Dramatic Sting
desc:
You frighten the objetivo by echoing its movements with ominous music and terrifying sound effects. It recibe 1d4 daño psíquico and becomes asustado of you until the spell ends.

At the end of each of the criatura's turns, it can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 1d4 daño psíquico.

You cannot cast another spell through your spellcasting focus while concentrating on this spell.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Dream
desc: This spell shapes a criatura's dreams. Choose a criatura known to you as the objetivo of this spell. The objetivo must be on the same plane of existence as you. criaturas that don't sleep, such as elves, can't be contacted by this spell. You, or a willing criatura you touch, enters a trance state, acting as a messenger. While in the trance, the messenger is aware of his or her surroundings, but can't take actions or move. If the objetivo is asleep, the messenger appears in the objetivo's dreams and can converse with the objetivo as long as it remains asleep, through the duration of the spell. The messenger can also shape the environment of the dream, creating landscapes, objects, and other images. The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time, ending the effect of the spell early. The objetivo recalls the dream perfectly upon waking. If the objetivo is awake when you cast the spell, the messenger knows it, and can either end the trance (and the spell) or wait for the objetivo to fall asleep, at which point the messenger appears in the objetivo's dreams. You can make the messenger appear monstrous and terrifying to the objetivo. If you do, the messenger can deliver a message of no more than ten words and then the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, echoes of the phantasmal monstrosity spawn a nightmare that lasts the duration of the objetivo's sleep and prevents the objetivo from gaining any benefit from that rest. In addition, when the objetivo wakes up, it recibe 3d6 daño psíquico. If you have a body part, lock of hair, clipping from a nail, or similar portion of the objetivo's body, the objetivo makes its tirada de salvación with desventaja.
material: A handful of sand, a dab of ink, and a writing quill plucked from a sleeping bird.

name: Dream
desc:
Until the spell ends, you manipulate the dreams of another criatura. You designate a messenger, which may be you or a willing criatura you touch, to enter a trance. The messenger remains aware of its surroundings while in the trance but cannot take actions or move.

If the objetivo is sleeping the messenger appears in its dreams and can converse with the objetivo as long as it remains asleep and the spell remains active. The messenger can also manipulate the dream, creating objects, landscapes, and various other sensory sensations. The messenger can choose to end the trance at any time, ending the spell. The objetivo remembers the dream in perfect detail when it wakes. The messenger knows if the objetivo is awake when you cast the spell and can either end the trance (and the spell) or wait for the objetivo to fall asleep, at which point the spell works as described.

You can choose to let the messenger terrorize the objetivo. The messenger can deliver a message of 10 words or fewer and the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. If you have a portion of the objetivo's body (some hair or a drop of blood) it has desventaja on its tirada de salvación. en una salvación fallida, echoes of the messenger's fearful aspect create a nightmare that lasts the duration of the objetivo's sleep and prevents it from gaining any benefit from the rest. In addition, upon waking the objetivo suffers a level of fatigue or strife (your choice), up to a maximum of 3 in either condition.

criaturas that don't sleep or don't dream (such as elves) cannot be contacted by this spell.

name: Dreamwine
desc: You imbue a bottle of wine with fey magic. While casting this spell, you and up to seven other criaturas can drink the imbued wine. At the completion of the casting, cada criatura that drank the wine can see invisible criaturas and objects as if they were visible, can see into the Ethereal plane, and has ventaja on Carisma checks and saving throws for the duration. Ethereal criaturas and objects appear ghostly and translucent.

name: Drown
desc:
You cause a criatura's lungs to fill with seawater. Unless the objetivo makes a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución, it immediately begins suffocating. A suffocating criatura can’t speak or perform verbal spell components. It can hold its breath, and thereafter can survive for a number of rondas equal to its Constitución modifier (minimum of 1 ronda), after which it drops to 0 puntos de golpe and is dying. Huge or larger criaturas are unaffected, as are criaturas that can breathe water or that don’t require air.

A suffocating (not dying) criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect en un éxito.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.

NOTE: Midgard Heroes Handbook has a very different [drown-heroes-handbook/drown](https://api.open5e.com/spells/drown) spell.
material: a small piece of flotsam or seaweed

name: Druidcraft
desc:
Whispering to the spirits of Naturaleza, you create one of the following effects within range: 
- You create a tiny, harmless sensory effect that predicts what the weather will be at your location for the next 24 horas. The effect might manifest as a golden orb for clear skies, a cloud for rain, falling snowflakes for snow, and so on. This effect persists for 1 ronda. 
- You instantly make a flower blossom, a seed pod open, or a leaf bud bloom. 
- You create an Instantáneo, harmless sensory effect, such as falling leaves, a puff of wind, the sound of a small animal, or the faint odor of skunk. The effect must fit in a 5-­--pie cube. 
- You instantly ligera or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a small campfire.

name: Druidcraft
desc:
You call upon your mastery of Naturaleza to produce one of the following effects within range:

* You create a minor, harmless sensory effect that lasts for 1 ronda and predicts the next 24 horas of weather in your current location. For example, the effect might create a miniature thunderhead if storms are predicted.
* You instantly make a plant feature develop, but never to produce Supply. For example, you can cause a flower to bloom or a seed pod to open.
* You create an Instantáneo, harmless sensory effect such as the sound of running water, birdsong, or the smell of mulch. The effect must fit in a 5-pie cube.
* You instantly ignite or extinguish a candle, torch, smoking pipe, or small campfire.

name: Dryad’s Kiss
desc:
You perform an ancient incantation that summons flora from the fey realm. A criatura you can see within range is covered with small, purple buds and recibe 3d8 daño necrótico; a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría negates el daño but doesn’t prevent the plant growth. The buds can be removed by the objetivo or an aliado of the objetivo within 5 pies who uses an action to make a successful Inteligencia (Naturaleza) or Sabiduría (Medicina) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro, or by a [greater restoration](https://api.open5e.com/spells/greater-restoration) or [blight](https://api.open5e.com/spells/blight) spell. While the buds remain, whenever the objetivo recibe damage from a source other than this spell, one bud blossoms into a purple and yellow flower that causa an extra 1d8 daño necrótico to the objetivo. Once four blossoms have formed in this way, the buds can no longer be removed by no mágico means. The buds and blossoms wilt and fall away when the spell ends, provided the criatura is still alive.

If a criatura affected by this spell dies, sweet-smelling blossoms quickly cover its body. The flowers wilt and die after one month.
higher_level: If this spell is cast using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the number of objetivos increases by one for every two slot levels above 3rd.
material: a flower petal or a drop of blood

name: Earth Barrier
desc: Choose an unoccupied space between you and the source of the attack which triggers the spell. You call forth a pillar of earth or stone (3 pies diameter, 20 pies tall, AC 10, 20 puntos de golpe) in that space that provides you with three-quarters cover (+5 to AC, Destreza saving throws, and ability checks made to hide).

name: Earthquake
desc:
You create a seismic disturbance at a point on the ground that you can see within range. For the duration, an intense tremor rips through the ground in a 100-pie-radius circle centered on that point and shakes criaturas and structures in contact with the ground in that area. The ground in the area becomes difficult terrain. cada criatura on the ground that is concentrating debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the criatura's Concentración is broken. When you cast this spell and at the end of each turn you spend concentrating on it, cada criatura on the ground in the area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is knocked derribado. This spell can have additional effects depending on the terrain in the area, as determined by the DM. 

**Fissures.** Fissures open throughout the spell's area at the start of your next turn after you cast the spell. A total of 1d6 such fissures open in locations chosen by the DM. Each is 1d10 × 10 pies deep, 10 pies wide, and extends from one edge of the spell's area to the opposite side. A criatura standing on a spot where a fissure opens debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall in. A criatura that successfully saves moves with the fissure's edge as it opens. A fissure that opens beneath a structure causes it to automatically collapse (see below). 

**Structures.** The tremor causa 50 daño contundente to any structure in contact with the ground in the area when you cast the spell and at the start of each of your turns until the spell ends. If a structure drops to 0 puntos de golpe, it collapses and potentially damages nearby criaturas. A criatura within half the distance of a structure's height debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 5d6 daño contundente, is knocked derribado, and is buried in the rubble, requiring a CD 20 Fuerza (Atletismo) check as an action to escape. The DM can adjust the CD higher or lower, depending on the Naturaleza of the rubble. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much damage and doesn't fall derribado or become buried.
material: A pinch of dirt, a piece of rock, and a lump of clay.

name: Earthquake
desc:
You create a seismic disturbance in the spell's area. Until the spell ends, an intense tremor rips through the ground and shakes anything in contact with it.

The ground in the spell's area becomes difficult terrain as it warps and cracks.

When you cast this spell and at the end of each turn you spend concentrating on it, cada criatura in contact with the ground in the spell's area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza or be knocked derribado.

Additionally, any criatura that is concentrating on a spell while in contact with the ground in the spell's area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución or lose Concentración.

At the Narrator's discretion, this spell may have additional effects depending on the terrain in the area.

* **Fissures:** Fissures open within the spell's area at the start of your next turn after you cast the spell. A total of 1d6 such fissures open in locations you choose. Each is 1d10 × 10 pies deep, 10 pies wide, and extends from one edge of the spell's area to the opposite side. A criatura standing on a spot where a fissure opens makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or falls in. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura moves with the fissure's edge as it opens.
* A structure automatically collapses if a fissure opens beneath it (see below).
* **Structures:** A structure in contact with the ground in the spell's area recibe 50 daño contundente when you cast the spell and again at the start of each of your turns while the spell is active. A structure reduced to 0 puntos de golpe this way collapses.
* criaturas within half the distance of a collapsing structure's height make a tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 5d6 daño contundente, are knocked derribado, and are buried in the rubble, requiring a CD 20 Acrobacias or Atletismo check as an action to escape. A criatura inside (instead of near) a collapsing structure has desventaja on its tirada de salvación. The Narrator can adjust the CD higher or lower depending on the composition of the rubble. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much damage and doesn't fall derribado or become buried.

name: Earthskimmer
desc:
You cause earth and stone to rise up beneath your pies, lifting you up to 5 pies. For the duration, you can use your movement to cause the slab to skim along the ground or other solid, horizontal surface at a Velocidad of 60 pies. This movement ignores difficult terrain. If you are pushed or moved against your will by any means other than teleporting, the slab moves with you.

Until the end of your turn, you can enter the space of a criatura up to one size larger than yourself when you take the Dash action. The criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. It recibe 4d6 daño contundente and is knocked derribado en una salvación fallida, or recibe half as much damage and isn’t knocked derribado on a succesful one.
material: a piece of shale or slate

name: Earworm Melody
desc:
You sing or play a catchy tune that only una criatura of your choice within range can hear. Unless the criatura makes a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, the verse becomes ingrained in its head. If the objetivo is concentrating on a spell, it debe realizar a Constitución check with desventaja against your CD de salvación del conjuro in order to maintain Concentración.

For the spell’s duration, the objetivo recibe 2d4 daño psíquico at the start of each of its turns as the melody plays over and over in its mind. The objetivo repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect en un éxito. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo must also repeat the Constitución check with desventaja if it is concentrating on a spell.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Echoes of Steel
desc: When you hit a criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma, you can use a acción adicional to cast echoes of steel. todas las criaturas you designate within 30 pies of you take daño de trueno equal to el daño from the ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución.

name: Ectoplasm
desc:
You call forth an ectoplasmic manifestation of Medium size that appears in an unoccupied space of your choice within range that you can see. The manifestation lasts for the spell’s duration. Any criatura that ends its turn within 5 pies of the manifestation recibe 2d6 daño psíquico, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría.

As a acción adicional, you can move the manifestation up to 30 pies. It can move through a criatura’s space but can’t remain in the same space as that criatura. If it enters a criatura’s space, that criatura recibe 2d6 daño psíquico, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura also has desventaja on Destreza checks until the end of its next turn.

When you move the manifestation, it can flow through a gap as small as 1 square inch, over barriers up to 5 pies tall, and across pits up to 10 pies wide. The manifestation sheds dim ligera in a 10-pie radius. It also leaves a thin film of ectoplasmic residue on everything it touches or moves through. This residue doesn’t illuminate the surroundings but does glow dimly enough to show the manifestation’s path. The residue dissipates 1 ronda after it is deposited.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a pinch of bone dust
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Eidetic Memory
desc: When you cast this spell, you can recall any piece of information you’ve ever read or heard in the past. This ability translates into a +10 bonus on Inteligencia checks for the duration of the spell.
material: a string tied in a knot

name: Eldritch Blast
desc: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a criatura within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d10 daño de fuerza. The spell creates more than one beam when you alcance higher levels: two beams at 5th level, three beams at 11th level, and four beams at 17th level. You can direct the beams at the same objetivo or at different ones. Make a separate tirada de ataque for each beam.

name: Eldritch Communion
desc:
You contact a Great Old One and ask one question that can be answered with a one-sentence reply no more than twenty words long. You must ask your question before the spell ends. There is a 25 percent chance that the answer contains a falsehood or is misleading in some way. (The GM determines this secretly.)

Great Old Ones have vast knowledge, but they aren’t omniscient, so if your question pertains to information beyond the Old One’s knowledge, the answer might be vacuous, gibberish, or an angry, “I don’t know.”

This also reveals the presence of all aberrations within 300 pies of you. There is a 1-in-6 chance that each aberration you become aware of also becomes aware of you.

If you cast **eldritch communion** two or more times before taking a descanso largo, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you receive no answer and become afflicted with short-term madness.
material: corvid entrails, a dried opium poppy, and a glass dagger
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Eldritch Cube
desc:
A black, nonreflective, incorporeal 10-pie cube appears in an unoccupied space that you can see. Its space can be in midair if you so desire. When a criatura starts its turn in the cube or enters the cube for the first time on its turn it debe realizar an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia, taking 5d6 daño psíquico en una salvación fallida, or la mitad del daño en un éxito.

As a acción adicional, you can move the cube up to 10 pies in any direction to a space you can see. The cube cannot be made to pass through other criaturas in this way.

name: Elemental Horns
desc:
The objetivo of this spell must be a criatura that has horns, or the spell fails. **Elemental horns** causes the touched criatura’s horns to crackle with elemental energy. Select one of the following energy types when casting this spell: ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, or radiante. The criatura’s gore attack causa 3d6 damage of the chosen type in addition to any other damage the attack normally causa.

Although commonly seen among tieflings and minotaurs, this spell is rarely employed by other races.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a brass wand

name: Elemental Twist
desc: During this spell’s duration, reality shifts around you whenever you cast a spell that causa ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, veneno, or daño de trueno. Assign each damage type a number and roll a d6 to determine the type of damage this casting of the spell causa. In addition, the spell’s damage increases by 1d6. All other properties or effects of the spell are unchanged.
material: a thin piece of copper twisted around itself

name: Emanation of Yoth
desc:
You call forth a [ghost](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghost)// that recibe the form of a spectral, serpentlike assassin. It appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The ghost disappears when it’s reduced to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.

The ghost is friendly to you and your companions for the duration of the spell. Roll initiative for the ghost, which recibe its own turns. It obeys verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don’t issue a command to it, the ghost defends itself from hostile criaturas but doesn’t move or take other actions.

You are immune to the ghost’s Horrifying Visage action but can willingly become the objetivo of the ghost’s Possession ability. You can end this effect on yourself as a acción adicional.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th or 7th level, you call forth two ghosts. If you cast it using a espacio de conjuro of 8th or 9th level, you call forth three ghosts.
material: a fistful of grave earth and a vial of child’s blood
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Emerald Eyes
desc:
You attempt to convince a criatura to enter a paranoid, murderous rage. Choose a criatura that you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be convinced those around it intend to steal anything and everything it possesses, from its position of employment, to the affections of its loved ones, to its monetary wealth and possessions, no matter how trusted those nearby might be or how ludicrous such a theft might seem. While affected by this spell, the objetivo must use its action to attack the nearest criatura other than itself or you. If the objetivo starts its turn with no other criatura near enough to move to and attack, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the objetivo's head clears momentarily and it can act freely that turn. If the objetivo starts its turn a second time with no other criatura near enough to move to and attack, it can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the spell ends on the objetivo.
  Each time the objetivo recibe damage, it can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the spell ends on the objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: Enchant Ring
desc:
You enchant a ring you touch that isn’t being worn or carried. The next criatura that willingly wears the ring becomes hechizado by you for 1 week or until it is harmed by you or one of your aliados. If the criatura dons the ring while directly threatened by you or one of your aliados, the spell fails.

The hechizado criatura regards you as a friend. When the spell ends, it doesn’t know it was hechizado by you, but it does realize that its attitude toward you has changed (possibly greatly) in a short time. How the criatura reacts to you and regards you in the future is up to the GM.
material: 500 gp worth of diamond dust, which the spell consumes

name: Enchanted Bloom
desc:
You spend an hora anointing a rose with scented oils and imbuing it with fey magic. The first criatura other than you that touches the rose before the spell ends pricks itself on the thorns and debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, the criatura falls into a deep slumber for 24 horas, and it can be awoken only by the greater restoration spell or similar magic or if you choose to end the spell as an action. While slumbering, the criatura doesn't need to eat or drink, and it doesn't age.
  Each time the criatura recibe damage, it makes a new tirada de salvación de Carisma. en un éxito, the spell ends on the criatura.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of a higher level, the duration of the slumber increases to 7 days with a 6th-level slot, to 30 days with a 7th-level slot, to 180 days with an 8th-level slot, and to a year with a 9th-level espacio de conjuro.

name: Encroaching Shadows
desc:
You cause menacing shadows to invade an area 200 pies on a side and 50 pies high, centered on a point within range. Illumination in the area drops one step (from bright ligera to dim, or from dim ligera to darkness). Any spell that creates ligera in the area that is cast using a lower-level espacio de conjuro than was used to cast encroaching shadows is dispelled, and a spell that creates ligera doesn’t function in the area if that spell is cast using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or lower. no mágico effects can’t increase the level of illumination in the affected area.

A spell that creates darkness or shadow recibe effect in the area as if the espacio de conjuro expended was one level higher than the espacio de conjuro actually used.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the effect lasts for an additional 12 horas for each slot level above 6th.

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the spell’s duration increases by 12 horas, and it cannot be dispelled by a spell that creates ligera, even if that spell is cast using a higher-level espacio de conjuro.
material: a drop of blood smeared on a silver rod worth 100 gp

name: Encrypt / Decrypt
desc: By touching a page of written information, you can encode its contents. todas las criaturas that try to read the information when its contents are encoded see the markings on the page as nothing but gibberish. The effect ends when either **encrypt / decrypt** or [dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) is cast on the encoded writing, which turns it back into its normal state.

name: Endow Attribute
desc:
You touch a criatura with a ring that has been etched with symbols representing a particular ability (Fuerza, Destreza, and so forth). The criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or lose one-fifth (rounded down) of its points from that ability score. Those points are absorbed into the ring and stored there for the spell’s duration. If you then use an action to touch the ring to another criatura on a later turn, the absorbed ability score points transfer to that criatura. Once the points are transferred to another criatura, you don’t need to maintain Concentración on the spell; the recipient criatura retains the transferred ability score points for the remainder of the hora.

The spell ends if you lose Concentración before the transfer recibe place, if either the objetivo or the recipient dies, or if either the objetivo or the recipient is affected by a successful [dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) spell. When the spell ends, the ability score points return to the original owner. Before then, that criatura can’t regain the stolen attribute points, even with greater restoration or comparable magic.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th or 8th level, the duration is 8 horas. If you use a 9th‐level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 24 horas.
material: a ring worth at least 200 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Energy Absorption
desc:
A criatura you touch has resistance to ácido, frío, fuego, fuerza, rayo, and daño de trueno until the spell ends.

If the spell is used against an unwilling criatura, you debe realizar a melee ataque de conjuro with a alcance of 5 pies. If the attack hits, for the duration of the spell the affected criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación using its spellcasting ability whenever it casts a spell that causa one of the given damage types. en una salvación fallida, the spell is not cast but its slot is expended; en una salvación exitosa, the spell is cast but its damage is halved before applying the effects of saving throws, resistance, and other factors.

name: Energy Foreknowledge
desc: When you cast this spell, you gain resistance to every type of energy listed above that is dealt by the spell hitting you. This resistance lasts until the end of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can include one additional aliado in its effect for each slot level above 4th. Affected aliados must be within 15 pies of you.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are the target of a spell that deals cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, psychic, radiant, or thunder damage

name: Enhance Ability
desc:
You touch a criatura and bestow upon it a mágico enhancement. Choose one of the following effects; the objetivo gains that effect until the spell ends.

**Bear's Endurance.** The objetivo has ventaja on Constitución checks. It also gains 2d6 temporary puntos de golpe, which are lost when the spell ends.

**Bull's Fuerza.** The objetivo has ventaja on Fuerza checks, and his or her carrying capacity doubles.

**Cat's Grace.** The objetivo has ventaja on Destreza checks. It also doesn't take damage from falling 20 pies or less if it isn't incapacitado.

**Eagle's Splendor.** The objetivo has ventaja on Carisma checks

 **Fox's Cunning.** The objetivo has ventaja on Inteligencia checks.

**Owl's Sabiduría.** The objetivo has ventaja on Sabiduría checks.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.
material: Fur or a feather from a beast.

name: Enhance Ability
desc:
You bestow a mágico enhancement on the objetivo. Choose one of the following effects for the objetivo to receive until the spell ends.

* **Bear's Endurance:** The objetivo has ventaja on Constitución checks and it gains 2d6 temporary puntos de golpe (lost when the spell ends).
* **Bull's Fuerza:** The objetivo has ventaja on Fuerza checks and doubles its carrying capacity.
* **Cat's Grace:** The objetivo has ventaja on Destreza checks and it reduces any falling damage it recibe by 10 unless it is incapacitado.
