If the criatura recibe daño contundente from a critical hit, the attack’s damage dice are rolled three times instead of twice. At the end of each of its turns, the criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Constitución, ending the effect en un éxito.

NOTE: This was previously a 5th-level spell that did 4d10 daño de frío.

name: Freeze Potion
desc: A blue spark flies from your hand and strikes a potion vial, drinking horn, waterskin, or similar container, instantly freezing the contents. The substance melts normally thereafter and is not otherwise harmed, but it can’t be consumed while it’s frozen.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the range increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 1st.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature within range about to consume a liquid

name: Freezing Fog
desc: The spell creates a 20-pie-radius sphere of mist similar to a [fog cloud](https://api.open5e.com/spells/fog-cloud) spell centered on a point you can see within range. The cloud spreads around corners, and the area it occupies is heavily obscured. A wind of moderate or greater velocity (at least 10 millas per hora) disperses it in 1 ronda. The fog is freezing frío; any criatura that ends its turn in the area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. It recibe 2d6 daño de frío and gains one level of agotamiento en una salvación fallida, or recibe half as much damage and no agotamiento on a successful one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Freezing Sphere
desc: A frigid globe of frío energy streaks from your fingertips to a point of your choice within range, where it explodes in a 60-pie-radius sphere. cada criatura within the area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 10d6 daño de frío. en una salvación exitosa, it recibe half as much damage. If the globe strikes a body of water or a liquid that is principally water (not including water-based criaturas), it freezes the liquid to a depth of 6 inches over an area 30 pies square. This ice lasts for 1 minuto. criaturas that were nadando on the surface of frozen water are trapped in the ice. A trapped criatura can use an action to make a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to break free. You can refrain from firing the globe after completing the spell, if you wish. A small globe about the size of a sling stone, cool to the touch, appears in your hand. At any time, you or a criatura you give the globe to can throw the globe (to a range of 40 pies) or hurl it with a sling (to the sling's normal range). It shatters on impact, with the same effect as the normal casting of the spell. You can also set the globe down without shattering it. After 1 minuto, if the globe hasn't already shattered, it explodes.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 6th.
material: A small crystal sphere.

name: Freezing Sphere
desc:
A freezing globe streaks to a point within range and explodes, dealing 10d6 daño de frío to criaturas in the area. Liquid in the area is frozen to a depth of 6 inches for 1 minuto. Any criatura caught in the ice can use an action to make a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to escape.

Instead of firing the globe, you can hold it in your hand. If you handle it carefully, it won't explode until a minuto after you cast the spell. At any time, you or another criatura can strike the globe, throw it up to 60 pies, or use it as a slingstone, causing it to explode on impact.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Frenzied Bolt
desc: You direct a bolt of rainbow colors toward a criatura of your choice within range. If the bolt hits, the objetivo recibe 3d8 damage, of a type determined by rolling on the Random Damage Type table. If your tirada de ataque (not the adjusted result) was odd, the bolt leaps to a new objetivo of your choice within range that has not already been targeted by frenzied bolt, requiring a new ataque de conjuro roll para impactar. The bolt continues leaping to new objetivos until you roll an even number on your ataque de conjuro roll, miss a objetivo, or run out of potential objetivos. You and your aliados are legal objetivos for this spell if you are particularly lucky—or unlucky.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you create an additional bolt for each slot level above 2nd. Each potential objetivo can be hit only once by each casting of the spell, not once per bolt.
 
 **Random Damage Type** 
 
| d10  | Damage Type | 
|--------------|---------| 
| 1          | ácido  | 
| 2          | frío  | 
| 3          | fuego  | 
| 4          | fuerza  | 
| 5          | rayo  | 
| 6          | necrótico  | 
| 7          | Poision  | 
| 8          | psíquico | 
| 9          | radiante | 
| 10         | trueno  |

name: Friends
desc: Once before the start of your next turn, when you make a Carisma ability check against the objetivo, you gain an expertise die. If you roll a 1 on the ability or skill check, the objetivo realizes its judgment was influenced by magic and may become hostile.

name: Frostbite
desc:
Biting frío settles onto a criatura you can see. The criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 4d8 daño de frío. In addition, for the duration of the spell, the criatura’s Velocidad is halved, it has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks, and it recibe another 4d8 daño de frío at the start of each of its turns.

An affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the start of each of its turns. The effect ends when the criatura makes its third successful save.

criaturas that are immune to daño de frío are unaffected by **frostbite**.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, you can objetivo two additional criaturas for each slot level above 5th.
material: a strip of dried flesh that has been frozen at least once

name: Frostbitten Fingers
desc:
You fuego a ray of intense frío that instantly induces frostbite. With a successful ranged ataque de conjuro, this spell causes one of the objetivo’s hands to lose sensation. When the spell is cast, the objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza to maintain its grip on any object with the affected hand. The tirada de salvación must be repeated every time the objetivo tries to manipulate, wield, or pick up an item with the affected hand. Additionally, the objetivo has desventaja on Destreza checks or Fuerza checks that require the use of both hands.

After every 10 minutos of being affected by frostbitten fingers, the objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución, or take 1d6 daño de frío and lose one of the fingers on the affected hand, beginning with the pinkie.

name: Frozen Razors
desc: Razor-sharp blades of ice erupt from the ground or other surface, filling a 20-pie cube centered on a point you can see within range. For the duration, the area is lightly obscured and is difficult terrain. A criatura that moves more than 5 pies into or inside the area on a turn recibe 2d6 daño cortante and 3d6 daño de frío, or half as much damage if it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura that recibe daño de frío from frozen razors is reduced to half Velocidad until the start of its next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: water from a melted icicle

name: Furious Hooves
desc: You enhance the pies or hooves of a criatura you touch, imbuing it with power and swiftness. The objetivo doubles its walking Velocidad or increases it by 30 pies, whichever addition is smaller. In addition to any attacks the criatura can normally make, this spell grants two hoof attacks, each of which causa daño contundente equal to 1d6 + plus the objetivo’s Fuerza modifier (or 1d8 if the objetivo of the spell is Large). For the duration of the spell, the affected criatura automatically causa this daño contundente to the objetivo of its successful shove attack.
material: a nail

name: Furious Wail
desc: You let out a scream of white-hot fury that pierces the minds of up to five criaturas within range. Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, it recibe 10d10 + 30 daño psíquico and is aturdido until the end of its next turn. en un éxito, it recibe half as much damage.

name: Fuse Armor
desc:
Choose a manufactured metal object with movable parts, such as a drawbridge pulley or winch or a suit of pesada or medium metal armor, that you can see within range. You cause the object's moveable parts to fuse together for the duration. The object's movable aspects can't be moved: a pulley's wheel won't turn and the joints of armor won't bend.
  A criatura wearing armor affected by this spell has its Velocidad reduced by 10 pies and has desventaja on weapon attacks and ability checks that use Fuerza or Destreza. At the end of each of its turns, the criatura wearing the armor can make a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en un éxito, the spell ends on the armor.
  A criatura in physical contact with an affected object that isn't a suit of armor can use its action to make a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. en un éxito, the spell ends on the object.
  If you objetivo a construct with this spell, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or have its Velocidad reduced by 10 pies and have desventaja on weapon attacks. At the end of each of its turns, the construct can make another tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en un éxito, the spell ends on the construct.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional object for each slot level above 2nd. The objects must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: Fusillade of Ice
desc: You unleash a spray of razor-sharp ice shards. cada criatura in the 30-pie cone recibe 4d6 daño de frío and 3d6 daño perforante, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by your choice of 1d6 daño de frío or 1d6 daño perforante for each slot level above 4th. You can make a different choice (daño de frío or daño perforante) for each slot level above 4th. Casting this spell with a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher increases the range to a 60-pie cone.
material: a dagger shaped like an icicle

name: Gale
desc:
You summon a storm to batter your oncoming enemigos. Until the spell ends, freezing rain and turbulent winds fill a 20-pie-tall cylinder with a 300- pie radius centered on a point you choose within range. You must be outdoors to cast this spell. Moving to a place where you don't have a clear path to the sky ends the spell early.
  The spell's area is heavily obscured, and exposed flames in the area are doused. The ground in the area becomes slick, difficult terrain, and a volando criatura in the area must land at the end of its turn or fall. When a criatura enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución as the wind and rain assail it. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 1d6 daño de frío.
  If a criatura is concentrating in the spell's area, the criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución against your CD de salvación del conjuro or lose Concentración.

name: Gaseous Form
desc: You transform a willing criatura you touch, along with everything it's wearing and carrying, into a misty cloud for the duration. The spell ends if the criatura drops to 0 puntos de golpe. An incorporeal criatura isn't affected. While in this form, the objetivo's only method of movement is a volando Velocidad of 10 pies. The objetivo can enter and occupy the space of another criatura. The objetivo has resistance to no mágico damage, and it has ventaja on Fuerza, Destreza, and Constitución saving throws. The objetivo can pass through small holes, narrow openings, and even mere cracks, though it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces. The objetivo can't fall and remains hovering in the air even when aturdido or otherwise incapacitado. While in the form of a misty cloud, the objetivo can't talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can't be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. The objetivo can't attack or cast spells.
material: A bit of gauze and a wisp of smoke.

name: Gaseous Form
desc:
The objetivo, along with anything it's wearing and carrying, becomes a hovering, wispy cloud. In this form, it can't attack, use or drop objects, talk, or cast spells.

As a cloud, the objetivo's base Velocidad is 0 and it gains a volando Velocidad of 10 pies. It can enter another criatura's space, and can pass through small holes and cracks, but not through liquid. It is resistant to no mágico damage, has ventaja on Fuerza, Destreza, and Constitución saving throws, and can't fall.

The spell ends if the criatura drops to 0 puntos de golpe.
higher_level: The objetivo's fly Velocidad increases by 10 pies for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Gate
desc: You conjure a portal linking an unoccupied space you can see within range to a precise location on a different plane of existence. The portal is a circular opening, which you can make 5 to 20 pies in diameter. You can orient the portal in any direction you choose. The portal lasts for the duration. The portal has a front and a back on each plane where it appears. Travel through the portal is possible only by moving through its front. Anything that does so is instantly transported to the other plane, appearing in the unoccupied space nearest to the portal. Deities and other planar rulers can prevent portals created by this spell from opening in their presence or anywhere within their domains. When you cast this spell, you can speak the name of a specific criatura (a pseudonym, title, or nickname doesn't work). If that criatura is on a plane other than the one you are on, the portal opens in the named criatura's immediate vicinity and draws the criatura through it to the nearest unoccupied space on your side of the portal. You gain no special power over the criatura, and it is free to act as the DM deems appropriate. It might leave, attack you, or help you.
material: A diamond worth at least 5,000gp.

name: Gate
desc:
You create a magic portal, a door between a space you can see and a specific place on another plane of existence. Each portal is a one-sided circular opening from 5 to 25 pies in diameter. Entering either portal transports you to the portal on the other plane. Deities and other planar rulers can prevent portals from opening in their domains.

When you cast this spell, you can speak the true name of a specific criatura (not its nickname or title). If that criatura is on another plane, the portal opens next to it and draws it through to your side of the portal. This spell gives you no power over the criatura, and it might choose to attack you, leave, or listen to you.

name: Gear Barrage
desc: You create a burst of magically propelled gears. cada criatura within a 60-pie cone recibe 3d8 daño cortante, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. Constructs have desventaja on the tirada de salvación.
material: a handful of gears and sprockets worth 5 gp

name: Gear Shield
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You cause a handful of gears to orbit the objetivo's body. These shield the spell's objetivo from incoming attacks, granting a +2 bonus to AC and to Destreza and Constitución saving throws for the duration, without hindering the subject's movement, vision, or outgoing attacks.

name: Geas
desc: You place a mágico command on a criatura that you can see within range, forcing it to carry out some service or refrain from some action or course of activity as you decide. If the criatura can understand you, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become hechizado by you for the duration. While the criatura is hechizado by you, it recibe 5d10 daño psíquico each time it acts in a manner directly counter to your instructions, but no more than once each day. A criatura that can't understand you is unaffected by the spell. You can issue any command you choose, short of an activity that would result in certain death. Should you issue a suicidal command, the spell ends. You can end the spell early by using an action to dismiss it. A remove curse, greater restoration, or wish spell also ends it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th or 8th level, the duration is 1 year. When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 9th level, the spell lasts until it is ended by one of the spells mentioned above.

name: Geas
desc:
You give a command to a objetivo which can understand you. It becomes hechizado by you.

While hechizado in this way, it recibe 5d10 daño psíquico the first time each day that it disobeys your command. Your command can be any course of action or inaction that wouldn't result in the objetivo's death. The spell ends if the command is suicidal or you use an action to dismiss the spell. Alternatively, a _remove curse_, _greater restoration_, or _wish_ spell cast on the objetivo using a espacio de conjuro at least as high as the slot used to cast this spell also ends it.
higher_level: The spell's duration is 1 year when using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, or permanent until dispelled when using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro.

name: Gentle Repose
desc: You touch a corpse or other remains. For the duration, the objetivo is protected from decay and can't become undead. The spell also effectively extends the time limit on raising the objetivo from the dead, since days spent under the influence of this spell don't count against the time limit of spells such as raise dead.
material: A pinch of salt and one copper piece placed on each of the corpse's eyes, which must remain there for the duration.

name: Gentle Repose
desc: The objetivo can't become undead and doesn't decay. Days spent under the influence of this spell don't count towards the time limit of spells which raise the dead.
higher_level: The spell's duration is 1 year when using a 3rd-level espacio de conjuro, or permanent until dispelled when using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro.

name: Ghoul King’s Cloak
desc:
You touch a criatura, giving it some of the power of a ghoul king. The objetivo gains the following benefits for the duration:
* Its Clase de Armadura increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
* When it uses the Attack action to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma or a ataque a distancia con arma, it can make one additional attack of the same kind.
* It is immune to daño necrótico and daño radiante.
* It can’t be reduced to less than 1 punto de golpe.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, the spell lasts for 10 minutos and doesn’t require Concentración.

name: Giant Insect
desc: You transform up to ten centipedes, three spiders, five wasps, or one scorpion within range into Gigante versions of their natural forms for the duration. A centipede becomes a Gigante centipede, a spider becomes a Gigante spider, a wasp becomes a Gigante wasp, and a scorpion becomes a Gigante scorpion. cada criatura obeys your verbal commands, and in combat, they act on your turn each ronda. The DM has the statistics for these criaturas and resolves their actions and movement. A criatura remains in its Gigante size for the duration, until it drops to 0 puntos de golpe, or until you use an action to dismiss the effect on it. The DM might allow you to choose different objetivos. For example, if you transform a bee, its Gigante version might have the same statistics as a Gigante wasp.

name: Giant Insect
desc:
You transform insects and other vermin into monstrous versions of themselves. Until the spell ends, up to 3 spiders become Gigante spiders, 2 ants become Gigante ants, 2 crickets or mantises become ankhegs, a centipede becomes a Gigante centipede, or a scorpion becomes a Gigante scorpion. The spell ends for a criatura when it dies or when you use an action to end the effect on it.

While it is within 60 pies you can use a acción adicional to mentally command the insects. When you command multiple insects using this spell, you may simultaneously give them all the same command.
higher_level: The spell's duration is 1 hora when using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro, or 8 horas when using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro.

name: Gift of Azathoth
desc: Deep Magic: void magic A willing criatura you touch is imbued with the persistence of ultimate Chaos. Until the spell ends, the objetivo has ventaja on the first three death saving throws it attempts.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th, 6th, or 7th level, the duration increases to 48 horas. When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th or 9th level, the duration increases to 72 horas.
duration: 24 hours or until the target attempts a third death saving throw
dnd_class: Wizard, Warlock, Sorceror, Ranger, Paladin, Druid, Cleric, Bard, Anti-Paladin

name: Gird the Spirit
desc: Your magic protects the objetivo criatura from the lifesapping energies of the undead. For the duration, the objetivo has immunity to effects from undead criaturas that reduce its ability scores, such as a shadow's Fuerza Drain, or its punto de golpe maximum, such as a specter's Life Drain. This spell doesn't prevent damage from those attacks; it prevents only the reduction in ability score or punto de golpe maximum.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you or a creature within 30 feet of you is hit by an attack from an undead creature

name: Glacial Cascade
desc: By harnessing the power of ice and frost, you emanate pure frío, filling a 30-pie-radius sphere. criaturas other than you in the sphere take 10d8 daño de frío, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. A criatura killed by this spell is transformed into ice, leaving behind no trace of its original body.
material: a piece of alexandrite

name: Glacial Fog
desc:
As you cast this spell, a 30-pie-radius sphere centered on a point within range becomes covered in a frigid fog. cada criatura that is in the area at the start of its turn while the spell remains in effect debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 12d6 daño de frío and gains one level of agotamiento, and it has desventaja on Percepción checks until the start of its next turn. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half el daño and ignores the other effects.

Stored devices and tools are all frozen by the fog: crossbow mechanisms become sluggish, weapons are stuck in scabbards, potions turn to ice, bag cords freeze together, and so forth. Such items require the application of heat for 1 ronda or longer in order to become useful again.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 7th.
material: crystalline statue of a polar bear worth at least 25 gp

name: Glare
desc: You cast a disdainful glare at up to two criaturas you can see within range. Each objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take no actions on its next turn as it reassesses its life choices. If a criatura fails the tirada de salvación by 5 or more, it can't take actions on its next two turns.

name: Glibness
desc: Until the spell ends, when you make a Carisma check, you can replace the number you roll with a 15. Additionally, no matter what you say, magic that would determine if you are telling the truth indicates that you are being truthful.

name: Glibness
desc: When you make a Carisma check, you can replace the number you rolled with 15\. Also, magic that prevents lying has no effect on you, and magic cannot determine that you are lying.

name: Gliding Step
desc: Provided you’re not carrying more of a load than your carrying capacity permits, you can walk on the surface of snow rather than wading through it, and you ignore its effect on movement. Ice supports your weight no matter how thin it is, and you can travel on ice as if you were wearing ice skates. You still leave tracks normally while under these effects.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the duration increases by 10 minutos for each slot level above 1st.

name: Glimpse of the Void
desc: Muttering Void Speech, you fuerza images of terror and nonexistence upon your foes. cada criatura in a 30-pie cube centered on a point within range debe realizar an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en una salvación fallida, the criatura goes insane for the duration. While insane, a criatura recibe no actions other than to shriek, wail, gibber, and babble unintelligibly. The GM controls the criatura’s movement, which is erratic.
material: a scrap of parchment with Void glyph scrawlings

name: Globe of Invulnerability
desc: An immobile, faintly shimmering barrier springs into existence in a 10-pie radius around you and remains for the duration. Any spell of 5th level or lower cast from outside the barrier can't affect criaturas or objects within it, even if the spell is cast using a higher level espacio de conjuro. Such a spell can objetivo criaturas and objects within the barrier, but the spell has no effect on them. Similarly, the area within the barrier is excluded from the areas affected by such spells.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the barrier blocks spells of one level higher for each slot level above 6th.
material: A glass or crystal bead that shatters when the spell ends.

name: Globe of Invulnerability
desc: An immobile, glimmering sphere forms around you. Any spell of 5th-level or lower cast from outside the sphere can't affect anything inside the sphere, even if it's cast with a higher level espacio de conjuro. Targeting something inside the sphere or including the globe's space in an area has no effect on anything inside.
higher_level: The barrier blocks spells of one espacio de conjuro level higher for each slot level above 6th.

name: Gloomwrought Barrier
desc: When you cast this spell, you erect a barrier of energy drawn from the realm of death and shadow. This barrier is a wall 20 pies high and 60 pies long, or a ring 20 pies high and 20 pies in diameter. The wall is transparent when viewed from one side of your choice and translucent—lightly obscuring the area beyond it—from the other. A criatura that tries to move through the wall debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or stop in front of the wall and become asustado until the start of the criatura’s next turn, when it can try again to move through. Once a criatura makes a successful tirada de salvación against the wall, it is immune to the effect of this barrier.
material: a piece of obsidian

name: Gluey Globule
desc:
You make a ranged ataque de conjuro to hurl a large globule of sticky, mágico glue at a criatura within 120 pies. If the attack hits, the objetivo criatura is apresado. A apresado criatura can break free by using an action to make a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza. When the criatura breaks free, it recibe 2d6 daño cortante from the glue tearing its skin. If your ranged ataque de conjuro roll was a critical hit or exceeded the objetivo’s AC by 5 or more, the tirada de salvación de Fuerza is made with desventaja. The objetivo can also be freed by an application of universal solvent or by taking 20 daño de ácido. The glue dissolves when the criatura breaks free or at the end of 1 minuto.

Alternatively, **gluey globule** can also be used to glue an object to a solid surface or to another object. In this case, the spell works like a single application of [sovereign glue](https://api.open5e.com/spells/sovereign-glue) and lasts for 1 hora.
material: a drop of glue

name: Glyph of Shifting
desc:
You create a hidden glyph by tracing it on a surface or object that you touch. When you cast the spell, you can also choose a location that's known to you, within 5 millas, and on the same plane of existence, to serve as the destination for the glyph's shifting effect.
  The glyph is triggered when it's touched by a criatura that's not aware of its presence. The triggering criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be teleported to the glyph's destination. If no destination was set, the criatura recibe 4d4 daño de fuerza and is knocked derribado.
  The glyph disappears after being triggered or when the spell's duration expires.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, its duration increases by 24 horas and the maximum distance to the destination increases by 5 millas for each slot level above 2nd.
material: powdered diamond worth at least 50 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Glyph of Warding
desc:
When you cast this spell, you inscribe a glyph that harms other criaturas, either upon a surface (such as a table or a section of floor or wall) or within an object that can be closed (such as a book, a scroll, or a treasure chest) to conceal the glyph. If you choose a surface, the glyph can cover an area of the surface no larger than 10 pies in diameter. If you choose an object, that object must remain in its place; if the object is moved more than 10 pies from where you cast this spell, the glyph is broken, and the spell ends without being triggered. The glyph is nearly invisible and requires a successful Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to be found. You decide what triggers the glyph when you cast the spell. For glyphs inscribed on a surface, the most typical triggers include touching or standing on the glyph, removing another object covering the glyph, approaching within a certain distance of the glyph, or manipulating the object on which the glyph is inscribed. For glyphs inscribed within an object, the most Común triggers include opening that object, approaching within a certain distance of the object, or seeing or reading the glyph. Once a glyph is triggered, this spell ends. You can further refine the trigger so the spell activates only under certain circumstances or according to physical characteristics (such as height or weight), criatura kind (for example, the ward could be set to affect aberrations or drow), or alignment. You can also set conditions for criaturas that don't trigger the glyph, such as those who say a certain password. When you inscribe the glyph, choose explosive runes or a spell glyph.

**Explosive Runes.** When triggered, the glyph erupts with mágico energy in a 20-­pie-­radius sphere centered on the glyph. The sphere spreads around corners. cada criatura in the area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura recibe 5d8 ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, or daño de trueno on a failed tirada de salvación (your choice when you create the glyph), or half as much damage on a successful one.

**Spell Glyph.** You can store a prepared spell of 3rd level or lower in the glyph by casting it as part of creating the glyph. The spell must objetivo a single criatura or an area. The spell being stored has no immediate effect when cast in this way. When the glyph is triggered, the stored spell is cast. If the spell has a objetivo, it objetivos the criatura that triggered the glyph. If the spell affects an area, the area is centered on that criatura. If the spell summons hostile criaturas or creates harmful objects or traps, they appear as close as possible to the intruder and attack it. If the spell requires Concentración, it lasts until the end of its full duration.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño of an explosive runes glyph increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd. If you create a spell glyph, you can store any spell of up to the same level as the slot you use for the glyph of warding.
material: Incense and powdered diamond worth at least 200 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Glyph of Warding
desc:
You trace a glyph on the objetivo. If the glyph is moved more than 10 pies from its original position, or if it comes within 20 pies of another glyph that you have cast, the spell ends. Finding the Tiny glyph requires an Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

Describe the actions a criatura must perform to trigger the spell, such as approaching within a certain distance, opening or touching the object the glyph is inscribed on, or seeing or reading the glyph. The criatura must have a clear path to the glyph to trigger it. You can specify certain criaturas which don't trigger the spell, such as those with a certain appearance or those who speak a certain phrase. Once the glyph is triggered, the spell ends.

When you cast the spell, choose Explosive Runes or Spell Glyph.

* **Explosive Runes:** When triggered, the glyph explodes. criaturas in a 20-pie radius sphere make a tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 5d8 ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, or daño de trueno (your choice when you cast the spell), or la mitad del daño en una salvación exitosa. The explosion spreads around corners.
* **Spell Glyph:** You store a spell of 3rd-level or lower as part of creating the glyph, expending its espacio de conjuro. The stored spell must objetivo a single criatura or area with a non-beneficial effect and it is cast when the glyph is triggered. A spell that objetivos a criatura objetivos the triggering criatura. A spell with an area is centered on the targeting criatura. A creation or conjuration spell affects an area next to that criatura, and objetivos it with any harmful effects. Spells requiring Concentración last for their full duration.
higher_level: The cost of the material component increases by 200 gold for each slot level above 3rd. For Explosive Runes, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd, and for Spell Glyph you can store a spell of up to the same level as the espacio de conjuro used to cast glyph of warding.

name: Goat's Hoof Charm
desc: A criatura you touch traverses craggy slopes with the surefootedness of a mountain goat. When ascending a slope that would normally be difficult terrain for it, the objetivo can move at its full Velocidad instead. The objetivo also gains a +2 bonus on Destreza checks and saving throws to prevent falling, to catch a ledge or otherwise stop a fall, or to move along a narrow ledge.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can increase the duration by 1 minuto, or you can affect one additional criatura, for each slot level above 1st.
material: a goat’s hoof

name: Going in Circles
desc:
You make natural terrain in a 1-milla cube difficult to traverse. A criatura in the affected area has desventaja on Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to follow tracks or travel safely through the area as paths through the terrain seem to twist and turn nonsensically. The terrain itself isn't changed, only the Percepción of those inside it. A criatura who succeeds on two Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks while within the terrain discerns the illusion for what it is and sees the illusory twists and turns superimposed on the terrain. A criatura that reenters the area after exiting it before the spell ends is affected by the spell even if it previously succeeded in traversing the terrain. A criatura with vista verdadera can see through the illusion and is unaffected by the spell. A criatura that casts find the path automatically succeeds in discovering a way out of the terrain.
  When you cast this spell, you can designate a password. A criatura that speaks the password as it enters the area automatically sees the illusion and is unaffected by the spell.
  If you cast this spell on the same spot every day for one year, the illusion lasts until it is dispelled.
material: a piece of the objetivo terrain

name: Goodberry
desc: Up to ten berries appear in your hand and are infused with magic for the duration. A criatura can use its action to eat one berry. Eating a berry restores 1 punto de golpe, and the berry provides enough nourishment to sustain a criatura for one day. The berries lose their potency if they have not been consumed within 24 horas of the casting of this spell.
material: A sprig of mistletoe.

name: Goodberry
desc:
You transform the components into 2d4 berries.

For the next 24 horas, any criatura that consumes one of these berries regains 1 punto de golpe. Eating or administering a berry is an action. The berries do not provide any nourishment or sate hunger.
higher_level: You create 1d4 additional berries for every 2 slot levels above 1st.

name: Gordolay’s Pleasant Aroma
desc: You create an intoxicating aroma that fills the area within 30 pies of a point you can see within range. criaturas in this area smell something they find so pleasing that it’s distracting. cada criatura in the area that makes an tirada de ataque must first make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría; en una salvación fallida, the attack is made with desventaja. Only a criatura’s first attack in a ronda is affected this way; subsequent attacks are resolved normally. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura becomes immune to the effect of this particular scent, but they can be affected again by a new casting of the spell.
material: a few flower petals or a piece of fruit, which the spell consumes

name: Grapevine
desc:
You cause a message in Druidic to appear on a tree or plant within range which you have seen before.

You can cast the spell again to erase the message.

name: Grasp of the Tupilak
desc:
This spell functions only against an arcane or divine spellcaster that prepares spells in advance and that has at least one unexpended espacio de conjuro of 6th level or lower. If you make a successful ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against such a criatura before the spell ends, in addition to the usual effect of that attack, the objetivo recibe 2d4 daño necrótico and one or more of the victim’s available espacios de conjuro are transferred to you, to be used as your own. Roll a d6; the result equals the total levels of the slots transferred. espacios de conjuro of the highest possible level are transferred before lower-level slots.

For example, if you roll a 5 and the objetivo has at least one 5th-level espacio de conjuro available, that slot transfers to you. If the objetivo’s highest available espacio de conjuro is 3rd level, then you might receive a 3rd-level slot and a 2nd-level slot, or a 3rd-level slot and two 1st-level slots if no 2nd-level slot is available.

If the objetivo has no available espacios de conjuro of an appropriate level—for example, if you roll a 2 and the objetivo has expended all of its 1st- and 2nd-level espacios de conjuro—then **grasp of the tupilak** has no effect, including causing no daño necrótico. If a stolen espacio de conjuro is of a higher level than you’re able to use, treat it as of the highest level you can use.

Unused stolen espacios de conjuro disappear, returning whence they came, when you take a descanso largo or when the criatura you stole them from receives the benefit of [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse)[greater restoration](https://api.open5e.com/greater-restoration), or comparable magic.
material: tupilak idol

name: Grease
desc: Slick grease covers the ground in a 10-pie square centered on a point within range and turns it into difficult terrain for the duration. When the grease appears, cada criatura standing in its area debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall derribado. A criatura that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall derribado.
material: A bit of pork rind or butter.

name: Grease
desc:
Grease erupts from a point that you can see within range and coats the ground in the area, turning it into difficult terrain until the spell ends.

When the grease appears, cada criatura within the area debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall derribado. A criatura that enters or ends its turn in the area must also succeed on a tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall derribado.

name: Greater Invisibility
desc: You or a criatura you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Anything the objetivo is wearing or carrying is invisible as long as it is on the objetivo's person.

name: Greater Invisibility
desc: The objetivo is invisible. Anything the objetivo is carrying or wearing is also invisible as long as it remains in the objetivo's possession.

name: Greater Ley Protection
desc: Deep Magic: forest-bound You create a 20-pie cube of antimagic within range that specifically protects against ley line magic. Ley line spells and mágico effects up to level 7 that objetivo a criatura within the cube have no effect on that objetivo. Any active ley line spells or mágico effects up to level 7 on a criatura or an object in the cube is suppressed while the criatura or object is in it. The area of a ley line spell or mágico effect up to level 7 can't extend into the cube. If the cube overlaps an area of ley line magic, such as greater ley pulse, the part of the area that is covered by the cube is suppressed. The cube has no effect on other types of magic or spells. You can exclude specific individuals within the cube from the protection.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 9th level or higher, its duration is Concentración, up to 1 hora.

name: Greater Ley Pulse
desc: You set up ley energy vibrations in a 20-pie cube within range, and name one type of damage. cada criatura in the area debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or lose immunity to the chosen damage type for the duration.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, choose two damage types instead of one.

name: Greater Maze
desc:
This spell functions as [maze](https://api.open5e.com/spells/maze), but the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza each time it starts its turn in the maze. The objetivo recibe 4d6 daño psíquico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en un éxito.

Escaping this maze is especially difficult. To do so, the objetivo must use an action to make a CD 20 Inteligencia check. It escapes when it makes its second successful check.

name: Greater Restoration
desc:
You imbue a criatura you touch with positive energy to undo a debilitating effect. You can reduce the objetivo's agotamiento level by one, or end one of the following effects on the objetivo: 
- One effect that hechizado or petrificado the objetivo 
- One curse, including the objetivo's attunement to a cursed magic item 
- Any reduction to one of the objetivo's ability scores 
- One effect reducing the objetivo's punto de golpe maximum
material: Diamond dust worth at least 100gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Greater Restoration
desc:
Healing energy rejuvenates a criatura you touch and undoes a debilitating effect. You can remove one of:

* a level of fatigue.
* a level of strife.
* a charm or petrification effect.
* a curse or cursed item attunement.
* any reduction to a single ability score.
* an effect that has reduced the objetivo's punto de golpe maximum.

name: Greater Seal of Sanctuary
desc:
You inscribe an angelic seal on the ground, the floor, or other solid surface of a structure. The seal creates a spherical sanctuary with a radius of 100 pies, centered on the seal. For the duration, aberrations, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead that approach to within 5 pies of the boundary know they are about to come into contact with a deadly barrier. If such a criatura moves so as to touch the boundary, or tries to cross the boundary by any means, including teleportation and extradimensional travel, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, it recibe 15d8 daño radiante, is repelled to 5 pies outside the boundary, and can’t objetivo anything inside the boundary with attacks, spells, or abilities until the spell ends. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much daño radiante and can cross the boundary. If the criatura is a fiend that isn’t on its home plane, it is immediately destroyed (no tirada de salvación) instead of taking damage.

Aberrations, elementals, fey, and undead that are within 100 pies of the seal (inside the boundary) have desventaja on ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws, and each such criatura recibe 4d8 daño radiante at the start of its turn.

criaturas other than aberrations, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead can’t be hechizado or asustado while within 100 pies of the seal.

The seal has AC 18, 75 puntos de golpe, resistance to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante, and immunity to psíquico and daño de veneno. Ranged attacks against the seal are made with desventaja. If it is scribed on the surface of an object that is later destroyed (such as a wooden door), the seal is not damaged and remains in place, perhaps suspended in midair. The spell ends only if the seal itself is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe.
material: incense and special inks worth 500 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Green Decay
desc:
Your touch inflicts a nauseating, alien rot. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura within your alcance. On a hit, you afflict the criatura with the supernatural disease green decay (see below), and criaturas within 15 pies of the objetivo who can see it debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or become envenenado until the end of their next turn.

You lose Concentración on this spell if you can’t see the objetivo at the end of your turn.

***Green Decay.*** The flesh of a criatura that has this disease is slowly consumed by a virulent extraterrestrial fungus. While the disease persists, the criatura has desventaja on Carisma and Sabiduría checks and on Sabiduría saving throws, and it has vulnerability to ácido, fuego, and daño necrótico. An affected criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 1d6 daño necrótico, and its punto de golpe maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the daño necrótico taken. If the criatura gets three successes on these saving throws before it gets three failures, the disease ends immediately (but el daño and the punto de golpe maximum reduction remain in effect). If the criatura gets three failures on these saving throws before it gets three successes, the disease lasts for the duration of the spell, and no further saving throws are allowed.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Gremlins
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You objetivo a construct and summon a plague of invisible spirits to harass it. The objetivo resists the spell and negates its effect with a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. While the spell remains in effect, the construct has desventaja on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws, and it recibe 3d8 daño de fuerza at the start of each of its turns as it is magically disassembled by the spirits.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot above 4th.

name: Grinding Gears
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You designate a spot within range, and massive gears emerge from the ground at that spot, creating difficult terrain in a 20-pie radius. criaturas that move in the area debe realizar successful Destreza saving throws after every 10 pies of movement or when they stand up. Failure indicates that the criatura falls derribado and recibe 1d8 points of daño contundente.

name: Grudge Match
desc: This spell affects any criaturas you designate within range, as long as the group contains an equal number of aliados and enemigos. If the number of aliados and enemigos targeted isn’t the same, the spell fails. For the duration of the spell, each objetivo gains a +2 bonus on saving throws, attack rolls, ability checks, skill checks, and weapon damage rolls made involving other objetivos of the spell. All affected criaturas can identify fellow objetivos of the spell by sight. If an affected criatura makes any of the above rolls against a non-objetivo, it recibe a -2 penalty on that roll.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the duration increases by 1 ronda for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Guardian of Faith
desc: A Large spectral guardian appears and hovers for the duration in an unoccupied space of your choice that you can see within range. The guardian occupies that space and is indistinct except for a gleaming sword and shield emblazoned with the symbol of your deity. Any criatura hostile to you that moves to a space within 10 pies of the guardian for the first time on a turn debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza. The criatura recibe 20 daño radiante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The guardian vanishes when it has dealt a total of 60 damage.

name: Guardian of Faith
desc:
A large spectral guardian appears and hovers for the duration in an unoccupied space of your choice that you can see within range. This guardian occupies that space and is indistinct except for a gleaming sword and sheild emblazoned with the symbol of your deity.

Any criatura hostile to you that moves to a space within 10 pies of the guardian for the first time on a turn debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza. The criatura recibe 20 daño radiante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The guardian vanishes when it has dealt a total of 60 damage.

name: Guards and Wards
desc:
You create a ward that protects up to 2,500 square pies of floor space (an area 50 pies square, or one hundred 5-pie squares or twenty-five 10-pie squares). The warded area can be up to 20 pies tall, and shaped as you desire. You can ward several stories of a stronghold by dividing the area among them, as long as you can walk into each contiguous area while you are casting the spell. When you cast this spell, you can specify individuals that are unaffected by any or all of the effects that you choose. You can also specify a password that, when spoken aloud, makes the speaker immune to these effects. Guards and wards creates the following effects within the warded area.

**Corridors.** Fog fills all the warded corridors, making them heavily obscured. In addition, at each intersection or branching passage offering a choice of direction, there is a 50 percent chance that a criatura other than you will believe it is going in the opposite direction from the one it chooses.

**Doors.** All doors in the warded area are magically locked, as if sealed by an arcane lock spell. In addition, you can cover up to ten doors with an illusion (equivalent to the illusory object function of the minor illusion spell) to make them appear as plain sections of wall

 **Stairs.** Webs fill all stairs in the warded area from top to bottom, as the web spell. These strands regrow in 10 minutos if they are burned or torn away while guards and wards lasts.

**Other Spell Effect.** You can place your choice of one of the following mágico effects within the warded area of the stronghold. 
- Place dancing lights in four corridors. You can designate a simple program that the lights repeat as long as guards and wards lasts. 
- Place magic mouth in two locations. 
- Place stinking cloud in two locations. The vapors appear in the places you designate; they return within 10 minutos if dispersed by wind while guards and wards lasts. 
- Place a constant gust of wind in one corridor or room. 
- Place a suggestion in one location. You select an area of up to 5 pies square, and any criatura that enters or passes through the area receives the suggestion mentally. The whole warded area radiates magic. A dispel magic cast on a specific effect, if successful, removes only that effect. You can create a permanently guarded and warded structure by casting this spell there every day for one year.
material: Burning incense, a small measure of brimstone and oil, a knotted string, a small amount of umber hulk blood, and a small silver rod worth at least 10 gp.

name: Guards and Wards
desc:
You create wards that protect the objetivo area. Each warded area has a maximum height of 20 pies and can be shaped. Several stories of a stronghold can be warded by dividing the area among them if you can walk from one to the next while the spell is being cast.

When cast, you can create a password that can make a criatura immune to these effects when it is spoken aloud. You may also specify individuals that are unaffected by any or all of the effects that you choose.

_Guards and wards_ creates the following effects within the area of the spell.

* **_Corridors:_** Corridors are heavily obscured with fog. Additionally, criaturas that choose between multiple passages or branches have a 50% chance to unknowingly choose a path other than the one they meant to choose.
* **_Doors:_** Doors are magically locked as if by an _arcane lock_ spell. Additionally, you may conceal up to 10 doors with an illusion as per the illusory object component of the _minor illusion_ spell to make the doors appear as unadorned wall sections.</ li>
* **_Stairs:_** Stairs are filled from top to bottom with webs as per the _web_ spell. Until the spell ends, the webbing strands regrow 10 minutos after they are damaged or destroyed.

In addition, one of the following spell effects can be placed within the spell's area.

* _Dancing lights_ can be placed in 4 corridors and you can choose for them to repeat a simple sequence.
* _Magic mouth_ spells can be placed in 2 locations.
_Stinking clouds_ can be placed in 2 locations.

The clouds return after 10 minutos if dispersed while the spell remains.
* A _gust of wind_ can be placed in a corridor or room.
* Pick a 5-pie square. Any criatura that passes through it subjected to a _suggestion_ spell, hearing the suggestion mentally.

The entirety of the warded area radiates as magic. Each effect must be targeted by separate dispel magic spells to be removed.

The spell can be made permanent by recasting the spell every day for a year.

name: Guest of Honor
desc: You whisper words of encouragement, and a criatura that you touch gains confidence along with approval from strangers. For the spell’s duration, the objetivo puts its best pie forward and strangers associate the criatura with positive feelings. The objetivo adds 1d4 to all Carisma (Persuasión) checks made to influence the attitudes of others.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the effect lasts for an additional 10 minutos for each slot level above 1st.

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the effect lasts for 24 horas.
material: a signet ring worth 25 gp

name: Guidance
desc: You touch one willing criatura. Once before the spell ends, the objetivo can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one ability check of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the ability check. The spell then ends.

name: Guidance
desc: The objetivo may gain an expertise die to one ability check of its choice, ending the spell. The expertise die can be rolled before or after the ability check is made.

name: Guiding Bolt
desc: A flash of ligera streaks toward a criatura of your choice within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 4d6 daño radiante, and the next tirada de ataque made against this objetivo before the end of your next turn has ventaja, thanks to the mystical dim ligera glittering on the objetivo until then.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Guiding Bolt
desc: A bolt of ligera erupts from your hand. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, you deal 4d6 daño radiante and the next tirada de ataque made against the objetivo before the end of your next turn has ventaja.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Guiding Star
desc: By observing the stars or the position of the sun, you are able to determine the cardinal directions, as well as the direction and distance to a stated destination. You can’t become directionally disoriented or lose track of the destination. The spell doesn’t, however, reveal the best route to your destination or warn you about deep gorges, flooded rivers, or other impassable or treacherous terrain.

name: Gust of Wind
desc: A line of strong wind 60 pies long and 10 pies wide blasts from you in a direction you choose for the spell's duration. cada criatura that starts its turn in the line debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pushed 15 pies away from you in a direction following the line. Any criatura in the line must spend 2 pies of movement for every 1 pie it moves when moving closer to you. The gust disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles, torches, and similar unprotected flames in the area. It causes protected flames, such as those of lanterns, to dance wildly and has a 50 percent chance to extinguish them. As a acción adicional on each of your turns before the spell ends, you can change the direction in which the line blasts from you.
material: A legume seed.

name: Gust of Wind
desc:
A torrent of wind erupts from your hand in a direction you choose. cada criatura that starts its turn in the area or moves into the area debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pushed 15 pies from you in the direction of the line.

Any criatura in the area must spend 2 pies of movement for every pie moved when trying to approach you.

The blast of wind extinguishes small fires and disperses gas or vapor.

You can use a acción adicional to change the direction of the gust.

name: Hallow
desc:
You touch a point and infuse an area around it with holy (or unholy) power. The area can have a radius up to 60 pies, and the spell fails if the radius includes an area already under the effect a hallow spell. The affected area is subject to the following effects. First, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead can't enter the area, nor can such criaturas charm, frighten, or possess criaturas within it. Any criatura hechizado, asustado, or possessed by such a criatura is no longer hechizado, asustado, or possessed upon entering the area. You can exclude one or more of those types of criaturas from this effect. Second, you can bind an extra effect to the area. Choose the effect from the following list, or choose an effect offered by the DM. Some of these effects apply to criaturas in the area; you can designate whether the effect applies to todas las criaturas, criaturas that follow a specific deity or leader, or criaturas of a specific sort, such as ores or trolls. When a criatura that would be affected enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it can make a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en un éxito, the criatura ignores the extra effect until it leaves the area.

**Courage.** Affected criaturas can't be asustado while in the area.

**Darkness.** Darkness fills the area. Normal ligera, as well as mágico ligera created by spells of a lower level than the slot you used to cast this spell, can't illuminate the area

 **Daylight.** Bright ligera fills the area. mágico darkness created by spells of a lower level than the slot you used to cast this spell can't extinguish the ligera.

**Energy Protection.** Affected criaturas in the area have resistance to one damage type of your choice, except for contundente, perforante, or cortante

 **Energy Vulnerability.** Affected criaturas in the area have vulnerability to one damage type of your choice, except for contundente, perforante, or cortante.

**Everlasting Rest.** Dead bodies interred in the area can't be turned into undead.

**Extradimensional Interference.** Affected criaturas can't move or travel using teleportation or by extradimensional or interplanar means.

**Fear.** Affected criaturas are asustado while in the area.

**Silence.** No sound can emanate from within the area, and no sound can alcance into it.

**Tongues.** Affected criaturas can communicate with any other criatura in the area, even if they don't share a Común language.
material: Herbs, oils, and incense worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Hallow
desc:
You imbue the area with divine power, bolstering some criaturas and hindering others. Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead cannot enter the area. They are also incapable of charming, frightening, or possessing another criatura within the area. Any such effects end on a criatura that enters the area. When casting, you may exclude one or more criatura types from this effect.

Additionally, you may anchor additional mágico effects to the area. Choose one effect from the list below (the Narrator may also offer specific effects).

Some effects apply to criaturas. You may choose to affect todas las criaturas, criaturas of a specific type, or those that follow a specific leader or deity. criaturas make a tirada de salvación de Carisma when the spell is cast, when they enter the area for the first time on a turn, or if they end their turn within the area. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura is immune to the effect until it leaves the area.

* **Courage:** criaturas in the area cannot be asustado.
* **Darkness:** The area is filled by darkness, and normal ligera sources or sources from a lower level espacio de conjuro are smothered within it.
* **Daylight:** The area is filled with bright ligera, dispelling mágico darkness created by spells of a lower level espacio de conjuro.
* **Energy Protection:** criaturas in the area gain resistance against a damage type of your choice (excepting contundente, perforante, or cortante).
* **Energy Vulnerability:** criaturas in the area gain vulnerability against a damage type of your choice (excepting contundente, perforante, or cortante).
* **Everlasting Rest:** Dead bodies laid to rest in the area cannot be turned into undead by any means.
* **Extradimensional Interference:** Extradimensional movement or travel is blocked to and from the area, including all teleportation effects.
* **Fear**: criaturas are asustado while within the area.
* **Silence:** No sound can enter or emanate from the area.
* **Tongues:** criaturas within the area can freely communicate with one another whether they share a language or not.

name: Hallucinatory Terrain
desc:
You make natural terrain in a 150-pie cube in range look, sound, and smell like some other sort of natural terrain. Thus, open fields or a road can be made to resemble a swamp, hill, crevasse, or some other difficult or impassable terrain. A pond can be made to seem like a grassy meadow, a precipice like a gentle slope, or a rock-strewn gully like a wide and smooth road. Manufactured structures, equipment, and criaturas within the area aren't changed in appearance.

The tactile characteristics of the terrain are unchanged, so criaturas entering the area are likely to see through the illusion. If the difference isn't obvious by touch, a criatura carefully examining the illusion can attempt an Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to disbelieve it. A criatura who discerns the illusion for what it is, sees it as a vague image superimposed on the terrain.
material: A stone, a twig, and a bit of green plant.

name: Hallucinatory Terrain
desc:
You weave a veil over the natural terrain within the area, making it look, sound, or smell like another sort of terrain. A small lake could be made to look like a grassy glade. A path or trail could be made to look like an impassable swamp. A cliff face could even appear as a gentle slope or seem to extend further than it does. This spell does not affect any manufactured structures, equipment, or criaturas.

Only the visual, auditory, and olfactory components of the terrain are changed. Any criatura that enters or attempts to interact with the illusion feels the real terrain below. If given sufficient reason, a criatura may make an Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to disbelieve it. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura sees the illusion superimposed over the actual terrain.
higher_level: The spell objetivos an additional 50-pie cube for each slot level above 4th.

name: Hamstring
desc: You create an arrow of eldritch energy and send it at a objetivo you can see within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d4 daño de fuerza, and it can’t take reactions until the end of its next turn.
higher_level: The spell’s damage increases by 1d4 when you alcance 5th level (2d4), 11th level (3d4), and 17th level (4d4).

name: Hard Heart
desc: You imbue your touch with the power to make a criatura aloof, hardhearted, and unfeeling. The criatura you touch as part of casting this spell debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría; a criatura can choose to fail this tirada de salvación unless it’s currently hechizado. en una salvación exitosa, this spell fails. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo becomes immune to being hechizado for the duration; if it’s currently hechizado, that effect ends. In addition, Carisma checks against the objetivo are made with desventaja for the spell’s duration.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd or 4th level, the duration increases to 1 hora. If you use a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the duration is 8 horas.
material: an iron key

name: Harm
desc: You unleash a virulent disease on a criatura that you can see within range. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, it recibe 14d6 daño necrótico, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa. el daño can't reduce the objetivo's puntos de golpe below 1. If the objetivo fails the tirada de salvación, its punto de golpe maximum is reduced for 1 hora by an amount equal to the daño necrótico it took. Any effect that removes a disease allows a criatura's punto de golpe maximum to return to normal before that time passes.

name: Harm
desc: You assail a objetivo with an agonizing disease. The objetivo recibe 14d6 daño necrótico. If it fails its tirada de salvación its punto de golpe maximum is reduced by an amount equal to el daño taken for 1 hora or until the disease is magically cured. This spell cannot reduce a objetivo to less than 1 punto de golpe.
higher_level: Increase el daño by 2d6 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Harmonic Resonance
desc:
You harmonize with the rhythm of those around you until you're perfectly in sync. You may take the Help action as a acción adicional. Additionally, when a criatura within 30 pies uses a Bardic Inspiration die, you may choose to reroll the die after it is rolled but before the outcome is determined.

You cannot cast another spell through your spellcasting focus while concentrating on this spell.

name: Harry
desc:
You instill an irresistible sense of insecurity and terror in the objetivo. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo has desventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks to avoid your notice and is asustado of you while you are within its line of sight. While you are within 1 milla of the objetivo, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to track the objetivo, and the objetivo can't take a descanso largo, terrified you are just around the corner. The objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación once every 10 minutos, ending the spell en un éxito.
  en una salvación exitosa, the objetivo isn't affected, and you can't use this spell against it again for 24 horas.
higher_level: When you cast this spell with a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 8 horas and the objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación once each hora. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 24 horas, and the objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación every 8 horas.
material: a bit of fur from a game animal
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorceror, Wizard

name: Harrying Hounds
desc:
When you cast this spell, choose a direction (north, south, northeast, or the like). cada criatura in a 20-pie-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría when you cast this spell or be affected by it. When an affected criatura travels, it travels at a fast pace in the opposite direction of the direction you chose as it believes a pack of dogs or wolves follows it from the chosen direction.
  When an affected criatura isn't traveling, it is asustado of your chosen direction. The affected criatura occasionally hears howls or sees glowing eyes in the darkness at the edge of its vision in that direction. An affected criatura will not stop at a destination, instead pacing half-circles around the destination until the effect ends, terrified the pack will overcome it if it stops moving.
  An affected criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the end of each 4-hora period, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. An affected criatura moves along the safest available route unless it has nowhere to move, such as if it arrives at the edge of a cliff. When an affected criatura can't safely move in the opposite direction of your chosen direction, it cowers in place, defending itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise taking no actions. In such circumstances, the affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación every minuto, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. The spell's effect is suspended when an affected criatura is engaged in combat, allowing it to move as necessary to face hostile criaturas.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the duration increases by 4 horas for each slot level above 5th. If an affected criatura travels for more than 8 horas, it risks agotamiento as if on a forced march.
material: a tuft of fur from a hunting dog

name: Harsh Light of Summer’s Glare
desc: You emit a burst of brilliant ligera, which bears down oppressively upon todas las criaturas within range that can see you. criaturas with visión en la oscuridad that fail a tirada de salvación de Constitución are cegado and aturdido. criaturas without visión en la oscuridad that fail a tirada de salvación de Constitución are cegado. This is not a gaze attack, and it cannot be avoided by averting one’s eyes or wearing a blindfold.

name: Haste
desc: Choose a willing criatura that you can see within range. Until the spell ends, the objetivo's Velocidad is doubled, it gains a +2 bonus to AC, it has ventaja on Destreza saving throws, and it gains an additional action on each of its turns. That action can be used only to take the Attack (one weapon attack only), Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object action. When the spell ends, the objetivo can't move or take actions until after its next turn, as a wave of lethargy sweeps over it.
material: A shaving of licorice root.

name: Haste
desc:
Until the spell ends, the objetivo's Velocidad is doubled, it gains a +2 bonus to AC, it has ventaja on Destreza saving throws, and it gains one additional action on each of its turns. This action can be used to make a single weapon attack, or to take the Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object action.

When the spell ends, the objetivo is tired and cannot move or take actions until after its next turn.
higher_level: objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd. All objetivos of this spell must be within 30 pies of each other.

name: Heal
desc: Choose a criatura that you can see within range. A surge of positive energy washes through the criatura, causing it to regain 70 puntos de golpe. This spell also ends blindness, deafness, and any diseases affecting the objetivo. This spell has no effect on constructs or undead.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the amount of healing increases by 10 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Heal
desc: A torrent of healing energy suffuses the objetivo and it regains 70 puntos de golpe. The spell also ends blindness, deafness, and any diseases afflicting the objetivo.
higher_level: The puntos de golpe regained increase by 10 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Healing Word
desc: A criatura of your choice that you can see within range regains puntos de golpe equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Healing Word
desc: Healing energy washes over the objetivo and it regains puntos de golpe equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier.
higher_level: The puntos de golpe regained increase by 1d4 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Heart of Dis
desc:
You magically replace your heart with one forged on the second layer of Hell. While the spell lasts, you are immune to fear and can't be envenenado, and you are immune to fuego and daño de veneno. You gain resistance to daño de frío, as well as to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante from no mágico weapons that aren't silvered. You have ventaja on saving throws against spells and other mágico effects. Finally, while you are conscious, any criatura hostile to you that starts its turn within 20 pies of you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is asustado of you until the start of your next turn. en un éxito, the criatura is immune to the effect for 24 horas.

Casting this spell magically transports your mortal heart to the lair of one of the lords of Hell. The heart returns to your body when the spell ends. If you die while under the effects of this spell, you can't be brought back to life until your original heart is retrieved.

name: Heart to Heart
desc: For the duration, you and the criatura you touch remain stable and inconsciente if reduced to 0 puntos de golpe while the other has 1 or more puntos de golpe. If you touch a dying criatura, it becomes stable but remains inconsciente while it has 0 puntos de golpe. If both of you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, you must both make death saving throws, as normal. If you or the objetivo regain puntos de golpe, either of you can choose to split those puntos de golpe between the two of you if both of you are within 60 pies of each other.
material: a drop of your blood

name: Heart-Seeking Arrow
desc: The next time you make a ataque a distancia con arma during the spell's duration, the weapon's munición—or the weapon itself if it's a arrojadiza weapon—seeks its objetivo's vital organs. Make the tirada de ataque as normal. On a hit, the weapon causa an extra 6d6 damage of the same type dealt by the weapon, or half as much damage on a miss as it streaks unerringly toward its objetivo. If this attack reduces the objetivo to 0 puntos de golpe, the objetivo has desventaja on its next death tirada de salvación, and, if it dies, it can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the extra damage on a hit increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Heartache
desc: You fuerza an enemigo to experience pangs of unrequited love and emotional distress. These feelings manifest with such intensity that the criatura recibe 5d6 daño psíquico on a failed tirada de salvación de Carisma, or half el daño en una salvación exitosa.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo an additional enemigo for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a silver locket

name: Hearth Charm
desc: This spell makes flammable material burn twice as long as normal.

name: Heartstop
desc: You slow the beating of a willing objetivo’s heart to the rate of one beat per minuto. The criatura’s breathing almost stops. To a casual or brief observer, the subject appears dead. At the end of the spell, the criatura returns to normal with no ill effects.

name: Heartstrike
desc: The spirits of ancient archers carry your missiles straight to their objetivos. You have ventaja on ranged weapon attacks until the start of your next turn, and you can ignore penalties for your enemigos having half cover or three-quarters cover, and for an area being lightly obscured, when making those attacks.
material: an arrow, bolt, or other missile

name: Heat Metal
desc: Choose a manufactured metal object, such as a metal weapon or a suit of pesada or medium metal armor, that you can see within range. You cause the object to glow red-hot. Any criatura in physical contact with the object recibe 2d8 daño de fuego when you cast the spell. Until the spell ends, you can use a acción adicional on each of your subsequent turns to cause this damage again. If a criatura is holding or wearing the object and recibe el daño from it, the criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or drop the object if it can. If it doesn't drop the object, it has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: A piece of iron and a flame.

name: Heat Metal
desc: The objetivo becomes oven hot. Any criatura touching the objetivo recibe 2d8 daño de fuego when the spell is cast. Until the spell ends, on subsequent turns you can use a acción adicional to inflict the same damage. If a criatura is holding or wearing the objetivo and suffers damage, it makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or it drops the objetivo. If a criatura does not or cannot drop the objetivo, it has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Heavenly Crown
desc: A glowing, golden crown appears on your head and sheds dim ligera in a 30-pie radius. When you cast the spell (and as a acción adicional on subsequent turns, until the spell ends), you can objetivo one willing criatura within 30 pies of you that you can see. If the objetivo can hear you, it can use its reacción to make one ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma and then move up to half its Velocidad, or vice versa.
material: a small golden crown worth 50 gp

name: Hedgehog Dozen
