In addition, any traps on the object are automatically triggered. An item with multiple locks requires multiple castings of this spell to be opened.

When you objetivo an object held shut by an arcane lock, that spell is suppressed for 10 minutos, allowing the object to be opened and shut normally during that time.
higher_level: The level of the arcane lock you can suppress increases by 1 for each slot level above 3rd. In addition, if the level of your knock spell is 2 or more levels higher than that of the arcane lock, you may dispel the arcane lock instead of suppressing it.

name: Kobold’s Fury
desc: Your touch infuses the rage of a threatened kobold into the objetivo. The objetivo has ventaja on melee weapon attacks until the end of its next turn. In addition, its next successful ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma against a criatura larger than itself does an additional 2d8 damage.
material: a kobold scale

name: Labyrinth Mastery
desc:
Upon casting this spell, you immediately gain a sense of your surroundings. If you are in a physical maze or any similar structure with multiple paths and dead ends, this spell guides you to the nearest exit, although not necessarily along the fastest or shortest route.

In addition, while the spell is guiding you out of such a structure, you have ventaja on ability checks to avoid being surprised and on initiative rolls.

You gain a perfect memory of all portions of the structure you move through during the spell’s duration. If you revisit such a portion, you recognize that you’ve been there before and automatically notice any changes to the environment.

Also, while under the effect of this spell, you can exit any [maze](https://api.open5e.com/spells/maze) spell (and its lesser and greater varieties) as an action without needing to make an Inteligencia check.
material: a piece of blank parchment

name: Labyrinthine Howl
desc: You let loose the howl of a ravenous beast, causing each enemigo within range that can hear you to make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, a criatura believes it has been transported into a labyrinth and is under attack by savage beasts. An affected criatura must choose either to face the beasts or to curl into a ball for protection. A criatura that faces the beasts recibe 7d8 daño psíquico, and then the spell ends on it. A criatura that curls into a ball falls derribado and is aturdido until the end of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, el daño increases by 2d8 for each slot level above 5th.
material: a dead mouse

name: Lacerate
desc: You make a swift cutting motion through the air to lacerate a criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. It recibe 4d8 daño cortante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the tirada de salvación fails by 5 or more, the wound erupts with a violent spray of blood, and the objetivo gains one level of agotamiento.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a shard of bone or crystal

name: Lair Sense
desc:
You set up a mágico boundary around your lair. The boundary can’t exceed the dimensions of a 100-pie cube, but within that maximum, you can shape it as you like—to follow the walls of a building or cave, for example. While the spell lasts, you instantly become aware of any Tiny or larger criatura that enters the enclosed area. You know the criatura’s type but nothing else about it. You are also aware when criaturas leave the area.

This awareness is enough to wake you from sleep, and you receive the knowledge as long as you’re on the same plane of existence as your lair.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, add 50 pies to the maximum dimensions of the cube and add 12 horas to the spell’s duration for each slot level above 2nd.
material: treasure worth at least 500 gp, which is not consumed in casting

name: Lance
desc: You create a shimmering lance of fuerza and hurl it toward a criatura you can see within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 5d6 daño de fuerza, and it is apresado by the lance until the end of its next turn.

name: Land Bond
desc: You touch a willing criatura and infuse it with ley energy, creating a bond between the criatura and the land. For the duration of the spell, if the objetivo is in contact with the ground, the objetivo has ventaja on saving throws and ability checks made to avoid being moved or knocked derribado against its will. Additionally, the criatura ignores no mágico difficult terrain and is immune to effects from extreme environments such as heat, frío (but not frío or daño de fuego), and altitude.

name: Last Rays of the Dying Sun
desc: A burst of searing heat explodes from you, dealing 6d6 daño de fuego to all enemigos within range. Immediately afterward, a wave of frigid frío rolls across the same area, dealing 6d6 daño de frío to enemigos. A criatura that makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza recibe half el daño.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th or 9th level, el daño from both waves increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Lava Stone
desc: When you cast **lava stone** on a piece of sling ammo, the stone or bullet becomes intensely hot. As a acción adicional, you can launch the heated stone with a sling: the stone increases in size and melts into a glob of lava while in flight. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. If it hits, the objetivo recibe 1d8 daño contundente plus 6d6 daño de fuego. The objetivo recibe additional daño de fuego at the start of each of your next three turns, starting with 4d6, then 2d6, and then 1d6. The additional damage can be avoided if the objetivo or an aliado within 5 pies of the objetivo scrapes off the lava. This is done by using an action to make a successful Sabiduría (Medicina) check against your spellcasting save CD. The spell ends if the heated sling stone isn’t used immediately.
material: a sling stone

name: Lay to Rest
desc:
A pulse of searing ligera rushes out from you. Each undead criatura within 15 pies of you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. A objetivo recibe 8d6 daño radiante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
  An undead criatura reduced to 0 puntos de golpe by this spell disintegrates in a burst of radiante motes, leaving anything it was wearing or carrying in a space it formerly occupied.
material: a pinch of grave dirt

name: Legend Killer
desc: You tap into the life fuerza of a criatura that is capable of performing legendary actions. When you cast the spell, the objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or lose the ability to take legendary actions for the spell’s duration. A criatura can’t use legendary resistance to automatically succeed on the tirada de salvación against this spell. An affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, regaining 1 legendary action en una salvación exitosa. The objetivo continues repeating the tirada de salvación until the spell ends or it regains all its legendary actions.
material: a silver scroll describing the spell’s objetivo worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Legend Lore
desc: Name or describe a person, place, or object. The spell brings to your mind a brief summary of the significant lore about the thing you named. The lore might consist of current tales, forgotten stories, or even secret lore that has never been widely known. If the thing you named isn't of legendary importance, you gain no information. The more information you already have about the thing, the more precise and detailed the information you receive is. The information you learn is accurate but might be couched in figurative language. For example, if you have a mysterious magic axe on hand, the spell might yield this information:  "Woe to the evildoer whose hand touches the axe, for even the haft slices the hand of the evil ones. Only a true Child of Stone, lover and beloved of Moradin, may awaken the true powers of the axe, and only with the sacred word Rudnogg on the lips."
material: Incense worth 250 inches that fate consumes and four sticks of ivory worth 50 gp each.

name: Legend Lore
desc:
You learn significant information about the objetivo. This could range from the most up-todate research, lore forgotten in old tales, or even previously unknown information. The spell gives you additional, more detailed information if you already have some knowledge of the objetivo. The spell will not return any information for items not of legendary renown.

The knowledge you gain is always true, but may be obscured by metaphor, poetic language, or verse.

If you use the spell for a cursed tome, for instance, you may gain knowledge of the dire words spoken by its creator as they brought it into the world.
higher_level: Your intuition surrounding the objetivo is enhanced and you gain ventaja on one Investigación check regarding it for each slot level above 6th.

name: Legion
desc: You call down a legion of shadowy soldiers in a 10-pie cube. Their features resemble a mockery of once-living criaturas. Whenever a criatura starts its turn inside the cube or within 5 pies of it, or enters the cube for the first time on its turn, the conjured shades make an attack using your melee ataque de conjuro modifier; on a hit, the objetivo recibe 3d8 daño necrótico. The space inside the cube is difficult terrain.
material: a toy soldier

name: Legion of Rabid Squirrels
desc: While in a forest, you call a legion of rabid squirrels to descend from the nearby trees at a point you can see within range. The squirrels form into a swarm that uses the statistics of a [swarm of poisonous snakes](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/swarm-of-poisonous-snakes), except it has a escalando Velocidad of 30 pies rather than a nadando Velocidad. The legion of squirrels is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the legion, which has its own turns. The legion of squirrels obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to the legion, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions. If you command it to move farther than 60 pies from you, the spell ends and the legion disperses back into the forest. A canid, such as a dog, wolf, fox, or worg, has desventaja on attack rolls against objetivos other than the legion of rabid squirrels while the swarm is within 60 pies of the criatura. When the spell ends, the squirrels disperse back into the forest.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the legion’s daño de veneno increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: an acorn or nut

name: Lemure Transformation
desc: Your body melts into a humanoid-shaped mass of liquid flesh. cada criatura within 5 pies of you that can see the transformation debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, the criatura can't take reactions and is asustado of you until the start of its next turn. Until the end of your turn, your Velocidad becomes 20 pies, you can't speak, and you can move through spaces as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. You revert to your normal form at the end of your turn.

name: Less Fool, I
desc: A criatura you touch becomes less susceptible to lies and mágico influence. For the duration, other criaturas have desventaja on Carisma checks to influence the protected criatura, and the criatura has ventaja on spells that cause it to become hechizado or asustado.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 1 hora. If you use a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the duration is 8 horas. If you use a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the duration is 24 horas. If you use a 9th level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 1 year. Using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher grants a duration that doesn't require Concentración.

name: Lesser Ley Protection
desc: Deep Magic: forest-bound You create a 10-pie cube of antimagic within range that specifically protects against ley line magic. Ley line spells and mágico effects up to level 5 that objetivo a criatura within the cube have no effect on that objetivo. Any active ley line spells or mágico effects up to level 5 on a criatura or an object in the cube is suppressed while the criatura or object is in it. The area of a ley line spell or mágico effect up to level 5 can't extend into the cube. If the cube overlaps an area of ley line magic, such as lesser ley pulse, the part of the area that is covered by the cube is suppressed. The cube has no effect on other types of magic or spells. You can exclude specific individuals within the cube from the protection.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, its duration is Concentración, up to 1 hora.

name: Lesser Ley Pulse
desc: You set up ley energy vibrations in a 10-pie cube within range, and name one type of damage. cada criatura in the area debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or lose resistance to the chosen damage type for the duration of the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, choose two damage types instead of one.

name: Lesser Maze
desc: This spell functions as [maze](https://api.open5e.com/spells/maze), but the objetivo can resist being sent to the extradimensional prison with a successful tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. In addition, the maze is easier to navigate, requiring only a CD 12 Inteligencia check to escape.

name: Lesser Restoration
desc: You touch a criatura and can end either one disease or one condition afflicting it. The condition can be cegado, ensordecido, paralizado, or envenenado.

name: Lesser Restoration
desc: Your glowing hand removes one disease or condition affecting the objetivo. Choose from cegado, ensordecido, paralizado, or envenenado. At the Narrator's discretion, some diseases might not be curable with this spell.

name: Levitate
desc: una criatura or object of your choice that you can see within range rises vertically, up to 20 pies, and remains suspended there for the duration. The spell can levitate a objetivo that weighs up to 500 pounds. An unwilling criatura that succeeds on a tirada de salvación de Constitución is unaffected. The objetivo can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object or surface within alcance (such as a wall or a ceiling), which allows it to move as if it were escalando. You can change the objetivo's altitude by up to 20 pies in either direction on your turn. If you are the objetivo, you can move up or down as part of your move. Otherwise, you can use your action to move the objetivo, which must remain within the spell's range. When the spell ends, the objetivo floats gently to the ground if it is still aloft.
material: Either a small leather loop or a piece of golden wire bent into a cup shape with a long shank on one end.

name: Levitate
desc:
Until the spell ends, the objetivo rises vertically in the air up to 20 pies and remains floating there, able to move only by pushing or pulling on fixed objects or surfaces within its alcance. This allows the objetivo to move as if it was escalando.

On subsequent turns, you can use your action to alter the objetivo's altitude by up to 20 pies in either direction so long as it remains within range. If you have targeted yourself you may move up or down as part of your movement.

The objetivo floats gently to the ground if it is still in the air when the spell ends.
higher_level: When using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro the objetivo can levitate or come to the ground at will. When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro its duration increases to 1 hora and it no longer requires Concentración.

name: Ley Disruption
desc: You create a 15-pie-radius sphere filled with disruptive ley energy. The sphere is centered around a point you can see within range. Surfaces inside the sphere shift erratically, becoming difficult terrain for the duration. Any criatura in the area when it appears, that starts its turn in the area, or that enters the area for the first time on a turn debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall derribado. If you cast this spell in an area within the influence of a ley line, criaturas have desventaja on their saving throws against its effect. Special. A geomancer with a bound ley line is “within the influence of a ley line” for purposes of ley disruption as long as he or she is on the same plane as the bound line.

name: Ley Disturbance
desc: Deep Magic: forest-bound While in your bound forest, you tune your senses to any disturbances of ley energy flowing through it. For the duration, you are aware of any ley line manipulation or ley spell casting within 5 millas of you. You know the approximate distance and general direction to each disturbance within that range, but you don't know its exact location. This doesn't allow you to locate the ley lines themselves, just any use or modification of them.

name: Ley Energy Bolt
desc: You transform ambient ley power into a crackling bolt of energy 100 pies long and 5 pies wide. cada criatura in the line recibe 5d8 daño de fuerza, or la mitad del daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. The bolt passes through the first inanimate object in its path, and criaturas on the other side of the obstacle receive no bonus to their tirada de salvación from cover. The bolt stops if it strikes a second object.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the bolt's damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Ley Leech
desc: You channel destructive ley energy through your touch. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura within your alcance. The objetivo recibe 8d10 daño necrótico and debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or have desventaja on attack rolls, saving throws, and ability checks. An affected criatura repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of its turn, ending the effect on itself with a success. This spell has no effect against constructs or undead.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the spell's damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Ley Sense
desc: You tune your senses to the pulse of ambient ley energy flowing through the world. For the duration, you gain sentido de temblor with a range of 20 pies and you are instantly aware of the presence of any ley line within 5 millas. You know the distance and direction to every ley line within that range.

name: Ley Storm
desc: A roiling stormcloud of ley energy forms, centered around a point you can see and extending horizontally to a radius of 360 pies, with a thickness of 30 pies. Shifting color shoots through the writhing cloud, and trueno roars out of it. cada criatura under the cloud at the moment when it's created (no more than 5,000 pies beneath it) recibe 2d6 daño de trueno and is disruptive aura spell. rondas 5-10. Flashes of multicolored ligera burst through and out of the cloud, causing criaturas to have desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on sight while they are beneath the cloud. In addition, each ronda, you trigger a burst of energy that fills a 20-pie sphere centered on a point you can see beneath the cloud. cada criatura in the sphere recibe 4d8 daño de fuerza (no tirada de salvación). Special. A geomancer who casts this spell regains 4d10 puntos de golpe.

name: Ley Surge
desc: You unleash the power of a ley line within 5 millas, releasing a spark that flares into a 30-pie sphere centered around a point within 150 pies of you. cada criatura in the sphere recibe 14d6 daño de fuerza and is aturdido for 1 minuto; a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución halves el daño and negates the stun. A aturdido criatura repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of its turn, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Special. A geomancer with a bound ley line can cast this spell as long as he or she is on the same plane as the bound line.

name: Ley Whip
desc: You channel the power of a ley line within 1 milla into a crackling tendril of multicolored ley energy. The tendril extends from your hand but doesn't interfere with your ability to hold or manipulate objects. When you cast the spell and as a acción adicional on subsequent turns, you can direct the tendril to strike a objetivo within 50 pies of you. Make a melee ataque de conjuro; on a hit, the tendril does 3d8 daño de fuerza and the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. If the tirada de salvación fails, you can push the objetivo away or pull it closer, up to 10 pies in either direction. Special. A geomancer with a bound ley line can cast this spell as long as he or she is on the same plane as the bound line.

name: Life Burst
desc:
You make a jubilant shout when you cast this spell, releasing your stores of divine energy in a wave of healing. You distribute the remaining power of your Lay on Hands to aliados within 30 pies of you, restoring puntos de golpe and curing diseases and poisons. This healing energy removes diseases and poisons first (starting with the nearest aliado), removing 5 puntos de golpe from the punto de golpe total for each disease or veneno cured, until all the points are spent or all diseases and poisons are cured. If any puntos de golpe remain, you regain puntos de golpe equal to that amount.
  This spell expends all of the healing energy in your Lay on Hands, which replenishes, as normal, when you finish a descanso largo.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are reduced to 0 hit points

name: Life Drain
desc: With a snarled word of Void Speech, you create a swirling vortex of purple energy. Choose a point you can see within range. criaturas within 15 pies of the point take 10d6 daño necrótico, or half that damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. For cada criatura damaged by the spell, you can choose one other criatura within range, including yourself, that is not a construct or undead. The secondary objetivos regain puntos de golpe equal to half the daño necrótico you dealt.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the vortex’s damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Life Hack
desc:
Choose up to five criaturas that you can see within range. Each of the criaturas gains access to a pool of temporary puntos de golpe that it can draw upon over the spell’s duration or until the pool is used up. The pool contains 120 temporary puntos de golpe. The number of temporary puntos de golpe each individual criatura can draw is determined by dividing 120 by the number of criaturas with access to the pool. puntos de golpe are drawn as a acción adicional by the criatura gaining the temporary puntos de golpe. Any number can be drawn at once, up to the maximum allowed.

A criatura can’t draw temporary puntos de golpe from the pool while it has temporary puntos de golpe from any source, including a previous casting of this spell.
material: a ruby worth 500 gp, which is consumed during the casting

name: Life Sense
desc: For the duration, you can sense the location of any criatura that isn’t a construct or an undead within 30 pies of you, regardless of impediments to your other senses. This spell doesn’t sense criaturas that are dead. A criatura trying to hide its life fuerza from you can make a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en un éxito, you can’t sense the criatura with this casting of the spell. If you cast the spell again, the criatura debe realizar the tirada de salvación again to remain hidden from your senses.
material: a clear piece of quartz
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Life Transference Arrow
desc:
You create a glowing arrow of necrótico magic and command it to strike a criatura you can see within range. The arrow can have one of two effects; you choose which at the moment of casting. If you make a successful ranged ataque de conjuro, you and the objetivo experience the desired effect. If the attack misses, the spell fails.
* The arrow causa 2d6 daño necrótico to the objetivo, and you heal the same amount of puntos de golpe.
* You take 2d6 daño necrótico, and the objetivo heals the same amount of puntos de golpe.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the spell’s damage and puntos de golpe healed increase by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Life from Death
desc: Your touch can siphon energy from undead to heal your wounds. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against an undead criatura within your alcance. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d6 daño radiante, and you or an aliado within 30 pies of you regains puntos de golpe equal to half the amount of daño radiante dealt. If used on an aliado, this effect can restore the aliado to no more than half of the aliado's punto de golpe maximum. This effect can't heal an undead or a construct. Until the spell ends, you can make the attack again on each of your turns as an action.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Light
desc: You touch one object that is no larger than 10 pies in any dimension. Until the spell ends, the object sheds bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. The ligera can be colored as you like. Completely covering the object with something opaque blocks the ligera. The spell ends if you cast it again or dismiss it as an action. If you objetivo an object held or worn by a hostile criatura, that criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza to avoid the spell.
material: A firefly or phosphorescent moss.

name: Light
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivo emits bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera an additional 20 pies. ligera emanating from the objetivo may be any color. Completely covering the objetivo with something that is not transparent blocks the ligera. The spell ends when you use an action to dismiss it or if you cast it again.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Herald, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Lightless Torch
desc:
You touch one object that is no larger than 10 pies in any dimension. Until the spell ends, the object sheds a shadowy miasma in a 30-pie radius. A criatura with visión en la oscuridad inside the radius sees the area as if it were filled with bright ligera. The miasma doesn't shed ligera, and a criatura with visión en la oscuridad inside the radius can still see outside the radius as normal. A criatura with visión en la oscuridad outside the radius or a criatura without visión en la oscuridad sees only that the object is surrounded by wisps of shadow.
  Completely covering the affected object with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the effect. Though the effect doesn't shed ligera, it can be dispelled if the area of a darkness spell overlaps the area of this spell.
  If you objetivo an object held or worn by a hostile criatura, that criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza to avoid the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the duration increases by 2 horas for each slot level above 1st.

name: Lightning Bolt
desc: A stroke of rayo forming a line 100 pies long and 5 pies wide blasts out from you in a direction you choose. cada criatura in the line debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura recibe 8d6 daño de rayo en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The rayo ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: A bit of fur and a rod of amber, crystal, or glass.

name: Lightning Bolt
desc:
A bolt of rayo arcs out from you in a direction you choose. cada criatura in the area recibe 8d6 daño de rayo. The rayo ignites flammable objects in its path that aren't worn or carried by another criatura.

If the spell is stopped by an object at least as large as its width, it ends there unless it causa enough damage to break through. When it does, it continues to the end of its area.
higher_level: Damage increases by 1d6 for every slot level above 3rd.

name: Litany of Sure Hands
desc: This spell allows a criatura within range to quickly perform a simple task (other than attacking or casting a spell) as a acción adicional on its turn. Examples include finding an item in a backpack, drinking a potion, and pulling a rope. Other actions may also fall into this category, depending on the GM's ruling. The objetivo also ignores the loading property of weapons.

name: Living Shadows
desc:
You whisper sibilant words of void speech that cause shadows to writhe with unholy life. Choose a point you can see within range. Writhing shadows spread out in a 15-pie-radius sphere centered on that point, grasping at criaturas in the area. A criatura that starts its turn in the area or that enters the area for the first time on its turn debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be apresado by the shadows. A criatura that starts its turn apresado by the shadows debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or gain one level of agotamiento.

A apresado criatura can use its action to make a Fuerza or Destreza check (its choice) against your CD de salvación del conjuro. en un éxito, it frees itself.

name: Locate Animals or Plants
desc: Describe or name a specific kind of beast or plant. Concentrating on the voice of Naturaleza in your surroundings, you learn the direction and distance to the closest criatura or plant of that kind within 5 millas, if any are present.
material: A bit of fur from a bloodhound.

name: Locate Animals or Plants
desc: Name or describe in detail a specific kind of beast or plant. The natural magics in range reveal the closest example of the objetivo within 5 millas, including its general direction (north, west, southeast, and so on) and how many millas away it currently is.

name: Locate Creature
desc: Describe or name a criatura that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the criatura's location, as long as that criatura is within 1,000 pies of you. If the criatura is moving, you know the direction of its movement. The spell can locate a specific criatura known to you, or the nearest criatura of a specific kind (such as a human or a unicorn), so long as you have seen such a criatura up close-within 30 pies-at least once. If the criatura you described or named is in a different form, such as being under the effects of a polymorph spell, this spell doesn't locate the criatura. This spell can't locate a criatura if running water at least 10 pies wide blocks a direct path between you and the criatura.
material: A bit of fur from a bloodhound.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Wizard

name: Locate Creature
desc:
Name or describe in detail a criatura familiar to you. The spell reveals the general direction the criatura is in (south, east, northwest, and so on) if it exists within range. This includes its current trajectory if it's travelling.

You may locate specific, known criaturas, or the nearest criatura of a specific type (like a bat, gnome, or red dragon) provided that you have observed that type within 30 pies at least once. If a specific criatura you seek is in a different form (for example a wildshaped druid) the spell is unable to find it.

The spell cannot travel across running water 10 pies across or wider—it is unable to find the criatura and the trail ends.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Herald, Wizard

name: Locate Object
desc: Describe or name an object that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the object's location, as long as that object is within 1,000 pies of you. If the object is in motion, you know the direction of its movement. The spell can locate a specific object known to you, as long as you have seen it up close-within 30 pies-at least once. Alternatively, the spell can locate the nearest object of a particular kind, such as a certain kind of apparel, jewelry, furniture, tool, or weapon. This spell can't locate an object if any thickness of lead, even a thin sheet, blocks a direct path between you and the object.
material: A forked twig.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Wizard

name: Locate Object
desc:
Name or describe in detail an object familiar to you. The spell reveals the general direction the object is in (south, east, northwest, and so on) if it exists within range. This includes its current trajectory if it's travelling.

You may locate a specific object known to you, provided that you have observed it within 30 pies at least once. You may also find the closest example of a certain type of object (for example an instrument, item of furniture, compass, or vase).

When there is any thickness of lead in the direct path between you and the object the spell is unable to find it.

name: Locate Red Portal
desc: For the duration, you can sense the presence of any dimensional portals within range and whether they are one-way or two-way. If you sense a portal using this spell, you can use your action to peer through the portal to determine its destination. You gain a glimpse of the area at the other end of the shadow road. If the destination is not somewhere you have previously visited, you can make a CD 25 Inteligencia (Arcanos, Historia or Naturaleza-whichever is most relevant) check to determine to where and when the portal leads.

name: Lock Armor
desc: You objetivo a piece of metal equipment or a metal construct. If the objetivo is a criatura wearing metal armor or is a construct, it makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to negate the effect. en una salvación fallida, the spell causes metal to cling to metal, making it impossible to move pieces against each other. This effectively paralyzes a criatura that is made of metal or that is wearing metal armor with moving pieces; for example, scale mail would lock up because the scales must slide across each other, but a breastplate would be unaffected. Limited movement might still be possible, depending on how extensive the armor is, and speech is usually not affected. Metal constructs are paralizado. An affected criatura or construct can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. A grease spell dispels lock armor on everything in its area.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a pinch of rust and metal shavings

name: Loki's Gift
desc: Loki's gift makes even the most barefaced lie seem strangely plausible: you gain ventaja to Carisma (Engaño) checks for whatever you're currently saying. If your Engaño check fails, the criatura knows that you tried to manipulate it with magic. If you lie to a criatura that has a friendly attitude toward you and it fails a tirada de salvación de Carisma, you can also coax him or her to reveal a potentially embarrassing secret. The secret can involve wrongdoing (adultery, cheating at tafl, a secret fear, etc.) but not something life-threatening or dishonorable enough to earn the subject repute as a nithling. The verbal component of this spell is the lie you are telling.

name: Long Game
desc:
While casting this spell, you must engage your objetivo in conversation. At the completion of the casting, the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. If it fails, you place a latent mágico effect in the objetivo's mind for the duration. If the objetivo succeeds on the tirada de salvación, it realizes that you used magic to affect its mind and might become hostile toward you, at the GM's discretion.
  Once before the spell ends, you can use an action to trigger the mágico effect in the objetivo's mind, provided you are on the same plane of existence as the objetivo. When the effect is triggered, the objetivo recibe 5d8 daño psíquico plus an extra 1d8 daño psíquico for every 24 horas that has passed since you cast the spell, up to a total of 12d8 daño psíquico. The spell has no effect on the objetivo if it ends before you trigger the mágico effect.
  *A greater restoration* or *wish* spell cast on the objetivo ends the spell early. You know if the spell is ended early, provided you are on the same plane of existence as the objetivo.

name: Longstrider
desc: You touch a criatura. The objetivo's Velocidad increases by 10 pies until the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each espacio de conjuro above 1st.
material: A pinch of dirt.

name: Longstrider
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivo's Velocidad increases by 10 pies.
higher_level: objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Looping Trail
desc: You touch a trail no more than 1 milla in length, reconfiguring it to give it switchbacks and curves that make the trail loop back on itself. For the duration, the trail makes subtle changes in its configuration and in the surrounding environment to give the impression of forward progression along a continuous path. A criatura on the trail debe tener éxito en a Sabiduría (Supervivencia) check to notice that the trail is leading it in a closed loop.
material: a piece of rope twisted into a loop

name: Lovesick
desc:
This spell causes criaturas to behave unpredictably, as they randomly experience the full gamut of emotions of someone who has fallen head over heels in love. cada criatura in a 10-pie-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría when you cast this spell or be affected by it.

An affected objetivo can’t take reactions and must roll a d10 at the start of each of its turns to determine its behavior for that turn.

| d10 | Behavior |
|---|---|
| 1-3 | The criatura spends its turn moping like a lovelorn teenager; it doesn’t move or take actions. |
| 4–5 | The criatura bursts into tears, recibe the Dash action, and uses all its movement to run off in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a d8 and assign a direction to each die face. |
| 6 | The criatura uses its action to remove one item of clothing or piece of armor. Each ronda spent removing pieces of armor reduces its AC by 1. |
| 7–8 | The criatura drops anything it is holding in its hands and passionately embraces a randomly determined criatura. Treat this as a grapple attempt which uses the Attack action. |
| 9 | The criatura flies into a jealous rage and uses its action to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against a randomly determined criatura. |
| 10 | The criatura can act and move normally. |

At the end of each of its turns, an affected objetivo can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, ending the effect on itself en una salvación exitosa.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the radius of the sphere increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 4th.
material: a handful of red rose petals

name: Machine Sacrifice
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You sacrifice a willing construct you can see to imbue a willing objetivo with construct traits. The objetivo gains resistance to all no mágico damage and gains immunity to the cegado, hechizado, ensordecido, asustado, petrificado, and envenenado conditions.

name: Machine Speech
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork Your voice, and to a lesser extent your mind, changes to communicate only in the whirring clicks of machine speech. Until the end of your next turn, all clockwork spells you cast have ventaja on their attack rolls or the objetivos have desventaja on their saving throws.

name: Machine's Load
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You touch a criatura and give it the capacity to carry, lift, push, or drag weight as if it were one size category larger. If you're using the encumbrance rules, the objetivo is not subject to penalties for weight. Furthermore, the subject can carry loads that would normally be unwieldy.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro higher than 1st, you can touch one additional criatura for each spell level.

name: Maddening Whispers
desc: You whisper a string of Void Speech toward a objetivo within range that can hear you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Carisma or be incapacitado. While incapacitado by this spell, the objetivo’s Velocidad is 0, and it can’t benefit from increases to its Velocidad. To maintain the effect for the duration, you must use your action on subsequent turns to continue whispering; otherwise, the spell ends. The spell also ends if the objetivo recibe damage.

name: Mage Armor
desc: You touch a willing criatura who isn't wearing armor, and a protective mágico fuerza surrounds it until the spell ends. The objetivo's base AC becomes 13 + its Destreza modifier. The spell ends if the objetivo dons armor or if you dismiss the spell as an action.
material: A piece of cured leather.

name: Mage Armor
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivo is protected by a shimmering mágico fuerza. Its AC becomes 13 + its Destreza modifier. The spell ends if the objetivo dons armor, or if you use an action to dismiss it.
higher_level: The objetivo gains 5 temporary puntos de golpe for each slot level above 1st. The temporary puntos de golpe last for the spell's duration.

name: Mage Hand
desc: A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration or until you dismiss it as an action. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 pies away from you or if you cast this spell again. You can use your action to control the hand. You can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial. You can move the hand up to 30 pies each time you use it. The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

name: Mage Hand
desc:
A faintly shimmering phantasmal hand appears at a point you choose within range. It remains until you dismiss it as an action, or until you move more than 30 pies from it.

You can use an action to control the hand and direct it to do any of the following:

* manipulate an object.
* open an unlocked container or door.
* stow or retrieve items from unlocked containers.

The hand cannot attack, use magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

name: Magic Circle
desc:
You create a 10-­--pie-­--radius, 20-­--pie-­--tall cylinder of mágico energy centered on a point on the ground that you can see within range. Glowing runes appear wherever the cylinder intersects with the floor or other surface. Choose one or more of the following types of criaturas: celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead. The circle affects a criatura of the chosen type in the following ways: 
- The criatura can't willingly enter the cylinder by no mágico means. If the criatura tries to use teleportation or interplanar travel to do so, it must first succeed on a tirada de salvación de Carisma. 
- The criatura has desventaja on attack rolls against objetivos within the cylinder. 
- objetivos within the cylinder can't be hechizado, asustado, or possessed by the criatura.
When you cast this spell, you can elect to cause its magic to operate in the reverse direction, preventing a criatura of the specified type from leaving the cylinder and protecting objetivos outside it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 3rd.
material: Holy water or powdered silver and iron worth at least 100 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Magic Circle
desc:
mágico energies surround the area and stop the type of designated criatura from willingly entering by no mágico means.

Designated criaturas have desventaja when attacking criaturas within the area and are unable to charm, frighten, or possess criaturas within the area. When a designated criatura attempts to teleport or use interplanar travel to enter the area, it makes a tirada de salvación de Carisma or its attempt fails.

You may also choose to reverse this spell, trapping a criatura of your chosen type within the area in order to protect objetivos outside it.
higher_level: The spell's duration increases by 1 hora for every slot level above 3rd.

name: Magic Jar
desc: Your body falls into a catatonic state as your soul leaves it and enters the container you used for the spell's material component. While your soul inhabits the container, you are aware of your surroundings as if you were in the container's space. You can't move or use reactions. The only action you can take is to project your soul up to 100 pies out of the container, either returning to your living body (and ending the spell) or attempting to possess a humanoids body. You can attempt to possess any humanoid within 100 pies of you that you can see (criaturas warded by a protection from evil and good or magic circle spell can't be possessed). The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en un fallo, your soul moves into the objetivo's body, and the objetivo's soul becomes trapped in the container. en un éxito, the objetivo resists your efforts to possess it, and you can't attempt to possess it again for 24 horas. Once you possess a criatura's body, you control it. Your game statistics are replaced by the statistics of the criatura, though you retain your alignment and your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. You retain the benefit of your own class features. If the objetivo has any class levels, you can't use any of its class features. Meanwhile, the possessed criatura's soul can perceive from the container using its own senses, but it can't move or take actions at all. While possessing a body, you can use your action to return from the host body to the container if it is within 100 pies of you, returning the host criatura's soul to its body. If the host body dies while you're in it, the criatura dies, and you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma against your own spellcasting CD. en un éxito, you return to the container if it is within 100 pies of you. Otherwise, you die. If the container is destroyed or the spell ends, your soul immediately returns to your body. If your body is more than 100 pies away from you or if your body is dead when you attempt to return to it, you die. If another criatura's soul is in the container when it is destroyed, the criatura's soul returns to its body if the body is alive and within 100 pies. Otherwise, that criatura dies. When the spell ends, the container is destroyed.
material: A gem, crystal, reliquary, or some other ornamental container worth at least 500 gp.

name: Magic Jar
desc:
Your body becomes catatonic as your soul enters the vessel used as a material component. While within this vessel, you're aware of your surroundings as if you physically occupied the same space.

The only action you can take is to project your soul within range, whether to return to your living body (and end the spell) or to possess a humanoid.

You may not objetivo criaturas protected by protection from good and evil or magic circle spells. A criatura you try to possess makes a tirada de salvación de Carisma or your soul moves from your vessel and into its body. The criatura's soul is now within the container. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura resists and you may not attempt to possess it again for 24 horas.

Once you possess a criatura, you have control of it. Replace your game statistics with the criatura's, except your Carisma, Inteligencia and Sabiduría scores. Your own cultural traits and class features also remain, and you may not use the criatura's cultural traits or class features (if it has any).

During possession, you can use an action to return to the vessel if it is within range, returning the host criatura to its body. If the host body dies while you are possessing it, the criatura also dies and you debe realizar a Carisma save. en un éxito you return to the container if it's within range. Otherwise, you die.

If the vessel is destroyed, the spell ends and your soul returns to your body if it's within range. If your body is out of range or dead when you try to return, you die.

The possessed criatura perceives the world as if it occupied the same space as the vessel, but may not take any actions or movement. If the vessel is destroyed while occupied by a criatura other than yourself, the criatura returns to its body if the body is alive and within range. Otherwise, the criatura dies.

The vessel is destroyed when the spell ends.

name: Magic Missile
desc: You create three glowing darts of mágico fuerza. Each dart hits a criatura of your choice that you can see within range. A dart causa 1d4 + 1 daño de fuerza to its objetivo. The darts all strike simultaneously, and you can direct them para impactar una criatura or several.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the spell creates one more dart for each slot level above 1st.

name: Magic Missile
desc: A trio of glowing darts of mágico fuerza unerringly and simultaneously strike the objetivos, each dealing 1d4+1 daño de fuerza.
higher_level: Evoke one additional dart and objetivo up to one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Magic Mouth
desc: You implant a message within an object in range, a message that is uttered when a trigger condition is met. Choose an object that you can see and that isn't being worn or carried by another criatura. Then speak the message, which must be 25 words or less, though it can be delivered over as long as 10 minutos. Finally, determine the circumstance that will trigger the spell to deliver your message. When that circumstance occurs, a mágico mouth appears on the object and recites the message in your voice and at the same volume you spoke. If the object you chose has a mouth or something that looks like a mouth (for example, the mouth of a statue), the mágico mouth appears there so that the words appear to come from the object's mouth. When you cast this spell, you can have the spell end after it delivers its message, or it can remain and repeat its message whenever the trigger occurs. The triggering circumstance can be as general or as detailed as you like, though it must be based on visual or audible conditions that occur within 30 pies of the object. For example, you could instruct the mouth to speak when any criatura moves within 30 pies of the object or when a silver bell rings within 30 pies of it.
material: A small bit of honeycomb and jade dust worth at least 10 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Magic Mouth
desc:
The objetivo is imbued with a spoken message of 25 words or fewer which it speaks when a trigger condition you choose is met. The message may take up to 10 minutos to convey.

When your trigger condition is met, a mágico mouth appears on the object and recites the message in the same voice and volume as you used when instructing it. If the object chosen has a mouth (for example, a painted portrait) this is where the mouth appears.

You may choose upon casting whether the message is a single event, or whether it repeats every time the trigger condition is met.

The trigger condition must be based upon audio or visual cues within 30 pies of the object, and may be highly detailed or as broad as you choose.

For example, the trigger could be when any attack action is made within range, or when the first spring shoot breaks ground within range.

name: Magic Weapon
desc: You touch a no mágico weapon. Until the spell ends, that weapon becomes a magic weapon with a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the bonus increases to +2. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the bonus increases to +3.

name: Magic Weapon
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivo becomes +1 magic weapon.
higher_level: The bonus increases by +1 for every 2 slot levels above 2nd (maximum +3).

name: Magma Spray
desc:
A 5-pie-diameter, 5-pie-tall cylindrical fountain of magma erupts from the ground in a space of your choice within range. A criatura in that space recibe 3d8 daño de fuego, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura that enters the area on its turn or ends its turn there also recibe 3d8 daño de fuego, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura can take this damage only once per turn.
  A criatura killed by this spell is reduced to ash.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Magnificent Mansion
desc: You conjure an extradimensional dwelling in range that lasts for the duration. You choose where its one entrance is located. The entrance shimmers faintly and is 5 pies wide and 10 pies tall. You and any criatura you designate when you cast the spell can enter the extradimensional dwelling as long as the portal remains open. You can open or close the portal if you are within 30 pies of it. While closed, the portal is invisible. Beyond the portal is a magnificent foyer with numerous chambers beyond. The atmosphere is clean, fresh, and warm. You can create any floor plan you like, but the space can't exceed 50 cubes, each cube being 10 pies on each side. The place is furnished and decorated as you choose. It contains sufficient food to serve a nine course banquet for up to 100 people. A staff of 100 near-transparent servants attends all who enter. You decide the visual appearance of these servants and their attire. They are completely obedient to your orders. Each servant can perform any task a normal human servant could perform, but they can't attack or take any action that would directly harm another criatura. Thus the servants can fetch things, clean, mend, fold clothes, ligera fires, serve food, pour wine, and so on. The servants can go anywhere in the mansion but can't leave it. Furnishings and other objects created by this spell dissipate into smoke if removed from the mansion. When the spell ends, any criaturas inside the extradimensional space are expelled into the open spaces nearest to the entrance.
material: A miniature portal carved from ivory, a small piece of polished marble, and a tiny silver spoon, each item worth at least 5 gp.

name: Magnificent Mansion
desc:
You conjure an extradimensional residence within range. It has one entrance that is in a place of your choosing, has a faint luster to it, and is 5 pies wide and 10 pies tall. You and any designated criatura may enter your mansion while the portal is open. You may open and close the portal while you are within 30 pies of it. Once closed the entrance is invisible.

The entrance leads to an opulent entrance hall, with many doors and halls coming from it. The atmosphere is welcoming, warm, and comfortable, and the whole place is sparkling clean.

The floor plan of the residence is up to you, but it must be made up of fifty or fewer 10-pie cubes.

The furniture and decor are chosen by you. The residence contains enough food to provide Supply for a number of people equal to 5 × your competencia bonus. A staff of translucent, lustrous servants dwell within the residence. They may otherwise look how you wish. These servants obey your commands without question, and can perform the same nonhostile actions as a human servant—they might carry objects, prepare and serve food and drinks, clean, make simple repairs, and so on. Servants have access to the entire mansion but may not leave.

All objects and furnishings belonging to the mansion evaporate into shimmering smoke when they leave it. Any criatura within the mansion when the spell ends is expelled into an unoccupied space near the entrance.

name: Maim
desc:
Your hands become claws bathed in necrótico energy. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura you can alcance. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 4d6 daño necrótico and a section of its body of your choosing withers:
   ***Upper Limb.*** The objetivo has desventaja on Fuerza checks, and, if it has the Ataque Múltiple action, it has desventaja on its first tirada de ataque each ronda.
   ***Lower Limb.*** The objetivo's Velocidad is reduced by 10 pies, and it has desventaja on Destreza checks.
   ***Body.*** Choose one damage type: contundente, perforante, or cortante. The objetivo loses its resistance to that damage type. If the objetivo doesn't have resistance to the chosen damage type, it is vulnerable to that damage type instead.
  The effect is permanent until removed by *remove curse*, *greater restoration*, or similar magic.

name: Major Image
desc: You create the image of an object, a criatura, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 20-pie cube. The image appears at a spot that you can see within range and lasts for the duration. It seems completely real, including sounds, smells, and temperature appropriate to the thing depicted. You can't create sufficient heat or frío to cause damage, a sound loud enough to deal daño de trueno or deafen a criatura, or a smell that might sicken a criatura (like a troglodyte's stench). As long as you are within range of the illusion, you can use your action to cause the image to move to any other spot within range. As the image changes location, you can alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image. For example, if you create an image of a criatura and move it, you can alter the image so that it appears to be walking. Similarly, you can cause the illusion to make different sounds at different times, even making it carry on a conversation, for example. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, because things can pass through it. A criatura that uses its action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If a criatura discerns the illusion for what it is, the criatura can see through the image, and its other sensory qualities become faint to the criatura.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the spell lasts until dispelled, without requiring your Concentración.
material: A bit of fleece.

name: Major Image
desc:
Until the spell ends, you create an image that appears completely real. The illusion includes sounds, smells, and temperature in addition to visual phenomena. None of the effects of the illusion are able to cause actual harm.

While within range you can use an action to move the illusion. As the image moves you may also change its appearance to make the movement seem natural (like a roc moving its wings to fly) and also change the nonvisual elements of the illusion for the same reason (like the sound of beating wings as the roc flies).

Any physical interaction immediately reveals the image is an illusion, as objects and criaturas alike pass through it. An Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro also reveals the image is an illusion.

When a criatura realizes the image is an illusion, the effects become fainter for that criatura.
higher_level: When cast using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro the illusion lasts until dispelled without requiring Concentración.

name: Malevolent Waves
desc: You create an invisible miasma that fills the area within 30 pies of you. All your aliados have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks they make within 30 pies of you, and all your enemigos are envenenado while within that radius.
material: a profane object that has been bathed in blood

name: Mammon’s Due
desc:
You summon a cylindrical sinkhole filled with burning ash and grasping arms made of molten metal at a point on the ground you can see within range. The sinkhole is 20 pies deep and 50 pies in diameter, and is difficult terrain. A criatura that’s in the area when the spell is cast, or that begins its turn in the area or enters it during its turn, recibe 10d6 daño de fuego and debe realizar a Fuerza or Destreza (criatura’s choice) tirada de salvación. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is apresado by the molten arms, which try to drag it below the surface of the ash.

A criatura that’s apresado by the arms at the start of your turn debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pulled 5 pies farther down into the ash. A criatura pulled below the surface is cegado, ensordecido, and can’t breathe. To escape, a criatura must use an action to make a successful Fuerza or Destreza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. On a successful check, the criatura is no longer apresado and can move through the difficult terrain of the ash pit. It doesn’t need to make a Fuerza or tirada de salvación de Destreza this turn to not be grabbed by the arms again, but it debe realizar the tirada de salvación as normal if it’s still in the ash pit at the start of its next turn.

The diameter of the ash pit increases by 10 pies at the start of each of your turns for the duration of the spell. The ash pit remains after the spell ends, but the grasping arms disappear and apresado criaturas are freed automatically. As the ash slowly cools, it causa 1d6 less daño de fuego for each hora that passes after the spell ends.
material: 11 gilded human skulls worth 150 gp each, which are consumed by the spell

name: Mantle of the Brave
desc: You touch up to four individuals, bolstering their courage. The next time a criatura affected by this spell debe realizar a tirada de salvación against a spell or effect that would cause the asustado condition, it has ventaja on the roll. Once a criatura has received this benefit, the spell ends for that criatura.

name: March of the Dead
desc: This spell animates the recently dead to remove them from a battlefield. Choose one corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid per level of the caster (within range). Your spell imbues the objetivos with an animating spirit, raising them as construct criaturas similar in appearance to flesh golems, though with the Fuerza and abilities of zombies. Dwarves use this to return the bodies of the fallen to clan tombs and to deny the corpses the foul attention of ghouls, necromancers, and similar foes. On each of your turns, you can use a acción adicional to mentally command all the criaturas you made with this spell if the criaturas are within 60 pies of you. You decide what action the criaturas will take and where they will move during the next day; you cannot command them to guard. If you issue no commands, the criaturas only defend themselves against hostile criaturas. Once given an order and direction of march, the criaturas continue to follow it until they arrive at the destination you named or until 24 horas have elapsed when the spell ends and the corpses fall lifeless once more. To tell criaturas to move for another 24 horas, you must cast this spell on the criaturas again before the current 24-hora period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to 50 criaturas you have animated with this spell rather than animating a new one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you animate or reassert control over two additional construct criaturas for each slot level above 3rd (two criaturas/level at 4th, three criaturas/level at 5th). Each of the criaturas must come from a different corpse.

name: Mark Prey
desc: You choose a criatura you can see within range as your prey. Until the spell ends, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) and Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to find or track your prey. In addition, the objetivo is outlined in ligera that only you can see. Any tirada de ataque you make against your prey has ventaja if you can see it, and your prey can't benefit from being invisible against you. If the objetivo drops to 0 puntos de golpe before this spell ends, you can use a acción adicional on a subsequent turn to mark a new objetivo as your prey.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level, you can maintain your Concentración on the spell for up to 8 horas. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can maintain your Concentración on the spell for up to 24 horas.

name: Martyr's Rally
desc: With a hopeful rallying cry just as you fall inconsciente, you rouse your aliados to action. Each aliado within 60 pies of you that can see and hear you has ventaja on attack rolls for the duration. If you regain puntos de golpe, the spell immediately ends.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are reduced to 0 hit points

name: Mass Blade Ward
desc: You make a protective gesture toward your aliados. Choose three criaturas that you can see within range. Until the end of your next turn, the objetivos have resistance against contundente, perforante, and daño cortante from weapon attacks. If a objetivo moves farther than 30 pies from you, the effect ends for that criatura.

name: Mass Cure Wounds
desc: A wave of healing energy washes out from a point of your choice within range. Choose up to six criaturas in a 30-pie-radius sphere centered on that point. Each objetivo regains puntos de golpe equal to 3d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Mass Cure Wounds
desc: Glowing energy rushes through the air and each objetivo regains puntos de golpe equal to 3d8 + your spellcasting modifier.
higher_level: The puntos de golpe regained increase by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Mass Faerie Fire
desc:
You can place up to three 20-pie cubes each centered on a point you can see within range. Each object in a cube is outlined in blue, green, or violet ligera (your choice). Any criatura in a cube when the spell is cast is also outlined in ligera if it fails a tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura in the area of more than one cube is affected only once. Each affected object and criatura sheds dim ligera in a 10-pie radius for the duration.
  Any tirada de ataque against an affected object or criatura has ventaja if the attacker can see it, and the affected criatura or object can't benefit from being invisible.

name: Mass Heal
desc: A flood of healing energy flows from you into injured criaturas around you. You restore up to 700 puntos de golpe, divided as you choose among any number of criaturas that you can see within range. criaturas healed by this spell are also cured of all diseases and any effect making them cegado or ensordecido. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.

name: Mass Heal
desc:
Healing energy erupts from your steepled hands and restores up to 700 puntos de golpe between the objetivos.

criaturas healed in this way are also cured of any diseases, and any effect causing them to be cegado or ensordecido. In addition, on subsequent turns within the next minuto you can use a acción adicional to distribute any unused puntos de golpe.

name: Mass Healing Word
desc: As you call out words of restoration, up to six criaturas of your choice that you can see within range regain puntos de golpe equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the healing increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Mass Healing Word
desc: Healing energy flows from you in a wash of restorative power and each objetivo regains puntos de golpe equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
higher_level: The puntos de golpe regained increase by 1d4 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Mass Hobble Mount
desc:
When you cast **mass hobble mount**, you make separate ranged spell attacks against up to six horses, wolves, or other four-legged or two-legged beasts being ridden as mounts within 60 pies of you. The objetivos can be different types of beasts and can have different numbers of legs. Each beast hit by your spell is disabled so that it can’t move at its normal Velocidad without incurring injury. An affected criatura that moves more than half its base Velocidad in a turn recibe 4d6 daño contundente.

This spell has no effect on a criatura that your GM deems to not be a mount.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Warlock, Wizard

name: Mass Repair Metal
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork As repair metal, but you can affect all metal within range. You repair 1d8 + 5 damage to a metal object or construct by sealing up rents and bending metal back into place.
higher_level: Casting mass repair metal as a 6th-level spell repairs 2d8 + 10 damage.

name: Mass Suggestion
desc: You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) and magically influence up to twelve criaturas of your choice that you can see within range and that can hear and understand you. criaturas that can't be hechizado are immune to this effect. The suggestion must be worded in such a manner as to make the course of action sound reasonable. Asking the criatura to stab itself, throw itself onto a spear, immolate itself, or do some other obviously harmful act automatically negates the effect of the spell. Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, it pursues the course of action you described to the best of its ability. The suggested course of action can continue for the entire duration. If the suggested activity can be completed in a shorter time, the spell ends when the subject finishes what it was asked to do. You can also specify conditions that will trigger a special activity during the duration. For example, you might suggest that a group of soldiers give all their money to the first beggar they meet. If the condition isn't met before the spell ends, the activity isn't performed. If you or any of your companions damage a criatura affected by this spell, the spell ends for that criatura.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 10 days. When you use an 8th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 30 days. When you use a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is a year and a day.
material: A snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil.

name: Mass Suggestion
desc:
criaturas that cannot be hechizado are immune to this spell. Suggest an activity phrased in a sentence or two. The objetivos are magically influenced to follow that course of activity. The suggestion must be worded to sound reasonable. Asking the objetivos to perform an action that is obviously harmful to them ends the spell.

A objetivo carries out the activity suggested by you as well as it can. The activity can last for the duration of the spell, and if it requires less time the spell ends after a objetivo has carried out the activity.

You may specify trigger conditions that cause a objetivo to perform a specific activity while the spell lasts. For example, you may suggest that the objetivo recibe off its clothes and dives the next time it sees a body of water. If the objetivo does not see a body of water before the spell ends, the specific activity isn't performed.

Any damage done to a objetivo by you or an aliado ends the spell for that criatura.
higher_level: When cast using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration of the spell increases to 10 days. When cast using an 8th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration increases to 30 days. When cast using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration increases to a year and a day.

name: Mass Surge Dampener
desc: Using your Fuerza of will, you protect up to three criaturas other than yourself from the effect of a chaos magic surge. A protected criatura can make a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Carisma to negate the effect of a chaos magic surge that does not normally allow a tirada de salvación, or it gains ventaja on a tirada de salvación that is normally allowed. Once a protected criatura makes a successful tirada de salvación allowed by **mass surge dampener**, the spell’s effect ends for that criatura.

name: Maw of Needles
desc: A spiny array of needle-like fangs protrudes from your gums, giving you a spiny bite. For the duration, you can use your action to make a melee ataque de conjuro with the bite. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d6 daño perforante and debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or some of the spines in your mouth break off, sticking in the objetivo. Until this spell ends, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the start of each of its turns or take 1d6 daño perforante from the spines. If you hit a objetivo that has your spines stuck in it, your attack causa extra damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier, and more spines don’t break off in the objetivo. Your spines can stick in only un objetivo at a time. If your spines stick into another objetivo, the spines on the previous objetivo crumble to dust, ending the effect on that objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño of the spiny bite and the spines increases by 1d6 for every two slot levels above 1st.

name: Maze
desc: You banish a criatura that you can see within range into a labyrinthine demiplane. The objetivo remains there for the duration or until it escapes the maze. The objetivo can use its action to attempt to escape. When it does so, it makes a CD 20 Inteligencia check. If it succeeds, it escapes, and the spell ends (a minotaur or goristro demon automatically succeeds). When the spell ends, the objetivo reappears in the space it left or, if that space is occupied, in the nearest unoccupied space.

name: Maze
desc:
The objetivo is banished to a complex maze on its own demiplane, and remains there for the duration or until the objetivo succeeds in escaping.

The objetivo can use an action to attempt to escape, making an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en una salvación exitosa it escapes and the spell ends. A criatura with Labyrinthine Recall (or a similar trait) automatically succeeds on its save.

When the spell ends the objetivo reappears in the space it occupied before the spell was cast, or the closest unoccupied space if that space is occupied.

name: Mechanical Union
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You can take control of a construct by voice or mental commands. The construct makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to resist the spell, and it gets ventaja on the tirada de salvación if its CR equals or exceeds your level in the class used to cast this spell. Once a command is given, the construct does everything it can to complete the command. Giving a new command recibe an action. Constructs will risk harm, even go into combat, on your orders but will not self-destruct; giving such an order ends the spell.

name: Meld Into Stone
desc:
Until the spell ends, you meld yourself and your carried equipment into the objetivo stone. Using your movement, you may enter the stone from any point you can touch. No trace of your presence is visible or detectable by no mágico senses.

Within the stone, you can't see outside it and have desventaja on Percepción checks made to hear beyond it. You are aware of time passing, and may cast spells upon yourself. You may use your movement only to step out of the objetivo where you entered it, ending the spell.

If the objetivo is damaged such that its shape changes and you no longer fit within it, you are expelled and take 6d6 daño contundente. Complete destruction of the objetivo, or its transmutation into another substance, expels you and you take 50 daño contundente. When expelled you fall derribado into the closest unoccupied space near your entrance point.
higher_level: When using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro, you may alcance out of the objetivo to make spell attacks or ranged weapon attacks without ending the spell. You make these attacks with desventaja.

name: Meld into Stone
desc: You step into a stone object or surface large enough to fully contain your body, melding yourself and all the equipment you carry with the stone for the duration. Using your movement, you step into the stone at a point you can touch. Nothing of your presence remains visible or otherwise detectable by no mágico senses. While merged with the stone, you can't see what occurs outside it, and any Sabiduría (Percepción) checks you make to hear sounds outside it are made with desventaja. You remain aware of the passage of time and can cast spells on yourself while merged in the stone. You can use your movement to leave the stone where you entered it, which ends the spell. You otherwise can't move. Minor physical damage to the stone doesn't harm you, but its partial destruction or a change in its shape (to the extent that you no longer fit within it) expels you and causa 6d6 daño contundente to you. The stone's complete destruction (or transmutation into a different substance) expels you and causa 50 daño contundente to you. If expelled, you fall derribado in an unoccupied space closest to where you first entered.

name: Memento Mori
desc:
You transform yourself into a horrifying vision of death, rotted and crawling with maggots, exuding the stench of the grave. cada criatura that can see you debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Carisma or be aturdido until the end of your next turn.

A criatura that succeeds on the tirada de salvación is immune to further castings of this spell for 24 horas.

name: Mending
desc: This spell repairs a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken key, a torn cloak, or a leaking wineskin. As long as the break or tear is no longer than 1 pie in any dimension, you mend it, leaving no trace of the former damage. This spell can physically repair a magic item or construct, but the spell can't restore magic to such an object.
material: Two lodestones.

name: Mending
desc:
You repair a single rip or break in the objetivo object (for example, a cracked goblet, torn page, or ripped robe). The break must be smaller than 1 pie in all dimensions. The spell leaves no trace that the object was damaged.

Magic items and constructs may be repaired in this way, but their magic is not restored. You gain an expertise die on maintenance checks if you are able to cast this spell on the item you are treating.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Herald, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Mental Grip
desc:
