You conjure extensions of your own mental fortitude to keep your foes at bay. For the spell's duration, you can use an action to attempt to grapple a criatura within range by making a Concentración check against its maneuver CD.

On its turn, a objetivo agarrado in this way can use an action to attempt to escape the grapple, using your CD de salvación del conjuro instead of your maneuver CD.

Successful escape attempts do not break your Concentración on the spell.

name: Mephitic Croak
desc: You release an intensely loud burp of acidic gas in a 15-pie cone. criaturas in the area take 2d6 daño de ácido plus 2d6 daño de trueno, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura whose tirada de salvación de Destreza fails must also make a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be aturdido and envenenado until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, both ácido and daño de trueno increase by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a dead toad and a dram of arsenic worth 10 gp

name: Message
desc: You point your finger toward a criatura within range and whisper a message. The objetivo (and only the objetivo) hears the message and can reply in a whisper that only you can hear. You can cast this spell through solid objects if you are familiar with the objetivo and know it is beyond the barrier. mágico silence, 1 pie of stone, 1 inch of Común metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 pies of wood blocks the spell. The spell doesn't have to follow a straight line and can travel freely around corners or through openings.
material: A short piece of copper wire.

name: Message
desc:
You point and whisper your message at the objetivo.

It alone hears the message and may reply in a whisper audible only to you.

You can cast this spell through solid objects if you are familiar with the objetivo and are certain it is beyond the barrier. The message is blocked by 3 pies of wood, 1 pie of stone, 1 inch of Común metals, or a thin sheet of lead.

The spell moves freely around corners or through openings.

name: Meteor Swarm
desc: Blazing orbs of fuego plummet to the ground at four different points you can see within range. cada criatura in a 40-pie-radius sphere centered on each point you choose debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. The sphere spreads around corners. A criatura recibe 20d6 daño de fuego and 20d6 daño contundente en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. A criatura in the area of more than one fiery burst is affected only once. The spell damages objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried.

name: Meteor Swarm
desc: Scorching spheres of flame strike the ground at 4 different points within range. The effects of a sphere alcance around corners. criaturas and objects in the area take 14d6 daño de fuego and 14d6 daño contundente, and flammable unattended objects catch on fuego. If a criatura is in the area of more than one sphere, it is affected only once.

name: Mind Blank
desc: Until the spell ends, one willing criatura you touch is immune to daño psíquico, any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, divination spells, and the hechizado condition. The spell even foils wish spells and spells or effects of similar power used to affect the objetivo's mind or to gain information about the objetivo.

name: Mind Blank
desc:
The objetivo is immune to daño psíquico, any effect that would read its emotions or thoughts, divination spells, and the hechizado condition.

This immunity extends even to the wish spell, and mágico effects or spells of similar power that would affect the objetivo's mind or gain information about it.

name: Mind Exchange
desc:
One humanoid of your choice that you can see within range debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, you project your mind into the body of the objetivo. You use the objetivo’s statistics but don’t gain access to its knowledge, class features, or proficiencies, retaining your own instead. Meanwhile, the objetivo’s mind is shunted into your body, where it uses your statistics but likewise retains its own knowledge, class features, and proficiencies.

The exchange lasts until either of the the two bodies drops to 0 puntos de golpe, until you end it as a acción adicional, or until you are forced out of the objetivo body by an effect such as a [dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) or [dispel evil and good](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-evil-and-good) spell (the latter spell defeats **mind exchange** even though possession by a humanoid isn’t usually affected by that spell). When the effect of this spell ends, both switched minds return to their original bodies. The objetivo of the spell is immune to mind exchange for 24 horas after succeeding on the tirada de salvación or after the exchange ends.

The effects of the exchange can be made permanent with a [wish](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wish) spell or comparable magic.
material: a prism and silver coin
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Mind Maze
desc: Choose a criatura you can see within range. It debe tener éxito en an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia or be mentally trapped in an imagined maze of mirrors for the duration. While trapped in this way, the criatura is incapacitado, but it imagines itself alone and wandering through the maze. Externally, it appears dazed as it turns in place and reaches out at nonexistent barriers. Each time the objetivo recibe damage, it makes another tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en un éxito, the spell ends.

name: Mindshield
desc: The objetivo has resistance to daño psíquico and ventaja on saving throws made to resist being hechizado or asustado.

name: Minor Illusion
desc: You create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration. The illusion also ends if you dismiss it as an action or cast this spell again. If you create a sound, its volume can range from a whisper to a scream. It can be your voice, someone else's voice, a lion's roar, a beating of drums, or any other sound you choose. The sound continues unabated throughout the duration, or you can make discrete sounds at different times before the spell ends. If you create an image of an object-such as a chair, muddy footprints, or a small chest-it must be no larger than a 5-pie cube. The image can't create sound, ligera, smell, or any other sensory effect. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, because things can pass through it. If a criatura uses its action to examine the sound or image, the criatura can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If a criatura discerns the illusion for what it is, the illusion becomes faint to the criatura.
material: A bit of fleece.

name: Minor Illusion
desc:
This spell creates a sound or image of an object.

The illusion disappears if dismissed or you cast the spell again.

You may create any sound you choose, ranging in volume from a whisper to a scream. You may choose one sound for the duration or change them at varying points before the spell ends. Sounds are audible outside the spell's area.

Visual illusions may replicate any image and remain within the spell's area, but cannot create sound, ligera, smell, or other sensory effects.

The image is revealed as an illusion with any physical interaction as physical objects and criaturas pass through it. An Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro also reveals the image is an illusion. When a criatura realizes the image is an illusion, the effects become fainter for that criatura.

name: Mirage Arcane
desc: You make terrain in an area up to 1 milla square look, sound, smell, and even feel like some other sort of terrain. The terrain's general shape remains the same, however. Open fields or a road could be made to resemble a swamp, hill, crevasse, or some other difficult or impassable terrain. A pond can be made to seem like a grassy meadow, a precipice like a gentle slope, or a rock-strewn gully like a wide and smooth road. Similarly, you can alter the appearance of structures, or add them where none are present. The spell doesn't disguise, conceal, or add criaturas. The illusion includes audible, visual, tactile, and olfactory elements, so it can turn clear ground into difficult terrain (or vice versa) or otherwise impede movement through the area. Any piece of the illusory terrain (such as a rock or stick) that is removed from the spell's area disappears immediately. criaturas with vista verdadera can see through the illusion to the terrain's true form; however, all other elements of the illusion remain, so while the criatura is aware of the illusion's presence, the criatura can still physically interact with the illusion.

name: Mirage Arcane
desc:
You make terrain within the spell's area appear as another kind of terrain, tricking all senses (including touch).

The general shape of the terrain remains the same, however. A small town could resemble a woodland, a smooth road could appear rocky and overgrown, a deep pit could resemble a shallow pond, and so on.

Structures may be altered in the similar way, or added where there are none. criaturas are not disguised, concealed, or added by the spell.

The illusion appears completely real in all aspects, including physical terrain, and can be physically interacted with. Clear terrain becomes difficult terrain, and vice versa. Any part of the illusory terrain such as a boulder, or water collected from an illusory stream, disappears immediately upon leaving the spell's area.

criaturas with vista verdadera see through the illusion, but are not immune to its effects. They may know that the overgrown path is in fact a well maintained road, but are still impeded by illusory rocks and branches.

name: Mire
desc: When you cast mire, you create a 10-pie-diameter pit of quicksand, sticky mud, or a similar dangerous natural hazard suited to the region. A criatura that’s in the area when the spell is cast or that enters the affected area debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or sink up to its waist and be apresado by the mire. From that point on, the mire acts as quicksand, but the CD for Fuerza checks to escape from the quicksand is equal to your CD de salvación del conjuro. A criatura outside the mire trying to pull another criatura free receives a +5 bonus on its Fuerza check.
material: a vial of sand mixed with water

name: Mirror Image
desc: Three illusionary duplicates of yourself appear in your space. Until the end of the spell, duplicates move with you and imitate your actions, swapping their position so that it is impossible to determine which image is real. You can use your action to dispel the illusory duplicates. Whenever a criatura is targeting you with an attack during the duration of the spell, roll 1d20 to determine if the attack does not objetivo rather one of your duplicates. If you have three duplicates, you need 6 or more on your throw to lead the objetivo of the attack to a duplicate. With two duplicates, you need 8 or more. With one duplicate, you need 11 or more. The CA of a duplicate is 10 + your Destreza modifier. If an attack hits a duplicate, it is destroyed. A duplicate may be destroyed not just an attack on key. It ignores other damage and effects. The spell ends if the three duplicates are destroyed. A criatura is unaffected by this fate if she can not see if it relies on a different meaning as vision, such as blind vision, or if it can perceive illusions as false, as with clear vision.

name: Mirror Image
desc:
A total of 3 illusory copies of yourself appear in your space. For the duration, these copies move with you and mimic your actions, creating confusion as to which is real.

You can use an action to dismiss them.

Each time you're targeted by a criatura's attack, roll a d20 to see if it objetivos you or one of your copies.

With 3 copies, a roll of 6 or higher means a copy is targeted. With two copies, a roll of 8 or higher objetivos a copy, and with 1 copy a roll of 11 or higher objetivos the copy.

A copy's AC is 10 + your Destreza modifier, and when it is hit by an attack a copy is destroyed.

It may be destroyed only by an attack that hits it.

All other damage and effects have no impact.

Attacking criaturas that have vista verdadera, cannot see, have vista ciega, or rely on other nonvisual senses are unaffected by this spell.
higher_level: When using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration increases to Concentración (1 hora).

name: Mirror Realm
desc:
You transform a mirror into a mágico doorway to an extradimensional realm. You and any criaturas you designate when you cast the spell can move through the doorway into the realm beyond. For the spell's duration, the mirror remains anchored in the plane of origin, where it can't be broken or otherwise damaged by any mundane means. No criaturas other than those you designate can pass through the mirror or see into the mirror realm.
  The realm within the mirror is an exact reflection of the location you left. The temperature is comfortable, and any environmental threats (lava, poisonous gas, or similar) are inert, harmless facsimiles of the real thing. Likewise, magic items reflected in the mirror realm have no mágico properties, but those carried into it work normally. Food, drink, and other beneficial items within the mirror realm (reflections of originals in the real world) function as normal, real items; food can be eaten, wine can be drunk, and so on. Only items that were reflected in the mirror at the moment the spell was cast exist inside the mirror realm. Items placed in front of the mirror afterward don't appear in the mirror realm, and criaturas never do unless they are allowed in by you. Items found in the mirror realm dissolve into nothingness when they leave it, but the effects of food and drink remain.
  Sound passes through the mirror in both directions. criaturas in the mirror realm can see what's happening in the world, but criaturas in the world see only what the mirror reflects. Objects can cross the mirror boundary only while worn or carried by a criatura, and spells can't cross it at all. You can't stand in the mirror realm and shoot arrows or cast spells at objetivos in the world or vice versa.
  The boundaries of the mirror realm are the same as the room or location in the plane of origin, but the mirror realm can't exceed 50,000 square pies (for simplicity, imagine 50 cubes, each cube being 10 pies on a side). If the original space is larger than this, such as an open field or a forest, the boundary is demarcated with an impenetrable, gray fog.
  Any criatura still inside the mirror realm when the spell ends is expelled through the mirror into the nearest empty space.
  If this spell is cast in the same spot every day for a year, it becomes permanent. Once permanent, the mirror can't be moved or destroyed through mundane means. You can allow new criaturas into the mirror realm (and disallow previous criaturas) by recasting the spell within range of the permanent mirror. Casting the spell elsewhere doesn't affect the creation or the existence of a permanent mirror realm; a determined spellcaster could have multiple permanent mirror realms to use as storage spaces, hiding spots, and spy vantages.

name: Misdirection
desc: You create a brief flash of ligera, loud sound, or other distraction that interrupts a criatura's attack. When a criatura you can see within range makes an attack, you can impose desventaja on its tirada de ataque.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature within 30 feet of you make an attack

name: Mislead
desc: You become invisible at the same time that an illusory double of you appears where you are standing. The double lasts for the duration, but the invisibility ends if you attack or cast a spell. You can use your action to move your illusory double up to twice your Velocidad and make it gesture, speak, and behave in whatever way you choose. You can see through its eyes and hear through its ears as if you were located where it is. On each of your turns as a acción adicional, you can switch from using its senses to using your own, or back again. While you are using its senses, you are cegado and ensordecido in regard to your own surroundings.

name: Mislead
desc:
You become invisible. At the same time, an illusory copy of you appears where you're standing.

This invisibility ends when you cast a spell but the copy lasts until the spell ends.

You can use an action to move your copy up to twice your Velocidad, have it speak, make gestures, or behave however you'd like.

You may see and hear through your copy. Until the spell ends, you can use a acción adicional to switch between your copy's senses and your own, or back again. While using your copy's senses you are blind and deaf to your body's surroundings.

The copy is revealed as an illusion with any physical interaction, as solid objects and criaturas pass through it.

name: Misstep
desc: You gesture to a criatura within range that you can see. If the objetivo fails a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, it uses its reacción to move 5 pies in a direction you dictate. This movement does not provoke opportunity attacks. The spell automatically fails if you direct the objetivo into a dangerous area such as a pit trap, a bonfire, or off the edge of a cliff, or if the objetivo has already used its reacción.

name: Mist of Wonders
desc:
A colorful mist surrounds you out to a radius of 30 pies. criaturas inside the mist see odd shapes in it and hear random sounds that don’t make sense. The very concepts of order and logic don’t seem to exist inside the mist.

Any 1st-level spell that’s cast in the mist by another caster or that travels through the mist is affected by its strange Naturaleza. The caster debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución when casting the spell. en una salvación fallida, the spell transforms into another 1st-level spell the caster knows (chosen by the GM from those available), even if that spell is not currently prepared. The altered spell’s slot level or its original objetivo or targeted area can’t be changed. Cantrips are unaffected. If (in the GM’s judgment) none of the caster’s spells known of that level can be transformed, the spell being cast simply fails.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, it affects any spell cast using a espacio de conjuro of any lower level. For instance, using a 6th-level slot enables you to transform a spell of 5th level or lower into another spell of the same level.

name: Misty Step
desc: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 pies to an unoccupied space that you can see.

name: Misty Step
desc: You teleport to an unoccupied space that you can see, disappearing and reappearing in a swirl of shimmering mist.

name: Modify Memory
desc: You attempt to reshape another criatura's memories. una criatura that you can see debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. If you are fighting the criatura, it has ventaja on the tirada de salvación. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo becomes hechizado by you for the duration. The hechizado objetivo is incapacitado and unaware of its surroundings, though it can still hear you. If it recibe any damage or is targeted by another spell, this spell ends, and none of the objetivo's memories are modified. While this charm lasts, you can affect the objetivo's memory of an event that it experienced within the last 24 horas and that lasted no more than 10 minutos. You can permanently eliminate all memory of the event, allow the objetivo to recall the event with perfect clarity and exacting detail, change its memory of the details of the event, or create a memory of some other event. You must speak to the objetivo to describe how its memories are affected, and it must be able to understand your language for the modified memories to take root. Its mind fills in any gaps in the details of your description. If the spell ends before you have finished describing the modified memories, the criatura's memory isn't altered. Otherwise, the modified memories take hold when the spell ends. A modified memory doesn't necessarily affect how a criatura behaves, particularly if the memory contradicts the criatura's natural inclinations, alignment, or beliefs. An illogical modified memory, such as implanting a memory of how much the criatura enjoyed dousing itself in ácido, is dismissed, perhaps as a bad dream. The DM might deem a modified memory too nonsensical to affect a criatura in a significant manner. A remove curse or greater restoration spell cast on the objetivo restores the criatura's true memory.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, you can alter the objetivo's memories of an event that took place up to 7 days ago (6th level), 30 days ago (7th level), 1 year ago (8th level), or any time in the criatura's past (9th level).

name: Modify Memory
desc:
The objetivo has ventaja on its tirada de salvación if you are in combat with it. The objetivo becomes hechizado and incapacitado, though it can still hear you. Until the spell ends, any memories of an event that took place within the last 24 horas and lasted 10 minutos or less may be altered.

You may destroy the memory, have the objetivo recall the event with perfect clarity, change the details, or create a new memory entirely with the same restrictions in time frame and length.

You must speak to the objetivo in a language you both know to modify its memories and describe how the memory is changed. The objetivo fills in the gaps in details based on your description.

The spell automatically ends if the objetivo recibe any damage or if it is targeted by another spell. If the spell ends before you have finished modifying its memories, the alteration fails. Otherwise, the alteration is complete when the spell ends and only greater restoration or remove curse can restore the memory.

The Narrator may deem a modified memory too illogical or nonsensical to affect a criatura, in which case the modified memory is simply dismissed by the objetivo. In addition, a modified memory doesn't specifically change the behavior of a criatura, especially if the memory conflicts with the criatura's personality, beliefs, or innate tendencies.

There may also be events that are practically unforgettable and after being modified can be remembered correctly when another criatura succeeds on a Persuasión check to stir the objetivo's memories. This check is made with desventaja if the criatura does not have indisputable proof on hand that is relevant to the altered memory.
higher_level: When using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, the event can be from as far as 7 days ago. When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, the event can be from as far as 30 days ago. When using an 8th-level espacio de conjuro, the event can be from as far as 1 year ago. When using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, any event can be altered.

name: Molech's Blessing
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork ritual You call upon the dark blessings of the furnace god Molech. In an hora-long ritual begun at midnight, you dedicate a living being to Molech by branding the deity's symbol onto the victim's forehead. If the ritual is completed and the victim fails to make a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría (or the victim chooses not to make one), the being is transformed into an avatar of Molech under your control. The avatar is 8 pies tall and appears to be made of black iron wreathed in flames. Its eyes, mouth, and a portion of its torso are cut away to show the churning fuego inside that crackles with wailing voices. The avatar has all the statistics and abilities of an earth elemental, with the following differences: Alignment is Neutral Evil; Velocidad is 50 pies and it cannot burrow or use earth glide; it gains the fuego form ability of a fuego elemental, but it cannot squeeze through small spaces; its Slam does an additional 1d10 daño de fuego. This transformation lasts for 24 horas. At the end of that time, the subject returns to its normal state and recibe 77 (14d10) daño de fuego, or la mitad del daño with a successful CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución.

name: Monstrous Empathy
desc: This spell lets you forge a connection with a monstrosity. Choose a monstrosity that you can see within range. It must see and hear you. If the monstrosity’s Inteligencia is 4 or higher, the spell fails. Otherwise, the monstrosity debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be hechizado by you for the spell’s duration. If you or one of your companions harms the objetivo, the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can affect one additional monstrosity for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a morsel of food

name: Moon Trap
desc:
While casting this spell under the ligera of the moon, you inscribe a glyph that covers a 10-pie-square area on a flat, stationary surface such as a floor or a wall. Once the spell is complete, the glyph is invisible in moonlight but glows with a faint white ligera in darkness.

Any criatura that touches the glyph, except those you designate during the casting of the spell, debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be drawn into an inescapable maze until the sun rises.

The glyph lasts until the next sunrise, at which time it flares with bright ligera, and any criatura trapped inside returns to the space it last occupied, unharmed. If that space has become occupied or dangerous, the criatura appears in the nearest safe unoccupied space.
material: powdered silver worth 250 gp

name: Moon's Respite
desc: You touch a criatura who must be present for the entire casting. A beam of moonlight shines down from above, bathing the objetivo in radiante ligera. The spell fails if you can't see the open sky. If the objetivo has any levels of shadow corruption, the moonlight burns away some of the Shadow tainting it. The criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución against a CD of 10 + the number of shadow corruption levels it has. The criatura recibe 2d10 daño radiante per level of shadow corruption and removes 1 level of shadow corruption on a failed tirada de salvación, or half as much damage and removes 2 levels of shadow corruption en un éxito.

name: Moonbeam
desc: A silvery beam of pale ligera shines down in a 5-pie-radius, 40-pie-high cylinder centered on a point within range. Until the spell ends, dim ligera fills the cylinder. When a criatura enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it is engulfed in ghostly flames that cause searing pain, and it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. It recibe 2d10 daño radiante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. A shapechanger makes its tirada de salvación with desventaja. If it fails, it also instantly reverts to its original form and can't assume a different form until it leaves the spell's ligera. On each of your turns after you cast this spell, you can use an action to move the beam 60 pies in any direction.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: Several seeds of any moonseed plant and a piece of opalescent feldspar.

name: Moonbeam
desc:
A beam of moonlight fills the area with dim ligera.

When a criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or begins its turn in the area, it is struck by silver flames and makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 2d10 daño radiante en una salvación fallida, or half as much en un éxito.

Shapechangers have desventaja on this tirada de salvación. en una salvación fallida, a shapechanger is forced to take its original form while within the spell's ligera.

On your turn, you may use an action to move the beam 60 pies in any direction.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Morphic Flux
desc: When you cast this spell, your body becomes highly mutable, your flesh constantly shifting and quivering, occasionally growing extra parts-limbs and eyes-only to reabsorb them soon afterward. While under the effect of this spell, you have resistance to cortante and daño perforante and ignore the additional damage done by critical hits. You can squeeze through Tiny spaces without penalty. In addition, once per ronda, as a acción adicional, you can make an unarmed attack with a newly- grown limb. Treat it as a standard unarmed attack, but you choose whether it does contundente, perforante, or daño cortante.

name: Mosquito Bane
desc: This spell kills any insects or swarms of insects within range that have a total of 25 puntos de golpe or fewer.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the number of puntos de golpe affected increases by 15 for each slot level above 1st. Thus, a 2nd-level spell kills insects or swarms that have up to 40 puntos de golpe, a 3rd-level spell kills those with 55 puntos de golpe or fewer, and so forth, up to a maximum of 85 puntos de golpe for a slot of 6th level or higher.

name: Move Earth
desc: Choose an area of terrain no larger than 40 pies on a side within range. You can reshape dirt, sand, or clay in the area in any manner you choose for the duration. You can raise or lower the area's elevation, create or fill in a trench, erect or flatten a wall, or form a pillar. The extent of any such changes can't exceed half the area's largest dimension. So, if you affect a 40-pie square, you can create a pillar up to 20 pies high, raise or lower the square's elevation by up to 20 pies, dig a trench up to 20 pies deep, and so on. It recibe 10 minutos for these changes to complete. At the end of every 10 minutos you spend concentrating on the spell, you can choose a new area of terrain to affect. Because the terrain's transformation occurs slowly, criaturas in the area can't usually be trapped or injured by the ground's movement. This spell can't manipulate natural stone or stone construction. Rocks and structures shift to accommodate the new terrain. If the way you shape the terrain would make a structure unstable, it might collapse. Similarly, this spell doesn't directly affect plant growth. The moved earth carries any plants along with it.
material: An iron blade and a small bag containing a mixture of soils-clay, loam, and sand.

name: Move Earth
desc:
You reshape the area, changing its elevation or creating and eliminating holes, walls, and pillars.

The only limitation is that the elevation change may not exceed half the area's horizontal dimensions.

For example, affecting a 40-by-40 area allows you to include 20 pie high pillars, holes 20 pies deep, and changes in terrain elevation of 20 pies or less.

Changes that result in unstable terrain are subject to collapse.

Changes take 10 minutos to complete, after which you can choose another area to affect. Due to the slow Velocidad of transformation, it is nearly impossible for criaturas to be hurt or captured by the spell.

This spell has no effect on stone, objects crafted from stone, or plants, though these objects will shift based on changes in the area.

name: Move the Cosmic Wheel
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You wind your music box and call forth a piece of another plane of existence with which you are familiar, either through personal experience or intense study. The magic creates a bubble of space with a 30-pie radius within range of you and at a spot you designate. The portion of your plane that's inside the bubble swaps places with a corresponding portion of the plane your music box is attuned with. There is a 10% chance that the portion of the plane you summon arrives with native criaturas on it. Inanimate objects and non-ambulatory life (like trees) are cut off at the edge of the bubble, while living criaturas that don't fit inside the bubble are shunted outside of it before the swap occurs. Otherwise, criaturas from both planes that are caught inside the bubble are sent along with their chunk of reality to the other plane for the duration of the spell unless they make a successful tirada de salvación de Carisma when the spell is cast; with a successful save, a criatura can choose whether to shift planes with the bubble or leap outside of it a moment before the shift occurs. Any natural reacción between the two planes occurs normally (fuego spreads, water flows, etc.) while energy (such as necrótico energy) leaks slowly across the edge of the sphere (no more than a pie or two per hora). Otherwise, criaturas and effects can move freely across the boundary of the sphere; for the duration of the spell, it becomes a part of its new location to the fullest extent possible, given the natures of the two planes. The two displaced bubbles shift back to their original places automatically after 24 horas. Note that the amount of preparation involved (acquiring and attuning the music box) precludes this spell from being cast on the spur of the moment. Because of its unpredictable and potentially wide-ranging effect, it's also advisable to discuss your interest in this spell with your GM before adding it to your character's repertoire.

name: Mud
desc: The ground in a 20-pie radius centered on a point within range becomes thick, viscous mud. The area becomes difficult terrain for the duration. When a criatura enters the affected area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, its movement Velocidad is reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.

name: Mud Pack
desc:
This spell covers you or a willing criatura you touch in mud consistent with the surrounding terrain. For the duration, the spell protects the objetivo from extreme frío and heat, allowing the objetivo to automatically succeed on Constitución saving throws against environmental hazards related to temperature. In addition, the objetivo has ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks while traveling at a slow pace in the terrain related to the component for this spell.

If the objetivo is subject to pesada precipitation for 1 minuto, the precipitation removes the mud, ending the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the duration is 8 horas and you can objetivo up to ten willing criaturas within 30 pies of you.
material: a clump of mud

name: Muted Foe
desc: You touch a no mágico weapon. The next time a criatura hits with the affected weapon before the spell ends, the weapon booms with a thunderous peal as the weapon strikes. The attack causa an extra 1d6 daño de trueno to the objetivo, and the objetivo becomes ensordecido, immune to daño de trueno, and unable to cast spells with verbal components for 1 minuto. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the effect ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the extra damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Negative Image
desc: You create a shadow-tunnel between your location and one other criatura you can see within range. You and that criatura instantly swap positions. If the objetivo criatura is unwilling to exchange places with you, it can resist the effect by making a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación exitosa, the spell has no effect.
material: a piece of reflective obsidian

name: Nether Weapon
desc: You whisper in Void Speech and touch a weapon. Until the spell ends, the weapon turns black, becomes mágico if it wasn’t before, and causa 2d6 daño necrótico (in addition to its normal damage) on a successful hit. A criatura that recibe daño necrótico from the enchanted weapon can’t regain puntos de golpe until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 4th.
material: ink, chalk, or some other writing medium

name: Never Surrender
desc: When the objetivo is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, it can fight looming death to stay in the fight. The objetivo doesn't fall inconsciente but must still make death saving throws, as normal. The objetivo doesn't need to make a death tirada de salvación until the end of its next turn, but it has desventaja on that first death tirada de salvación. In addition, massive damage required to kill the objetivo outright must equal or exceed twice the objetivo's punto de golpe maximum instead. If the objetivo regains 1 or more puntos de golpe, this spell ends.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the objetivo doesn't have desventaja on its first death tirada de salvación.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you or a creature within 60 feet of you drops to 0 hit points.

name: Night Terrors
desc: You amplify the fear that lurks in the heart of todas las criaturas. Select a objetivo point you can see within the spell’s range. Every criatura within 20 pies of that point becomes asustado until the start of your next turn and debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become paralizado. A paralizado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. criaturas immune to being asustado are not affected by **night terrors**.
material: a crow’s eye

name: Nightfall
desc: You call upon night to arrive ahead of schedule. With a sharp word, you create a 30-pie-radius cylinder of night centered on a point on the ground within range. The cylinder extends vertically for 100 pies or until it reaches an obstruction, such as a ceiling. The area inside the cylinder is normal darkness, and thus heavily obscured. criaturas inside the darkened cylinder can see illuminated areas outside the cylinder normally.

name: Nip at the Heels
desc: You create an illusory pack of wild dogs that bark and nip at una criatura you can see within range, which debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo has desventaja on ability checks and attack rolls for the duration as it is distracted by the dogs. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, ending the effect on itself en una salvación exitosa. A objetivo that is at least 10 pies off the ground (in a tree, volando, and so forth) has ventaja on the tirada de salvación, staying just out of alcance of the jumping and barking dogs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a dog’s tooth

name: Nondetection
desc: For the duration, you hide a objetivo that you touch from divination magic. The objetivo can be a willing criatura or a place or an object no larger than 10 pies in any dimension. The objetivo can't be targeted by any divination magic or perceived through mágico scrying sensors.
material: A pinch of diamond dust worth 25 gp sprinkled over the objetivo, which the spell consumes.

name: Nondetection
desc:
The objetivo is hidden from divination magic and cannot be perceived by mágico scrying sensors.

When used on a place or object, the spell only works if the objetivo is no larger than 10 pies in any given dimension.

name: Not Dead Yet
desc:
You cast this spell while touching the cloth doll against the intact corpse of a Medium or smaller humanoid that died within the last hora. At the end of the casting, the body reanimates as an undead criatura under your control. While the spell lasts, your consciousness resides in the animated body. You can use an action to manipulate the body’s limbs in order to make it move, and you can see and hear through the body’s eyes and ears, but your own body becomes inconsciente. The animated body can neither attack nor defend itself. This spell doesn’t change the appearance of the corpse, so further measures might be needed if the body is to be used in a way that involves fooling observers into believing it’s still alive. The spell ends instantly, and your consciousness returns to your body, if either your real body or the animated body recibe any damage.

You can’t use any of the objetivo’s abilities except for no mágico movement and visión en la oscuridad. You don’t have access to its knowledge, proficiencies, or anything else that was held in its now dead mind, and you can’t make it speak.
material: a cloth doll filled with herbs and diamond dust worth 100 gp

name: Not This Day!
desc: The criatura you touch gains protection against either a specific damage type (cortante, veneno, fuego, radiante, and the like) or a category of criatura (Gigante, beast, elemental, monstrosity, and so forth) that you name when the spell is cast. For the next 24 horas, the objetivo has ventaja on saving throws involving that type of damage or kind of criatura, including death saving throws if the attack that dropped the objetivo to 0 puntos de golpe is affected by this spell. A character can be under the effect of only a single **not this day!** spell at one time; a second casting on the same objetivo cancels the preexisting protection.

name: Oathbound Implement
desc:
You place a mágico oath upon a criatura you can see within range, compelling it to complete a specific task or service that involves using a weapon as you decide. If the criatura can understand you, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become bound by the task. When acting to complete the directed task, the objetivo has ventaja on the first tirada de ataque it makes on each of its turns using a weapon. If the objetivo attempts to use a weapon for a purpose other than completing the specific task or service, it has desventaja on attack rolls with a weapon and must roll the weapon's damage dice twice, using the lower total.
  Completing the task ends the spell early. Should you issue a suicidal task, the spell ends. You can end the spell early by using an action to dismiss it. A *remove curse*, *greater restoration*, or *wish* spell also ends it.

name: Obfuscate Object
desc: While you are in dim ligera, you cause an object in range to become unobtrusively obscured from the sight of other criaturas. For the duration, you have ventaja on Destreza (Juego de Manos) checks to hide the object. The object can't be larger than a shortsword, and it must be on your person, held in your hand, or otherwise unattended.
higher_level: You can affect two objects when you alcance 5th level, three objects at 11th level, and four objects at 17th level.

name: Open Red Portal
desc: You must tap the power of a titanic or strong ley line to cast this spell (see the Ley Initiate feat). You open a new two-way Red Portal on the shadow road, leading to a precise location of your choosing on any plane of existence. If located on the Prime Material Plane, this destination can be in the present day or up to 1,000 years in the past. The portal lasts for the duration. Deities and other planar rulers can prevent portals from opening in their presence or anywhere within their domains.

name: Orb of Light
desc: An orb of ligera the size of your hand shoots from your fingertips toward a criatura within range, which recibe 3d8 daño radiante and is cegado for 1 ronda. A objetivo that makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza recibe half el daño and is not cegado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Order of Revenge
desc: You touch a weapon or a bundle of 30 munición, imbuing them with spell energy. Any criatura damaged by a touched, affected weapon leaves an invisibly glowing trail of their path until the spell expires. The caster may see this trail by casting revenge's eye or see invisible. Any other caster may see the trail by casting see invisible. Casting dispel magic on an affected criatura causes that criatura to stop generating a trail, and the trail fades over the next hora.
higher_level: When you cast the spell using a slot of 4th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional weapon or bundle of munición for each slot level above fourth.

name: Outflanking Boon
desc: This spell objetivos one enemigo, which debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, an illusory aliado of yours appears in a space from which it threatens to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against the objetivo. Your aliados gain ventaja on melee attacks against the objetivo for the duration because of the distracting effect of the illusion. An affected objetivo repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the spell objetivos one additional enemigo for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Outmaneuver
desc: When a criatura provokes an ataque de oportunidad from an aliado you can see within range, you can fuerza the criatura to make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura's movement is reduced to 0, and you can move up to your Velocidad toward the criatura without provoking opportunity attacks. This spell doesn't interrupt your aliado's ataque de oportunidad, which happens before the effects of this spell.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when a creature within 30 feet of you provokes an opportunity attack
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Paladin, Sorceror, Warlock, Wizard

name: Overclock
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You cause a targeted piece of clockwork to Velocidad up past the point of control for the duration of the spell. The targeted clockwork can't cast spells with verbal components or even communicate effectively (all its utterances sound like grinding gears). At the start of each of its turns, the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. If the tirada de salvación fails, the clockwork moves at three times its normal Velocidad in a random direction and its turn ends; it can't perform any other actions. If the tirada de salvación succeeds, then until the end of its turn, the clockwork's Velocidad is doubled and it gains an additional action, which must be Attack (one weapon attack only), Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object. When the spell ends, the clockwork recibe 2d8 daño de fuerza. It also must be rewound or refueled and it needs to have its daily maintenance performed immediately, if it relies on any of those things.

name: Oversized Paws
desc: Until this spell ends, the hands and pies of one willing criatura within range become oversized and more powerful. For the duration, the criatura adds 1d4 to damage it causa with its unarmed strike.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each espacio de conjuro above 2nd.

name: Paragon of Chaos
desc:
You become a humanoid-shaped swirling mass of color and sound. You gain resistance to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante, and immunity to veneno and daño psíquico. You are also immune to the following conditions: agotamiento, paralizado, petrificado, envenenado, and inconsciente. Finally, you gain vista verdadera to 30 pies and can teleport 30 pies as a move.

Each ronda, as a acción adicional, you can cause an automatic chaos magic surge, choosing either yourself or another criatura you can see within 60 pies as the caster for the purpose of resolving the effect. You must choose the objetivo before rolling percentile dice to determine the Naturaleza of the surge. The CD of any required tirada de salvación is calculated as if you were the caster.

name: Pass Without Trace
desc: You and aliados within the area gain ventaja and an expertise die on Destreza (Sigilo) checks as an aura of secrecy enshrouds you. criaturas in the area leave behind no evidence of their passage.

name: Pass without Trace
desc: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from you, masking you and your companions from detection. For the duration, cada criatura you choose within 30 pies of you (including you) has a +10 bonus to Destreza (Sigilo) checks and can't be tracked except by mágico means. A criatura that receives this bonus leaves behind no tracks or other traces of its passage.
material: Ashes from a burned leaf of mistletoe and a sprig of spruce.

name: Passwall
desc: A passage appears at a point of your choice that you can see on a wooden, plaster, or stone surface (such as a wall, a ceiling, or a floor) within range, and lasts for the duration. You choose the opening's dimensions: up to 5 pies wide, 8 pies tall, and 20 pies deep. The passage creates no instability in a structure surrounding it. When the opening disappears, any criaturas or objects still in the passage created by the spell are safely ejected to an unoccupied space nearest to the surface on which you cast the spell.
material: A pinch of sesame seeds.

name: Passwall
desc:
Until the spell ends, you create a passage extending into the objetivo surface. When creating the passage you define its dimensions, as long as they do not exceed 5 pies in width, 8 pies in height, or 20 pies in depth.

The appearance of the passage has no effect on the stability of the surrounding environment.

Any criaturas or objects within the passage when the spell ends are expelled without harm into unoccupied spaces near where the spell was cast.

name: Pendulum
desc: You give the touched criatura an aspect of regularity in its motions and fortunes. If the objetivo gets a failure on a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, then for the duration of the spell it doesn’t make d20 rolls—to determine the results of attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws it instead follows the sequence 20, 1, 19, 2, 18, 3, 17, 4, and so on.
material: a small pendulum or metronome made of brass and rosewood worth 10 gp

name: Perun's Doom
desc: Deep Magic: Rothenian A powerful wind swirls from your outstretched hand toward a point you choose within range, where it explodes with a low roar into vortex of air. cada criatura in a 20-pie-radius cylinder centered on that point debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 3d8 daño contundente, is pulled to the center of the cylinder, and arrojadiza 50 pies upward into the air. If a criatura hits a solid obstruction, such as a stone ceiling, when it's arrojadiza upward, it recibe daño contundente as if it had fallen (50 pies - the distance it's traveled upward). For example, if a criatura hits the ceiling after rising only 10 pies, it recibe daño contundente as if it had fallen (50 pies - 10 pies =) 40 pies, or 4d6 daño contundente.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, increase the distance affected criaturas are arrojadiza into the air by 10 pies for each slot above 3rd.

name: Pestilence
desc: A swarm of insects fills the area. criaturas that begin their turn within the spell's area or who enter the area for the first time on their turn debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1d4 daño perforante. The pests also ravage any unattended organic material within their radius, such as plant, wood, or fabric.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d4 when you alcance 5th level (2d4), 10th level (3d4), and 15th level (4d4).

name: Phantasmal Killer
desc: You tap into the nightmares of a criatura you can see within range and create an illusory manifestation of its deepest fears, visible only to that criatura. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo becomes asustado for the duration. At the start of each of the objetivo's turns before the spell ends, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 4d10 daño psíquico. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Phantasmal Killer
desc:
You create an illusion that invokes the objetivo's deepest fears. Only the objetivo can see this illusion.

When the spell is cast and at the end of each of its turns, the objetivo makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or recibe 4d10 daño psíquico and becomes asustado.

The spell ends early when the objetivo succeeds on its tirada de salvación. A objetivo that succeeds on its initial tirada de salvación recibe la mitad del daño.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above the 4th.

name: Phantasmal Talons
desc:
You silently clench your hand into a claw and invisible talons of pure will sprout from your fingers.

The talons do not interact with physical matter, but rip viciously at the psyche of any criatura struck by them. For the duration, your unarmed strikes gain the sutil property and deal daño psíquico. In addition, if your unarmed strike normally causa less than 1d4 damage, it instead causa 1d4 damage.

name: Phantom Dragon
desc:
You tap your dragon magic to make an aliado appear as a Dracónico beast. The objetivo of the spell appears to be a dragon of size Large or smaller. When seeing this illusion, observers make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to see through it.

You can use an action to make the illusory dragon seem ferocious. Choose una criatura within 30 pies of the illusory dragon to make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. If it fails, the criatura is asustado. The criatura remains asustado until it uses an action to make a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or the spell’s duration expires.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, increase the number of objetivos the illusion can affect by one for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a piece of dragon egg shell

name: Phantom Steed
desc: A Large quasi-real, horselike criatura appears on the ground in an unoccupied space of your choice within range. You decide the criatura's appearance, but it is equipped with a saddle, bit, and bridle. Any of the equipment created by the spell vanishes in a puff of smoke if it is carried more than 10 pies away from the steed. For the duration, you or a criatura you choose can ride the steed. The criatura uses the statistics for a riding horse, except it has a Velocidad of 100 pies and can travel 10 millas in an hora, or 13 millas at a fast pace. When the spell ends, the steed gradually fades, giving the rider 1 minuto to dismount. The spell ends if you use an action to dismiss it or if the steed recibe any damage.

name: Phantom Steed
desc:
You create an illusory Large criatura with an appearance determined by you that comes into being with all the necessary equipment needed to use it as a mount. This equipment vanishes when more than 10 pies away from the criatura.

You or any criatura you allow may ride the steed, which uses the statistics for a riding horse but has a Velocidad of 100 pies and travels at 10 millas per hora at a steady pace (13 millas per hora at a fast pace).

The steed vanishes if it recibe damage (disappearing instantly) or you use an action to dismiss it (fading away, giving the rider 1 minuto to dismount).

name: Pierce the Veil
desc:
By sketching a shimmering, ethereal doorway in the air and knocking three times, you call forth an otherworldly entity to provide Perspicacia or advice. The door swings open and the entity, wreathed in shadow or otherwise obscured, appears at the threshold. It answers up to five questions truthfully and to the best of its ability, but its answers aren't necessarily clear or direct. The entity can't pass through the doorway or interact with anything on your side of the doorway other than by speaking its responses.
  Likewise, criaturas on your side of the doorway can't pass through it to the other side or interact with the other side in any way other than asking questions. In addition, the spell allows you and the criatura to understand each other's words even if you have no language in Común, the same as if you were both under the effects of the comprehend languages spell.
  When you cast this spell, you must request a specific, named entity, a specific type of criatura, or a criatura from a specific plane of existence. The objetivo criatura can't be native to the plane you are on when you cast the spell. After making this request, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The CD is 12 if you request a criatura from a specific plane; 16 if you request a specific type of criatura; or 20 if you request a specific entity. (The GM can choose to make this check for you secretly.) If the spellcasting check fails, the criatura that responds to your summons is any entity of the GM's choosing, from any plane. No matter what, the criatura is always of a type with an Inteligencia of at least 8 and the ability to speak and to hear.

name: Pincer
desc:
You fuerza your enemigos into a tight spot. Choose two points you can see within range. The points must be at least 30 pies apart from each other. Each point then emits a thunderous boom in a 30-pie cone in the direction of the other point. The boom is audible out to 300 pies.
  cada criatura within a cone debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 5d10 daño de trueno and is pushed up to 10 pies away from the point that emitted the cone. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much damage and isn't pushed. Objects that aren't being worn or carried within each cone are automatically pushed.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Piper's Lure
desc:
You touch a no mágico pipe or horn instrument and imbue it with magic that lures criaturas toward it. cada criatura that enters or starts its turn within 150 pies of the affected object debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be hechizado for 10 minutos. A criatura hechizado by this spell must take the Dash action and move toward the affected object by the safest available route on each of its turns. Once a hechizado criatura moves within 5 pies of the object, it is also incapacitado as it stares at the object and sways in place to a mesmerizing tune only it can hear. If the object is moved, the hechizado criatura attempts to follow it.
  For every 10 minutos that elapse, the criatura can make a new tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the spell ends on that criatura. If a hechizado criatura is attacked, the spell ends immediately on that criatura. Once a criatura has been hechizado by this spell, it can't be hechizado by it again for 24 horas.

name: Pitfall
desc:
A pit opens under a Huge or smaller criatura you can see within range that does not have a volando Velocidad. This pit isn’t a simple hole in the floor or ground, but a passage to an extradimensional space. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall into the pit, which closes over it. At the end of your next turn, a new portal opens 20 pies above where the pit was located, and the criatura falls out. It lands derribado and recibe 6d6 daño contundente.

If the original objetivo makes a successful tirada de salvación, you can use a acción adicional on your turn to reopen the pit in any location within range that you can see. The spell ends when a criatura has fallen through the pit and taken damage, or when the duration expires.

name: Planar Ally
desc: You beseech an otherworldly entity for aid. The being must be known to you: a god, a Primordial, a demon prince, or some other being of cosmic power. That entity sends a Celestial, an elemental, or a fiend loyal to it to aid you, making the criatura appear in an unoccupied space within range. If you know a specific criatura's name, you can speak that name when you cast this spell to request that criatura, though you might get a different criatura anyway (DM's choice). When the criatura appears, it is under no compulsion to behave in any particular way. You can ask the criatura to perform a service in exchange for payment, but it isn't obliged to do so. The requested task could range from simple (fly us across the chasm, or help us fight a battle) to complex (spy on our enemigos, or protect us during our foray into the dungeon). You must be able to communicate with the criatura to bargain for its services. Payment can take a variety of forms. A Celestial might require a sizable donation of gold or magic items to an allied temple, while a fiend might demand a living sacrifice or a gift of treasure. Some criaturas might exchange their service for a quest undertaken by you. As a rule of thumb, a task that can be measured in minutos requires a payment worth 100 gp per minuto. A task measured in horas requires 1,000 gp per hora. And a task measured in days (up to 10 days) requires 10,000 gp per day. The DM can adjust these payments based on the circumstances under which you cast the spell. If the task is aligned with the criatura's ethos, the payment might be halved or even waived. Nonhazardous tasks typically require only half the suggested payment, while especially dangerous tasks might require a greater gift. criaturas rarely accept tasks that seem suicidal. After the criatura completes the task, or when the agreed-upon duration of service expires, the criatura returns to its home plane after reporting back to you, if appropriate to the task and if possible. If you are unable to agree on a price for the criatura's service, the criatura immediately returns to its home plane. A criatura enlisted to join your group counts as a member of it, receiving a full share of experience points awarded.

name: Planar Ally
desc:
An entity from beyond the realm material answers your call for assistance. You must know this entity whether it is holy, unholy, or beyond the bounds of mortal comprehension. The entity sends forth a servant loyal to it to aid you in your endeavors. If you have a specific servant in mind you may speak its name during the casting, but ultimately who is sent to answer your call is the entity's decision.

The criatura that appears (a Celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend), is under no compulsion to behave in any particular way other than how its Naturaleza and personality direct it. Any request made of the criatura, simple or complex, requires an equal amount of payment which you must bargain with the criatura to ascertain. The criatura can request either items, sacrifices, or services in exchange for its assistance. A criatura that you cannot communicate with cannot be bargained with.

A task that can be completed in minutos is worth 100 gold per minuto, a task that requires horas is worth 1, 000 gold per hora, and a task requiring days is worth 10, 000 gold per day (the criatura can only accept tasks contained within a 10 day timeframe). A criatura can often be persuaded to lower or raise prices depending on how a task aligns with its personality and the goals of its master —some require no payment at all if the task is deemed worthy. Additionally, a task that poses little or no risk only requires half the usual amount of payment, and an extremely dangerous task might call for double the usual payment. Still, only extreme circumstances will cause a criatura summoned this way to accept tasks with a near certain result of death.

A criatura returns to its place of origin when a task is completed or if you fail to negotiate an agreeable task and payment. Should a criatura join your party, it counts as a member of the group and receives a full portion of any experience gained.

name: Planar Binding
desc: With this spell, you attempt to bind a Celestial, an elemental, a fey, or a fiend to your service. The criatura must be within range for the entire casting of the spell. (Typically, the criatura is first summoned into the center of an inverted magic circle in order to keep it trapped while this spell is cast.) At the completion of the casting, the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, it is bound to serve you for the duration. If the criatura was summoned or created by another spell, that spell's duration is extended to match the duration of this spell. A bound criatura must follow your instructions to the best of its ability. You might command the criatura to accompany you on an adventure, to guard a location, or to deliver a message. The criatura obeys the letter of your instructions, but if the criatura is hostile to you, it strives to twist your words to achieve its own objectives. If the criatura carries out your instructions completely before the spell ends, it travels to you to report this fact if you are on the same plane of existence. If you are on a different plane of existence, it returns to the place where you bound it and remains there until the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of a higher level, the duration increases to 10 days with a 6th-level slot, to 30 days with a 7th-level slot, to 180 days with an 8th-level slot, and to a year and a day with a 9th-level espacio de conjuro.
material: A jewel worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Planar Binding
desc:
The objetivo must remain within range for the entire casting of the spell (usually by means of a magic circle spell). Until the spell ends, you fuerza the objetivo to serve you. If the objetivo was summoned through some other means, like a spell, the duration of the original spell is extended to match this spell's duration.

Once it is bound to you the objetivo serves as best it can and follows your orders, but only to the letter of the instruction. A hostile or malevolent objetivo actively seeks to take any ventaja of errant phrasing to suit its Naturaleza. When a objetivo completes a task you've assigned to it, if you are on the same plane of existence the objetivo travels back to you to report it has done so. Otherwise, it returns to where it was bound and remains there until the spell ends.
higher_level: When using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, its duration increases to 10 days. When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, its duration increases to 30 days. When using an 8th-level espacio de conjuro, its duration increases to 180 days. When using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, its duration increases to a year and a day.

name: Plane Shift
desc: You and up to eight willing criaturas who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a objetivo destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the Elemental Plane of fuego or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells, and you appear in or near that destination. If you are trying to alcance the City of Brass, for example, you might arrive in its Street of Steel, before its Gate of Ashes, or looking at the city from across the Sea of fuego, at the DM's discretion. Alternatively, if you know the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle on another plane of existence, this spell can take you to that circle. If the teleportation circle is too small to hold all the criaturas you transported, they appear in the closest unoccupied spaces next to the circle. You can use this spell to banish an unwilling criatura to another plane. Choose a criatura within your alcance and make a melee ataque de conjuro against it. On a hit, the criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. If the criatura fails this save, it is transported to a random location on the plane of existence you specify. A criatura so transported must find its own way back to your current plane of existence.
material: A forked, metal rod worth at least 250 gp, attuned to a particular plane of existence.

name: Plane Shift
desc:
Willing objetivos are transported to a plane of existence that you choose. If the destination is generally described, objetivos arrive near that destination in a location chosen by the Narrator. If you know the correct sequence of an existing teleportation circle (see teleportation circle), you can choose it as the destination (when the designated circle is too small for all objetivos to fit, any additional objetivos are shunted to the closest unoccupied spaces).

Alternatively this spell can be used offensively to banish an unwilling objetivo. You make a melee ataque de conjuro and on a hit the objetivo makes a tirada de salvación de Carisma or is transported to a random location on a plane of existence that you choose. Once transported, you must spend 1 minuto concentrating on this spell or the objetivo returns to the last space it occupied (otherwise it must find its own way back).

name: Plant Growth
desc: This spell channels vitality into plants within a specific area. There are two possible uses for the spell, granting either immediate or long-term benefits. If you cast this spell using 1 action, choose a point within range. All normal plants in a 100-pie radius centered on that point become thick and overgrown. A criatura moving through the area must spend 4 pies of movement for every 1 pie it moves. You can exclude one or more areas of any size within the spell's area from being affected. If you cast this spell over 8 horas, you enrich the land. All plants in a half-milla radius centered on a point within range become enriched for 1 year. The plants yield twice the normal amount of food when harvested.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Warlock
archetype: Cleric: Nature, Paladin: Ancients, Warlock: Archfey

name: Plant Growth
desc:
You channel vitality into vegetation to achieve one of the following effects, chosen when casting the spell.

Enlarged: Plants in the area are greatly enriched. Any harvests of the affected plants provide twice as much food as normal.

Rapid: All no mágico plants in the area surge with the power of life. A criatura that moves through the area must spend 4 pies of movement for every pie it moves. You can exclude one or more areas of any size from being affected.

name: Poison Skin
desc:
The objetivo becomes poisonous to the touch. Until the spell ends, whenever a criatura within 5 pies of the objetivo damages the objetivo with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma, the criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the criatura becomes envenenado and recibe 1d6 ongoing daño de veneno.

A envenenado criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

The objetivo of the spell also becomes bright and multicolored like a poisonous dart frog, giving it desventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks.
higher_level: The objetivo's skin is also covered in mucus, giving it ventaja on saving throws and checks made to resist being agarrado or apresado. In addition, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Poison Spray
desc: You extend your hand toward a criatura you can see within range and project a puff of noxious gas from your palm. The criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1d12 daño de veneno.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d12 when you alcance 5th level (2d12), 11th level (3d12), and 17th level (4d12).

name: Poisoned Volley
desc: By drawing back and releasing an imaginary bowstring, you summon forth dozens of glowing green arrows. The arrows dissipate when they hit, but todas las criaturas in a 20-pie square within range take 3d8 daño de veneno and become envenenado. A criatura that makes a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución recibe half as much damage and is not envenenado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Polymorph
desc: This spell transforms a criatura that you can see within range into a new form. An unwilling criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to avoid the effect. A shapechanger automatically succeeds on this tirada de salvación. The transformation lasts for the duration, or until the objetivo drops to 0 puntos de golpe or dies. The new form can be any beast whose challenge rating is equal to or less than the objetivo's (or the objetivo's level, if it doesn't have a challenge rating). The objetivo's game statistics, including mental ability scores, are replaced by the statistics of the chosen beast. It retains its alignment and personality. The objetivo assumes the puntos de golpe of its new form. When it reverts to its normal form, the criatura returns to the number of puntos de golpe it had before it transformed. If it reverts as a result of dropping to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to its normal form. As long as the excess damage doesn't reduce the criatura's normal form to 0 puntos de golpe, it isn't knocked inconsciente. The criatura is limited in the actions it can perform by the Naturaleza of its new form, and it can't speak, cast spells, or take any other action that requires hands or speech. The objetivo's gear melds into the new form. The criatura can't activate, use, wield, or otherwise benefit from any of its equipment.
material: A caterpillar cocoon.

name: Polymorph
desc:
The objetivo's body is transformed into a beast with a Challenge Rating equal to or less than its own. If the objetivo doesn't have a Challenge Rating, use its level.

Until the spell ends or it is dropped to 0 puntos de golpe, the objetivo's game statistics (including its puntos de golpe and mental ability scores) are replaced by the statistics of the chosen beast. The objetivo is limited to actions that it is physically capable of doing, and it can't speak or cast spells. The objetivo's gear melds into the new form. Equipment that merges with a objetivo's form has no effect until it leaves the form.

When the objetivo reverts to its normal form, it returns to the number of puntos de golpe it had before it transformed. If the spell's effects on the objetivo end early from dropping to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to its normal form and knocks it inconsciente if el daño reduces it to 0 puntos de golpe.

name: Portal Jaunt
desc:
You touch a specially prepared key to a door or gate, turning it into a one-way portal to another such door within range. This spell works with any crafted door, doorway, archway, or any other artificial opening, but not natural or accidental openings such as cave entrances or cracks in walls. You must be aware of your destination or be able to see it from where you cast the spell.
  On completing the spell, the touched door opens, revealing a shimmering image of the location beyond the destination door. You can move through the door, emerging instantly out of the destination door. You can also allow one other willing criatura to pass through the portal instead. Anything you carry moves through the door with you, including other criaturas, willing or unwilling.
  For the purpose of this spell, any locks, bars, or mágico effects such as arcane lock are ineffectual for the spell's duration. You can travel only to a side of the door you can see or have physically visited in the past (divinations such as clairvoyance count as seeing). Once you or a willing criatura passes through, both doors shut, ending the spell. If you or another criatura does not move through the portal within 1 ronda, the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the range increases by 100 pies and the duration increases by 1 ronda for each slot level above 3rd. Each ronda added to the duration allows one additional criatura to move through the portal before the spell ends.

name: Portal Trap
desc:
You create a mágico portal on a surface in an unoccupied space you can see within range. The portal occupies up to 5 square pies of the surface and is instantly covered with an illusion. The illusion looks like the surrounding terrain or surface features, such as mortared stone if the portal is placed on a stone wall, or a simple image of your choice like those created by the *minor illusion* spell. A criatura that touches, steps on, or otherwise interacts with or enters the portal debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be teleported to an unoccupied space up to 30 pies away in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a d8 and assign a direction to each die face. The criatura can't be teleported into a solid object.
  Physical interaction with the illusion reveals it to be an illusion, but such touching triggers the portal's effect. A criatura that uses an action to examine the area where the portal is located can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can create one additional portal for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Potency of the Pack
desc:
You bestow lupine traits on a group of living criaturas that you designate within range. Choose one of the following benefits to be gained by all objetivos for the duration:

* ***Thick Fur.*** Each objetivo sprouts fur over its entire body, giving it a +2 bonus to Clase de Armadura.
* ***Keen Hearing and Smell.*** Each objetivo has ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
* ***Pack Tactics.*** Each affected criatura has ventaja on an tirada de ataque against a objetivo if at least one of the attacker’s aliados (also under the effect of this spell) is within 5 pies of the objetivo of the attack and the aliado isn’t incapacitado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the duration increases by 1 minuto for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a few hairs from a wolf

name: Power Word Fling
desc:
You mutter a word of power that causes a criatura you can see within range to be flung vertically or horizontally. The criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be arrojadiza up to 15 pies vertically or horizontally. If the objetivo impacts a surface, such as a ceiling or wall, it stops moving and recibe 3d6 daño contundente. If the objetivo was arrojadiza vertically, it plummets to the ground, taking falling damage as normal, unless it has a volando Velocidad or other method of preventing a fall. If the objetivo impacts a criatura, the objetivo stops moving and recibe 3d6 daño contundente, and the criatura the objetivo hits debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be knocked derribado. After the objetivo is arrojadiza horizontally or it falls from being arrojadiza vertically, regardless of whether it impacted a surface, it is knocked derribado.
  As a acción adicional on each of your subsequent turns, you can attempt to fling the same criatura again. The objetivo debe tener éxito en another tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be arrojadiza.
