higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the distance you can fling the objetivo increases by 5 pies, and el daño from impacting a surface or criatura increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Power Word Kill
desc: You utter a word of power that can compel una criatura you can see within range to die instantly. If the criatura you choose has 100 puntos de golpe or fewer, it dies. Otherwise, the spell has no effect.

name: Power Word Kill
desc: With but a word you snuff out the objetivo's life and it immediately dies. If you cast this on a criatura with more than 100 puntos de golpe, it recibe 50 puntos de golpe of damage.

name: Power Word Kneel
desc: When you shout this word of power, criaturas within 20 pies of a point you specify are compelled to kneel down facing you. A kneeling criatura is treated as derribado. Up to 55 puntos de golpe of criaturas are affected, beginning with those that have the fewest puntos de golpe. A kneeling criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the end of its turn, ending the effect on itself en una salvación exitosa. The effect ends immediately on any criatura that recibe damage while kneeling.
material: an emerald worth at least 100 gp

name: Power Word Pain
desc: When you utter this word of power, una criatura within 60 pies of you recibe 4d10 daño de fuerza. At the start of each of its turns, the criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or take an extra 4d10 daño de fuerza. The effect ends en una salvación exitosa.
material: a quill jabbed into your own body

name: Power Word Rend
desc: You speak a word of power that causes the internal organs of a criatura you can see within range to rupture. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. It recibe 4d6 + 20 daño de fuerza en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the objetivo is below half its punto de golpe maximum, it has desventaja on this tirada de salvación. This spell has no effect on criaturas without vital internal organs, such as constructs, oozes, and undead.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: Power Word Restore
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You speak a word of power, and energy washes over a single construct you touch. The construct regains all of its lost puntos de golpe, all negative conditions on the construct end, and it can use a reacción to stand up, if it was derribado.

name: Power Word Stun
desc: You speak a word of power that can overwhelm the mind of una criatura you can see within range, leaving it dumbfounded. If the objetivo has 150 puntos de golpe or fewer, it is aturdido. Otherwise, the spell has no effect. The aturdido objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns. en una salvación exitosa, this stunning effect ends.

name: Power Word Stun
desc: You utter a powerful word that stuns a objetivo with 150 puntos de golpe or less. At the end of the objetivo's turn, it makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución to end the effect. If the objetivo has more than 150 puntos de golpe, it is instead rattled until the end of its next turn.

name: Pratfall
desc: You cause a small bit of bad luck to befall a criatura, making it look humorously foolish. You create one of the following effects within range: A small, oily puddle appears under the pies of your objetivo, causing it to lose balance. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or be unable use a acción adicional on its next turn as it regains its footing. Tiny particles blow in your objetivo's face, causing it to sneeze. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or have desventaja on its first tirada de ataque on its next turn. Strobing lights flash briefly before your objetivo's eyes, causing difficulties with its vision. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or its passive Percepción is halved until the end of its next turn. The objetivo feels the sensation of a quick, mild clap against its ears, briefly disorienting it. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución to maintain its Concentración. An invisible fuerza sharply tugs on the objetivo's trousers, causing the clothing to slip down. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo has desventaja on its next tirada de ataque with a a dos manos weapon or loses its shield bonus to its Clase de Armadura until the end of its next turn as it uses one hand to gather its slipping clothing. Only one of these effects can be used on a single criatura at a time.

name: Prayer of Healing
desc: Up to six criaturas of your choice that you can see within range each regain puntos de golpe equal to 2d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Prayer of Healing
desc: The objetivos regain puntos de golpe equal to 2d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
higher_level: The puntos de golpe regained increase by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Prestidigitation
desc:
This spell is a minor mágico trick that novice spellcasters use for practice. You create one of the following mágico effects within 'range': 
- You create an Instantáneo, harmless sensory effect, such as a shower of sparks, a puff of wind, faint musical notes, or an odd odor. 
- You instantaneously ligera or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a small campfire. 
- You instantaneously clean or soil an object no larger than 1 cubic pie. 
- You chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic pie of nonliving material for 1 hora. 
- You make a color, a small mark, or a symbol appear on an object or a surface for 1 hora. 
- You create a no mágico trinket or an illusory image that can fit in your hand and that lasts until the end of your next turn. 
If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to three of its non-Instantáneo effects active at a time, and you can dismiss such an effect as an action.

name: Prestidigitation
desc:
You wield arcane energies to produce minor effects. Choose one of the following:

* create a single burst of magic that manifests to one of the senses (for example a burst of sound, sparks, or an odd odor).
* clean or soil an object of 1 cubic pie or less.
* ligera or snuff a flame.
* chill, warm, or flavor nonliving material of 1 cubic pie or less for 1 hora.
* color or mark an object or surface for 1 hora.
* create an ordinary trinket or illusionary image that fits in your hand and lasts for 1 ronda.

You may cast this spell multiple times, though only three effects may be active at a time. Dismissing each effect requires an action.

name: Primal Infusion
desc:
You channel the fury of Naturaleza, drawing on its power. Until the spell ends, you gain the following benefits:
* You gain 30 temporary puntos de golpe. If any of these remain when the spell ends, they are lost.
* You have ventaja on attack rolls when one of your aliados is within 5 pies of the objetivo and the aliado isn’t incapacitado.
* Your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d10 damage of the same type dealt by the weapon on a hit.
* You gain a +2 bonus to AC.
* You have competencia on Constitución saving throws.
material: a bit of fur from a carnivorous animal

name: Prismatic Ray
desc:
A ray of shifting color springs from your hand. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against a single criatura you can see within range. The ray’s effect and the tirada de salvación that applies to it depend on which color is dominant when the beam strikes its objetivo, determined by rolling a d8.

| d8 | Color | Effect | tirada de salvación |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Red | 8d10 daño de fuego | Destreza |
| 2 | Orange | 8d10 daño de ácido | Destreza |
| 3 | Yellow | 8d10 daño de rayo | Destreza |
| 4 | Green | objetivo envenenado | Constitución |
| 5 | Blue | objetivo ensordecido | Constitución |
| 6 | Indigo | objetivo asustado | Sabiduría |
| 7 | Violet | objetivo aturdido | Constitución |
| 8 | Shifting Ray | objetivo cegado | Constitución |

A objetivo recibe half as much damage on a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. A successful Constitución or tirada de salvación de Sabiduría negates the effect of a ray that inflicts a condition on the objetivo; en una salvación fallida, the objetivo is affected for 5 rondas or until the effect is negated. If the result of your tirada de ataque is a critical hit, you can choose the color of the beam that hits the objetivo, but the attack does not deal additional damage.

name: Prismatic Spray
desc:
Eight multicolored rays of ligera flash from your hand. Each ray is a different color and has a different power and purpose. cada criatura in a 60-pie cone debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. For each objetivo, roll a d8 to determine which color ray affects it.

**1. Red.** The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

**2. Orange.** The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de ácido en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

**3. Yellow.** The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de rayo en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

**4. Green.** The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de veneno en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

**5. Blue.** The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

**6. Indigo.** en una salvación fallida, the objetivo is apresado. It must then make a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves three times, the spell ends. If it fails its save three times, it permanently turns to stone and is subjected to the petrificado condition. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until the objetivo collects three of a kind.

**7. Violet.** en una salvación fallida, the objetivo is cegado. It must then make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the start of your next turn. A successful save ends the blindness. If it fails that save, the criatura is transported to another plane of existence of the DM's choosing and is no longer cegado. (Typically, a criatura that is on a plane that isn't its home plane is banished home, while other criaturas are usually cast into the Astral or Ethereal planes.) 

**8. Special.** The objetivo is struck by two rays. Roll twice more, rerolling any 8.

name: Prismatic Spray
desc:
You unleash 8 rays of ligera, each with a different purpose and effect. For each objetivo in the area, roll a d8 to determine the ray that affects it.

1—Red: The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de fuego.

2—Orange: The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de ácido.

3—Yellow: The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de rayo.

4—Green: The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de veneno.

5—Blue: The objetivo recibe 10d6 daño de frío.

6—Indigo: The objetivo is apresado and at the end of each of its turns it makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución. Once it accumulates two failed saves it permanently turns to stone, or when it accumulates two successful saves the effect ends.

7—Violet: The objetivo is cegado. At the start of your next turn, the objetivo makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, ending the effect en un éxito.

en una salvación fallida, the objetivo is banished to another random plane and is no longer blind. If it originated from another plane it returns there, while other criaturas are generally cast into the Astral Plane or Ethereal Plane.

8—Special: The objetivo is hit by two rays.

Roll a d8 twice to determine which rays, rerolling any 8s.

name: Prismatic Wall
desc:
A shimmering, multicolored plane of ligera forms a vertical opaque wall-up to 90 pies long, 30 pies high, and 1 inch thick-centered on a point you can see within range. Alternatively, you can shape the wall into a sphere up to 30 pies in diameter centered on a point you choose within range. The wall remains in place for the duration. If you position the wall so that it passes through a space occupied by a criatura, the spell fails, and your action and the espacio de conjuro are wasted. The wall sheds bright ligera out to a range of 100 pies and dim ligera for an additional 100 pies. You and criaturas you designate at the time you cast the spell can pass through and remain near the wall without harm. If another criatura that can see the wall moves to within 20 pies of it or starts its turn there, the criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or become cegado for 1 minuto. The wall consists of seven layers, each with a different color. When a criatura attempts to alcance into or pass through the wall, it does so one layer at a time through all the wall's layers. As it passes or reaches through each layer, the criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza or be affected by that layer's properties as described below. The wall can be destroyed, also one layer at a time, in order from red to violet, by means specific to each layer. Once a layer is destroyed, it remains so for the duration of the spell. A rod of cancellation destroys a prismatic wall, but an antimagic field has no effect on it.

**1. Red.** The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. While this layer is in place, no mágico ranged attacks can't pass through the wall. The layer can be destroyed by dealing at least 25 daño de frío to it.

**2. Orange.** The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de ácido en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. While this layer is in place, mágico ranged attacks can't pass through the wall. The layer is destroyed by a strong wind.

**3. Yellow.** The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de rayo en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. This layer can be destroyed by dealing at least 60 daño de fuerza to it.

**4. Green.** The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de veneno en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. A passwall spell, or another spell of equal or greater level that can open a portal on a solid surface, destroys this layer.

**5. Blue.** The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. This layer can be destroyed by dealing at least 25 daño de fuego to it.

**6. Indigo.** en una salvación fallida, the criatura is apresado. It must then make a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves three times, the spell ends. If it fails its save three times, it permanently turns to stone and is subjected to the petrificado condition. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until the criatura collects three of a kind. While this layer is in place, spells can't be cast through the wall. The layer is destroyed by bright ligera shed by a daylight spell or a similar spell of equal or higher level.

**7. Violet.** en una salvación fallida, the criatura is cegado. It must then make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the start of your next turn. A successful save ends the blindness. If it fails that save, the criatura is transported to another plane of the DM's choosing and is no longer cegado. (Typically, a criatura that is on a plane that isn't its home plane is banished home, while other criaturas are usually cast into the Astral or Ethereal planes.) This layer is destroyed by a dispel magic spell or a similar spell of equal or higher level that can end spells and mágico effects.

name: Prismatic Wall
desc:
You create a nontransparent barrier of prismatic energy that sheds bright ligera in a 100-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 100 pies. You and criaturas you choose at the time of casting are immune to the barrier's effects and may pass through it at will.

The barrier can be created as either a vertical wall or a sphere. If the wall intersects a space occupied by a criatura the spell fails, you lose your action, and the espacio de conjuro is wasted.

When a criatura that can see the barrier moves within 20 pies of the area or starts its turn within 20 pies of the area, it makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or it is cegado for 1 minuto.

The wall has 7 layers, each layer of a different color in order from red to violet. Once a layer is destroyed, it is gone for the duration of the spell.

To pass or alcance through the barrier a criatura does so one layer at a time and debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza for each layer or be subjected to that layer's effects. en una salvación exitosa, any damage taken from a layer is reduced by half.

A rod of cancellation can destroy a prismatic wall, but an antimagic field has no effect.

Red: The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de fuego.

While active, no mágico ranged attacks can't penetrate the barrier. The layer is destroyed by 25 daño de frío.

Orange: The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de ácido. While active, mágico ranged attacks can't penetrate the barrier. The layer is destroyed by strong winds.

Yellow: The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de rayo. This layer is destroyed by 60 daño de fuerza.

Green: The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de veneno. A passwall spell, or any spell of equal or greater level which can create a portal on a solid surface, destroys the layer.

Blue: The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de frío.

This layer is destroyed by 25 daño de fuego.

Indigo: The criatura is apresado and makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns. Once it accumulates three failed saves it permanently turns to stone, or when it accumulates three successful saves the effect ends. This layer can be destroyed by bright ligera, such as that created by the daylight spell or a spell of equal or greater level.

Violet: The criatura is cegado. At the start of your next turn, the criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, ending the effect en un éxito.

en una salvación fallida, the criatura is banished to another random plane and is no longer blind. If it originated from another plane it returns there, while other criaturas are generally cast into the Astral Plane or Ethereal Plane. This layer can be destroyed by dispel magic or a similar spell of equal or greater level capable of ending spells or mágico effects.

name: Private Sanctum
desc:
You make an area within range magically secure. The area is a cube that can be as small as 5 pies to as large as 100 pies on each side. The spell lasts for the duration or until you use an action to dismiss it. When you cast the spell, you decide what sort of security the spell provides, choosing any or all of the following properties: 
- Sound can't pass through the barrier at the edge of the warded area. 
- The barrier of the warded area appears dark and foggy, preventing vision (including visión en la oscuridad) through it. 
- Sensors created by divination spells can't appear inside the protected area or pass through the barrier at its perimeter. 
- criaturas in the area can't be targeted by divination spells. 
- Nothing can teleport into or out of the warded area. 
- Planar travel is blocked within the warded area. 
Casting this spell on the same spot every day for a year makes this effect permanent.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can increase the size of the cube by 100 pies for each slot level beyond 4th. Thus you could protect a cube that can be up to 200 pies on one side by using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level.
material: A thin sheet of lead, a piece of opaque glass, a wad of cotton or cloth, and powdered chrysolite.

name: Private Sanctum
desc:
You increase the mágico security in an area, choosing one or more of the following:

* sound cannot pass the edge of the area.
* ligera and vision cannot pass the edge of the area.
* sensors created by divination spells can neither enter the area nor appear within it.
* criaturas within the area cannot be targeted by divination spells.
* nothing can teleport into or out of the area.
* planar travel is impossible within the area.

Casting this spell on the same area every day for a year makes the duration permanent.
higher_level: Increase the size of the sanctum by up to 100 pies for each slot level above 4th.

name: Produce Flame
desc: A flickering flame appears in your hand. The flame remains there for the duration and harms neither you nor your equipment. The flame sheds bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 10 pies. The spell ends if you dismiss it as an action or if you cast it again. You can also attack with the flame, although doing so ends the spell. When you cast this spell, or as an action on a later turn, you can hurl the flame at a criatura within 30 pies of you. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d8 daño de fuego.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Produce Flame
desc:
You create a flame in your hand which lasts until the spell ends and does no harm to you or your equipment. The flame sheds bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 10 pies.

The spell ends when you dismiss it, cast it again, or attack with the flame. As part of casting the spell or as an action on a following turn, you can fling the flame at a criatura within 30 pies, making a ranged ataque de conjuro that causa 1d8 daño de fuego.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Programmed Illusion
desc: You create an illusion of an object, a criatura, or some other visible phenomenon within range that activates when a specific condition occurs. The illusion is imperceptible until then. It must be no larger than a 30-pie cube, and you decide when you cast the spell how the illusion behaves and what sounds it makes. This scripted Interpretación can last up to 5 minutos. When the condition you specify occurs, the illusion springs into existence and performs in the manner you described. Once the illusion finishes performing, it disappears and remains dormant for 10 minutos. After this time, the illusion can be activated again. The triggering condition can be as general or as detailed as you like, though it must be based on visual or audible conditions that occur within 30 pies of the area. For example, you could create an illusion of yourself to appear and warn off others who attempt to open a trapped door, or you could set the illusion to trigger only when a criatura says the correct word or phrase. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, because things can pass through it. A criatura that uses its action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If a criatura discerns the illusion for what it is, the criatura can see through the image, and any noise it makes sounds hollow to the criatura.
material: A bit of fleece and jade dust worth at least 25 gp.

name: Programmed Illusion
desc:
You craft an illusory object, criatura, or other effect which executes a scripted Interpretación when a specific condition is met within 30 pies of the area.

You must describe both the condition and the details of the Interpretación upon casting. The trigger must be based on something that can be seen or heard.

Once the illusion triggers, it runs its Interpretación for up to 5 minutos before it disappears and goes dormant for 10 minutos. The illusion is undetectable until then and only reactivates when the condition is triggered and after the dormant period has passed.

A criatura can use an action to attempt an Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to reveal the spell's illusory Naturaleza. Physical interactions reveal the illusion for what it is as things can pass through it with ease. A criatura aware of the illusion perceives the image as transparent and the sounds it generates hollow.

name: Project Image
desc: You create an illusory copy of yourself that lasts for the duration. The copy can appear at any location within range that you have seen before, regardless of intervening obstacles. The illusion looks and sounds like you but is intangible. If the illusion recibe any damage, it disappears, and the spell ends. You can use your action to move this illusion up to twice your Velocidad, and make it gesture, speak, and behave in whatever way you choose. It mimics your mannerisms perfectly. You can see through its eyes and hear through its ears as if you were in its space. On your turn as a acción adicional, you can switch from using its senses to using your own, or back again. While you are using its senses, you are cegado and ensordecido in regard to your own surroundings. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, because things can pass through it. A criatura that uses its action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If a criatura discerns the illusion for what it is, the criatura can see through the image, and any noise it makes sounds hollow to the criatura.
material: A small replica of you made from materials worth at least 5 gp.

name: Project Image
desc:
You create an illusory duplicate of yourself that looks and sounds like you but is intangible. The duplicate can appear anywhere within range as long as you have seen the space before (it ignores any obstacles in the way).

You can use an action to move this duplicate up to twice your Velocidad and make it speak and behave in whatever way you choose, mimicking your mannerism with perfect accuracy. You can use a acción adicional to see through your duplicate's eyes and hear through its ears until the beginning of your next turn. During this time, you are blind and deaf to your body's surroundings.

A criatura can use an action to attempt an Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to reveal the spell's illusory Naturaleza. Physical interactions reveal the illusion for what it is as things can pass through it with ease. A criatura aware of the illusion perceives the image as transparent and the sounds it generates hollow.

name: Protection from Energy
desc: For the duration, the willing criatura you touch has resistance to one damage type of your choice: ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, or trueno.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Protection from Energy
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivo has resistance to one of the following damage types: ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, trueno.
higher_level: For each slot level above 2nd, the objetivo gains resistance to one additional type of damage listed above, with a maximum number equal to your spellcasting ability modifier.

name: Protection from Evil and Good
desc: Until the spell ends, one willing criatura you touch is protected against certain types of criaturas: aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. The protection grants several benefits. criaturas of those types have desventaja on attack rolls against the objetivo. The objetivo also can't be hechizado, asustado, or possessed by them. If the objetivo is already hechizado, asustado, or possessed by such a criatura, the objetivo has ventaja on any new tirada de salvación against the relevant effect.
material: Holy water or powdered silver and iron, which the spell consumes.

name: Protection from Evil and Good
desc:
The objetivo is protected against the following types of criaturas: aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. criaturas of those types have desventaja on attack rolls against the objetivo and are unable to charm, frighten, or possess the objetivo.

If the objetivo is already hechizado, asustado, or possessed by such a criatura, the objetivo has ventaja on any new tirada de salvación against that effect.

name: Protection from Poison
desc: You touch a criatura. If it is envenenado, you neutralize the veneno. If more than one veneno afflicts the objetivo, you neutralize one veneno that you know is present, or you neutralize one at random. For the duration, the objetivo has ventaja on saving throws against being envenenado, and it has resistance to daño de veneno.

name: Protection from Poison
desc:
The objetivo has ventaja on saving throws against being envenenado and resistance to daño de veneno.

Additionally, if the objetivo is envenenado, you negate one veneno affecting it. If more than one veneno affects the objetivo, you negate one veneno you know is present (otherwise you negate one at random).

name: Protection from the Void
desc: Until the spell ends, one willing criatura you touch has resistance to necrótico and daño psíquico and has ventaja on saving throws against Void spells.
material: a small bar of silver worth 15 sp, which the spell consumes

name: Protective Ice
desc:
When you cast **protective ice**, you encase a willing objetivo in icy, medium armor equivalent to a breastplate (AC 14). A criatura without the appropriate armor competencia has the usual penalties. If the objetivo is already wearing armor, it only uses the better of the two armor classes.

A criatura striking a objetivo encased in **protective ice** with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo while within 5 pies of it recibe 1d6 daño de frío.

If the armor’s wearer recibe daño de fuego, an equal amount of damage is done to the armor, which has 30 puntos de golpe and is damaged only when its wearer recibe daño de fuego. Damaged ice can be repaired by casting a spell that causa daño de frío on it, on a point-for-point basis, but the armor can’t have more than 30 points repaired.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro, it creates splint armor (AC 17, 40 puntos de golpe). If you cast this spell using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro, it creates plate armor (AC 18, 50 puntos de golpe). The armor’s puntos de golpe increase by 10 for each espacio de conjuro above 5th, but the AC remains 18. Additionally, if you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the armor causa an extra +2 daño de frío for each espacio de conjuro above 3rd.
material: a seed encased in ice or glass

name: Puff of Smoke
desc: By harnessing the elemental power of fuego, you warp nearby air into obscuring smoke. una criatura you can see within range debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. If it fails, the criatura is cegado until the start of your next turn. **Puff of smoke** has no effect on criaturas that have sentido de temblor or vista ciega.

name: Pummelstone
desc: You cause a fist-sized chunk of stone to appear and hurl itself against the spell’s objetivo. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d6 daño contundente and must roll a d4 when it makes an tirada de ataque or ability check during its next turn, subtracting the result of the d4 from the attack or check roll.
higher_level: The spell’s damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).
material: a pebble

name: Purify Food and Drink
desc: All no mágico food and drink within a 5-pie radius sphere centered on a point of your choice within range is purified and rendered free of veneno and disease.

name: Purify Food and Drink
desc: You remove all veneno and disease from a number of Supply equal to your competencia bonus.
higher_level: Remove all veneno and disease from an additional Supply for each slot level above 1st.

name: Putrescent Faerie Circle
desc: You create a 20-pie-diameter circle of loosely-packed toadstools that spew sickly white spores and ooze a tarry substance. At the start of each of your turns, cada criatura within the circle debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. A criatura recibe 4d8 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. If a criatura attempts to pass through the ring of toadstools, the toadstools release a cloud of spores, and the criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, the criatura recibe 8d8 daño de veneno and is envenenado for 1 minuto. en un éxito, the criatura recibe half as much damage and isn't envenenado. While a criatura is envenenado, it is paralizado. It can attempt a new tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns to remove the paralizado condition (but not the envenenado condition).

name: Pyroclasm
desc:
You point toward an area of ground or a similar surface within range. A geyser of lava erupts from the chosen spot. The geyser is 5 pies in diameter and 40 pies high. cada criatura in the cylinder when it erupts or at the start of your turn recibe 10d8 daño de fuego, or half as much damage if it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza.

The geyser also forms a pool of lava at its base. Initially, the pool is the same size as the geyser, but at the start of each of your turns for the duration, the pool’s radius increases by 5 pies. A criatura in the pool of lava (but not in the geyser) at the start of your turn recibe 5d8 daño de fuego.

When a criatura leaves the pool of lava, its Velocidad is reduced by half and it has desventaja on Destreza saving throws, caused by a hardening layer of lava. These penalties last until the criatura uses an action to break the hardened stone away from itself.

If you maintain Concentración on **pyroclasm** for a full minuto, the lava geyser and pool harden into permanent, no mágico stone. A criatura in either area when the stone hardens is apresado until the stone is broken away.
material: a shard of obsidian

name: Quick Time
desc: You make one living criatura or plant within range move rapidly in time compared to you. The objetivo becomes one year older. For example, you could cast this spell on a seedling, which causes the plant to sprout from the soil, or you could cast this spell on a newly hatched duckling, causing it to become a full-grown duck. If the objetivo is a criatura with an Inteligencia of 3 or higher, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución to resist the aging. It can choose to fail the tirada de salvación.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you increase the objetivo’s age by one additional year for each slot level above 4th.
material: any seed

name: Quicken
desc: You touch one willing criatura. Once before the duration of the spell expires, the objetivo can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to an initiative roll or tirada de salvación de Destreza it has just made. The spell then ends.

name: Quicksilver Mantle
desc: You transform an ordinary cloak into a highly reflective, silvery garment. This mantle increases your AC by 2 and grants ventaja on saving throws against gaze attacks. In addition, whenever you are struck by a ray such as a [ray of enfeeblement](https://api.open5e.com/spells/ray-of-enfeeblement), [scorching ray](https://api.open5e.com/spells/scorching-ray), or even [disintegrate](https://api.open5e.com/spells/disintegrate), roll 1d4. On a result of 4, the cloak deflects the ray, which instead strikes a randomly selected objetivo within 10 pies of you. The cloak deflects only the first ray that strikes it each ronda; rays after the first affect you as normal.
material: a no mágico cloak and a dram of quicksilver worth 10 gp

name: Quintessence
desc:
By calling upon an archangel, you become infused with Celestial essence and take on angelic features such as golden skin, glowing eyes, and ethereal wings. For the duration of the spell, your Clase de Armadura can’t be lower than 20, you can’t be asustado, and you are immune to daño necrótico.

In addition, each hostile criatura that starts its turn within 120 pies of you or enters that area for the first time on a turn debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado for 1 minuto. A criatura asustado in this way is apresado. A asustado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. If a criatura’s tirada de salvación is successful or if the effect ends for it, the criatura is immune to the frightening effect of the spell until you cast **quintessence** again.

name: Rage of the Meek
desc:
You unleash the discipline of your mágico training and let arcane power burn from your fists, consuming the material components of the spell. Until the spell ends you have resistance to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante from no mágico weapons, and on each of your turns you can use an action to make a melee ataque de conjuro against a objetivo within 5 pies that causa 4d8 daño de fuerza on a successful hit.

For the duration, you cannot cast other spells or concentrate on other spells. The spell ends early if your turn ends and you haven't attacked a hostile criatura since your last turn or taken damage since then. You can also end this spell early on your turn as a acción adicional.
higher_level:
When using a espacio de conjuro of 5th- or 6th-level, el daño increases to 5d8.

When using a espacio de conjuro of 7th- or 8th-level, el daño increases to 6d8\. When using a espacio de conjuro of 9th-level, el daño increases to 7d8.

name: Raid the Lair
desc:
You create an invisible circle of protective energy centered on yourself with a radius of 10 pies. This field moves with you. The caster and all aliados within the energy field are protected against dragons’ lair actions.
* Attack rolls resulting directly from lair actions are made with desventaja.
* Saving throws resulting directly from lair actions are made with ventaja, and damage done by these lair actions is halved.
* Lair actions occur on an initiative count 10 lower than normal.

The caster has ventaja on Constitución saving throws to maintain Concentración on this spell.
material: a piece of the dragon whose lair you are raiding

name: Rain of Blades
desc: You call down a rain of swords, spears, and axes. The blades fill 150 square pies (six 5-pie squares, a circle 15 pies in diameter, or any other pattern you want as long as it forms one contiguous space at least 5 pies wide in all places. The blades deal 6d6 daño cortante to cada criatura in the area at the moment the spell is cast, or half as much damage on a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. An intelligent undead injured by the blades is asustado for 1d4 rondas if it fails a tirada de salvación de Carisma. Most of the blades break or are driven into the ground on impact, but enough survive intact that any single perforante or cortante melee weapon can be salvaged from the affected area and used normally if it is claimed before the spell ends. When the duration expires, all the blades (including the one that was salvaged) disappear.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, an unbroken blade can be picked up and used as a mágico +1 weapon until it disappears.
material: shard of metal from a weapon

name: Raise Dead
desc: You return a dead criatura you touch to life, provided that it has been dead no longer than 10 days. If the criatura's soul is both willing and at liberty to rejoin the body, the criatura returns to life with 1 punto de golpe. This spell also neutralizes any poisons and cures no mágico diseases that affected the criatura at the time it died. This spell doesn't, however, remove mágico diseases, curses, or similar effects; if these aren't first removed prior to casting the spell, they take effect when the criatura returns to life. The spell can't return an undead criatura to life. This spell closes all mortal wounds, but it doesn't restore missing body parts. If the criatura is lacking body parts or organs integral for its Supervivencia-its head, for instance-the spell automatically fails. Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The objetivo recibe a -4 penalty to all attack rolls, saving throws, and ability checks. Every time the objetivo finishes a descanso largo, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it disappears.
material: A diamond worth at least 500gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Raise Dead
desc:
You return the objetivo to life, provided its soul is willing and able to return to its body. The criatura returns to life with 1 punto de golpe. The spell cannot return an undead criatura to life.

The spell cures any poisons and no mágico diseases that affected the criatura at the time of death. It does not remove any mágico diseases, curses, or other mágico effects; these must be removed prior to the spell being cast, otherwise they immediately take effect when the criatura returns to life.

The spell does not regrow limbs or organs, and it automatically fails if the objetivo is missing any body parts necessary for life (like its heart or head).

Being raised from the dead recibe a toll on the body, mind, and spirit. The objetivo suffers 3 levels of fatigue and strife. At the conclusion of each descanso largo, the objetivo removes one level of fatigue and strife until the objetivo completely recovers.

name: Raise Hell
desc:
You transform the land around you into a blasted hellscape. When you cast the spell, all no mágico vegetation in the area immediately dies. In addition, you can create any of the following effects within the area. Fiends are immune to these effects, as are any criaturas you specify at the time you cast the spell. A successful dispel magic ends a single effect, not the entire area.

Brimstone Rubble. You can fill any number of unoccupied 5-pie squares in the area with smoldering brimstone. These spaces become difficult terrain. A criatura that enters an affected square or starts its turn there recibe 2d10 daño de fuego.

Field of Fear. Dread pervades the entire area.

A criatura that starts its turn in the area debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado until the start its next turn. While asustado, a criatura must take the Dash action to escape the area by the safest available route on each of its turns. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura becomes immune to this effect for 24 horas.

Spawning Pits. The ground opens to create up to 6 pits filled with poisonous bile. Each pit fills a 10-pie cube that drops beneath the ground.

When this spell is cast, any criatura whose space is on a pit may make a tirada de salvación de Destreza, moving to an unoccupied space next to the pit en un éxito. A criatura that enters a pit or starts its turn there recibe 15d6 daño de veneno, or half as much damage on a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. A criatura reduced to 0 puntos de golpe by this damage immediately dies and rises as a lemure at the start of its next turn. Lemures created this way obey your verbal commands, but they disappear when the spell ends or if they leave the area for any reason.

Unhallowed Spires. Up to four spires of black ice rise from the ground in unoccupied 10-pie squares within the area. Each spire can be up to 66 pies tall and is immune to all damage and mágico effects. Whenever a criatura within 30 pies of a spire would regain puntos de golpe, it does not regain puntos de golpe and instead recibe 3d6 daño necrótico.

If you maintain Concentración on the spell for the full duration, the effects are permanent until dispelled.

name: Ray of Alchemical Negation
desc:
You launch a ray of blazing, polychromatic energy from your fingertips. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against an alchemical item or a trap that uses alchemy to achieve its ends, such as a trap that sprays ácido, releases poisonous gas, or triggers an explosion of alchemist’s fuego. A hit destroys the alchemical reagents, rendering them harmless. The attack is made against the most suitable object Clase de Armadura.

This spell can also be used against a criatura within range that is wholly or partially composed of acidic, poisonous, or alchemical components, such as an alchemical golem or an ochre jelly. In that case, a hit causa 6d6 daño de fuerza, and the objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or it causa only half as much damage with its acidic, poisonous, or alchemical attacks for 1 minuto. A criatura whose damage is halved can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect en un éxito.

name: Ray of Enfeeblement
desc: A black beam of enervating energy springs from your finger toward a criatura within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo causa only la mitad del daño with weapon attacks that use Fuerza until the spell ends. At the end of each of the objetivo's turns, it can make a tirada de salvación de Constitución against the spell. en un éxito, the spell ends.

name: Ray of Enfeeblement
desc:
A black ray of necrótico energy shoots from your fingertip. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo is weakened and only causa la mitad del daño with weapon attacks that use Fuerza.

At the end of each of the objetivo's turns, it can make a tirada de salvación de Fuerza, ending the spell en un éxito.

name: Ray of Frost
desc: A frigid beam of blue-white ligera streaks toward a criatura within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, it recibe 1d8 daño de frío, and its Velocidad is reduced by 10 pies until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: The spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Ray of Frost
desc:
An icy beam shoots from your outstretched fingers.

Make a ranged ataque de conjuro. On a hit, you deal 1d8 daño de frío and reduce the objetivo's Velocidad by 10 pies until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Ray of Life Suppression
desc:
You launch a swirling ray of disruptive energy at a criatura within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro. On a hit, the criatura recibe 6d8 daño necrótico and its maximum puntos de golpe are reduced by an equal amount. This reduction lasts until the criatura finishes a short or descanso largo, or until it receives the benefit of a [greater restoration](https://api.open5e.com/spells/greater-restoration) spell or comparable magic.

This spell has no effect on constructs or undead.

name: Ray of Sickness
desc:
A ray of green ligera appears at your fingertip, arcing towards a objetivo within range.

Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d8 daño de veneno and debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, it is also envenenado until the end of your next turn.

*(This Open5e spell replaces a like-named non-SRD spell from an official source.*
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Read Memory
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You copy the memories of one memory gear into your own mind. You recall these memories as if you had experienced them but without any emotional attachment or context.

name: Reaper's Knell
desc: As the bell rings, a burst of necrótico energy ripples out in a 20-pie-radius sphere from a point you can see within range. cada criatura in that area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is marked with necrótico energy for the duration. If a marked criatura is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe or dies before the spell ends, you regain puntos de golpe equal to 2d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. Alternatively, you can choose for one aliado you can see within range to regain the puntos de golpe instead.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Reassemble
desc: You touch an undead criatura (dust and bones suffice) destroyed not more than 10 horas ago; the criatura is surrounded by purple fuego for 1 ronda and is returned to life with full puntos de golpe. This spell has no effect on any criaturas except undead, and it cannot restore a lich whose phylactery has been destroyed, a vampire destroyed by sunlight, any undead whose remains are destroyed by fuego, ácido, or holy water, or any remains affected by a gentle repose spell. This spell doesn't remove mágico effects. If they aren't removed prior to casting, they return when the undead criatura comes back to life. This spell closes all mortal wounds but doesn't restore missing body parts. If the criatura doesn't have body parts or organs necessary for Supervivencia, the spell fails. Sudden reassembly is an ordeal involving enormous expenditure of necrótico energy; ley line casters within 5 millas are aware that some great shift in life forces has occurred and a sense of its direction. The objetivo recibe a -4 penalty to all attacks, saves, and ability checks. Every time it finishes a descanso largo, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it disappears.

name: Reaver Spirit
desc:
You inspire aliados to fight with the savagery of berserkers. You and any aliados you can see within range have ventaja on Fuerza checks and Fuerza saving throws; resistance to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante from ataques no mágicos; and a +2 bonus to damage with melee weapons.

When the spell ends, each affected criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or gain 1d4 levels of agotamiento.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the bonus to damage increases by 1 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Rebounding Bolt
desc:
You fuego a vibrant blue beam of energy at a criatura you can see within range. The beam then bounces to a criatura of your choice within 30 pies of the objetivo, losing some of its vibrancy and continuing to bounce to other criaturas of your choice until it sputters out. Each subsequent objetivo must be within 30 pies of the objetivo affected before it, and the beam can't bounce to a objetivo it has already affected.
  Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. The first objetivo recibe 5d6 daño de fuerza en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The beam loses some of its power then bounces to the second objetivo. The beam causa 1d6 daño de fuerza less (4d6, then 3d6, then 2d6, then 1d6) to each subsequent objetivo with the final objetivo taking 1d6 daño de fuerza en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd. This increase allows the beam to jump an additional time, reducing el daño it causa by 1d6 with each bounce as normal.

name: Reciprocating Portal
desc:
With a gesture and a muttered word, you cause an inky black, circular portal to open on the ground beneath one or more criaturas. You can create one 15-pie-diameter portal, two 10-pie-diameter portals, or six 5-pie-diameter portals. A criatura that's standing where you create a portal debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura falls through the portal, disappears into a demiplane where it is aturdido as it falls endlessly, and the portal closes.
  At the start of your next turn, the criaturas that failed their saving throws fall through matching portals directly above their previous locations. A falling criatura lands derribado in the space it once occupied or the nearest unoccupied space and recibe falling damage as if it fell 60 pies, regardless of the distance between the exit portal and the ground. volando and levitating criaturas can't be affected by this spell.

name: Regenerate
desc: You touch a criatura and stimulate its natural healing ability. The objetivo regains 4d8 + 15 puntos de golpe. For the duration of the spell, the objetivo regains 1 punto de golpe at the start of each of its turns (10 puntos de golpe each minuto). The objetivo's severed body members (fingers, legs, tails, and so on), if any, are restored after 2 minutos. If you have the severed part and hold it to the stump, the spell instantaneously causes the limb to knit to the stump.
material: A prayer wheel and holy water.

name: Regenerate
desc:
You touch a criatura, causing its body to spontaneously heal itself. The objetivo immediately regains 4d8 + 15 puntos de golpe and regains 10 puntos de golpe per minuto (1 punto de golpe at the start of each of its turns).

If the objetivo is missing any body parts, the lost parts are restored after 2 minutos. If a severed part is held against the stump, the limb instantaneously reattaches itself.

name: Reincarnate
desc:
You touch a dead humanoid or a piece of a dead humanoid. Provided that the criatura has been dead no longer than 10 days, the spell forms a new adult body for it and then calls the soul to enter that body. If the objetivo's soul isn't free or willing to do so, the spell fails. The magic fashions a new body for the criatura to inhabit, which likely causes the criatura's race to change. The DM rolls a d 100 and consults the following table to determine what form the criatura recibe when restored to life, or the DM chooses a form.

**01-04** Dragonborn **05-13** Dwarf, hill **14-21** Dwarf, mountain **22-25** Elf, dark **26-34** Elf, high **35-42** Elf, wood **43-46** Gnome, forest **47-52** Gnome, rock **53-56** Half-elf **57-60** Half-orc **61-68** Halfling, lightfoot **69-76** Halfling, stout **77-96** Human **97-00** Tiefling 
The reincarnated criatura recalls its former life and experiences. It retains the capabilities it had in its original form, except it exchanges its original race for the new one and changes its racial traits accordingly.
material: Rare oils and unguents worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Reincarnate
desc:
You return the objetivo to life, provided the objetivo's soul is willing and able to return to its body. If you only have a piece of the objetivo, the spell reforms a new adult body for the soul to inhabit. Once reincarnated the objetivo remembers everything from its former life, and retains all its proficiencies, cultural traits, and class features.

The objetivo's heritage traits change according to its new form. The Narrator chooses the form of the new body, or rolls on Table: Reincarnation.

name: Remove Curse
desc: At your touch, all curses affecting una criatura or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains, but the spell breaks its owner's attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.

name: Remove Curse
desc: This spell ends a curse inflicted with a espacio de conjuro of 3rd-level or lower. If the curse was instead inflicted by a feature or trait, the spell ends a curse inflicted by a criatura of Challenge Rating 6 or lower. If cast on a cursed object of Rare or lesser rarity, this spell breaks the owner's attunement to the item (although it does not end the curse on the object).
higher_level:
For each slot level above 3rd, the spell ends a curse inflicted either by a spell one level higher or by a criatura with a Challenge Rating two higher. When using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, the spell breaks the owner's attunement to a Very Rare item.

When using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, the spell breaks the owner's attunement to a Legendary item.

name: Remove Insulation
desc: You objetivo a criatura within range, and that criatura debe tener éxito en a Fortitude tirada de salvación or become less resistant to daño de rayo. A criatura with immunity to daño de rayo has ventaja on this tirada de salvación. en un fallo, a criatura with immunity to daño de rayo instead has resistance to daño de rayo for the spell's duration, and a criatura with resistance to daño de rayo loses its resistance for the duration. A criatura without resistance to daño de rayo that fails its tirada de salvación recibe double damage from rayo for the spell's duration. Remove curse or similar magic ends this spell.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the duration is 24 horas. If you use a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, a criatura with immunity to daño de rayo no longer has ventaja on its tirada de salvación. If you use a espacio de conjuro of 9th level or higher, the spell lasts until it is dispelled.

name: Repair Metal
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork A damaged construct or metal object regains 1d8 + 5 puntos de golpe when this spell is cast on it.
higher_level: The spell restores 2d8 + 10 puntos de golpe at 4th level, 3d8 + 15 at 6th level, and 4d8 + 20 at 8th level.

name: Reposition
desc: You designate up to three friendly criaturas (one of which can be yourself) within range. Each objetivo teleports to an unoccupied space of its choosing that it can see within 30 pies of itself.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the spell objetivos one additional friendly criatura for each slot level above 4th.

name: Repulsing Wall
desc:
You create a shimmering wall of ligera on a solid surface within range. You can make the wall up to 60 pies long, 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 pies in diameter, 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick. The wall is translucent, and criaturas have desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks to look through the wall.
  One side of the wall, selected by you when you cast this spell, causa 5d8 daño radiante when a criatura enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. A criatura attempting to pass through the wall debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura is pushed 10 pies away from the wall and falls derribado. A criatura that is undead, a fiend, or vulnerable to daño radiante has desventaja on this tirada de salvación. The other side of the wall causa no damage and doesn't restrict movement through it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Reset
desc: Choose up to four criaturas within range. If a objetivo is your aliado, it can reroll initiative, keeping whichever of the two results it prefers. If a objetivo is your enemigo, it debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or reroll initiative, keeping whichever of the two results you prefer. Changes to the initiative order go into effect at the start of the next ronda.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can affect one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th.

name: Reset Red Portal
desc: When you cast this spell, you can reset the destination of a Red Portal within range, diverting the shadow road so it leads to a location of your choosing. This destination must be in the present day. You can specify the objetivo destination in general terms such as the City of the fuego Snakes, Mammon's home, the Halls of Avarice, or in the Eleven Hells, and anyone stepping through the portal while the spell is in effect will appear in or near that destination. If you reset the destination to the City of the fuego Snakes, for example, the portal might now lead to the first inner courtyard inside the city, or to the marketplace just outside at the GM's discretion. Once the spell's duration expires, the Red Portal resets to its original destination (50% chance) or to a new random destination (roll on the Destinations table).
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, you can specify a destination up to 100 years in the past for each slot level beyond 5th.

name: Resilient Sphere
desc: A sphere of shimmering fuerza encloses a criatura or object of Large size or smaller within range. An unwilling criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is enclosed for the duration. Nothing-not physical objects, energy, or other spell effects-can pass through the barrier, in or out, though a criatura in the sphere can breathe there. The sphere is immune to all damage, and a criatura or object inside can't be damaged by attacks or effects originating from outside, nor can a criatura inside the sphere damage anything outside it. The sphere is weightless and just large enough to contain the criatura or object inside. An enclosed criatura can use its action to push against the sphere's walls and thus roll the sphere at up to half the criatura's Velocidad. Similarly, the globe can be picked up and moved by other criaturas. A disintegrate spell targeting the globe destroys it without harming anything inside it.
material: A hemispherical piece of clear crystal and a matching hemispherical piece of gum arabic.

name: Resilient Sphere
desc:
A transparent sphere of fuerza encloses the objetivo.

The sphere is weightless and just large enough for the objetivo to fit inside. The sphere can be destroyed without harming anyone inside by being dealt at least 15 daño de fuerza at once or by being targeted with a dispel magic spell cast using a 4th-level or higher espacio de conjuro. The sphere is immune to all other damage, and no spell effects, physical objects, or anything else can pass through, though a objetivo can breathe while inside it. The objetivo cannot be damaged by any attacks or effects originating from outside the sphere, and the objetivo cannot damage anything outside of it.

The objetivo can use an action to roll the sphere at half its Velocidad. Similarly, the sphere can be picked up and moved by other criaturas.

name: Resistance
desc: You touch one willing criatura. Once before the spell ends, the objetivo can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one tirada de salvación of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the tirada de salvación. The spell then ends.
material: A miniature cloak.

name: Resistance
desc: The objetivo gains an expertise die to one tirada de salvación of its choice, ending the spell. The expertise die can be rolled before or after the tirada de salvación is made.

name: Resurrection
desc: You touch a dead criatura that has been dead for no more than a century, that didn't die of old age, and that isn't undead. If its soul is free and willing, the objetivo returns to life with all its puntos de golpe. This spell neutralizes any poisons and cures normal diseases afflicting the criatura when it died. It doesn't, however, remove mágico diseases, curses, and the like; if such effects aren't removed prior to casting the spell, they afflict the objetivo on its return to life. This spell closes all mortal wounds and restores any missing body parts. Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The objetivo recibe a -4 penalty to all attack rolls, saving throws, and ability checks. Every time the objetivo finishes a descanso largo, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it disappears. Casting this spell to restore life to a criatura that has been dead for one year or longer taxes you greatly. Until you finish a descanso largo, you can't cast spells again, and you have desventaja on all attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.
material: A diamond worth at least 1,000gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Resurrection
desc:
Provided the objetivo's soul is willing and able to return to its body, so long as it is not undead it returns to life with all of its puntos de golpe.

The spell cures any poisons and no mágico diseases that affected the objetivo at the time of death.

It does not remove any mágico diseases, curses, or other mágico effects; these must be removed prior to the spell being cast, otherwise they immediately take effect when the objetivo returns to life. The spell closes all mortal wounds and restores any missing body parts.

Being raised from the dead recibe a toll on the body, mind, and spirit. The objetivo recibe a -4 penalty to attack rolls, saving throws, and ability checks.

At the conclusion of each descanso largo, the penalty is reduced by 1 until the objetivo completely recovers.

Resurrecting a criatura that has been dead for one year or longer is exhausting. Until you finish a descanso largo, you can't cast spells again and you have desventaja on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

name: Retribution
desc: You wrap yourself in shimmering ethereal armor. The next time a criatura hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, it recibe daño de fuerza equal to half el daño it dealt to you, and it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is pushed up to 5 pies away from you. Then the spell ends.

name: Revenge's Eye
desc: You touch a criatura's visual organs and grant them the ability to see the trail left by criaturas damaged by a weapon you cast invisible criaturas; it only reveals trails left by those affected by order of revenge also cast by the spellcaster.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo +1 criatura for each slot level above second.

name: Reverberate
desc: You touch the ground at your pies with the metal ring, creating an impact that shakes the earth ahead of you. criaturas and unattended objects touching the ground in a 15-pie cone emanating from you take 4d6 daño de trueno, and criaturas fall derribado; a criatura that makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza recibe half el daño and does not fall derribado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a metal ring

name: Reverse Gravity
desc: This spell reverses gravity in a 50-pie-radius, 100-pie high cylinder centered on a point within range. todas las criaturas and objects that aren't somehow anchored to the ground in the area fall upward and alcance the top of the area when you cast this spell. A criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Destreza to grab onto a fixed object it can alcance, thus avoiding the fall. If some solid object (such as a ceiling) is encountered in this fall, falling objects and criaturas strike it just as they would during a normal downward fall. If an object or criatura reaches the top of the area without striking anything, it remains there, oscillating slightly, for the duration. At the end of the duration, affected objects and criaturas fall back down.
material: A lodestone and iron filings.

name: Reverse Gravity
desc:
Gravity reverses in the area. Any criaturas or objects not anchored to the ground fall upward until they alcance the top of the area. A criatura may make a tirada de salvación de Destreza to prevent the fall by grabbing hold of something. If a solid object (such as a ceiling) is encountered, the affected criaturas and objects impact against it with the same fuerza as a downward fall. When an object or criatura reaches the top of the area, it remains suspended there until the spell ends.

When the spell ends, all affected objects and criaturas fall back down.

name: Revive Beast
desc: You touch a beast that has died within the last minuto. That beast returns to life with 1 punto de golpe. This spell can’t return to life a beast that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts.
material: emeralds worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Revivify
desc: You touch a criatura that has died within the last minuto. That criatura returns to life with 1 punto de golpe. This spell can't return to life a criatura that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts.
material: Diamonds worth 300gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Revivify
desc: The objetivo returns to life with 1 punto de golpe. The spell does not restore any missing body parts and cannot return to life a criatura that died of old age.

name: Right the Stars
desc: You subtly warp the flow of space and time to enhance your conjurations with cosmic potency. Until the spell ends, the maximum duration of any conjuration spell you cast that requires Concentración is doubled, any criatura that you summon or create with a conjuration spell has 30 temporary puntos de golpe, and you have ventaja on Carisma checks and Carisma saving throws.
material: seven black candles and a circle of powdered charred bone or basalt
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Ring Strike
desc: You infuse two metal rings with magic, causing them to revolve in a slow orbit around your head or hand. For the duration, when you hit a objetivo within 60 pies of you with an attack, you can launch one of the rings to strike the objetivo as well. The objetivo recibe 1d10 daño contundente and debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pushed 5 pies directly away from you. The ring is destroyed when it strikes.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can affect up to two additional rings for each espacio de conjuro level above 1st.
material: two metal rings

name: Ring Ward
desc: The iron ring you use to cast the spell becomes a faintly shimmering circlet of energy that spins slowly around you at a radius of 15 pies. For the duration, you and your aliados inside the protected area have ventaja on saving throws against spells, and all affected criaturas gain resistance to one type of damage of your choice.
material: an iron ring worth 200 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Riptide
desc:
With a sweeping gesture, you cause water to swell up into a 20-pie tall, 20-pie radius cylinder centered on a point on the ground that you can see. cada criatura in the cylinder debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is apresado and suspended in the cylinder; en una salvación exitosa, the criatura moves to just outside the nearest edge of the cylinder.

At the start of your next turn, you can direct the current of the swell as it dissipates. Choose one of the following options.

* ***Riptide.*** The water in the cylinder flows in a direction you choose, sweeping along cada criatura in the cylinder. An affected criatura recibe 3d8 daño contundente and is pushed 40 pies in the chosen direction, landing derribado.
* ***Undertow.*** The water rushes downward, pulling cada criatura in the cylinder into an unoccupied space at the center. cada criatura is knocked derribado and debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be aturdido until the start of your next turn.

name: Rise of the Green
desc: The spell gives life to existing plants in range. If there are no plants in range, the spell creates undergrowth and trees that persist for the duration. One of the trees becomes a treant friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the treant, which has its own turn. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it. If you don't issue it any commands, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions. The animated undergrowth creates difficult terrain for your enemigos. Additionally, at the beginning of each of your turns, todas las criaturas that are on the ground in range debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or become apresado until the spell ends. A apresado criatura can use an action to make a Fuerza (Atletismo) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. If a criatura is apresado by plants at the beginning of your turn, it recibe 1d6 daño contundente. Finally, the trees swing at each enemigo in range, requiring cada criatura to make a tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura recibe 6d6 daño contundente en una salvación fallida or half as much damage on a successful one. You can use a acción adicional to recenter the spell on yourself. This does not grow additional trees in areas that previously had none.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 9th-level slot, an additional tree becomes a treant, the undergrowth causa an additional 1d6 daño contundente, and the trees inflict an additional 2d6 daño contundente.

name: Risen Road
desc: When you cast this spell, you open a glowing portal into the plane of shadow. The portal remains open for 1 minuto, until 10 criaturas step through it, or until you collapse it (no action required). Stepping through the portal places you on a shadow road leading to a destination within 50 millas, or in a direction specified by you. The road is in ideal condition. You and your companions can travel it safely at a normal pace, but you can't rest on the road; if you stop for more than 10 minutos, the spell expires and dumps you back into the real world at a random spot within 10 millas of your starting point. The spell expires 2d6 horas after being cast. When that happens, travelers on the road are safely deposited near their specified destination or 50 millas from their starting point in the direction that was specified when the spell was cast. Travelers never incur agotamiento no matter how many horas they spent walking or riding on the shadow road. The temporary shadow road ceases to exist; anything left behind is lost in the shadow realm. Each casting of risen road creates a new shadow road. A small chance exists that a temporary shadow road might intersect with an existing shadow road, opening the possibility for meeting other travelers or monsters, or for choosing a different destination mid-journey. The likelihood is entirely up to the GM.

name: Rive
desc: You pull on the filaments of transition and possibility to tear at your enemigos. Choose a criatura you can see within range and make a ranged ataque de conjuro. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 5d8 daño de frío as strands of icy nothingness whip from your outstretched hand to envelop it. If the objetivo isn't native to the plane you're on, it recibe an extra 3d6 daño psíquico and debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or be aturdido until the end of its next turn.

name: Robe of Shards
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You create a robe of metal shards, gears, and cogs that provides a base AC of 14 + your Destreza modifier. As a acción adicional while protected by a robe of shards, you can command bits of metal from a fallen foe to be absorbed by your robe; each infusion of metal increases your AC by 1, to a maximum of 18 + Destreza modifier. You can also use a acción adicional to dispel the robe, causing it to explode into a shower of volando metal that does 8d6 daño cortante, +1d6 per point of basic (non-Destreza) AC above 14, to todas las criaturas within 30 pies of you.

name: Rockfall Ward
desc: You temporarily halt the fall of up to a 10-pie cube of no mágico objects or debris, saving those who might have been crushed. The falling material's rate of descent slows to 60 pies per ronda and comes to a stop 5 pies above the ground, where it hovers until the spell ends. This spell can't prevent missile weapons from striking a objetivo, and it can't slow the descent of an object larger than a 10-pie cube. However, at the GM's discretion, it can slow the descent of a section of a larger object, such as the wall of a falling building or a section of sail and rigging tied to a falling mast.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the cube of debris and objects you can halt increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 1st.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when nonmagical debris fall within 120 feet of you

name: Rolling Thunder
desc:
A tremendous bell note explodes from your outstretched hand and rolls forward in a line 30 pies long and 5 pies wide. cada criatura in the line debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be ensordecido for 1 minuto. A criatura made of material such as stone, crystal, or metal has desventaja on its tirada de salvación against this spell.

While a criatura is ensordecido in this way, it is wreathed in thundering energy; it recibe 2d8 daño de trueno at the start of its turn, and its Velocidad is halved. A ensordecido criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a sliver of metal from a gong

name: Rope Trick
desc: You touch a length of rope that is up to 60 pies long. One end of the rope then rises into the air until the whole rope hangs perpendicular to the ground. At the upper end of the rope, an invisible entrance opens to an extradimensional space that lasts until the spell ends. The extradimensional space can be reached by escalando to the top of the rope. The space can hold as many as eight Medium or smaller criaturas. The rope can be pulled into the space, making the rope disappear from view outside the space. Attacks and spells can't cross through the entrance into or out of the extradimensional space, but those inside can see out of it as if through a 3-pie-by-5-pie window centered on the rope. Anything inside the extradimensional space drops out when the spell ends.
material: Powdered corn extract and a twisted loop of parchment.

name: Rope Trick
desc:
One end of the objetivo rope rises into the air until it hangs perpendicular to the ground. At the upper end, a nearly imperceptible entrance opens to an extradimensional space that can fit up to 8 Medium or smaller criaturas. The entrance can be reached by escalando the rope. Once inside, the rope can be pulled into the extradimensional space.

No spells or attacks can cross into or out of the extradimensional space. criaturas inside the extradimensional space can see out of a 3-pie-by- 5-pie window centered on its entrance. criaturas outside the space can spot the entrance with a Percepción check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If they can alcance it, criaturas can pass in and out of the space.

When the spell ends, anything inside the extradimensional space falls to the ground.

name: Rotting Corpse
desc:
Your familiarity with the foul effects of death allows you to prevent a dead body from being returned to life using anything but the most powerful forms of magic.

You cast this spell by touching a criatura that died within the last 24 horas. The body immediately decomposes to a state that prevents the body from being returned to life by the [raise dead](https://api.open5e.com/spells/raise-dead) spell (though a [resurrection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/resurrection) spell still works). At the end of this spell’s duration, the body decomposes to a rancid slime, and it can’t be returned to life except through a [true resurrection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/true-resurrection) spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can affect one additional corpse for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a rotting piece of flesh from an undead criatura
