***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the spell also gives you vista ciega out to a range of 30 pies.
material: a dried leaf, crumpled and released

name: Soothsayer's Shield
desc: This spell can be cast when you are hit by an enemigo's attack. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +4 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack.

name: Soul of the Machine
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork One willing criatura you touch becomes immune to mind-altering effects and daño psíquico for the spell's duration.

name: Soulwrought Fists
desc:
The objetivo's hands harden with inner power, turning dexterous fingers into mágico iron cudgels.

Until the spell ends, the objetivo drops anything it is holding and cannot use its hands to grasp objects or perform complex tasks. A objetivo can still cast any spell that does not specifically require its hands.

When making unarmed strikes, the objetivo can use its spellcasting ability or Destreza (its choice) instead of Fuerza for the attack and damage rolls of unarmed strikes. In addition, the objetivo's unarmed strikes deal 1d8 daño contundente and count as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques no mágicos and damage.

name: Spare the Dying
desc: You touch a living criatura that has 0 puntos de golpe. The criatura becomes stable. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.

name: Spare the Dying
desc: A jolt of healing energy flows through the objetivo and it becomes stable.

name: Speak with Animals
desc: You gain the ability to comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts for the duration. The knowledge and awareness of many beasts is limited by their Inteligencia, but at a minimum, beasts can give you information about nearby locations and monsters, including whatever they can perceive or have perceived within the past day. You might be able to persuade a beast to perform a small favor for you, at the DM's discretion.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Ritual Caster

name: Speak with Animals
desc: You call upon the secret lore of beasts and gain the ability to speak with them. Beasts have a different perspective of the world, and their knowledge and awareness is filtered through that perspective. At a minimum, beasts can tell you about nearby locations and monsters, including things they have recently perceived. At the Narrator's discretion, you might be able to persuade a beast to perform a small favor for you.

name: Speak with Dead
desc: You grant the semblance of life and Inteligencia to a corpse of your choice within range, allowing it to answer the questions you pose. The corpse must still have a mouth and can't be undead. The spell fails if the corpse was the objetivo of this spell within the last 10 days. Until the spell ends, you can ask the corpse up to five questions. The corpse knows only what it knew in life, including the languages it knew. Answers are usually brief, cryptic, or repetitive, and the corpse is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if you are hostile to it or it recognizes you as an enemigo. This spell doesn't return the criatura's soul to its body, only its animating spirit. Thus, the corpse can't learn new information, doesn't comprehend anything that has happened since it died, and can't speculate about future events.
material: Burning incense.

name: Speak with Dead
desc:
You call forth the objetivo's memories, animating it enough to answer 5 questions. The corpse's knowledge is limited: it knows only what it knew in life and cannot learn new information or speak about anything that has occurred since its death. It speaks only in the languages it knew, and is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if it has reason not to. Answers might be brief, cryptic, or repetitive.

This spell does not return a departed soul, nor does it have any effect on an undead corpse, or one without a mouth.

name: Speak with Inanimate Object
desc: You awaken a spirit that resides inside an inanimate object such as a rock, a sign, or a table, and can ask it up to three yes-or-no questions. The spirit is indifferent toward you unless you have done something to harm or help it. The spirit can give you information about its environment and about things it has observed (with its limited senses), and it can act as a spy for you in certain situations. The spell ends when its duration expires or after you have received answers to three questions.

name: Speak with Plants
desc: You imbue plants within 30 pies of you with limited sentience and animation, giving them the ability to communicate with you and follow your simple commands. You can question plants about events in the spell's area within the past day, gaining information about criaturas that have passed, weather, and other circumstances. You can also turn difficult terrain caused by plant growth (such as thickets and undergrowth) into ordinary terrain that lasts for the duration. Or you can turn ordinary terrain where plants are present into difficult terrain that lasts for the duration, causing vines and branches to hinder pursuers, for example. Plants might be able to perform other tasks on your behalf, at the DM's discretion. The spell doesn't enable plants to uproot themselves and move about, but they can freely move branches, tendrils, and stalks. If a plant criatura is in the area, you can communicate with it as if you shared a Común language, but you gain no mágico ability to influence it. This spell can cause the plants created by the entangle spell to release a apresado criatura.

name: Speak with Plants
desc:
Your voice recibe on a mágico timbre, awakening the objetivos to limited sentience. Until the spell ends, the objetivos can communicate with you and follow simple commands, telling you about recent events including criaturas that have passed, weather, and nearby locations.

The objetivos have a limited mobility: they can move their branches, tendrils, and stalks freely. This allows them to turn ordinary terrain into difficult terrain, or make difficult terrain caused by vegetation into ordinary terrain for the duration as vines and branches move at your request. This spell can also release a criatura apresado by an entangle spell.

At the Narrator's discretion the objetivos may be able to perform other tasks, though each must remain rooted in place. If a plant criatura is in the area, you can communicate with it but it is not compelled to follow your requests.

name: Sphere of Order
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You surround yourself with the perfect order of clockwork. Chaotic criaturas that start their turn in the area or enter it on their turn take 5d8 daño psíquico. el daño is 8d8 for Chaotic aberrations, celestials, elementals, and fiends. A successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría halves el daño, but Chaotic criaturas (the only ones affected by the spell) make the tirada de salvación with desventaja.

name: Spider Climb
desc: Until the spell ends, one willing criatura you touch gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, while leaving its hands free. The objetivo also gains a escalando Velocidad equal to its walking Velocidad.
material: A drop of bitumen and a spider.

name: Spider Climb
desc: The objetivo gains the ability to walk on walls and upside down on ceilings, as well as a escalando Velocidad equal to its base Velocidad.
higher_level: You can affect one additional objetivo for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Spike Growth
desc: The ground in a 20-pie radius centered on a point within range twists and sprouts hard spikes and thorns. The area becomes difficult terrain for the duration. When a criatura moves into or within the area, it recibe 2d4 daño perforante for every 5 pies it travels. The development of land is camouflaged to look natural. Any criatura that does not see the area when the spell is spell casts debe realizar a Sabiduría (Percepción) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to recognize the terrain as hazardous before entering it.
material: Seven sharp spines or seven twigs cut peak.

name: Spike Growth
desc:
You cause sharp spikes and thorns to sprout in the area, making it difficult terrain. When a criatura enters or moves within the area, it recibe 2d4 daño perforante for every 5 pies it travels.

Your magic causes the ground to look natural. A criatura that can't see the area when the spell is cast can spot the hazardous terrain just before entering it by making a Percepción check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

name: Spiked Barricade
desc:
With a word, you create a barricade of pointed, wooden poles, also known as a cheval de frise, to block your enemigos' progress. The barricade is composed of six 5-pie cube barriers made of wooden spikes mounted on central, horizontal beams.
  Each barrier doesn't need to be contiguous with another barrier, but each barrier must appear in an unoccupied space within range. Each barrier is difficult terrain, and a barrier provides half cover to a criatura behind it. When a criatura enters a barrier's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or take 3d6 daño perforante.
  The barriers are objects made of wood that can be damaged and destroyed. Each barrier has AC 13, 20 puntos de golpe, and is vulnerable to contundente and daño de fuego. Reducing a barrier to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it.
  If you maintain your Concentración on this spell for its whole duration, the barriers become permanent and can't be dispelled. Otherwise, the barriers disappear when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the number of barriers you create increases by two for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Spin
desc: You designate a criatura you can see within range and tell it to spin. The criatura can resist this command with a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura spins in place for the duration of the spell. A spinning criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. A criatura that has spun for 1 ronda or longer becomes dizzy and has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks until 1 ronda after it stops spinning.

name: Spinning Axes
desc: Spinning axes made of luminous fuerza burst out from you to strike todas las criaturas within 10 pies of you. Each of those criaturas recibe 5d8 daño de fuerza, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. criaturas damaged by this spell that aren’t undead or constructs begin bleeding. A bleeding criatura recibe 2d6 daño necrótico at the end of each of its turns for 1 minuto. A criatura can stop the bleeding for itself or another criatura by using an action to make a successful Sabiduría (Medicina) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro or by applying any amount of mágico healing.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
material: an iron ring

name: Spire of Stone
desc: You cause a spire of rock to burst out of the ground, floor, or another surface beneath your pies. The spire is as wide as your space, and lifting you, it can rise up to 20 pies in height. When the spire appears, a criatura within 5 pies of you debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall derribado. As a acción adicional on your turn, you can cause the spire to rise or descend up to 20 pies to a maximum height of 40 pies. If you move off of the spire, it immediately collapses back into the ground. When the spire disappears, it leaves the surface from which it sprang unharmed. You can create a new spire as a acción adicional for the duration of the spell.

name: Spirit Guardians
desc: You call forth spirits to protect you. They flit around you to a distance of 15 pies for the duration. If you are good or neutral, their spectral form appears angelic or fey (your choice). If you are evil, they appear fiendish. When you cast this spell, you can designate any number of criaturas you can see to be unaffected by it. An affected criatura's Velocidad is halved in the area, and when the criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 3d8 daño radiante (if you are good or neutral) or 3d8 daño necrótico (if you are evil). en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much damage.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: A holy symbol.

name: Spirit Guardians
desc:
You call down spirits of divine fury, filling the area with flitting spectral forms. You choose the form taken by the spirits.

criaturas of your choice halve their Velocidad while in the area. When a criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it recibe 3d6 radiante or daño necrótico (your choice).
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Spiritual Weapon
desc: You create a floating, spectral weapon within range that lasts for the duration or until you cast this spell again. When you cast the spell, you can make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura within 5 pies of the weapon. On a hit, the objetivo recibe daño de fuerza equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. As a acción adicional on your turn, you can move the weapon up to 20 pies and repeat the attack against a criatura within 5 pies of it. The weapon can take whatever form you choose. Clerics of deities who are associated with a particular weapon (as St. Cuthbert is known for his mace and Thor for his hammer) make this spell's effect resemble that weapon.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for every two slot levels above the 2nd.

name: Spiritual Weapon
desc:
You create a floating, incandescent weapon with an appearance of your choosing and use it to attack your enemigos. On the ronda you cast it, you can make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura within 5 pies of the weapon that causa daño de fuerza equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

As a acción adicional on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you can move the weapon up to 20 pies and make another attack against a criatura within 5 pies of it.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for every two slot levels above 2nd.

name: Spite
desc: You prick your finger and anoint your forehead with your own blood, taking 1 daño perforante and warding yourself against hostile attacks. The first time a criatura hits you with an attack during this spell's duration, it recibe 3d6 daño psíquico. Then the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Spiteful Weapon
desc:
You create a connection between the objetivo of the spell, an attacker that injured the objetivo during the last 24 horas, and the melee weapon that caused the injury, all of which must be within range when the spell is cast.

For the duration of the spell, whenever the attacker recibe damage while holding the weapon, the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo recibe the same amount and type of damage, or half as much damage on a successful one. The attacker can use the weapon on itself and thus cause the objetivo to take identical damage. A self-inflicted wound hits automatically, but damage is still rolled randomly.

Once the connection is established, it lasts for the duration of the spell regardless of range, so long as all three elements remain on the same plane. The spell ends immediately if the attacker receives any healing.
higher_level: The objetivo has desventaja on its Carisma saving throws if **spiteful weapon** is cast using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher.
material: a melee weapon that has been used to injure the objetivo

name: Sporesight
desc:
You throw a mushroom at a point within range and detonate it, creating a cloud of spores that fills the area. The cloud of spores travels around corners, and the area is considered lightly obscured for everyone except you. criaturas and objects within the area are covered in spores.

Until the spell ends, you know the exact location of all affected objects and criaturas. Any tirada de ataque you make against an affected criatura or object has ventaja, and the affected criaturas and objects can't benefit from being invisible.

name: Spur Mount
desc: You urge your mount to a sudden burst of Velocidad. Until the end of your next turn, you can direct your mount to use the Dash or Disengage action as a acción adicional. This spell has no effect on a criatura that you are not riding.
material: an apple or a sugar cube

name: Staff of Violet Fire
desc:
You create a quarterstaff of pure necrótico energy that blazes with intense purple ligera; it appears in your chosen hand. If you let it go, it disappears, though you can evoke it again as a acción adicional if you have maintained Concentración on the spell.

This staff is an extremely unstable and impermanent magic item; it has 10 charges and does not require attunement. The wielder can use one of three effects:

* By using your action to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo and expending 1 charge, you can attack with it. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 5d10 daño necrótico.
* By expending 2 charges, you can release bolts of necrótico fuego against up to 3 objetivos as ranged attacks for 1d8+4 daño necrótico each.

The staff disappears and the spell ends when all the staff's charges have been expended or if you stop concentrating on the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the melee damage increases by 1d10 for every two slot levels above 4th, or you add one additional ranged bolt for every two slot levels above 4th.
material: mummy dust

name: Stanch
desc: The objetivo’s blood coagulates rapidly, so that a dying objetivo stabilizes and any ongoing bleeding or wounding effect on the objetivo ends. The objetivo can't be the source of blood for any spell or effect that requires even a drop of blood.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Star's Heart
desc:
This spell increases gravity tenfold in a 50-pie radius centered on you. cada criatura in the area other than you drops whatever it’s holding, falls derribado, becomes incapacitado, and can’t move. If a solid object (such as the ground) is encountered when a volando or levitating criatura falls, the criatura recibe three times the normal falling damage. Any criatura except you that enters the area or starts its turn there debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or fall derribado and become incapacitado and unable to move. A criatura that starts its turn derribado and incapacitado makes a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 8d6 daño contundente; en una salvación exitosa, it recibe 4d6 daño contundente, it’s no longer incapacitado, and it can move at half Velocidad.

All ranged weapon attacks inside the area have a normal range of 5 pies and a maximum range of 10 pies. The same applies to spells that create missiles that have mass, such as [flaming sphere](https://api.open5e.com/spells/flaming-sphere). A criatura under the influence of a [freedom of movement](https://api.open5e.com/spells/freedom-of-movement) spell or comparable magic has ventaja on the Fuerza saving throws required by this spell, and its Velocidad isn’t reduced once it recovers from being incapacitado.
material: an ioun stone

name: Starburst
desc: You cause a mote of starlight to appear and explode in a 5-pie cube you can see within range. If a criatura is in the cube, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Carisma or take 1d8 daño radiante.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases to 2d8 when you alcance 5th level, 3d8 when you alcance 11th level, and 4d8 when you alcance 17th level.

name: Starfall
desc: You cause bolts of shimmering starlight to fall from the heavens, striking up to five criaturas that you can see within range. Each bolt strikes un objetivo, dealing 6d6 daño radiante, knocking the objetivo derribado, and blinding it until the start of your next turn. A criatura that makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza recibe half el daño, is not knocked derribado, and is not cegado. If you name fewer than five objetivos, excess bolts strike the ground harmlessly.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, you can create one additional bolt for each slot level above 5th.

name: Starry Vision
desc: This spell acts as [compelling fate](https://api.open5e.com/spells/compelling-fate), except as noted above (**starry** vision can be cast as a reacción, has twice the range of [compelling fate](https://api.open5e.com/spells/compelling-fate), and lasts up to 1 minuto). At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo repeats the tirada de salvación de Carisma, ending the effect en un éxito.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the bonus to AC increases by 1 for each slot level above 7th.
material: a sprinkle of gold dust worth 400 gp
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy starts its turn

name: Steal Warmth
desc: When you cast **steal warmth** after taking daño de frío, you select a living criatura within 5 pies of you. That criatura recibe the daño de frío instead, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. You regain puntos de golpe equal to the amount of daño de frío taken by the objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the distance to the objetivo you can affect with this spell increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 3rd.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you take cold damage from magic

name: Steam Blast
desc: You unleash a burst of superheated steam in a 15-pie radius around you. All other criaturas in the area take 5d8 daño de fuego, or half as much damage on a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. no mágico fires smaller than a bonfire are extinguished, and everything becomes wet.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
material: a tiny copper kettle or boiler

name: Steam Gout
desc:
You create a gout of billowing steam in a 40-foottall cylinder with a 5-pie radius centered on a point on the ground you can see within range. Exposed flames in the area are doused. cada criatura in the area when the gout first appears debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 2d8 daño de fuego and falls derribado. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much damage and doesn't fall derribado.
  The gout then covers the area in a sheen of slippery water. When a criatura enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, it falls derribado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8, and you can create one additional gout of steam for each slot level above 3rd. A criatura in the area of more than one gout of steam is affected only once.

name: Steam Whistle
desc: You open your mouth and unleash a shattering scream. All other criaturas in a 30-pie radius around you take 10d10 daño de trueno and are ensordecido for 1d8 horas. A successful tirada de salvación de Constitución halves el daño and reduces the deafness to 1 ronda.
material: a small brass whistle

name: Stench of Rot
desc: Choose una criatura you can see within range that isn’t a construct or an undead. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Carisma or become cursed for the duration of the spell. While cursed, the objetivo reeks of death and rot, and nothing short of magic can mask or remove the smell. The objetivo has desventaja on all Carisma checks and on Constitución saving throws to maintain Concentración on spells. A criatura with the Keen Smell trait, or a similar trait indicating the criatura has a strong sense of smell, can add your spellcasting ability modifier to its Sabiduría (Percepción) or Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to find the objetivo. A [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse) spell or similar magic ends the spell early.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a live maggot
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Stigmata of the Red Goddess
desc: You cut yourself and bleed as tribute to Marena, gaining power as long as the blood continues flowing. The stigmata typically appears as blood running from the eyes or ears, or from wounds manifesting on the neck or chest. You take 1 daño perforante at the beginning of each turn and gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls. Any healing received by you, mágico or otherwise, ends the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño you take at the start of each of your turns and the bonus damage you do both increase by 1 for each slot level above 2nd, and the duration increases by 1 ronda for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Stinking Cloud
desc: You create a 20-pie-radius sphere of yellow, nauseating gas centered on a point within range. The cloud spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. The cloud lingers in the air for the duration. cada criatura that is completely within the cloud at the start of its turn debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución against veneno. en una salvación fallida, the criatura spends its action that turn retching and reeling. criaturas that don't need to breathe or are immune to veneno automatically succeed on this tirada de salvación. A moderate wind (at least 10 millas per hora) disperses the cloud after 4 rondas. A strong wind (at least 20 millas per hora) disperses it after 1 ronda.
material: A rotten egg or several skunk cabbage leaves.

name: Stinking Cloud
desc:
You create a roiling, noxious cloud that hinders criaturas and leaves them retching. The cloud spreads around corners and lingers in the air until the spell ends.

The area is heavily obscured. A criatura in the area at the start of its turn makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or uses its action to retch and reel.

criaturas that don't need to breathe or are immune to veneno automatically succeed on the save.

A moderate wind (10 millas per hora) disperses the cloud after 4 rondas, a strong wind (20 millas per hora) after 1 ronda.
higher_level: The spell's area increases by 5 pies for every 2 slot levels above 3rd.

name: Stone Aegis
desc:
A rocky coating covers your body, protecting you. Until the start of your next turn, you gain 5 temporary puntos de golpe and a +2 bonus to Clase de Armadura, including against the triggering attack.
  At the start of each of your subsequent turns, you can use a acción adicional to extend the duration of the AC bonus until the start of your following turn, for up to 1 minuto.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are hit by an attack

name: Stone Fetch
desc:
You create a stony duplicate of yourself, which rises out of the ground and appears next to you. The duplicate looks like a stone carving of you, including the clothing you're wearing and equipment you're carrying at the time of the casting. It uses the statistics of an earth elemental.
  For the duration, you have a telepathic link with the duplicate. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the duplicate while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as “Run over there” or “Fetch that object.” If the duplicate completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it recibe the Dodge or Hide action (your choice) on its turn. The duplicate can't attack, but it can speak in a gravelly version of your voice and mimic your mannerisms with exact detail.
  As a acción adicional, you can see through the duplicate's eyes and hear what it hears as if you were in the duplicate's space, gaining the benefits of the earth elemental's visión en la oscuridad and sentido de temblor until the start of your next turn. During this time, you are deaf and blind with regard to your own senses. As an action while sharing the duplicate's senses, you can make the duplicate explode in a shower of jagged chunks of rock, destroying the duplicate and ending the spell. cada criatura within 10 pies of the duplicate debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura recibe 4d10 daño cortante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
  The duplicate explodes at the end of the duration, if you didn't cause it to explode before then. If the duplicate is killed before it explodes, you suffer one level of agotamiento.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the explosion damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 4th. In addition, when you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the duration is 1 hora. When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the duration is 8 horas. Using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher grants a duration that doesn't require Concentración.

name: Stone Shape
desc: You touch a stone object of Medium size or smaller or a section of stone no more than 5 pies in any dimension and form it into any shape that suits your purpose. So, for example, you could shape a large rock into a weapon, idol, or coffer, or make a small passage through a wall, as long as the wall is less than 5 pies thick. You could also shape a stone door or its frame to seal the door shut. The object you create can have up to two hinges and a latch, but finer mechanical detail isn't possible.
material: Soft clay, to be crudely worked into the desired shape for the stone object.

name: Stone Shape
desc:
You reshape the objetivo into any form you choose.

For example, you could shape a large rock into a weapon, statue, or chest, make a small passage through a wall (as long as it isn't more than 5 pies thick), seal a stone door shut, or create a hiding place. The objetivo can have up to two hinges and a latch, but finer mechanical detail isn't possible.
higher_level: You may select one additional objetivo for every slot level above 4th.

name: Stoneskin
desc: This spell turns the flesh of a willing criatura you touch as hard as stone. Until the spell ends, the objetivo has resistance to no mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante.
material: Diamond dust worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Stoneskin
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivo's flesh becomes as hard as stone and it gains resistance to no mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante.
higher_level: When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, the objetivo gains resistance to mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante.

name: Storm Kick
desc:
You must be able to move in order to cast this spell.

You leap into the air and flash across the battlefield, arriving pies-first with the fuerza of a thunderbolt. As part of casting this spell, make a ranged ataque de conjuro against a criatura you can see within range. If you hit, you instantly flash to an open space of your choosing adjacent to the objetivo, dealing daño contundente equal to 1d6 + your spellcasting modifier plus 3d8 daño de trueno and 6d8 daño de rayo. If your unarmed strike normally uses a larger die, use that instead of a d6\. If you miss, you may still choose to teleport next to the objetivo.
higher_level: When using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro or higher, if you are able to make more than one attack when you take the Attack action, you may make an additional ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma against the objetivo. When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, you may choose an additional objetivo within 30 pies of the objetivo for each espacio de conjuro level above 6th, forcing each additional objetivo to make a tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 6d8 daño de rayo.

name: Storm of Axes
desc: Deep Magic: battle You conjure up dozens of axes and direct them in a pattern in chopping, whirling mayhem. The blades fill eight 5-pie squares in a line 40 pies long or in a double-Fuerza line 20 pies long and 10 deep. The axes cause 6d8 daño cortante to criaturas in the area at the moment the spell is cast or la mitad del daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. By maintaining Concentración, you can move the swarm of axes up to 20 pies per ronda in any direction you wish. If the storm of axes moves into spaces containing criaturas, they immediately debe realizar another tirada de salvación de Destreza or suffer damage again.

name: Storm of Vengeance
desc:
A churning storm cloud forms, centered on a point you can see and spreading to a radius of 360 pies. rayo flashes in the area, trueno booms, and strong winds roar. cada criatura under the cloud (no more than 5,000 pies beneath the cloud) when it appears debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 2d6 daño de trueno and becomes ensordecido for 5 minutos. Each ronda you maintain Concentración on this spell, the storm produces additional effects on your turn.

**ronda 2.** Acidic rain falls from the cloud. cada criatura and object under the cloud recibe 1d6 daño de ácido.

**ronda 3.** You call six bolts of rayo from the cloud to strike six criaturas or objects of your choice beneath the cloud. A given criatura or object can't be struck by more than one bolt. A struck criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. The criatura recibe 10d6 daño de rayo en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

**ronda 4.** Hailstones rain down from the cloud. cada criatura under the cloud recibe 2d6 daño contundente.

**ronda 5-10.** Gusts and freezing rain assail the area under the cloud. The area becomes difficult terrain and is heavily obscured. cada criatura there recibe 1d6 daño de frío. Ranged weapon attacks in the area are impossible. The wind and rain count as a severe distraction for the purposes of maintaining Concentración on spells. Finally, gusts of strong wind (ranging from 20 to 50 millas per hora) automatically disperse fog, mists, and similar phenomena in the area, whether mundane or mágico.

name: Storm of Vengeance
desc:
You conjure a churning storm cloud that spreads to cover the objetivo area. As it forms, rayo and trueno mix with howling winds, and cada criatura beneath the cloud makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or recibe 2d6 daño de trueno and becomes ensordecido for 5 minutos.

Until the spell ends, at the start of your turn the cloud produces additional effects: ronda 2\. Acidic rain falls throughout the area dealing 1d6 daño de ácido to cada criatura and object beneath the cloud.

ronda 3\. rayo bolts strike up to 6 criaturas or objects of your choosing that are beneath the cloud (no more than one bolt per criatura or object). A criatura struck by this rayo makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 10d6 daño de rayo en una salvación fallida, or la mitad del daño en una salvación exitosa.

ronda 4\. Hailstones fall throughout the area dealing 2d6 daño contundente to cada criatura beneath the cloud.

ronda 5�10\. Gusts and freezing rain turn the area beneath the cloud into difficult terrain that is heavily obscured. Ranged weapon attacks are impossible while a criatura or its objetivo are beneath the cloud. When a criatura concentrating on a spell starts its turn beneath the cloud or enters into the area, it makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or loses Concentración. Gusts of strong winds between 20�50 millas per hora automatically disperse fog, mists, and similar effects (whether mundane or mágico). Finally, cada criatura beneath the cloud recibe 1d6 daño de frío.

name: Storm of Wings
desc:
You create a storm of spectral birds, bats, or volando insects in a 15-pie-radius sphere on a point you can see within range. The storm spreads around corners, and its area is lightly obscured. cada criatura in the storm when it appears and each a criatura that starts its turn in the storm is affected by the storm.
  As a acción adicional on your turn, you can move the storm up to 30 pies. As an action on your turn, you can change the storm from one type to another, such as from a storm of bats to a storm of insects.
  ***Bats.*** The criatura recibe 4d6 daño necrótico, and its Velocidad is halved while within the storm as the bats cling to it and drain its blood.
  ***Birds.*** The criatura recibe 4d6 daño cortante, and has desventaja on attack rolls while within the storm as the birds fly in the way of the criatura's attacks.
  ***Insects.*** The criatura recibe 4d6 daño de veneno, and it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución each time it casts a spell while within the storm. en una salvación fallida, the criatura fails to cast the spell, losing the action but not the espacio de conjuro.
material: a drop of honey

name: Strength of the Underworld
desc: You call on the power of the dark gods of the afterlife to strengthen the objetivo's undead energy. The spell's objetivo has ventaja on saving throws against Turn Undead while the spell lasts. If this spell is cast on a corpse that died from darakhul fever, the corpse gains a +5 bonus on its roll to determine whether it rises as a darakhul.

name: Subliminal Aversion
desc: You ward a criatura within range against attacks by making the choice para impactar them painful. When the warded criatura is hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo from within 5 pies of it, the attacker recibe 1d4 daño psíquico.

name: Sudden Dawn
desc: You call upon morning to arrive ahead of schedule. With a sharp word, you create a 30-pie-radius cylinder of ligera centered on a point on the ground within range. The cylinder extends vertically for 100 pies or until it reaches an obstruction, such as a ceiling. The area inside the cylinder is brightly lit.

name: Sudden Slue
desc: With a growl, you call forth dozens of bears to overrun todas las criaturas in a 20-pie cube within range. cada criatura in the area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 6d6 daño contundente and is knocked derribado. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half el daño and isn't knocked derribado. The bears disappear after making their charge.

name: Sudden Stampede
desc: You conjure up a multitude of fey spirits that manifest as galloping horses. These horses run in a 10-pie'wide, 60-pie-long line, in a given direction starting from a point within range, trampling todas las criaturas in their path, before vanishing again. cada criatura in the line recibe 6d10 daño contundente and is knocked derribado. A successful tirada de salvación de Destreza reduces el daño by half, and the criatura is not knocked derribado.

name: Suggestion
desc: You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) and magically influence a criatura you can see within range that can hear and understand you. criaturas that can't be hechizado are immune to this effect. The suggestion must be worded in such a manner as to make the course of action sound reasonable. Asking the criatura to stab itself, throw itself onto a spear, immolate itself, or do some other obviously harmful act ends the spell. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, it pursues the course of action you described to the best of its ability. The suggested course of action can continue for the entire duration. If the suggested activity can be completed in a shorter time, the spell ends when the subject finishes what it was asked to do. You can also specify conditions that will trigger a special activity during the duration. For example, you might suggest that a knight give her warhorse to the first beggar she meets. If the condition isn't met before the spell expires, the activity isn't performed. If you or any of your companions damage the objetivo, the spell ends.
material: A snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil.

name: Suggestion
desc:
criaturas that cannot be hechizado are immune to this spell. Suggest an activity phrased in a sentence or two. The objetivo is magically influenced to follow that course of activity. The suggestion must be worded to sound reasonable. Asking the objetivo to perform an action that is obviously harmful to it ends the spell.

The objetivo carries out the activity suggested by you as well as it can. The activity can last for the duration of the spell, and if it requires less time the spell ends after the objetivo has carried out the activity.

You may specify trigger conditions that cause the objetivo to perform a specific activity while the spell lasts. For example, you may suggest that the objetivo recibe off its clothes and dives the next time it sees a body of water. If the objetivo does not see a body of water before the spell ends, the specific activity isn't performed.

Any damage done to the objetivo by you or an aliado ends the spell for that criatura.
higher_level:
When using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 24 horas. When using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 7 days. When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 1 year. When using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, the suggestion lasts until it is dispelled.

Any use of a 5th-level or higher espacio de conjuro grants a duration that doesn't require Concentración.

name: Summon Clockwork Beast
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork Once per day, you can cast this ritual to summon a Tiny clockwork beast doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep. When its puntos de golpe are reduced to 0, it crumbles into a heap of gears and springs.

name: Summon Eldritch Servitor
desc:
You summon eldritch aberrations that appear in unoccupied spaces you can see within range. Choose one of the following options for what appears:
* Two [ghasts of Leng](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghast-of-leng)
* One [shantak](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shantak)

When the summoned criaturas appear, you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en un éxito, the criaturas are friendly to you and your aliados. en un fallo, the criaturas are friendly to no one and attack the nearest criaturas, pursuing and fighting for as long as possible.

Roll initiative for the summoned criaturas, which take their own turns as a group. If friendly to you, they obey your verbal commands (no action required by you to issue a command), or they attack the nearest living criatura if they are not commanded otherwise.

Each ronda when you maintain Concentración on the spell, you debe realizar a successful CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the end of your turn or take 1d4 daño psíquico. If the total of this damage exceeds your Sabiduría score, you gain 1 point of Void taint and you are afflicted with a form of short-term madness. The same penalty applies when el daño exceeds twice your Sabiduría score, three times your Sabiduría score, and so forth, if you maintain Concentración for that long.

A summoned criatura disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends. If you stop concentrating on the spell before 1 hora has elapsed, the criaturas become uncontrolled and hostile until they disappear 1d6 rondas later or until they are killed.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 7th- or 8th-level espacio de conjuro, you can summon four [ghasts of Leng](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghast-of-leng) or a [hound of Tindalos](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/hound-of-tindalos). When you cast it with a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, you can summon five [ghasts of Leng](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghast-of-leng) or a [nightgaunt](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/nightgaunt).
material: a vial of the caster’s blood and a silver dagger
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Summon Old One's Avatar
desc: Deep Magic: void magic You summon a worldly incarnation of a Great Old One, which appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range. This avatar manifests as a Void speaker (criatura Codex NPC) augmented by boons from the Void. Choose one of the following options for the type of avatar that appears (other options might be available if the GM allows): Avatar of Cthulhu. The Void speaker is a goat-man with the ability to cast black goat's blessing and unseen strangler at will. Avatar of Yog-Sothoth. The Void speaker is a human with 1d4 + 1 flesh warps and the ability to cast gift of Azathoth and thunderwave at will. When the avatar appears, you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. If it succeeds, the avatar is friendly to you and your aliados. If it fails, the avatar is friendly to no one and attacks the nearest criatura to it, pursuing and fighting for as long as possible. Roll initiative for the avatar, which recibe its own turn. If friendly to you, it obeys verbal commands you issue to it (no action required by you). If the avatar has no command, it attacks the nearest criatura. Each ronda you maintain Concentración on the spell, you debe realizar a successful CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 1d6 daño psíquico. If the cumulative total of this damage exceeds your Sabiduría score, you gain one point of Void taint and you are afflicted with a short-term madness. The same penalty recurs when el daño exceeds twice your Sabiduría, three times your Sabiduría, etc. The avatar disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends. If you stop concentrating on the spell before an hora has elapsed, the avatar becomes uncontrolled and hostile and doesn't disappear until 1d6 rondas later or it's killed.
dnd_class: Wizard, Warlock, Sorceror, Druid, Cleric, Bard

name: Summon Star
desc: You summon a friendly star from the heavens to do your bidding. It appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range and recibe the form of a glowing humanoid with long white hair. todas las criaturas other than you who view the star debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be hechizado for the duration of the spell. A criatura hechizado in this way can repeat the tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the end of each of its turns. en un éxito, the criatura is no longer hechizado and is immune to the effect of this casting of the spell. In all other ways, the star is equivalent to a [deva](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/deva). It entiende and obeys verbal commands you give it. If you do not give the star a command, it defends itself and attacks the last criatura that attacked it. The star disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.

name: Sunbeam
desc: A beam of brilliant ligera flashes out from your hand in a 5-pie-wide, 60-pie-long line. cada criatura in the line debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 6d8 daño radiante and is cegado until your next turn. en una salvación exitosa, it recibe half as much damage and isn't cegado by this spell. Undead and oozes have desventaja on this tirada de salvación. You can create a new line of radiance as your action on any turn until the spell ends. For the duration, a mote of brilliant radiance shines in your hand. It sheds bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. This ligera is sunlight.
material: A magnifying glass.

name: Sunbeam
desc:
Oozes and undead have desventaja on saving throws made to resist this spell. A beam of radiante sunlight streaks from your hand. cada criatura in the area recibe 6d8 daño radiante and is cegado for 1 ronda.

Until the spell ends, you can use an action on subsequent turns to create a new beam of sunlight and a mote of brilliant radiance lingers on your hand, shedding bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera an additional 30 pies. This ligera is sunlight.
higher_level: When using an 8th-level espacio de conjuro el daño increases by 1d8.

name: Sunburst
desc: Brilliant sunlight flashes in a 60-pie radius centered on a point you choose within range. cada criatura in that ligera debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 12d6 daño radiante and is cegado for 1 minuto. en una salvación exitosa, it recibe half as much damage and isn't cegado by this spell. Undead and oozes have desventaja on this tirada de salvación. A criatura cegado by this spell makes another tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns. en una salvación exitosa, it is no longer cegado. This spell dispels any darkness in its area that was created by a spell.
material: fuego and a piece of sunstone.

name: Sunburst
desc:
Oozes and undead have desventaja on saving throws made to resist this spell. You create a burst of radiante sunlight that fills the area. cada criatura in the area recibe 12d6 daño radiante and is cegado for 1 minuto. A criatura cegado by this spell repeats its tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the blindness en una salvación exitosa.

This spell dispels any mágico darkness in its area.
higher_level: When using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro el daño increases by 2d6.

name: Suppress Regeneration
desc: You temporarily remove the ability to regenerate from a criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo can't regain puntos de golpe from the Regeneration trait or similar spell or trait for the duration. The objetivo can receive mágico healing or regain puntos de golpe from other traits, spells, or actions, as normal. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un éxito, the spell ends on the objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: Surge Dampener
desc: Using your Fuerza of will, you cause una criatura other than yourself that you touch to become so firmly entrenched within reality that it is protected from the effects of a chaos magic surge. The protected criatura can make a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Carisma to negate the effect of a chaos magic surge that does not normally allow a tirada de salvación, or it gains ventaja on a tirada de salvación that is normally allowed. Once the protected criatura makes a successful tirada de salvación allowed by **surge dampener**, the spell ends.

name: Surprise Blessing
desc:
You touch a willing criatura and choose one of the conditions listed below that the criatura is currently subjected to. The condition’s normal effect on the objetivo is suspended, and the indicated effect applies instead. This spell’s effect on the objetivo lasts for the duration of the original condition or until the spell ends. If this spell ends before the original condition’s duration expires, you become affected by the condition for as long as it lasts, even if you were not the original recipient of the condition.

***cegado:*** The objetivo gains vista verdadera out to a range of 10 pies and can see 10 pies into the Ethereal Plane.

***hechizado:*** The objetivo’s Carisma score becomes 19, unless it is already higher than 19, and it gains immunity to charm effects.

***asustado:*** The objetivo emits a 10-pie-radius aura of dread. cada criatura the objetivo designates that starts its turn in the aura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado of the objetivo. A criatura asustado in this way that starts its turn outside the aura repeats the tirada de salvación, ending the condition on itself en un éxito.

***paralizado:*** The objetivo can use one extra acción adicional or reacción per ronda.

***petrificado:*** The objetivo gains a +2 bonus to AC.

***envenenado:*** The objetivo heals 2d6 puntos de golpe at the start of its next turn, and it gains immunity to daño de veneno and the envenenado condition.

***aturdido:*** The objetivo has ventaja on Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma saving throws.

name: Symbol
desc:
When you cast this spell, you inscribe a harmful glyph either on a surface (such as a section of floor, a wall, or a table) or within an object that can be closed to conceal the glyph (such as a book, a scroll, or a treasure chest). If you choose a surface, the glyph can cover an area of the surface no larger than 10 pies in diameter. If you choose an object, that object must remain in its place; if the object is moved more than 10 pies from where you cast this spell, the glyph is broken, and the spell ends without being triggered. The glyph is nearly invisible, requiring an Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to find it. You decide what triggers the glyph when you cast the spell. For glyphs inscribed on a surface, the most typical triggers include touching or stepping on the glyph, removing another object covering it, approaching within a certain distance of it, or manipulating the object that holds it. For glyphs inscribed within an object, the most Común triggers are opening the object, approaching within a certain distance of it, or seeing or reading the glyph. You can further refine the trigger so the spell is activated only under certain circumstances or according to a criatura's physical characteristics (such as height or weight), or physical kind (for example, the ward could be set to affect hags or shapechangers). You can also specify criaturas that don't trigger the glyph, such as those who say a certain password. When you inscribe the glyph, choose one of the options below for its effect. Once triggered, the glyph glows, filling a 60-pie-radius sphere with dim ligera for 10 minutos, after which time the spell ends. cada criatura in the sphere when the glyph activates is targeted by its effect, as is a criatura that enters the sphere for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there.

**Death.** Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 10d 10 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa

 **Discord.** Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, a objetivo bickers and argues with other criaturas for 1 minuto. During this time, it is incapable of meaningful communication and has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks.

**Fear.** Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría and becomes asustado for 1 minuto en una salvación fallida. While asustado, the objetivo drops whatever it is holding and must move at least 30 pies away from the glyph on each of its turns, if able.

**Hopelessness.** Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo is overwhelmed with despair for 1 minuto. During this time, it can't attack or objetivo any criatura with harmful abilities, spells, or other mágico effects.

**Insanity.** Each objetivo debe realizar an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo is driven insane for 1 minuto. An insane criatura can't take actions, can't understand what other criaturas say, can't read, and speaks only in gibberish. The DM controls its movement, which is erratic.

**Pain.** Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución and becomes incapacitado with excruciating pain for 1 minuto en una salvación fallida.

**Sleep.** Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría and falls inconsciente for 10 minutos en una salvación fallida. A criatura awakens if it recibe damage or if someone uses an action to shake or slap it awake.

**Stunning.** Each objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría and becomes aturdido for 1 minuto en una salvación fallida.
material: Mercury, phosphorus, and powdered diamond and opal with a total value of at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Symbol
desc:
You inscribe a potent glyph on the objetivo, setting a mágico trap for your enemigos. If the glyph is moved more than 10 pies from its original position, or if it comes within 20 pies of another glyph that you have cast, the spell ends. Finding the Tiny glyph requires an Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

Describe the actions a criatura must perform to trigger the spell, such as approaching within a certain distance, opening or touching the object the glyph is inscribed on, or seeing or reading the glyph. The criatura must have a clear path to the glyph to trigger it. You can specify certain criaturas which don't trigger the spell, such as those with a certain appearance or those who speak a certain phrase. Once the glyph is triggered, the spell ends.

When triggered, the glyph sheds dim ligera in a 60-pie radius for 10 minutos, after which the spell ends. cada criatura within the sphere's area is targeted by the glyph, as are criaturas that enter the sphere for the first time on a turn.

When you cast the spell, choose one of the following effects.

Death: criaturas in the area make a tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 10d10 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much en una salvación exitosa.

Discord: criaturas in the area make a tirada de salvación de Constitución or bicker and argue with other criaturas for 1 minuto. While bickering, a criatura cannot meaningfully communicate and it has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks.

Confused: criaturas in the area make an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia or become confused for 1 minuto.

Fear: criaturas in the area make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or are asustado for 1 minuto.

While asustado, a criatura drops whatever it is holding and must move at least 30 pies away from the glyph on each of its turns.

Hopelessness: criaturas in the area make a tirada de salvación de Carisma or become overwhelmed with despair for 1 minuto. While despairing, a criatura can't attack or objetivo any criatura with harmful features, spells, traits, or other mágico effects.

Pain: criaturas in the area make a tirada de salvación de Constitución or become incapacitado for 1 minuto.

Sleep: criaturas in the area make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or fall inconsciente for 10 minutos.

A sleeping criatura awakens if it recibe damage or an action is used to wake it.

Stunning: criaturas in the area make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become aturdido for 1 minuto.

name: Symbol of Sorcery
desc: You draw an arcane symbol on an object, wall, or other surface at least 5 pies wide. When a criatura other than you approaches within 5 pies of the symbol, that act triggers an arcane explosion. cada criatura in a 60-pie cone debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be aturdido. A aturdido criatura repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en una salvación exitosa. After this symbol explodes or when the duration expires, its power is spent and the spell ends.
material: a stick of incense worth 20 gp

name: Talons of a Hungry Land
desc:
You cause three parallel lines of thick, flared obsidian spikes to erupt from the ground. They appear within range on a solid surface, last for the duration, and provide three‐quarters cover to criaturas behind them. You can make lines (up to 60 pies long, 10 pies high, and 5 pies thick) or form a circle (20 pies in diameter, up to 15 pies high and 5 pies thick).

When the lines appear, cada criatura in their area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. criaturas recibe 8d8 daño cortante, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa.

A criatura can move through the lines at the risk of cutting itself on the exposed edges. For every 1 pie a criatura moves through the lines, it must spend 4 pies of movement. Furthermore, the first time a criatura enters the lines on a turn or ends its turn there, the criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. It recibe 8d8 daño cortante en un fallo, or half as much damage en un éxito.

When you stop concentrating on the spell, you can cause the obsidian spikes to explode, dealing 5d8 daño cortante to any criatura within 15 pies, or half as much damage on a successful Destreza save.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, el daño from all effects of the lines increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Targeting Foreknowledge
desc: Twisting the knife, slapping with the butt of the spear, cortante out again as you recover from a lunge, and countless other double-strike maneuvers are skillful ways to get more from your weapon. By casting this spell as a acción adicional after making a successful ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma, you deal an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon’s type to the objetivo. In addition, if your weapon tirada de ataque was a 19 or higher, it is a critical hit and increases the weapon’s damage dice as normal. The extra damage from this spell is not increased on a critical hit.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Tearful Sonnet
desc:
You quietly play a tragedy, a song that fills those around you with mágico sorrow. cada criatura in the area makes a tirada de salvación de Carisma at the start of its turn. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 2d4 daño psíquico, it spends its action that turn crying, and it can't take reactions until the start of its next turn. criaturas that are immune to the hechizado condition automatically succeed on this tirada de salvación.

If a criatura other than you hears the entire song (remaining within the spell's area from the casting through the duration) it is so wracked with sadness that it is aturdido for 1d4 rondas.

You cannot cast another spell through your spellcasting focus while concentrating on this spell.
higher_level: el daño increases by 2d4 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Telekinesis
desc:
You gain the ability to move or manipulate criaturas or objects by thought. When you cast the spell, and as your action each ronda for the duration, you can exert your will on una criatura or object that you can see within range, causing the appropriate effect below. You can affect the same objetivo ronda after ronda, or choose a new one at any time. If you switch objetivos, the prior objetivo is no longer affected by the spell.

**criatura.** You can try to move a Huge or smaller criatura. Make an ability check with your spellcasting ability contested by the criatura's Fuerza check. If you win the contest, you move the criatura up to 30 pies in any direction, including upward but not beyond the range of this spell. Until the end of your next turn, the criatura is apresado in your telekinetic grip. A criatura lifted upward is suspended in mid-air. On subsequent rondas, you can use your action to attempt to maintain your telekinetic grip on the criatura by repeating the contest.

**Object.** You can try to move an object that weighs up to 1,000 pounds. If the object isn't being worn or carried, you automatically move it up to 30 pies in any direction, but not beyond the range of this spell. If the object is worn or carried by a criatura, you debe realizar an ability check with your spellcasting ability contested by that criatura's Fuerza check. If you succeed, you pull the object away from that criatura and can move it up to 30 pies in any direction but not beyond the range of this spell. You can exert fine control on objects with your telekinetic grip, such as manipulating a simple tool, opening a door or a container, stowing or retrieving an item from an open container, or pouring the contents from a vial.

name: Telekinesis
desc:
You move the objetivo with the power of your mind.

Until the spell ends you can use an action on subsequent turns to pick a new objetivo or continue to affect the same objetivo. Depending on whether you objetivo a criatura or an object, the spell has the following effects:

**criatura.** The objetivo makes a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro or it is moved up to 30 pies in any direction and apresado (even in mid-air) until the end of your next turn. You cannot move a objetivo beyond the range of the spell.

**Object.** You move the objetivo 30 pies in any direction. If the object is worn or carried by a criatura, that criatura can make a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If the objetivo fails, you pull the object away from that criatura and can move it up to 30 pies in any direction, but not beyond the range of the spell.

You can use telekinesis to finely manipulate objects as though you were using them yourself—you can open doors and unscrew lids, dip a quill in ink and make it write, and so on.
higher_level: When using an 8th-level espacio de conjuro, this spell does not require your Concentración.

name: Telepathic Bond
desc: You forge a telepathic link among up to eight willing criaturas of your choice within range, psychically linking cada criatura to all the others for the duration. criaturas with Inteligencia scores of 2 or less aren't affected by this spell. Until the spell ends, the objetivos can communicate telepathically through the bond whether or not they have a Común language. The communication is possible over any distance, though it can't extend to other planes of existence.
material: Pieces of eggshell from two different kinds of criaturas

name: Telepathic Bond
desc: Until the spell ends, a telepathic link connects the minds of the objetivos. So long as they remain on the same plane of existence, objetivos may communicate telepathically with each other regardless of language and across any distance.
higher_level: The spell's duration increases by 1d4 horas for each slot level above 5th.

name: Teleport
desc:
This spell instantly transports you and up to eight willing criaturas of your choice that you can see within range, or a single object that you can see within range, to a destination you select. If you objetivo an object, it must be able to fit entirely inside a 10-pie cube, and it can't be held or carried by an unwilling criatura. The destination you choose must be known to you, and it must be on the same plane of existence as you. Your familiarity with the destination determines whether you arrive there successfully. The DM rolls d100 and consults the table.

**Familiarity.** "Permanent circle" means a permanent teleportation circle whose sigil sequence you know. "Associated object" means that you possess an object taken from the desired destination within the last six months, such as a book from a wizard's library, bed linen from a royal suite, or a chunk of marble from a lich's secret tomb. "Very familiar" is a place you have been very often, a place you have carefully studied, or a place you can see when you cast the spell. "Seen casually" is someplace you have seen more than once but with which you aren't very familiar. "Viewed once" is a place you have seen once, possibly using magic. "Description" is a place whose location and appearance you know through someone else's description, perhaps from a map. "False destination" is a place that doesn't exist. Perhaps you tried to scry an enemigo's sanctum but instead viewed an illusion, or you are attempting to teleport to a familiar location that no longer exists.

**On objetivo.** You and your group (or the objetivo object) appear where you want to.

**Off objetivo.** You and your group (or the objetivo object) appear a random distance away from the destination in a random direction. Distance off objetivo is 1d10 × 1d10 percent of the distance that was to be traveled. For example, if you tried to travel 120 millas, landed off objetivo, and rolled a 5 and 3 on the two d10s, then you would be off objetivo by 15 percent, or 18 millas. The GM determines the direction off objetivo randomly by rolling a d8 and designating 1 as north, 2 as northeast, 3 as east, and so on around the points of the compass. If you were teleporting to a coastal city and wound up 18 millas out at sea, you could be in trouble.

**Similar Area.** You and your group (or the objetivo object) wind up in a different area that's visually or thematically similar to the objetivo area. If you are heading for your home laboratory, for example, you might wind up in another wizard's laboratory or in an alchemical supply shop that has many of the same tools and implements as your laboratory. Generally, you appear in the closest similar place, but since the spell has no range limit, you could conceivably wind up anywhere on the plane.

**Mishap.** The spell's unpredictable magic results in a difficult journey. Each teleporting criatura (or the objetivo object) recibe 3d10 daño de fuerza, and the GM rerolls on the table to see where you wind up (multiple mishaps can occur, dealing damage each time).

name: Teleport
desc:
You teleport the objetivos instantly across vast distances. When you cast this spell, choose a destination. You must know the location you're teleporting to, and it must be on the same plane of existence.

Teleportation is difficult magic and you may arrive off-objetivo or somewhere else entirely depending on how familiar you are with the location you're teleporting to. When you teleport, the Narrator rolls 1d100 and consults Table: Teleport Familiarity.

Familiarity is determined as follows: Permanent Circle: A permanent teleportation circle whose sigil sequence you know (see teleportation circle).

Associated Object: You have an object taken from the objetivo location within the last 6 months, such as a piece of wood from the pew in a grand temple or a pinch of grave dust from a vampire's hidden redoubt.

Very Familiar: A place you have frequented, carefully studied, or can see at the time you cast the spell.

Seen Casually: A place you have seen more than once but don't know well. This could be a castle you've passed by but never visited, or the farms you look down on from your tower of ivory.

Viewed Once: A place you have seen once, either in person or via magic.

Description: A place you only know from someone else's description (whether spoken, written, or even marked on a map).

False Destination: A place that doesn't actually exist. This typically happens when someone deceives you, either intentionally (like a wizard creating an illusion to hide their actual tower) or unintentionally (such as when the location you attempt to teleport to no longer exists).

Your arrival is determined as follows: On objetivo: You and your objetivos arrive exactly where you mean to.

Off objetivo: You and your objetivos arrive some distance away from the objetivo in a random direction. The further you travel, the further away you are likely to arrive. You arrive off objetivo by a number of millas equal to 1d10 × 1d10 percent of the total distance of your trip.

If you tried to travel 1, 000 millas and roll a 2 and 4 on the d10s, you land 6 percent off objetivo and arrive 60 millas away from your intended destination in a random direction. Roll 1d8 to randomly determine the direction: 1—north, 2 —northeast, 3 —east, 4 —southeast, 5—south, 6 —southwest, 7—west, 8—northwest.

Similar Location: You and your objetivos arrive in a different location that somehow resembles the objetivo area. If you tried to teleport to your favorite inn, you might end up at a different inn, or in a room with much of the same decor.

Typically you appear at the closest similar location, but that is not always the case.

Mishap: The spell's magic goes awry, and each teleporting criatura or object recibe 3d10 daño de fuerza. The Narrator rerolls on the table to determine where you arrive. When multiple mishaps occur objetivos take damage each time.

name: Teleportation Circle
desc: As you cast the spell, you draw a 10-pie-diameter circle on the ground inscribed with sigils that link your location to a permanent teleportation circle of your choice whose sigil sequence you know and that is on the same plane of existence as you. A shimmering portal opens within the circle you drew and remains open until the end of your next turn. Any criatura that enters the portal instantly appears within 5 pies of the destination circle or in the nearest unoccupied space if that space is occupied. Many major temples, guilds, and other important places have permanent teleportation circles inscribed somewhere within their confines. Each such circle includes a unique sigil sequence-a string of mágico runes arranged in a particular pattern. When you first gain the ability to cast this spell, you learn the sigil sequences for two destinations on the Material Plane, determined by the DM. You can learn additional sigil sequences during your adventures. You can commit a new sigil sequence to memory after studying it for 1 minuto. You can create a permanent teleportation circle by casting this spell in the same location every day for one year. You need not use the circle to teleport when you cast the spell in this way.
material: Rare chalks and inks infused with precious gems with 50 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: Teleportation Circle
desc:
You draw a 10-pie diameter circle on the ground and open within it a shimmering portal to a permanent teleportation circle elsewhere in the world. The portal remains open until the end of your next turn. Any criatura that enters the portal instantly travels to the destination circle.

Permanent teleportation circles are commonly found within major temples, guilds, and other important locations. Each circle has a unique sequence of mágico runes inscribed in a certain pattern called a sigil sequence.

When you cast teleportation circle, you inscribe runes that match the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle you know. When you first gain the ability to cast this spell, you learn the sigil sequences for 2 destinations on the Material Plane, determined by the Narrator. You can learn a new sigil sequence with 1 minuto of observation and study.

Casting the spell in the same location every day for a year creates a permanent teleportation circle with its own unique sigil sequence. You do not need to teleport when casting the spell to make a permanent destination.

name: Thaumaturgy
desc:
You manifest a minor wonder, a sign of supernatural power, within range. You create one of the following mágico effects within range. 
- Your voice booms up to three times as loud as normal for 1 minuto. 
- You cause flames to flicker, brighten, dim, or change color for 1 minuto. 
- You cause harmless tremors in the ground for 1 minuto. 
- You create an Instantáneo sound that originates from a point of your choice within range, such as a rumble of trueno, the cry of a raven, or ominous whispers. 
- You instantaneously cause an unlocked door or window to fly open or slam shut. 
- You alter the appearance of your eyes for 1 minuto. 
If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to three of its 1-minuto effects active at a time, and you can dismiss such an effect as an action.

name: Thaumaturgy
desc:
You draw upon divine power and create a minor divine effect. When you cast the spell, choose one of the following:

* Your voice booms up to three times louder than normal
* You cause flames to flicker, brighten, dim, or change color
* You send harmless tremors throughout the ground.
* You create an Instantáneo sound, like ethereal chimes, sinister laughter, or a dragon's roar at a point of your choosing within range.
* You instantaneously cause an unlocked door or window to fly open or slam shut.
* You alter the appearance of your eyes.

Lingering effects last until the spell ends. If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to 3 of the lingering effects active at a time, and can dismiss an effect at any time on your turn.

name: The Black God's Blessing
desc: Chernobog doesn't care that the Night Cauldron only focuses on one aspect of his dominion. After all, eternal night leads perfectly well to destruction and murder, especially by the desperate fools seeking to survive in the new, lightless world. Having devotees at the forefront of the mayhem suits him, so he allows a small measure of his power to infuse worthy souls. After contacting the Black God, the ritual caster makes a respectful yet forceful demand for him to deposit some of his power into the criatura that is the objetivo of the ritual. For Chernobog to comply with this demand, the caster debe realizar a successful CD 20 spellcasting check. If the check fails, the spell fails and the caster and the spell's objetivo become permanently vulnerable to fuego; this vulnerability can be ended with remove curse or comparable magic. If the spell succeeds, the objetivo criatura gains visión en la oscuridad (60 pies) and immunity to frío. Chernobog retains the privilege of revoking these gifts if the recipient ever wavers in devotion to him.

name: Thin the Ice
desc: You objetivo a point within range. That point becomes the top center of a cylinder 10 pies in radius and 40 pies deep. All ice inside that area melts immediately. The uppermost layer of ice seems to remain intact and sturdy, but it covers a 40-pie-deep pit filled with ice water. A successful Sabiduría (Supervivencia) check or passive Percepción check against your CD de salvación del conjuro notices the thin ice. If a criatura weighing more than 20 pounds (or a greater weight specified by you when casting the spell) treads over the cylinder or is already standing on it, the ice gives way. Unless the criatura makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza, it falls into the icy water, taking 2d6 daño de frío plus whatever other problems are caused by water, by armor, or by being drenched in a freezing environment. The water gradually refreezes normally.
material: a piece of sunstone

name: Thousand Darts
desc: You launch thousands of needlelike darts in a 5-pie‐wide line that is 120 pies long. cada criatura in the line recibe 6d6 daño perforante, or half as much damage if it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. The first criatura struck by the darts makes the tirada de salvación with desventaja.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a set of mithral darts worth 25 gp

name: Threshold Slip
desc:
The threshold of a doorway, the sill of a window, the junction where the floor meets the wall, the intersection of two walls—these are all points of travel for you.
