When you cast this spell, you can step into the junction of two surfaces, slip through the boundary of the Material Plane, and reappear in an unoccupied space with another junction you can see within 60 pies.
  You can take one willing criatura of your size or smaller that you're touching with you. The objetivo junction must have unoccupied spaces for both of you to enter when you reappear or the spell fails.

name: Throes of Ecstasy
desc: Choose a humanoid that you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or become overcome with euphoria, rendering it incapacitado for the duration. The objetivo automatically fails Sabiduría saving throws, and attack rolls against the objetivo have ventaja. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends on the objetivo and it gains one level of agotamiento. If the spell continues for its maximum duration, the objetivo gains three levels of agotamiento when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional humanoid for each slot level above 3rd. The humanoids must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.
material: a hazel or oak wand

name: Thunder Bolt
desc: You cast a knot of trueno at one enemigo. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. If it hits, the objetivo recibe 1d8 daño de trueno and can’t use reactions until the start of your next turn.

name: Thunderclap
desc:
You clap your hands, emitting a peal of trueno. cada criatura within 20 pies of you recibe 8d4 daño de trueno and is ensordecido for 1d8 rondas, or it recibe half as much damage and isn’t ensordecido if it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. On a tirada de salvación that fails by 5 or more, the criatura is also aturdido for 1 ronda.

This spell doesn’t function in an area affected by a [silence](https://api.open5e.com/spells/silence) spell. Very brittle material such as crystal might be shattered if it’s within range, at the GM’s discretion; a character holding such an object can protect it from harm by making a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza.

name: Thunderous Charge
desc: With a thunderous battle cry, you move up to 10 pies in a straight line and make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma. If it hits, you can choose to either gain a +5 bonus on the attack’s damage or shove the objetivo 10 pies.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the distance you can move increases by 10 pies, and the attack causa an additional 1d6 daño de trueno, for each slot level above 1st.

name: Thunderous Stampede
desc: This spell acts as [thunderous charge](https://api.open5e.com/spells/thunderous-charge), but affecting up to three objetivos within range, including yourself. A objetivo other than you must use its reacción to move and attack under the effect of thunderous stampede.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the distance your objetivos can move increases by 10 pies, and the attack causa an additional 1d6 daño de trueno, for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Thunderous Wave
desc: You initiate a shock wave centered at a point you designate within range. The wave explodes outward into a 30-pie-radius sphere. This fuerza causa no damage directly, but every criatura the wave passes through debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura is pushed 30 pies and knocked derribado; if it strikes a solid obstruction, it also recibe 5d6 daño contundente. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura is pushed 15 pies and not knocked derribado, and it recibe 2d6 daño contundente if it strikes an obstruction. The spell also emits a thunderous boom that can be heard within 400 pies.

name: Thunderstorm
desc: You touch a willing criatura, and it becomes surrounded by a roiling storm cloud 30 pies in diameter, erupting with (harmless) trueno and rayo. The criatura gains a volando Velocidad of 60 pies. The cloud heavily obscures the criatura inside it from view, though it is transparent to the criatura itself.
material: a piece of rayo-fused glass

name: Thunderwave
desc: A wave of thunderous fuerza sweeps out from you. cada criatura in a 15-pie cube originating from you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 2d8 daño de trueno and is pushed 10 pies away from you. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much damage and isn't pushed. In addition, unsecured objects that are completely within the area of effect are automatically pushed 10 pies away from you by the spell's effect, and the spell emits a thunderous boom audible out to 300 pies.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Thunderwave
desc:
You create a wave of thunderous fuerza, damaging criaturas and pushing them back. criaturas in the area take 2d8 daño de trueno and are pushed 10 pies away from you.

Unsecured objects completely within the area are also pushed 10 pies away from you. The thunderous boom of the spell is audible out to 300 pies.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Tick Stop
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You speak a word and the objetivo construct can take one action or acción adicional on its next turn, but not both. The construct is immune to further tick stops from the same caster for 24 horas.

name: Tidal Barrier
desc: A swirling wave of seawater surrounds you, crashing and rolling in a 10-pie radius around your space. The area is difficult terrain, and a criatura that starts its turn there or that enters it for the first time on a turn debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is pushed 10 pies away from you and its Velocidad is reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.
material: a piece of driftwood

name: Time Jump
desc: You touch a construct and throw it forward in time if it fails a tirada de salvación de Constitución. The construct disappears for 1d4 + 1 rondas, during which time it cannot act or be acted upon in any way. When the construct returns, it is unaware that any time has passed.

name: Time Loop
desc:
You capture a criatura within range in a loop of time. The objetivo is teleported to the space where it began its most recent turn. The objetivo then makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends. en una salvación fallida, the criatura must repeat the activities it undertook on its previous turn, following the sequence of moves and actions to the best of its ability. It doesn’t need to move along the same path or attack the same objetivo, but if it moved and then attacked on its previous turn, its only option is to move and then attack on this turn. If the space where the objetivo began its previous turn is occupied or if it’s impossible for the objetivo to take the same action (if it cast a spell but is now unable to do so, for example), the objetivo becomes incapacitado.

An affected objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. For as long as the spell lasts, the objetivo teleports back to its starting point at the start of each of its turns, and it must repeat the same sequence of moves and actions.
material: a metal loop
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Time Slippage
desc: You ensnare a criatura within range in an insidious trap, causing different parts of its body to function at different speeds. The criatura debe realizar an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en una salvación fallida, it is aturdido until the end of its next turn. en un éxito, the criatura’s Velocidad is halved and it has desventaja on attack rolls and saving throws until the end of its next turn. The criatura repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, with the same effects for success and failure. In addition, the criatura has desventaja on Fuerza or Destreza saving throws but ventaja on Constitución or Carisma saving throws for the spell’s duration (a side effect of the chronal anomaly suffusing its body). The spell ends if the criatura makes three successful saves in a row.
material: the heart of a chaotic criatura of challenge rating 5 or higher, worth 500 gp

name: Time Step
desc: You briefly step forward in time. You disappear from your location and reappear at the start of your next turn in a location of your choice that you can see within 30 pies of the space you disappeared from. You can’t be affected by anything that happens during the time you’re missing, and you aren’t aware of anything that happens during that time.

name: Time Stop
desc: You briefly stop the flow of time for everyone but yourself. No time passes for other criaturas, while you take 1d4 + 1 turns in a row, during which you can use actions and move as normal. This spell ends if one of the actions you use during this period, or any effects that you create during this period, affects a criatura other than you or an object being worn or carried by someone other than you. In addition, the spell ends if you move to a place more than 1,000 pies from the location where you cast it.

name: Time Stop
desc:
You stop time, granting yourself extra time to take actions. When you cast the spell, the world is frozen in place while you take 1d4 + 1 turns in a row, during which you can use actions and move as normal.

The spell ends if you move more than 1, 000 pies from where you cast the spell, or if you affect either a criatura other than yourself or an object worn or carried by someone else.

name: Time Vortex
desc:
This spell destabilizes the flow of time, enabling you to create a vortex of temporal fluctuations that are visible as a spherical distortion with a 10-pie radius, centered on a point within range. cada criatura in the area when you cast the spell debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be affected by the time vortex. While the spell lasts, a criatura that enters the sphere or starts its turn inside the sphere must also succeed on a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be affected. en una salvación exitosa, it becomes immune to this casting of the spell.

An affected criatura can’t take reactions and rolls a d10 at the start of its turn to determine its behavior for that turn.

| D10 | EFFECT |
|---|---|
| 1–2 | The criatura is affected as if by a slow spell until the start of its next turn. |
| 3–5 | The criatura is aturdido until the start of its next turn. |
| 6–8 | The criatura’s current initiative result is reduced by 5. The criatura begins using this new initiative result in the next ronda. Multiple occurrences of this effect for the same criatura are cumulative. |
| 9–10 | The criatura’s Velocidad is halved (ronda up to the nearest 5-pie increment) until the start of its next turn. |

You can move the temporal vortex 10 pies each ronda as a acción adicional. An affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the radius of the sphere increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 4th.

name: Time in a Bottle
desc: You designate a spot within your sight. Time comes under your control in a 20-pie radius centered on that spot. You can freeze it, reverse it, or move it forward by as much as 1 minuto as long as you maintain Concentración. Nothing and no one, yourself included, can enter the field or affect what happens inside it. You can choose to end the effect at any moment as an action on your turn.

name: Timeless Engine
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You halt the normal processes of degradation and wear in a no mágico clockwork device, making normal maintenance unnecessary and slowing fuel consumption to 1/10th of normal. For mágico devices and constructs, the spell greatly reduces wear. A mágico clockwork device, machine, or criatura that normally needs daily maintenance only needs care once a year; if it previously needed monthly maintenance, it now requires attention only once a decade.

name: Timely Distraction
desc:
You call forth a swirling, crackling wave of constantly shifting pops, flashes, and swept-up debris. This chaos can confound una criatura. If the objetivo gets a failure on a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, roll a d4 and consult the following table to determine the result. An affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Otherwise, the spell ends when its duration expires.

| D4 | Effect |
|---|---|
| 1 | cegado |
| 2 | aturdido |
| 3 | ensordecido |
| 4 | derribado |
material: a handful of sand or dirt arrojadiza in the air

name: Tiny Hut
desc: A 10-pie-radius immobile dome of fuerza springs into existence around and above you and remains stationary for the duration. The spell ends if you leave its area. Nine criaturas of Medium size or smaller can fit inside the dome with you. The spell fails if its area includes a larger criatura or more than nine criaturas. criaturas and objects within the dome when you cast this spell can move through it freely. All other criaturas and objects are barred from passing through it. Spells and other mágico effects can't extend through the dome or be cast through it. The atmosphere inside the space is comfortable and dry, regardless of the weather outside. Until the spell ends, you can command the interior to become dimly lit or dark. The dome is opaque from the outside, of any color you choose, but it is transparent from the inside.
material: A small crystal bead.

name: Tiny Hut
desc:
You create an immobile dome of protective fuerza that provides shelter and can be used as a safe haven (Chapter 4: Exploration in Trials & Treasures). The dome is of a color of your choosing, can't be seen through from the outside, is transparent on the inside, and can fit up to 10 Medium criaturas (including you) within.

The dome prevents inclement weather and environmental effects from passing through it, though criaturas and objects may pass through freely. Spells and other mágico effects can't cross the dome in either direction, and the dome provides a comfortable dry interior no matter the conditions outside of it. You can command the interior to become dimly lit or dark at any time on your turn.

The spell fails if a Large criatura or more than 10 criaturas are inside the dome. The spell ends when you leave the dome.

name: Tireless
desc: You grant machinelike stamina to a criatura you touch for the duration of the spell. The objetivo requires no food or drink or rest. It can move at three times its normal Velocidad overland and perform three times the usual amount of labor. The objetivo is not protected from fatigue or agotamiento caused by a mágico effect.
material: an ever-wound spring worth 50 gp

name: Toadstool Ring
desc:
You coax a toadstool ring to sprout from the ground. A criatura of your choice can sit in the center of the ring and meditate for the duration, catching glimpses of the past, present, and future. The criatura can ask up to three questions: one about the past, one about the present, and one about the future. The GM offers truthful answers in the form of dreamlike visions that may be subject to interpretation. When the spell ends, the toadstools turn black and dissolve back into the earth.
  If you cast the spell two or more times before finishing your next descanso largo, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that the meditating criatura gets a random vision unrelated to the question. The GM makes this roll in secret.

name: Tongue Tied
desc: You make a choking motion while pointing at a objetivo, which debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become unable to communicate verbally. The objetivo’s speech becomes garbled, and it has desventaja on Carisma checks that require speech. The criatura can cast a spell that has a verbal component only by making a successful Constitución check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. On a failed check, the criatura’s action is used but the espacio de conjuro isn’t expended.

name: Tongue of Sand
desc:
**Tongue of sand** is similar in many ways to [magic mouth](https://api.open5e.com/spells/magic-mouth). When you cast it, you implant a message in a quantity of sand. The sand must fill a space no smaller than 4 square pies and at least 2 inches deep. The message can be up to 25 words. You also decide the conditions that trigger the speaking of the message. When the message is triggered, a mouth forms in the sand and delivers the message in a raspy, whispered voice that can be heard by criaturas within 10 pies of the sand.

Additionally, **tongue of sand** has the ability to interact in a simple, brief manner with criaturas who hear its message. For up to 10 minutos after the message is triggered, questions addressed to the sand will be answered as you would answer them. Each answer can be no more than ten words long, and the spell ends after a second question is answered.

name: Tongues
desc: This spell grants the criatura you touch the ability to understand any spoken language it hears. Moreover, when the objetivo speaks, any criatura that knows at least one language and can hear the objetivo entiende what it says.
material: A small clay model of a ziggurat.

name: Tongues
desc: The objetivo entiende any words it hears, and when the objetivo speaks its words are understood by criaturas that know at least one language.

name: Toothless Beast
desc: You hinder the natural attacks of a criatura you can see within range. The criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, any time the criatura attacks with a bite, claw, slam, or other weapon that isn't manufactured, it must roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use the lower total. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the spell ends on the objetivo. This spell has no effect on constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: Torrent of Fire
desc: You harness the power of fuego contained in ley lines with this spell. You create a 60-pie cone of flame. criaturas in the cone take 6d6 daño de fuego, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. You can then flow along the flames, reappearing anywhere inside the cone’s area. This repositioning doesn’t count as movement and doesn’t trigger opportunity attacks.
material: a piece of obsidian

name: Touch of the Unliving
desc: Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura you can alcance. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d6 daño necrótico and, if it is not an undead criatura, it is paralizado until the end of its next turn. Until the spell ends, you can make the attack again on each of your turns as an action.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Toxic Pollen
desc: Upon casting this spell, one type of plant within range gains the ability to puff a cloud of pollen based on conditions you supply during casting. If the conditions are met, an affected plant sprays a pollen cloud in a 10-pie-radius sphere centered on it. criaturas in the area debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or become envenenado for 1 minuto. At the end of a envenenado criatura's turn, it can make a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un éxito, it is no longer envenenado. A plant can only release this pollen once within the duration.

name: Tracer
desc:
When you cast this spell and as a acción adicional on each of your turns until the spell ends, you can imbue a piece of munición you fuego from a ranged weapon with a tiny, invisible beacon. If a ataque a distancia roll with an imbued piece of munición hits a objetivo, the beacon is transferred to the objetivo. The weapon that fired the munición is attuned to the beacon and becomes warm to the touch when it points in the direction of the objetivo as long as the objetivo is on the same plane of existence as you. You can have only one *tracer* objetivo at a time. If you put a *tracer* on a different objetivo, the effect on the previous objetivo ends.
  A criatura debe tener éxito en an Inteligencia (Arcanos) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to notice the mágico beacon.
material: a drop of bright paint

name: Transport via Plants
desc: This spell creates a mágico link between a Large or larger inanimate plant within range and another plant, at any distance, on the same plane of existence. You must have seen or touched the destination plant at least once before. For the duration, any criatura can step into the objetivo plant and exit from the destination plant by using 5 pies of movement.

name: Transport via Plants
desc: You create a mágico pathway between the objetivo and a second plant that you've seen or touched before that is on the same plane of existence. Any criatura can step into the objetivo and exit from the second plant by using 5 pies of movement.

name: Traveler's Ward
desc:
Until the spell ends, criaturas have desventaja on Juego de Manos checks made against the objetivo.

If a criatura fails a Juego de Manos check to steal from the objetivo, the ward creates a loud noise and a flash of bright ligera easily heard and seen by criaturas within 100 pies.

name: Treasure Chasm
desc:
You cause the glint of a golden coin to haze over the vision of una criatura in range. The objetivo criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. If it fails, it sees a gorge, trench, or other hole in the ground, at a spot within range chosen by you, which is filled with gold and treasure. On its next turn, the criatura must move toward that spot. When it reaches the spot, it becomes incapacitado, as it devotes all its attention to scooping imaginary treasure into its pockets or a pouch.

An affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. The effect also ends if the criatura recibe damage from you or one of your aliados.

criaturas with the dragon type have desventaja on the initial tirada de salvación but have ventaja on saving throws against this spell made after reaching the designated spot.
material: a gold coin

name: Tree Heal
desc: You touch a plant and it regains 1d4 puntos de golpe. Alternatively, you can cure it of one disease or remove pests from it. Once you cast this spell on a plant or plant criatura, you can't cast it on that objetivo again for 24 horas. This spell can be used only on plants and plant criaturas.

name: Tree Running
desc: One willing criatura you touch gains a escalando Velocidad equal to its walking Velocidad. This escalando Velocidad functions only while the criatura is in contact with a living plant or fungus that’s growing from the ground. The criatura can cling to an appropriate surface with just one hand or with just its pies, leaving its hands free to wield weapons or cast spells. The plant doesn’t give under the criatura’s weight, so the criatura can walk on the tiniest of tree branches, stand on a leaf, or run across the waving top of a field of wheat without bending a stalk or touching the ground.
material: a maple catkin

name: Tree Speak
desc:
You touch a tree and ask one question about anything that might have happened in its immediate vicinity (such as “Who passed by here?”). You get a mental sensation of the response, which lasts for the duration of the spell. Trees do not have a humanoid’s sense of time, so the tree might speak about something that happened last night or a hundred years ago. The sensation you receive might include sight, hearing, vibration, or smell, all from the tree’s perspective. Trees are particularly attentive to anything that might harm the forest and always report such activities when questioned.

If you cast this spell on a tree that contains a criatura that can merge with trees, such as a dryad, you can freely communicate with the merged criatura for the duration of the spell.

name: Tree Stride
desc: You gain the ability to enter a tree and move from inside it to inside another tree of the same kind within 500 pies. Both trees must be living and at least the same size as you. You must use 5 pies of movement to enter a tree. You instantly know the location of all other trees of the same kind within 500 pies and, as part of the move used to enter the tree, can either pass into one of those trees or step out of the tree you're in. You appear in a spot of your choice within 5 pies of the destination tree, using another 5 pies of movement. If you have no movement left, you appear within 5 pies of the tree you entered. You can use this transportation ability once per ronda for the duration. You must end each turn outside a tree.

name: Tree Stride
desc: Until the spell ends, once per ronda you can use 5 pies of movement to enter a living tree and move to inside another living tree of the same kind within 500 pies so long as you end your turn outside of a tree. Both trees must be at least your size. You instantly know the location of all other trees of the same kind within 500 pies. You may step back outside of the original tree or spend 5 more pies of movement to appear within a spot of your choice within 5 pies of the destination tree. If you have no movement left, you appear within 5 pies of the tree you entered.
higher_level: objetivo one additional criatura within alcance for each slot level above 5th.

name: Trench
desc:
By making a scooping gesture, you cause the ground to slowly sink in an area 5 pies wide and 60 pies long, originating from a point within range. When the casting is finished, a 5-pie-deep trench is the result.

The spell works only on flat, open ground (not on stone or paved surfaces) that is not occupied by criaturas or objects.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can increase the width of the trench by 5 pies or the length by 30 pies for each slot level above 2nd. You can make a different choice (width or length) for each slot level above 2nd.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Trick Question
desc: You pose a question that can be answered by one word, directed at a criatura that can hear you. The objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be compelled to answer your question truthfully. When the answer is given, the objetivo knows that you used magic to compel it.

name: Triumph of Ice
desc:
You transform one of the four elements—air, earth, fuego, or water—into ice or snow. The affected area is a sphere with a radius of 100 pies, centered on you. The specific effect depends on the element you choose.
* ***Air.*** Vapor condenses into snowfall. If the effect of a [fog cloud](https://api.open5e.com/spells/fog-cloud) spell, a [stinking cloud](https://api.open5e.com/spells/stinking-cloud), or similar magic is in the area, this spell negates it. A criatura of elemental air within range recibe 8d6 daño de frío—and, if airborne, it debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución at the start of its turn to avoid being knocked derribado (no falling damage).
* ***Earth.*** Soil freezes into permafrost to a depth of 10 pies. A criatura burrowing through the area has its Velocidad halved until the area thaws, unless it can burrow through solid rock. A criatura of elemental earth within range debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 8d6 daño de frío.
* ***fuego.*** Flames or other sources of extreme heat (such as molten lava) on the ground within range transform into shards of ice, and the area they occupy becomes difficult terrain. cada criatura in the previously burning area recibe 2d6 daño cortante when the spell is cast and 1d6 daño cortante for every 5 pies it moves in the area (unless it is not hindered by icy terrain) until the spell ends; a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza reduces the daño cortante by half. A criatura of elemental fuego within range debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 8d6 daño de frío and be aturdido for 1d6 rondas.
* ***Water.*** Open water (a pond, lake, or river) freezes to a depth of 4 pies. A criatura on the surface of the water when it freezes debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza to avoid being trapped in the ice. A trapped criatura can free itself by using an action to make a successful Fuerza (Atletismo) check. A criatura of elemental water within range recibe no damage from the spell but is paralizado for 1d6 rondas unless it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución, and it treats the affected area as difficult terrain.
material: a stone extracted from glacial ice

name: Trollish Charge
desc:
You veil a willing criatura you can see within range in an illusion others perceive as their worst nightmares given flesh. When the affected criatura moves at least 10 pies straight toward a criatura and attacks it, that criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become asustado for 1 minuto. If the affected criatura’s attack hits the asustado objetivo, the affected criatura can roll the attack’s damage dice twice and use the higher total.
  At the end of each of its turns, a criatura asustado by this spell can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the criatura is no longer asustado and can’t be asustado by this spell again for 24 horas.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: True Polymorph
desc:
Choose una criatura or no mágico object that you can see within range. You transform the criatura into a different criatura, the criatura into an object, or the object into a criatura (the object must be neither worn nor carried by another criatura).  The transformation lasts for the duration, or until the objetivo drops to 0 puntos de golpe or dies. If you concentrate on this spell for the full duration, the transformation lasts until it is dispelled. This spell has no effect on a shapechanger or a criatura with 0 puntos de golpe. An unwilling criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, and if it succeeds, it isn't affected by this spell.

**criatura into criatura.** If you turn a criatura into another kind of criatura, the new form can be any kind you choose whose challenge rating is equal to or less than the objetivo's (or its level, if the objetivo doesn't have a challenge rating). The objetivo's game statistics, including mental ability scores, are replaced by the statistics of the new form. It retains its alignment and personality. The objetivo assumes the puntos de golpe of its new form, and when it reverts to its normal form, the criatura returns to the number of puntos de golpe it had before it transformed. If it reverts as a result of dropping to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to its normal form. As long as the excess damage doesn't reduce the criatura's normal form to 0 puntos de golpe, it isn't knocked inconsciente. The criatura is limited in the actions it can perform by the Naturaleza of its new form, and it can't speak, cast spells, or take any other action that requires hands or speech unless its new form is capable of such actions. The objetivo's gear melds into the new form. The criatura can't activate, use, wield, or otherwise benefit from any of its equipment.

**Object into criatura.** You can turn an object into any kind of criatura, as long as the criatura's size is no larger than the object's size and the criatura's challenge rating is 9 or lower. The criatura is friendly to you and your companions. It acts on each of your turns. You decide what action it recibe and how it moves. The DM has the criatura's statistics and resolves all of its actions and movement. If the spell becomes permanent, you no longer control the criatura. It might remain friendly to you, depending on how you have treated it.

 **criatura into Object.** If you turn a criatura into an object, it transforms along with whatever it is wearing and carrying into that form. The criatura's statistics become those of the object, and the criatura has no memory of time spent in this form, after the spell ends and it returns to its normal form.
material: A drop of mercury, a dollop of gum arabic, and a wisp of smoke.

name: True Polymorph
desc:
The objetivo is transformed until it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or the spell ends. You can make the transformation permanent by concentrating on the spell for the full duration.

criatura into criatura: The objetivo's body is transformed into a criatura with a Challenge Rating equal to or less than its own. If the objetivo doesn't have a Challenge Rating, use its level.

The objetivo's game statistics (including its puntos de golpe and mental ability scores) are replaced by the statistics of the chosen criatura. The objetivo is limited to actions that it is physically capable of doing, and it can't speak or cast spells. The objetivo's gear melds into the new form. Equipment that merges with a objetivo's form has no effect until it leaves the form.

When the objetivo reverts to its normal form, it returns to the number of puntos de golpe it had before it transformed. If the spell's effects on the objetivo end early from dropping to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to its normal form and knocks it inconsciente if el daño reduces it to 0 puntos de golpe.

Object into criatura: The objetivo is transformed into any kind of criatura, as long as the criatura's size isn't larger than the object's size and it has a Challenge Rating of 9 or less. The criatura is friendly to you and your aliados and acts on each of your turns. You decide what action it recibe and how it moves. The Narrator has the criatura's statistics and resolves all of its actions and movement.

If the spell becomes permanent, you no longer control the criatura. It might remain friendly to you, depending on how you have treated it.

criatura into Object: You turn the objetivo and whatever it is wearing and carrying into an object. The objetivo's game statistics are replaced by the statistics of the chosen object. The objetivo has no memory of time spent in this form, and when the spell ends it returns to its normal form.

name: True Resurrection
desc: You touch a criatura that has been dead for no longer than 200 years and that died for any reason except old age. If the criatura's soul is free and willing, the criatura is restored to life with all its puntos de golpe. This spell closes all wounds, neutralizes any veneno, cures all diseases, and lifts any curses affecting the criatura when it died. The spell replaces damaged or missing organs and limbs. The spell can even provide a new body if the original no longer exists, in which case you must speak the criatura's name. The criatura then appears in an unoccupied space you choose within 10 pies of you.
material: A sprinkle of holy water and diamonds worth at least 25,000gp, which the spell consumes.

name: True Resurrection
desc:
Provided the objetivo's soul is willing and able to return to its body, it returns to life with all of its puntos de golpe.

The spell cures any poisons and diseases that affected the objetivo at the time of death, closes all mortal wounds, and restores any missing body parts.

If no body (or body parts) exist, you can still cast the spell but must speak the criatura's name. The criatura then appears in an unoccupied space you choose within 10 pies of you. This option requires diamonds worth at least 50, 000 gold (consumed by the spell).

name: True Seeing
desc: This spell gives the willing criatura you touch the ability to see things as they actually are. For the duration, the criatura has vista verdadera, notices secret doors hidden by magic, and can see into the Ethereal Plane, all out to a range of 120 pies.
material: An ointment for the eyes that costs 25gp; is made from mushroom powder, saffron, and fat; and is consumed by the spell.

name: True Seeing
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivo gains vista verdadera to a range of 120 pies. The objetivo also notices secret doors hidden by magic.

name: True Strike
desc: You extend your hand and point a finger at a objetivo in range. Your magic grants you a brief Perspicacia into the objetivo's defenses. On your next turn, you gain ventaja on your first tirada de ataque against the objetivo, provided that this spell hasn't ended.

name: True Strike
desc: You gain an innate understanding of the defenses of a criatura or object in range. You have ventaja on your first tirada de ataque made against the objetivo before the end of your next turn.

name: Twist the Skein
desc: You tweak a strand of a criatura’s fate as it attempts an tirada de ataque, tirada de salvación, or skill check. Roll a d20 and subtract 10 to produce a number from 10 to –9. Add that number to the criatura’s roll. This adjustment can turn a failure into a success or vice versa, or it might not change the outcome at all.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when a creature makes an attack roll, saving throw, or skill check

name: Umbral Storm
desc:
You create a channel to a region of the Plane of Shadow that is inimical to life and order. A storm of dark, raging entropy fills a 20-pie-radius sphere centered on a point you can see within range. Any criatura that starts its turn in the storm or enters it for the first time on its turn recibe 6d8 daño necrótico and gains one level of agotamiento; a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución halves el daño and prevents the agotamiento.

You can use a acción adicional on your turn to move the area of the storm 30 pies in any direction.

name: Uncontrollable Transformation
desc: You infuse your body with raw chaos and will it to adopt a helpful mutation. Roll a d10 and consult the Uncontrollable Transformation table below to determine what mutation occurs. You can try to control the shifting of your body to gain a mutation you prefer, but doing so is taxing; you can roll a d10 twice and choose the result you prefer, but you gain one level of agotamiento. At the end of the spell, your body returns to its normal form.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, you gain an additional mutation for each slot level above 7th. You gain one level of agotamiento for each mutation you try to control.
 ## Uncontrollable Transformation 
| D10 | Mutation |
|---|---|
| 1 | A spindly third arm sprouts from your shoulder. As a acción adicional, you can use it to attack with a ligera weapon. You have ventaja on Destreza (Juego de Manos) checks and any checks that require the manipulation of tools. |
| 2 | Your skin is covered by rough scales that increase your AC by 1 and give you resistance to a random damage type (roll on el daño Type table). |
| 3 | A puckered orifice grows on your back. You can forcefully expel air from it, granting you a volando Velocidad of 30 pies. You must land at the end of your turn. In addition, as a acción adicional, you can try to push a criatura away with a blast of air. The objetivo is pushed 5 pies away from you if it fails a tirada de salvación de Fuerza with a CD equal to 10 + your Constitución modifier. |
| 4 | A second face appears on the back of your head. You gain visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 120 pies and ventaja on sight‐based and scent-based Sabiduría (Percepción) checks. You become adept at carrying on conversations with yourself. |
| 5 | You grow gills that not only allow you to breathe underwater but also filter veneno out of the air. You gain immunity to inhaled poisons. |
| 6 | Your hindquarters elongate, and you grow a second set of legs. Your base walking Velocidad increases by 10 pies, and your carrying capacity becomes your Fuerza score multiplied by 20. |
| 7 | You become incorporeal and can move through other criaturas and objects as if they were difficult terrain. You take 1d10 daño de fuerza if you end your turn inside an object. You can’t pick up or interact with physical objects that you weren’t carrying when you became incorporeal. |
| 8 | Your limbs elongate and flatten into prehensile paddles. You gain a nadando Velocidad equal to your base walking Velocidad and have ventaja on Fuerza (Atletismo) checks made to climb or swim. In addition, your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 daño contundente. |
| 9 | Your head fills with a ligera gas and swells to four times its normal size, causing your hair to fall out. You have ventaja on Inteligencia and Sabiduría ability checks and can levitate up to 5 pies above the ground. |
| 10 | You grow three sets of feathered wings that give you a volando Velocidad equal to your walking Velocidad and the ability to hover. |

 ## Damage Type 

| d10 | Damage Type |
|---|---|
| 1 | ácido |
| 2 | frío |
| 3 | fuego |
| 4 | fuerza |
| 5 | rayo |
| 6 | necrótico |
| 7 | veneno |
| 8 | psíquico |
| 9 | radiante |
| 10 | trueno |
material: the bill of a platypus

name: Undermine Armor
desc:
You unravel the bonds of reality that hold a suit of armor together. A objetivo wearing armor debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or its armor softens to the consistency of candle wax, decreasing the objetivo’s AC by 2.

**Undermine armor** has no effect on criaturas that aren’t wearing armor.

name: Unholy Defiance
desc: Until the spell ends, undead criaturas within range have ventaja on saving throws against effects that turn undead. If an undead criatura within this area has the Turning Defiance trait, that criatura can roll a d4 when it makes a tirada de salvación against an effect that turns undead and add the number rolled to the tirada de salvación.
material: a pinch of earth from a grave

name: Unholy Star
desc:
A meteor ripped from diabolical skies streaks through the air and explodes at a point you can see 100 pies directly above you. The spell fails if you can't see the point where the meteor explodes.

cada criatura within range that can see the meteor (other than you) makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or is cegado until the end of your next turn. Fiery chunks of the meteor then plummet to the ground at different areas you choose within range. cada criatura in an area makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 6d6 daño de fuego and 6d6 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. A criatura in more than one area is affected only once.

The spell damages objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried.

name: Unleash Effigy
desc:
You cause a stone statue that you can see within 60 pies of you to animate as your aliado. The statue has the statistics of a [stone golem](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/stone-golem). It recibe a turn immediately after your turn. As a acción adicional on your turn, you can order the golem to move and attack, provided you’re within 60 pies of it. Without orders from you, the statue does nothing.

Whenever the statue has 75 puntos de golpe or fewer at the start of your turn or it is more than 60 pies from you at the start of your turn, you debe realizar a successful CD 16 spellcasting check or the statue goes berserk. On each of its turns, the berserk statue attacks you or one of your aliados. If no criatura is near enough to be attacked, the statue dashes toward the nearest one instead. Once the statue goes berserk, it remains berserk until it’s destroyed.

When the spell ends, the animated statue reverts to a normal, mundane statue.

name: Unluck On That
desc: By uttering a swift curse (“Unluck on that!”), you bring misfortune to the objetivo’s attempt; the affected criatura has desventaja on the roll.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the range of the spell increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 1st.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when a creature within range makes an attack roll, saving throw, or ability check

name: Unseen Servant
desc: This spell creates an invisible, mindless, shapeless fuerza that performs simple tasks at your command until the spell ends. The servant springs into existence in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It has AC 10, 1 punto de golpe, and a Fuerza of 2, and it can't attack. If it drops to 0 puntos de golpe, the spell ends. Once on each of your turns as a acción adicional, you can mentally command the servant to move up to 15 pies and interact with an object. The servant can perform simple tasks that a human servant could do, such as fetching things, cleaning, mending, folding clothes, lighting fires, serving food, and pouring wind. Once you give the command, the servant performs the task to the best of its ability until it completes the task, then waits for your next command. If you command the servant to perform a task that would move it more than 60 pies away from you, the spell ends.
material: A piece of string and a bit of wood.

name: Unseen Servant
desc:
You create an invisible, mindless, shapeless fuerza to perform simple tasks. The servant appears in an unoccupied space on the ground that you can see and endures until it recibe damage, moves more than 60 pies away from you, or the spell ends. It has AC 10, a Fuerza of 2, and it can't attack.

You can use a acción adicional to mentally command it to move up to 15 pies and interact with an object.

The servant can do anything a humanoid servant can do —fetching things, cleaning, mending, folding clothes, lighting fires, serving food, pouring wine, and so on. Once given a command the servant performs the task to the best of its ability until the task is completed, then waits for its next command.
higher_level: You create an additional servant for each slot level above 1st.

name: Unseen Strangler
desc:
You conjure an immaterial, tentacled aberration in an unoccupied space you can see within range, and you specify a password that the phantom recognizes. The entity remains where you conjured it until the spell ends, until you dismiss it as an action, or until you move more than 80 pies from it.

The strangler is invisible to todas las criaturas except you, and it can’t be harmed. When a Small or larger criatura approaches within 30 pies of it without speaking the password that you specified, the strangler starts whispering your name. This whispering is always audible to you, regardless of other sounds in the area, as long as you’re conscious. The strangler sees invisible criaturas and can see into the Ethereal Plane. It ignores illusions.

If any criaturas hostile to you are within 5 pies of the strangler at the start of your turn, the strangler attacks one of them with a tentacle. It makes a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma with a bonus equal to your spellcasting ability modifier + your competencia bonus. On a hit, it causa 3d6 daño contundente, and a Large or smaller criatura is agarrado (escape CD = your spellcasting ability modifier + your competencia bonus). Until this grapple ends, the objetivo is apresado, and the strangler can’t attack another objetivo. If the strangler scores a critical hit, the objetivo begins to suffocate and can’t speak until the grapple ends.
material: a pinch of sulfur and a live rodent
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Vagrant's Nondescript Cloak
desc: You touch a criatura. The criatura is warded against the effects of locate criatura, the caster may determine if the affected criatura is within 1,000 pies but cannot determine the direction to the objetivo of vagrant's nondescript cloak. If the criatura is already affected by one of the warded spells, then both the effect and vagrant's nondescript cloak end immediately.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of third level or higher, you can objetivo +1 criatura for each slot level above second.

name: Vampiric Touch
desc: The touch of your shadow-wreathed hand can siphon life fuerza from others to heal your wounds. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura within your alcance. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 3d6 daño necrótico, and you regain puntos de golpe equal to half the amount of daño necrótico dealt. Until the spell ends, you can make the attack again on each of your turns as an action.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Vampiric Touch
desc:
Shadows roil about your hand and heal you by siphoning away the life fuerza from others. On the ronda you cast it, and as an action on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you can make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura within your alcance.

On a hit, you deal 3d6 daño necrótico and regain puntos de golpe equal to half the amount of daño necrótico dealt.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Vengeful Panopy of the Ley Line Ignited
desc: Deep Magic: ley line While bound to a ley line, you draw directly from its power, becoming cloaked in a mágico heliotropic fuego that sheds dim ligera in a 10-pie radius. Additionally, each ronda, including the ronda it is cast, you may make a ranged ataque de conjuro as an action. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 6d6 daño de fuerza. Every 3 minutos the effect is active, your bond with the ley line is reduced by one step; a bond to a Titanic ley line becomes effectively a Strong, then a Weak, and after 10 minutos, the bond is broken. The Fuerza of the bond is only restored after a descanso largo; if the bond was broken, it can only be restored at the next weakest level for a week. A bond broken from a Weak ley line cannot be restored for two weeks. Some believe this spell damages ley lines, and there is some evidence to support this claim. Additionally, whenever a criatura within 5 pies hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, the cloak erupts with a heliotropic flare. The attacker recibe 3d6 daño de fuerza.
higher_level: When casting this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level, el daño from all effects of the spell increase by 1d6 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Venomous Succor
desc: You cause a searing veneno to burn quickly through the objetivo's wounds, dealing 1d6 daño de veneno. The objetivo regains 2d4 puntos de golpe at the start of each of its turns for the next 1d4+1 rondas.
higher_level: For each slot level above 2nd, the initial damage increases by 1d6 and objetivo regains an additional 1d4 puntos de golpe.

name: Vicious Mockery
desc: You unleash a string of insults laced with subtle enchantments at a criatura you can see within range. If the objetivo can hear you (though it need not understand you), it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 1d4 daño psíquico and have desventaja on the next tirada de ataque it makes before the end of its next turn.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d4 when you alcance 5th level (2d4), 11th level (3d4), and 17th level (4d4).

name: Vicious Mockery
desc: You verbally insult or mock the objetivo so viciously its mind is seared. As long as the objetivo hears you (understanding your words is not required) it recibe 1d6 daño psíquico and has desventaja on the first tirada de ataque it makes before the end of its next turn.
higher_level: The spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Vine Carpet
desc:
You cause a thick carpet of vines to grow from a point on the ground within range. The vines cover objects and derribado criaturas within 20 pies of that point. While covered in this way, objects and criaturas have total cover as long as they remain motionless. A criatura that moves while beneath the carpet has only three-quarters cover from attacks on the other side of the carpet. A covered criatura that stands up from derribado stands atop the carpet and is no longer covered. The carpet of vines is plush enough that a Large or smaller criatura can walk across it without harming or detecting those covered by it.
  When the spell ends, the vines wither away into nothingness, revealing any objects and criaturas that were still covered.

name: Vine Trestle
desc:
You cause a vine to sprout from the ground and crawl across a surface or rise into the air in a direction chosen by you. The vine must sprout from a solid surface (such as the ground or a wall), and it is strong enough to support 600 pounds of weight along its entire length. The vine collapses immediately if that 600-pound limit is exceeded. A vine that collapses from weight or damage instantly disintegrates.

The vine has many small shoots, so it can be climbed with a successful CD 5 Fuerza (Atletismo) check. It has AC 8, puntos de golpe equal to 5 × your spellcasting level, and a damage threshold of 5.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the vine can support an additional 30 pounds, and its damage threshold increases by 1 for each slot level above 2nd.

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the vine is permanent until destroyed or dispelled.
material: a 1-inch piece of green vine that is consumed in the casting

name: Visage of Madness
desc: When you cast this spell, your face momentarily becomes that of a demon lord, frightful enough to drive enemigos mad. Every foe that’s within 30 pies of you and that can see you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, a criatura claws savagely at its eyes, dealing daño perforante to itself equal to 1d6 + the criatura’s Fuerza modifier. The criatura is also aturdido until the end of its next turn and cegado for 1d4 rondas. A criatura that rolls maximum damage against itself (a 6 on the d6) is cegado permanently.

name: Vital Mark
desc: You mark an unattended magic item (including weapons and armor) with a clearly visible stain of your blood. The exact appearance of the bloodstain is up to you. The item’s mágico abilities don’t function for anyone else as long as the bloodstain remains on it. For example, a **+1 flaming longsword** with a vital mark functions as a no mágico longsword in the hands of anyone but the caster, but it still functions as a **+1 flaming longsword** for the caster who placed the bloodstain on it. A [wand of magic missiles](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wand-of-magic-missiles) would be no more than a stick in the hands of anyone but the caster.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher on the same item for 28 consecutive days, the effect becomes permanent until dispelled.

name: Void Rift
desc:
You speak a hideous string of Void Speech that leaves your mouth bloodied, causing a rift into nothingness to tear open. The rift recibe the form of a 10-pie-radius sphere, and it forms around a point you can see within range. The area within 40 pies of the sphere’s outer edge becomes difficult terrain as the Void tries to draw everything into itself. A criatura that starts its turn within 40 pies of the sphere or that enters that area for the first time on its turn debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pulled 15 pies toward the rift. A criatura that starts its turn in the rift or that comes into contact with it for the first time on its turn recibe 8d10 daño necrótico. criaturas inside the rift are cegado and ensordecido. Unattended objects within 40 pies of the rift are drawn 15 pies toward it at the start of your turn, and they take damage as criaturas if they come into contact with it.

While concentrating on the spell, you take 2d6 daño necrótico at the end of each of your turns.
material: a black opal worth 500 gp, carved with a Void glyph

name: Void Strike
desc: With a short phrase of Void Speech, you gather writhing darkness around your hand. When you cast the spell, and as an action on subsequent turns while you maintain Concentración, you can unleash a bolt of darkness at a criatura within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro. If the objetivo is in dim ligera or darkness, you have ventaja on the roll. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 5d8 daño necrótico and is asustado of you until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast the spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Volley Shield
desc:
You touch a willing criatura and create a shimmering shield of energy to protect it. The shield grants the objetivo a +5 bonus to AC and gives it resistance against no mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante for the duration of the spell.

In addition, the shield can reflect hostile spells back at their casters. When the objetivo makes a successful tirada de salvación against a hostile spell, the caster of the spell immediately becomes the spell’s new objetivo. The caster is entitled to the appropriate tirada de salvación against the returned spell, if any, and is affected by the spell as if it came from a spellcaster of the caster’s level.

name: Vomit Tentacles
desc:
Your jaws distend and dozens of thin, slimy tentacles emerge from your mouth to grasp and bind your opponents. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a foe within 15 pies of you. On a hit, the objetivo recibe daño contundente equal to 2d6 + your Fuerza modifier and is agarrado (escape CD equal to your CD de salvación del conjuro). Until this grapple ends, the objetivo is apresado and it recibe the same damage at the start of each of your turns. You can grapple only una criatura at a time.

The Clase de Armadura of the tentacles is equal to yours. If they take daño cortante equal to 5 + your Constitución modifier from a single attack, enough tentacles are severed to enable a agarrado criatura to escape. Severed tentacles are replaced by new ones at the start of your turn. Damage dealt to the tentacles doesn’t affect your puntos de golpe.

While the spell is in effect, you are incapable of speech and can’t cast spells that have verbal components.
material: a piece of a tentacle

name: Voorish Sign
desc: For the duration, invisible criaturas and objects within 20 pies of you become visible to you, and you have ventaja on saving throws against effects that cause the asustado condition. The effect moves with you, remaining centered on you until the duration expires.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the radius increases by 5 pies for every two slot levels above 1st.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Waft
desc: This spell was first invented by dragon parents to assist their offspring when learning to fly. You gain a volando Velocidad of 60 pies for 1 ronda. At the start of your next turn, you float rapidly down and land gently on a solid surface beneath you.
material: a topaz worth at least 10 gp

name: Walk the Twisted Path
desc:
When you cast this spell, you and up to five criaturas you can see within 20 pies of you enter a shifting landscape of endless walls and corridors that connect to many places throughout the world.

You can find your way to a destination within 100 millas, as long as you know for certain that your destination exists (though you don’t need to have seen or visited it before), and you debe realizar a successful CD 20 Inteligencia check. If you have the ability to retrace a path you have previously taken without making a check (as a minotaur or a goristro can), this check automatically succeeds. On a failed check, you don't find your path this ronda, and you and your companions each take 4d6 daño psíquico as the madness of the shifting maze exacts its toll. You must repeat the check at the start of each of your turns until you find your way to your destination or until you die. In either event, the spell ends.

When the spell ends, you and those traveling with you appear in a safe location at your destination.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, you can bring along two additional criaturas or travel an additional 100 millas for each slot level above 6th.
material: a map

name: Walking Wall
desc:
This spell creates a wall of swinging axes from the pile of miniature axes you provide when casting the spell. The wall fills a rectangle 10 pies wide, 10 pies high, and 20 pies long. The wall has a base Velocidad of 50 pies, but it can’t take the Dash action. It can make up to four attacks per ronda on your turn, using your ataque de conjuro modifier para impactar and with a alcance of 10 pies. You direct the wall’s movement and attacks as a acción adicional. If you choose not to direct it, the wall continues trying to execute the last command you gave it. The wall can’t use reactions. Each successful attack causa 4d6 daño cortante, and el daño is considered mágico.

The wall has AC 12 and 200 puntos de golpe, and is immune to necrótico, veneno, psíquico, and daño perforante. If it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell’s duration ends, the wall disappears and the miniature axes fall to the ground in a tidy heap.
material: 100 miniature axes

name: Wall of Fire
desc: You create a wall of fuego on a solid surface within range. You can make the wall up to 60 pies long, 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 pies in diameter, 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick. The wall is opaque and lasts for the duration. When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 5d8 daño de fuego, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa. One side of the wall, selected by you when you cast this spell, causa 5d8 daño de fuego to cada criatura that ends its turn within 10 pies o f that side or inside the wall. A criatura recibe the same damage when it enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side o f the wall causa no damage. The other side of the wall causa no damage.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a level espacio de conjuro 5 or more, el daño of the spell increases by 1d8 for each level of higher espacio de conjuro to 4.
material: A small piece of phosphorus.

name: Wall of Fire
desc:
You create a wall of fuego on a solid surface. The wall can be up to 60 pies long (it does not have to be a straight line; sections of the wall can angle as long as they are contiguous), 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 pies in diameter, 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick. The wall blocks sight.

When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 5d8 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa.

One side of the wall (chosen when the spell is cast) causa 5d8 daño de fuego to cada criatura that ends its turn within 10 pies of that side or inside the wall. A criatura recibe the same damage when it enters the wall itself for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side of the wall causa no damage.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Wall of Flesh
desc:
A squirming wall of bodies, groping arms and tentacles, and moaning, biting mouths heaves itself up from the ground at a point you choose. The wall is 6 inches thick and is made up of a contiguous group of ten 10-pie square sections. The wall can have any shape you desire.

If the wall enters a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, and en un éxito it moves up to its Velocidad to escape. en una salvación fallida, it is swallowed by the wall (as below).

When a criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn within 10 pies of the wall, tentacles and arms alcance out to grab it. The criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or recibe 5d8 daño contundente and becomes agarrado. If the criatura was already agarrado by the wall at the start of its turn and fails its tirada de salvación, a mouth opens in the wall and swallows the criatura.

A criatura swallowed by the wall recibe 5d8 ongoing daño contundente and is cegado, ensordecido, and apresado.

A criatura agarrado or apresado by the wall can use its action to make a tirada de salvación de Fuerza against your CD de salvación del conjuro. en un éxito, a agarrado criatura frees itself and a apresado criatura claws its way out of the wall's space, exiting to an empty space next to the wall and still agarrado.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above the 6th.

name: Wall of Force
desc: An invisible wall of fuerza springs into existence at a point you choose within range. The wall appears in any orientation you choose, as a horizontal or vertical barrier or at an angle. It can be free floating or resting on a solid surface. You can form it into a hemispherical dome or a sphere with a radius of up to 10 pies, or you can shape a flat surface made up of ten 10-pie-by-10-pie panels. Each panel must be contiguous with another panel. In any form, the wall is 1/4 inch thick. It lasts for the duration. If the wall cuts through a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of the wall (your choice which side). Nothing can physically pass through the wall. It is immune to all damage and can't be dispelled by dispel magic. A disintegrate spell destroys the wall instantly, however. The wall also extends into the Ethereal Plane, blocking ethereal travel through the wall.
material: A pinch of powder made by crushing a clear gemstone.

name: Wall of Force
desc:
You create an invisible wall of fuerza at a point you choose. The wall is a horizontal or vertical barrier, or at an angle. It can be free floating or resting on a solid surface. You can form it into a hemispherical dome or a sphere, either with a radius of up to 10 pies. You may also choose to create a flat surface made up of a contiguous group of ten 10-pie square sections. The wall is 1/4 inch thick.

If the wall enters a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of the wall (your choice), but when a criatura would be surrounded on all sides by the wall (or the wall and another solid surface), it can use its reacción to make a tirada de salvación de Destreza to move up to its Velocidad to escape. Any criatura without a special sense like vista ciega has desventaja on this tirada de salvación.

Nothing can physically pass through the wall.

It can be destroyed with dispel magic cast using a espacio de conjuro of at least 5th-level or by being dealt at least 25 daño de fuerza at once. It is otherwise immune to damage. The wall also extends into the Ethereal Plane, blocking ethereal travel through it.

name: Wall of Ice
desc: You create a wall of ice on a solid surface within range. You can form it into a hemispherical dome or a sphere with a radius of up to 10 pies, or you can shape a flat surface made up of ten 10-pie-square panels. Each panel must be contiguous with another panel. In any form, the wall is 1 pie thick and lasts for the duration. If the wall cuts through a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura within its area is pushed to one side of the wall and debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 10d6 daño de frío, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa. The wall is an object that can be damaged and thus breached. It has AC 12 and 30 puntos de golpe per 10-pie section, and it is vulnerable to daño de fuego. Reducing a 10-pie section of wall to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it and leaves behind a sheet of frigid air in the space the wall occupied. A criatura moving through the sheet of frigid air for the first time on a turn debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. That criatura recibe 5d6 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, el daño the wall causa when it appears increases by 2d6, and el daño from passing through the sheet of frigid air increases by 1d6, for each slot level above 6th.
material: A small piece of quartz.

name: Wall of Ice
desc:
You create a wall of ice on a solid surface. You can form it into a hemispherical dome or a sphere, either with a radius of up to 10 pies. You may also choose to create a flat surface made up of a contiguous group of ten 10-pie square sections. The wall is 1 pie thick.

If the wall enters a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of it (your choice).

In addition, the criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 10d6 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en un éxito.

The wall is an object with vulnerability to daño de fuego, with AC 12 and 30 puntos de golpe per 10-pie section. Reducing a 10-pie section of wall to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it and leaves behind a sheet of frigid air in the space the section occupied. A criatura moving through the sheet of frigid air for the first time on a turn makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 5d6 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level: el daño the wall causa when it appears increases by 2d6 and el daño from passing through the sheet of frigid air increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Wall of Stone
desc: A no mágico wall of solid stone springs into existence at a point you choose within range. The wall is 6 inches thick and is composed of ten 10-pie-by-10-pie panels. Each panel must be contiguous with at least one other panel. Alternatively, you can create 10-pie-by-20-pie panels that are only 3 inches thick. If the wall cuts through a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of the wall (your choice). If a criatura would be surrounded on all sides by the wall (or the wall and another solid surface), that criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en un éxito, it can use its reacción to move up to its Velocidad so that it is no longer enclosed by the wall. The wall can have any shape you desire, though it can't occupy the same space as a criatura or object. The wall doesn't need to be vertical or rest on any firm foundation. It must, however, merge with and be solidly supported by existing stone. Thus, you can use this spell to bridge a chasm or create a ramp. If you create a span greater than 20 pies in length, you must halve the size of each panel to create supports. You can crudely shape the wall to create crenellations, battlements, and so on. The wall is an object made of stone that can be damaged and thus breached. Each panel has AC 15 and 30 puntos de golpe per inch of thickness. Reducing a panel to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it and might cause connected panels to collapse at the DM's discretion. If you maintain your Concentración on this spell for its whole duration, the wall becomes permanent and can't be dispelled. Otherwise, the wall disappears when the spell ends.
material: A small block of granite.

name: Wall of Stone
desc:
A no mágico wall of solid stone appears at a point you choose. The wall is 6 inches thick and is made up of a contiguous group of ten 10-pie square sections. Alternatively, you can create 10-pie-by-20- pie sections that are only 3 inches thick.

The wall can have any shape you desire, though it can't occupy the same space as a criatura or object.

The wall doesn't need to be vertical or rest on any firm foundation but must merge with and be solidly supported by existing stone. Thus, you can use this spell to bridge a chasm or create a ramp.

If the wall enters a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of the wall (your choice), but when a criatura would be surrounded on all sides by the wall (or the wall and another solid surface), it can use its reacción to make a tirada de salvación de Destreza to move up to its Velocidad to escape.

If you create a span greater than 20 pies in length, you must halve the size of each panel to create supports. You can crudely shape the wall to create crenelations, battlements, and so on.

The wall is an object made of stone. Each panel has AC 15 and 30 puntos de golpe per inch of thickness.

Reducing a panel to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it and at the Narrator's discretion might cause connected panels to collapse.

You can make the wall permanent by concentrating on the spell for the full duration.

name: Wall of Thorns
desc: You create a wall of tough, pliable, tangled brush bristling with needle-sharp thorns. The wall appears within range on a solid surface and lasts for the duration. You choose to make the wall up to 60 pies long, 10 pies high, and 5 pies thick or a circle that has a 20-pie diameter and is up to 20 pies high and 5 pies thick. The wall blocks line of sight. When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 7d8 daño perforante, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa. A criatura can move through the wall, albeit slowly and painfully. For every 1 pie a criatura moves through the wall, it must spend 4 pies of movement. Furthermore, the first time a criatura enters the wall on a turn or ends its turn there, the criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. It recibe 7d8 daño cortante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, both types of damage increase by 1d8 for each slot level above 6th.
material: A handful of thorns.

name: Wall of Thorns
desc:
You create a wall of tough, pliable, tangled brush bristling with needle-sharp thorns on a solid surface. You can choose to make the wall up to 60 pies long, 10 pies high, and 5 pies thick or a circle that has a 20-pie diameter and is up to 20 pies high and 5 pies thick. The wall blocks line of sight.

When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 7d8 daño perforante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa.

A criatura can move through the wall, albeit slowly and painfully. For every 1 pie a criatura moves through the wall, it must spend 4 pies of movement. The first time a criatura enters the wall on a turn or ends its turn there, it makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 7d8 daño cortante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa.
higher_level: Damage dealt by the wall increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Wall of Time
desc: You create a wall of shimmering, transparent blocks on a solid surface within range. You can make a straight wall up to 60 pies long, 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick, or a cylindrical wall up to 20 pies high, 1 pie thick, and 20 pies in diameter. no mágico ranged attacks that cross the wall vanish into the time stream with no other effect. Ranged spell attacks and ranged weapon attacks made with magic weapons that pass through the wall are made with desventaja. A criatura that intentionally enters or passes through the wall is affected as if it had just failed its initial tirada de salvación against a [slow](https://api.open5e.com/spells/slow) spell.
material: an hourglass

name: War Horn
desc:
You blow a blast on your war horn, sending a ripple of fear through your enemigos and bolstering your aliados. Choose up to three hostile criaturas in range and up to three friendly criaturas in range. Each hostile objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become asustado for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, a asustado criatura can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the spell ends on that criatura.
  Each friendly objetivo gains a number of temporary puntos de golpe equal to 2d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier and has ventaja on the next tirada de ataque it makes before the spell ends. The temporary puntos de golpe last for 1 hora.

name: Warding Bond
desc: This spell wards a willing criatura you touch and creates a mystic connection between you and the objetivo until the spell ends. While the objetivo is within 60 pies of you, it gains a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws, and it has resistance to all damage. Also, each time it recibe damage, you take the same amount of damage. The spell ends if you drop to 0 puntos de golpe or if you and the objetivo become separated by more than 60 pies. It also ends if the spell is cast again on either of the connected criaturas. You can also dismiss the spell as an action.
material: A pair of platinum rings worth at least 50gp each, which you and the objetivo must wear for the duration.

name: Warding Bond
desc:
Until the spell ends, the objetivo is warded by a mystic connection between it and you. While the objetivo is within 60 pies it gains a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws, and it has resistance to all damage. Each time it recibe damage, you take an equal amount of damage.

The spell ends if you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe or if you and the objetivo become separated by more than 60 pies. It also ends if you use an action to dismiss it, or if the spell is cast again on either you or the objetivo.
higher_level: The duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Warning Shout
desc: You sense danger before it happens and call out a warning to an aliado. una criatura you can see and that can hear you gains ventaja on its initiative roll.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take immediately before initiative is rolled

name: Warp Mind and Matter
desc: A criatura you can see within range undergoes a baleful transmogrification. The objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or suffer a flesh warp and be afflicted with a form of indefinite madness.
material: root of deadly nightshade and a drop of the caster’s blood
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Warrior's Instincts
desc: Your senses sharpen, allowing you to anticipate incoming attacks and find weaknesses in the defenses of your foes. Until the spell ends, criaturas cannot gain bonuses (like those granted by bless or expertise dice) or ventaja on attack rolls against you. In addition, none of your movement provokes opportunity attacks, and you ignore no mágico difficult terrain. Finally, you can end the spell early to treat a single weapon tirada de ataque as though you had rolled a 15 on the d20.
higher_level: For each slot level above 5th, you can also apply this spell's benefits to an additional criatura you can see within 30 pies.

name: Water Breathing
