desc: This spell gives a maximum of ten willing criaturas within range and you can see, the ability to breathe underwater until the end of its term. Affected criaturas also retain their normal breathing pattern.
material: A short piece of reed or straw.
dnd_class: Druid, Ranger, Ritual Caster, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Water Breathing
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivos are able to breathe underwater (and still able to respirate normally).

name: Water Walk
desc: This spell grants the ability to move across any liquid surface-such as water, ácido, mud, snow, quicksand, or lava-as if it were harmless solid ground (criaturas crossing molten lava can still take damage from the heat). Up to ten willing criaturas you can see within range gain this ability for the duration. If you objetivo a criatura submerged in a liquid, the spell carries the objetivo to the surface of the liquid at a rate of 60 pies per ronda.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Ritual Caster, Sorcerer

name: Water Walk
desc:
Until the spell ends, the objetivos are able to move across any liquid surface (such as water, ácido, mud, snow, quicksand, or lava) as if it was solid ground.

criaturas can still take damage from surfaces that would deliver damage from corrosion or extreme temperatures, but they do not sink while moving across it.

A objetivo submerged in a liquid is moved to the surface of the liquid at a rate of 60 pies per ronda.
higher_level: The duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Weapon of Blood
desc: When you cast this spell, you inflict 1d4 daño cortante on yourself that can’t be healed until after the blade created by this spell is destroyed or the spell ends. The trickling blood transforms into a dagger of red metal that functions as a **+1 dagger**.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd to 5th level, the self-inflicted wound causa 3d4 daño cortante and the spell produces a **+2 dagger**. When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th to 8th level, the self-inflicted wound causa 6d4 daño cortante and the spell produces a **+2 dagger of wounding**. When you cast this spell using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, the self-inflicted wound causa 9d4 daño cortante and the spell produces a **+3 dagger of wounding**.
material: a pinch of iron shavings

name: Web
desc: You conjure a mass of thick, sticky webbing at a point of your choice within range. The webs fill a 20-pie cube from that point for the duration. The webs are difficult terrain and lightly obscure their area. If the webs aren't anchored between two solid masses (such as walls or trees) or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling, the conjured web collapses on itself, and the spell ends at the start of your next turn. Webs layered over a flat surface have a depth of 5 pies. cada criatura that starts its turn in the webs or that enters them during its turn debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is apresado as long as it remains in the webs or until it breaks free. A criatura apresado by the webs can use its action to make a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If it succeeds, it is no longer apresado. The webs are flammable. Any 5-pie cube of webs exposed to fuego burns away in 1 ronda, dealing 2d4 daño de fuego to any criatura that starts its turn in the fuego.
material: A bit of spiderweb.

name: Web
desc:
Thick, sticky webs fill the area, lightly obscuring it and making it difficult terrain.

You must anchor the webs between two solid masses (such as walls or trees) or layer them across a flat surface. If you don't the conjured webs collapse and at the start of your next turn the spell ends.

Webs layered over a flat surface are 5 pies deep.

cada criatura that starts its turn in the webs or that enters them during its turn makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or it is apresado as long as it remains in the webs (or until the criatura breaks free).

A criatura apresado by the webs can escape by using its action to make a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

Any 5-pie cube of webs exposed to fuego burns away in 1 ronda, dealing 2d4 daño de fuego to any criatura that starts its turn in the fuego.
higher_level:
When using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro, you also summon a Gigante wolf spider in an unoccupied space within the web's area. When using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, you summon up to two spiders.

When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, you summon up to three spiders. The spiders are friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the spiders as a group, which have their own turns. The spiders obey your verbal commands, but they disappear when the spell ends or when they leave the web's area.

name: Weiler’s Ward
desc: You create four small orbs of faerie magic that float around your head and give off dim ligera out to a radius of 15 pies. Whenever a Large or smaller enemigo enters that area of dim ligera, or starts its turn in the area, you can use your reacción to attack it with one or more of the orbs. The enemigo criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is pushed 20 pies directly away from you, and each orb you used in the attack explodes violently, dealing 1d6 daño de fuerza to the criatura.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the number of orbs increases by one for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a lock of hair from a fey criatura

name: Weird
desc: Drawing on the deepest fears of a group of criaturas, you create illusory criaturas in their minds, visible only to them. cada criatura in a 30-pie-radius sphere centered on a point of your choice within range debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, a criatura becomes asustado for the duration. The illusion calls on the criatura's deepest fears, manifesting its worst nightmares as an implacable threat. At the start of each of the asustado criatura's turns, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 4d10 daño psíquico. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends for that criatura.

name: Weird
desc: You create illusions which manifest the deepest fears and worst nightmares in the minds of todas las criaturas in the spell's area. cada criatura in the area makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or becomes asustado until the spell ends. At the end of each of a asustado criatura's turns, it makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or it recibe 4d10 daño psíquico. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends for that criatura.

name: Whirlwind Kick
desc:
You must be able to move in order to cast this spell. You leap into the air and spin like a tornado, striking foes all around you with supernatural fuerza as you fly up to 60 pies in a straight line. Your movement (which does not provoke attacks of opportunity) must end on a surface that can support your weight or you fall as normal.

As part of the casting of this spell, make a melee ataque de conjuro against any number of criaturas in the area. On a hit, you deal your unarmed strike damage plus 2d6 daño de trueno. In addition, criaturas in the area make a tirada de salvación de Destreza or are either pulled 10 pies closer to you or pushed 10 pies away (your choice).
higher_level: The extra daño de trueno increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Who Goes There?
desc: You sift the surrounding air for sound wave remnants of recent conversations to discern passwords or other important information gleaned from a conversation, such as by guards on a picket line. The spell creates a cloud of words in the caster's mind, assigning relevance to them. Selecting the correct word or phrase is not foolproof, but you can make an educated guess. You make a Sabiduría (Percepción) check against the objetivo person's Sabiduría score (CD 10, if not specified) to successfully pick the key word or phrase.

name: Wield Soul
desc: You draw forth the ebbing life fuerza of a criatura and use its arcane power. Upon casting this spell, you must touch a criatura that dropped to 0 puntos de golpe since your last turn. If it fails a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, you gain knowledge of spells, innate spells, and similar abilities it could have used today were it still alive. Expended spells and abilities aren't revealed. Choose one of these spells or abilities with a casting time no longer than 1 action. Until you complete a descanso largo, you can use this spell or ability once, as a acción adicional, using the criatura's CD de salvación del conjuro or spellcasting ability bonus.

name: Wild Hunt
desc:
While casting this spell, you must chant and drum, calling forth the spirit of the hunt. Up to nine other criaturas can join you in the chant.
  For the duration, cada criatura that participated in the chant is filled with the fervent bloodlust of the wild hunt and gains several benefits. The criatura is immune to being hechizado and asustado, it causa one extra die of damage on the first weapon or ataque de conjuro it makes on each of its turns, it has ventaja on Fuerza or Destreza saving throws (the criatura's choice), and its Clase de Armadura increases by 1.
  When this spell ends, a criatura affected by it suffers one level of agotamiento.

name: Wild Shield
desc:
You surround yourself with the forces of chaos. Wild lights and strange sounds engulf you, making Sigilo impossible. While **wild shield** is active, you can use a reacción to repel a spell of 4th level or lower that objetivos you or whose area you are within. A repelled spell has no effect on you, but doing this causes the chance of a chaos magic surge as if you had cast a spell, with you considered the caster for any effect of the surge.

**Wild shield** ends when the duration expires or when it absorbs 4 levels of spells. If you try to repel a spell whose level exceeds the number of levels remaining, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The CD equals 10 + the spell’s level – the number of levels **wild shield** can still repel. If the check succeeds, the spell is repelled; if the check fails, the spell has its full effect. The chance of a chaos magic surge exists regardless of whether the spell is repelled.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can repel one additional spell level for each slot level above 4th.

name: Wind Lash
desc: Your swift gesture creates a solid lash of howling wind. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d8 daño cortante from the shearing wind and is pushed 5 pies away from you.
higher_level: The spell’s damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Wind Tunnel
desc:
You create a swirling tunnel of strong wind extending from yourself in a direction you choose. The tunnel is a line 60 pies long and 10 pies wide. The wind blows from you toward the end of the line, which is stationary once created. A criatura in the line moving with the wind (away from you) adds 10 pies to its Velocidad, and ranged weapon attacks launched with the wind don’t have desventaja because of long range. criaturas in the line moving against the wind (toward you) spend 2 pies of movement for every 1 pie they move, and ranged weapon attacks launched along the line against the wind are made with desventaja.

The wind tunnel immediately disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles, torches, and similar unprotected flames in the line. It causes protected flames, such as those of lanterns, to dance wildly and has a 50 percent chance of extinguishing them.
material: a paper straw

name: Wind Up
desc: You wind your power up like a spring. You gain ventaja on the next ataque cuerpo a cuerpo roll you make before the end of the spell's duration, after which the spell ends.

name: Wind Walk
desc: You and up to ten willing criaturas you can see within range assume a gaseous form for the duration, appearing as wisps of cloud. While in this cloud form, a criatura has a volando Velocidad of 300 pies and has resistance to damage from no mágico weapons. The only actions a criatura can take in this form are the Dash action or to revert to its normal form. Reverting recibe 1 minuto, during which time a criatura is incapacitado and can't move. Until the spell ends, a criatura can revert to cloud form, which also requires the 1-minuto transformation. If a criatura is in cloud form and volando when the effect ends, the criatura descends 60 pies per ronda for 1 minuto until it lands, which it does safely. If it can't land after 1 minuto, the criatura falls the remaining distance.
material: fuego and holy water.

name: Wind Walk
desc:
The objetivos assume a gaseous form and appear as wisps of cloud. Each objetivo has a volando Velocidad of 300 pies and resistance to damage from no mágico weapons, but the only action it can take is the Dash action or to revert to its normal form (a process that recibe 1 minuto during which it is incapacitado and can't move).

Until the spell ends, a objetivo can change again to cloud form (in an identical transformation process).

When the effect ends for a objetivo volando in cloud form, it descends 60 pies each ronda for up to 1 minuto or until it safely lands. If the objetivo can't land after 1 minuto, the criatura falls the rest of the way normally.

name: Wind Wall
desc: A wall of strong wind rises from the ground at a point you choose within range. You can make the wall up to 50 pies long, 15 pies high, and 1 pie thick. You can shape the wall in any way you choose so long as it makes one continuous path along the ground. The wall lasts for the duration. When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. A criatura recibe 3d8 daño contundente en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The strong wind keeps fog, smoke, and other gases at bay. Small or smaller volando criaturas or objects can't pass through the wall. Loose, lightweight materials brought into the wall fly upward. Arrows, bolts, and other ordinary projectiles launched at objetivos behind the wall are deflected upward and automatically miss. (Boulders hurled by giants or siege engines, and similar projectiles, are unaffected.) criaturas in gaseous form can't pass through it.
material: A tiny fan and a feather of exotic origin.

name: Wind Wall
desc:
A wall of strong wind rises from the ground at a point you choose. You can make the wall up to 50 pies long, 15 pies high, and 1 pie thick. You can shape the wall in any way you choose so long as it makes one continuous path along the ground.

When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area makes a tirada de salvación de Fuerza, taking 3d8 daño contundente en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

The wall keeps fog, smoke, and other gases (including criaturas in gaseous form) at bay. Small or smaller volando criaturas or objects can't pass through. Loose, lightweight materials brought into the area fly upward. Arrows, bolts, and other ordinary projectiles launched at objetivos behind the wall are deflected upward and automatically miss (larger projectiles such as boulders and siege engine attacks are unaffected).
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Wind of the Hereafter
desc:
You create a 30-pie-radius sphere of roiling wind that carries the choking stench of death. The sphere is centered on a point you choose within range. The wind blows around corners. When a criatura starts its turn in the sphere, it recibe 8d8 daño necrótico, or half as much damage if it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. criaturas are affected even if they hold their breath or don’t need to breathe.

The sphere moves 10 pies away from you at the start of each of your turns, drifting along the surface of the ground. It is not heavier than air but drifts in a straight line for the duration of the spell, even if that carries it over a cliff or gully. If the sphere meets a wall or other impassable obstacle, it turns to the left or right (select randomly).
material: a vial of air from a tomb

name: Winding Key
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You objetivo a construct, giving it an extra action or move on each of its turns.

name: Winged Spies
desc: This spell summons a swarm of ravens or other birds-or a swarm of bats if cast at night or underground-to serve you as spies. The swarm moves out as you direct, but it won't patrol farther away than the spell's range. Commands must be simple, such as “search the valley to the east for travelers” or “search everywhere for humans on horses.” The GM can judge how clear and effective your instructions are and use that estimation in determining what the spies report. You can recall the spies at any time by whispering into the air, but the spell ends when the swarm returns to you and reports. You must receive the swarm's report before the spell expires, or you gain nothing. The swarm doesn't fight for you; it avoids danger if possible but defends itself if it must. You know if the swarm is destroyed, and the spell ends.

name: Winter's Radiance
desc: When you cast this spell, the perforante rays of a day’s worth of sunlight reflecting off fresh snow blankets the area. A criatura caught in the spell’s area debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or have desventaja on ranged attacks and Sabiduría (Percepción) checks for the duration of the spell. In addition, an affected criatura’s vision is hampered such that foes it objetivos are treated as having three-quarters cover.
material: a piece of polished glass

name: Winterdark
desc:
This spell invokes the deepest part of night on the winter solstice. You objetivo a 40-pie-radius, 60-pie-high cylinder centered on a point within range, which is plunged into darkness and unbearable frío. cada criatura in the area when you cast the spell and at the start of its turn debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1d6 daño de frío and gain one level of agotamiento. criaturas immune to daño de frío are also immune to the agotamiento effect, as are criaturas wearing frío weather gear or otherwise adapted for a frío environment.

As a acción adicional, you can move the center of the effect 20 pies.

name: Wintry Glide
desc:
Upon casting wintry glide, you can travel via ice or snow without crossing the intervening space. If you are adjacent to a mass of ice or snow, you can enter it by expending 5 pies of movement. By expending another 5 pies of movement, you can immediately exit from that mass at any point—within 500 pies—that’s part of the contiguous mass of ice or snow. When you enter the ice or snow, you instantly know the extent of the material within 500 pies. You must have at least 10 pies of movement available when you cast the spell, or it fails.

If the mass of ice or snow is destroyed while you are transiting it, you debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución against your CD de salvación del conjuro to avoid taking 4d6 daño contundente and falling derribado at the midpoint of a line between your entrance point and your intended exit point.

name: Wish
desc:
Wish is the mightiest spell a mortal criatura can cast. By simply speaking aloud, you can alter the very foundations of reality in accord with your desires. The basic use of this spell is to duplicate any other spell of 8th level or lower. You don't need to meet any requirements in that spell, including costly components. The spell simply recibe effect. Alternatively, you can create one of the following effects of your choice: 
- You create one object of up to 25,000 gp in value that isn't a magic item. The object can be no more than 300 pies in any dimension, and it appears in an unoccupied space you can see on the ground. 
- You allow up to twenty criaturas that you can see to regain all puntos de golpe, and you end all effects on them described in the greater restoration spell. 
- You grant up to ten criaturas you can see resistance to a damage type you choose. 
- You grant up to ten criaturas you can see immunity to a single spell or other mágico effect for 8 horas. For instance, you could make yourself and all your companions immune to a lich's life drain attack. 
- You undo a single recent event by forcing a reroll of any roll made within the last ronda (including your last turn). Reality reshapes itself to accommodate the new result. For example, a wish spell could undo an opponent's successful save, a foe's critical hit, or a friend's failed save. You can fuerza the reroll to be made with ventaja or desventaja, and you can choose whether to use the reroll or the original roll. 
You might be able to achieve something beyond the scope of the above examples. State your wish to the DM as precisely as possible. The DM has great latitude in ruling what occurs in such an instance; the greater the wish, the greater the likelihood that something goes wrong. This spell might simply fail, the effect you desire might only be partly achieved, or you might suffer some unforeseen consequence as a result of how you worded the wish. For example, wishing that a villain were dead might propel you forward in time to a period when that villain is no longer alive, effectively removing you from the game. Similarly, wishing for a legendary magic item or artifact might instantly transport you to the presence of the item's current owner. The stress of casting this spell to produce any effect other than duplicating another spell weakens you. After enduring that stress, each time you cast a spell until you finish a descanso largo, you take 1d10 daño necrótico per level of that spell. This damage can't be reduced or prevented in any way. In addition, your Fuerza drops to 3, if it isn't 3 or lower already, for 2d4 days. For each of those days that you spend resting and doing nothing more than ligera activity, your remaining recovery time decreases by 2 days. Finally, there is a 33 percent chance that you are unable to cast wish ever again if you suffer this stress.

name: Wish
desc:
This is the mightiest of mortal magics and alters reality itself.

The safest use of this spell is the duplication of any other spell of 8th-level or lower without needing to meet its requirements (including components).

You may instead choose one of the following:

* One no mágico object of your choice that is worth up to 25, 000 gold and no more than 300 pies in any dimension appears in an unoccupied space you can see on the ground.
* Up to 20 criaturas that you can see to regain all their puntos de golpe, and each is further healed as per the greater restoration spell.
* Up to 10 criaturas that you can see gain resistance to a damage type you choose.
* Up to 10 criaturas you can see gain immunity to a single spell or other mágico effect for 8 horas.
* You fuerza a reroll of any roll made within the last ronda (including your last turn). You can fuerza the reroll to be made with ventaja or desventaja, and you can choose whether to use the reroll or the original roll.

You might be able to achieve something beyond the scope of the above examples. State your wish to the Narrator as precisely as possible, being very careful in your wording. Be aware that the greater the wish, the greater the chance for an unexpected result. This spell might simply fizzle, your desired outcome might only be partly achieved, or you might suffer some unforeseen consequence as a result of how you worded the wish. The Narrator has the final authority in ruling what occurs—and reality is not tampered with lightly.

**_Multiple Wishes:_** The stress of casting this spell to produce any effect other than duplicating another spell weakens you. Until finishing a descanso largo, each time you cast a spell you take 1d10 daño necrótico per level of that spell. This damage can't be reduced or prevented. In addition, your Fuerza drops to 3 for 2d4 days (if it isn't 3 or lower already). For each of those days that you spend resting and doing nothing more than ligera activity, your remaining recovery time decreases by 2 days. Finally, there is a 33% chance that you are unable to cast wish ever again.

name: Withered Sight
desc: You cause the eyes of a criatura you can see within range to lose acuity. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the criatura has desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks and all attack rolls for the duration of the spell. An affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. This spell has no effect on a criatura that is blind or that doesn’t use its eyes to see.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.
material: a dried lizard's eye
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Warlock, Wizard

name: Wolfsong
desc:
You emit a howl that can be heard clearly from 300 pies away outdoors. The howl can convey a message of up to nine words, which can be understood by all dogs and wolves in that area, as well as (if you choose) one specific criatura of any kind that you name when casting the spell.

If you cast the spell indoors and aboveground, the howl can be heard out to 200 pies from you. If you cast the spell underground, the howl can be heard from 100 pies away. A criatura that entiende the message is not compelled to act in a particular way, though the Naturaleza of the message might suggest or even dictate a course of action.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can name another specific recipient for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Word of Misfortune
desc: You hiss a word of Void Speech. Choose una criatura you can see within range. The next time the objetivo makes a tirada de salvación during the spell’s duration, it must roll a d4 and subtract the result from the total of the tirada de salvación. The spell then ends.

name: Word of Recall
desc: You and up to five willing criaturas within 5 pies of you instantly teleport to a previously designated sanctuary. You and any criaturas that teleport with you appear in the nearest unoccupied space to the spot you designated when you prepared your sanctuary (see below). If you cast this spell without first preparing a sanctuary, the spell has no effect. You must designate a sanctuary by casting this spell within a location, such as a temple, dedicated to or strongly linked to your deity. If you attempt to cast the spell in this manner in an area that isn't dedicated to your deity, the spell has no effect.

name: Word of Recall
desc:
The objetivos instantly teleport to a previously designated sanctuary, appearing in the nearest unoccupied space to the spot you designated when you prepared your sanctuary.

You must first designate a sanctuary by casting this spell within a location aligned with your faith, such as a temple dedicated to or strongly linked to your deity.

name: Wormway
desc:
You call a Gargantuan monstrosity from the depths of the world to carry you and your aliados across great distances. When you cast this spell, the nearest purple worm within range is hechizado by you and begins moving toward a point on the ground that you can see. If there are no purple worms within range, the spell fails. The earth rumbles slightly as it approaches and breaks through the surface. Any criaturas within 20 pies of that point debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza or be knocked derribado and pushed 10 pies away from it.

Upon emerging, the purple worm lays down before you and opens its maw. objetivos can climb inside where they are enclosed in an impervious hemispherical dome of fuerza.

Once objetivos are loaded into the purple worm, nothing—not physical objects, energy, or other spell effects —can pass through the barrier, in or out, though objetivos in the sphere can breathe there. The hemisphere is immune to all damage, and criaturas and objects inside can't be damaged by attacks or effects originating from outside, nor can a objetivo inside the hemisphere damage anything outside it.

The atmosphere inside the dome is comfortable and dry regardless of conditions outside it.

The purple worm waits until you give it a mental command to depart, at which point it dives back into the ground and travels, without need for rest or food, as directly as possible while avoiding obstacles to a destination known to you. It travels 150 millas per day.

When the purple worm reaches its destination it surfaces, the dome vanishes, and it disgorges the objetivos in its mouth before diving back into the depths again.

The purple worm remains hechizado by you until it has delivered you to your destination and returned to the depths, or until it is attacked at which point the charm ends, it vomits its objetivos in the nearest unoccupied space as soon as possible, and then retreats to safety.

name: Wotan's Rede
desc: You recite a poem in the Northern tongue, sent to your lips by Wotan himself, to gain supernatural Perspicacia or advice. Your next Inteligencia or Carisma check within 1 minuto is made with ventaja, and you can include twice your competencia bonus. At the GM's discretion, this spell can instead provide a piece of general advice equivalent to an contact other plane.

name: Wresting Wind
desc: By blowing a pinch of confetti from your cupped hand, you create a burst of air that can rip weapons and other items out of the hands of your enemigos. Each enemigo in a 20-pie radius centered on a point you objetivo within range debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or drop anything held in its hands. The objects land 10 pies away from the criaturas that dropped them, in random directions.
material: a handful of paper confetti

name: Write Memory
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You copy your memories, or those learned from the spell read memory, onto an empty memory gear.

name: Writhing Arms
desc:
Your arms become constantly writhing tentacles. You can use your action to make a melee ataque de conjuro against any objetivo within range. The objetivo recibe 1d10 daño necrótico and is agarrado (escape CD is your CD de salvación del conjuro). If the objetivo does not escape your grapple, you can use your action on each subsequent turn to deal 1d10 daño necrótico to the objetivo automatically.

Although you control the tentacles, they make it difficult to manipulate items. You cannot wield weapons or hold objects, including material components, while under the effects of this spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño you deal with your tentacle attack increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Writhing Transformation
desc:
As part of the casting of this spell, you lay down in the coffin on a patch of bare earth and it buries itself. Over the following week, you are incapacitado and do not need air, food, or sleep. Your insides are eaten by worms, but you do not die and your skin remains intact. If you are exhumed during this time, or if the spell is otherwise interrupted, you die.

At the end of the week, the transformation is complete and your true form is permanently changed. Your appearance is unchanged but underneath your skin is a sentient mass of worms. Any criatura that makes a Medicina check against your CD de salvación del conjuro realizes that there is something moving underneath your skin.

Your statistics change in the following ways:

* Your type changes to aberration, and you do not age or require sleep.
* You cannot be healed by normal means, but you can spend an action or acción adicional to consume 2d6 live worms, regaining an equal amount of puntos de golpe by adding them to your body.
* You can sense and telepathically control all worms that have the beast type and are within 60 pies of you.

In addition, you are able to discard your shell of skin and travel as a writhing mass of worms. As an action, you can abandon your skin and pour out onto the ground. In this form you have the statistics of **swarm of insects** with the following exceptions: you keep your puntos de golpe, Sabiduría, Inteligencia, and Carisma scores, and proficiencies. You know but cannot cast spells in this form. You also gain a burrow Velocidad of 10 pies. Any worms touching you instantly join with your swarm, granting you a number of temporary puntos de golpe equal to the number of worms that join with your form (maximum 40 temporary puntos de golpe). These temporary puntos de golpe last until you are no longer in this form.

If you spend an hora in the same space as a dead criatura of your original form's size, you can eat its insides and inhabit its skin in the same way you once inhabited your own. While you are in your swarm form, the most recent skin you inhabited remains intact and you can move back into a previously inhabited skin in 1 minuto. You have ventaja on checks made to impersonate a criatura while wearing its skin.

name: Yellow Sign
desc:
You attempt to afflict a humanoid you can see within range with memories of distant, alien realms and their peculiar inhabitants. The objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be afflicted with a form of long-term madness and be hechizado by you for the duration of the spell or until you or one of your aliados harms it in any way. While hechizado in this way, the criatura regards you as a sacred monarch. If you or an aliado of yours is fighting the criatura, it has ventaja on its tirada de salvación.

A successful [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse) spell ends both effects.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Zone of Truth
desc: You create a mágico zone that guards against Engaño in a 15-pie-radius sphere centered on a point of your choice within range. Until the spell ends, a criatura that enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, a criatura can't speak a deliberate lie while in the radius. You know whether cada criatura succeeds or fails on its tirada de salvación. An affected criatura is aware of the fate and can avoid answering questions she would normally have responded with a lie. Such a criatura can remain evasive in his answers as they remain within the limits of truth.

name: Zone of Truth
desc:
You create a zone that minimizes Engaño. Any criatura that is able to be hechizado can't speak a deliberate lie while in the area.

An affected criatura is aware of the spell and can choose not to speak, or it might be evasive in its communications. A criatura that enters the zone for the first time on its turn or starts its turn there debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 2d4 daño psíquico when it intentionally tries to mislead or occlude important information. Each time the spell damages a criatura, it makes a Engaño check (CD 8 + el daño dealt) or its suffering is obvious. You know whether a criatura succeeds on its tirada de salvación

name: Zymurgic Aura
desc: A wave of putrefaction surges from you, targeting criaturas of your choice within a 30-pie radius around you, speeding the rate of decay in those it touches. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. It recibe 10d6 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida or half as much en una salvación exitosa. Its punto de golpe maximum is reduced by an amount equal to el daño taken. This reduction lasts until the criatura recibe a descanso largo.
